Nehemiah6:18 Gobane go be go na le ba bantsi mo Juda bao ba bego ba mo enela, ka gobane e be e le morwa wa Shegania morwa wa Ara. Morwa wa gagwe John o ile a nyala morwedi wa Momoseleme, morwa wa Beregia." 
Matthew1:1 Lokwalo lwa lotso lwa ga Jesu morwa Dafita, morwa Aborahame." 
Matthew1:2 Aborahame o ne a tsala Isaka; Isaka a tsala Jakobe; Jakobe a tsala Juta le bomorwa-rraagwe. 
Matthew1:3 Juta le Thamare ba tsala Pherese le Sera; Pherese a tsala Heserone; Heserone a tsala Rame; 
Matthew1:4 Rame a tsala Aminatabe; Aminatabe a tsala Nasone; Nasone a tsala Salema; 
Matthew1:5 Salema le Rahabe ba tsala Boase; Boase le Ruthe ba tsala Obete. 
Matthew1:6 Obete a tsala Isai; Isai a tsala kgosi Dafita. 
Matthew1:7 Salomo a tsala Rehabeame; Rehabeame a tsala Abia; Abia a tsala Asa; 
Matthew1:8 Asa a tsala Josafate; Josafate a tsala Jorame; Jorame a tsala Usia; 
Matthew1:9 Usia a tsala Jothame; Jothame a tsala Ahase; Ahase a tsala Hesekia; 
Matthew1:10 Hesekia a tsala Manase; Manase a tsala Amone; Amone a tsala Josia; 
Matthew1:11 Josia a tsala Jegonya le bomorwa-rraagwe ka sebaka sa go hudusediwa kwa Babilone. 
Matthew1:12 E rile morago ga go hudusediwa kwa Babilone, Jegonya a tsala Salathiele; Salathiele a tsala Serubabele;" 
Matthew1:13 Serubabele a tsala Abiute; Abiute a tsala Eliakime; 
Matthew1:14 Eliakime a tsala Asore; Asore a tsala Satoke; Satoke a tsala Agime; Agime a tsala Eliute; 
Matthew1:15 Eliute a tsala Eleasare; Eleasare a tsala Mathane; Mathane a tsala Jakobe; 
Matthew1:16 Jakobe a tsala Josefa, monna wa ga Maria yo o belegeng Jesu yo o bidiwang Keresete." 
Matthew1:17 Jalo he ditshika tsotlhe, go simolola ka Aborahame go tla go fitlha mo go Dafita, ke ditshika di le 14; le go tswa mo go Dafita go tla go fitlha mo sebakeng sa go hudusediwa kwa Babilone ke ditshika di le 14; le go tswa mo sebakeng sa go hudusediwa kwa Babilone go tla go fitlha mo go Keresete ke ditshika di le 14." 
Matthew1:18 Go tsalwa ga Jesu Keresete go ne go le jaana: E rile Maria mmaagwe a sena go beelelwa ke Josefa, ba ise ba kopane, a bonwa a le moimana ka Mowa o o Boitshepo." 
Matthew1:19 Josefa, lekau la gagwe, ka a siame, mme a sa rate go mo tlhabisa ditlhong, a ikaelela go mo tlhanogela mo sephiring." 
Matthew1:20 Ya re a ntse a akanya jalo, moengele wa Morena a bonala fa go ene ka toro a re: “Josefa, morwa Dafita, se boife go tsaya Maria go nna mosadi wa gago; gonne boimana jwa gagwe bo tswa mo Moweng o o Boitshepo." 
Matthew1:21 O tla belega mosimane, mme wena o bitse leina la gagwe Jesu; gonne ke ene yo o tla gololang batho ba gagwe mo dibeng tsa bone.”" 
Matthew1:22 Gotlhe moo go dirafetse gore go dirafale se se builweng ke Morena ka moporofeti a re: 
Matthew1:23 “Bonang, lekgarebe le tla ima, le belega mosimane; mme ba tla bitsa leina la gagwe Imanuele.” Ka phetolo ke go re: “Modimo o na le rona.”" 
Matthew1:24 Ya re Josefa a tsoga mo borokong, a dira ka fa moengele wa Morena a mo laetseng ka teng, a tsaya mosadi wa gagwe;" 
Matthew1:25 mme a se ka a kopana nae ga tsamaya a belega ngwana wa ntlha wa gagwe wa mosimane; a ba a bitsa leina la gagwe Jesu. 
Matthew2:1 E rile Jesu a sena go tsalelwa kwa Betleheme wa Jutea mo malatsing a kgosi Herote, batlhalefi bangwe ba tswa kwa botlhabatsatsi, ba fitlha mo Jerusalema ba re:" 
Matthew2:2 “Kgosi ya Bajuta e e tsetsweng e fa kae? Gonne re bonye naledi ya yona, re le kwa botlhabatsatsi, mme re tsile go mo obamela.”" 
Matthew2:3 Ya re kgosi Herote a utlwa, a tshoga le botlhe ba Jerusalema nae." 
Matthew2:4 A ba a phutha baperesiti ba bagolo botlhe le Baitsedikwalo ba morafe, a tlhotlhomisa mo go bone gore Keresete o tla tsalelwa kae." 
Matthew2:5 Ba mo araba ba re: “Kwa Betleheme wa Jutea; gonne go kwadilwe jalo ke moporofeti ga twe: 
Matthew2:6 “ ‘Wena Betleheme wa lefatshe la Juta; ga o mmotlana ka gope mo magosaneng a Juta; gonne mo go wena go tla tswa molaodi yo o tla disang morafe wa me wa Iseraele.’ ” 
Matthew2:7 Ke fa Herote a biletsa batlhalefi fa thoko, a ba botsa thata ka ga sebaka se naledi e bonetseng ka sona," 
Matthew2:8 a ba a ba romela kwa Betleheme a re: “Yaang lo tlhotlhomise sentle ka ga ngwana; mme e re lo sena go mmona, lo tle go mpolelela, gore le nna ke ye go mo obamela.”" 
Matthew2:9 Ya re ba sena go utlwa kgosi, ba tsamaya; ba akofa ba bona naledi e ba e bonyeng kwa botlhabatsatsi, ya ba etelela pele, ya ba ya fitlha ya ema e okame felo fa ngwana a leng teng." 
Matthew2:10 Ya re ba bona naledi, ba itumela thata ka boitumelo jo bogolo." 
Matthew2:11 Ba feta ba tsena mo ntlong, ba bona ngwana, a na le Maria, mmaagwe. Jaanong ba wela fa fatshe, ba mo obamela, ba be ba phutholola matlotlo a bone, ba mo ntshetsa dineo, e bong gouta le maswalo le mera." 
Matthew2:12 Mme ya re ka ba laetswe ke Modimo ka toro gore ba se ka ba boela kwa go Herote, ba boela kwa lefatsheng la ga bone ka tsela e sele." 
Matthew2:13 E rile ba sena go tloga, moengele wa Morena a bonala fa go Josefa ka toro, a mo raya a re: “Nanoga o tsee ngwana le mmaagwe, o tshabele kwa Egepeto, o be o nne teng go tsamaya ke go itsise; gonne Herote o ikemiseditse go batla ngwana gore a mmolae.”" 
Matthew2:14 Ke fa a tsoga, a tsaya ngwana le mmaagwe bosigo, a tloga a ya kwa Egepeto;" 
Matthew2:15 a nna teng ga tsamaya Herote a swa, gore go dirafale se se builweng ke Morena ka moporofeti a re: “Ke biditse morwaake kwa Egepeto.”" 
Matthew2:16 E rile jaanong Herote a lemoga gore batlhalefi ba mo forile, a gakala thata, a ba a romela batlhanka go bolaya basimanyana botlhe kwa Betleheme le mo tikologong yotlhe ya teng, go simolola ka ba dinyaga tse pedi le bomonnaa-bone, ka fa sebakeng se o se tlhotlhomisitseng mo batlhalefing." 
Matthew2:17 Ka go dira jalo ga dirafala se se builweng ke moporofeti Jeremia a re: 
Matthew2:18 “Lentswe le ne la utlwala kwa Rama, selelo le khutsafalo e kgolo; Ragele a lelela bana ba gagwe, mme a gana go gomodiwa, gonne ga ba tlhole ba le teng.”" 
Matthew2:19 Jaanong ya re Herote a sena go swa, moengele wa Morena a bonala fa go Josefa kwa Egepeto ka toro a re:" 
Matthew2:20 “Tsoga o tsee ngwana le mmaagwe, o boele kwa lefatsheng la Iseraele; gonne ba ba neng ba batla go bolaya ngwana ba sule.”" 
Matthew2:21 A tsoga, a tsaya ngwana le mmaagwe, a boela kwa lefatsheng la Iseraele." 
Matthew2:22 Ya re a utlwa gore Aregelao o busa kwa Jutea mo boemong jwa ga Herote rraagwe, a boifa go ya teng; mme ya re a sena go laelwa ke Modimo ka toro, a fetela kwa lefatsheng la Galelea," 
Matthew2:23 a ba a fitlha a aga mo motseng o o bidiwang Nasaretha; ka go dira jalo ga dirafala se se builweng ke baporofeti ba re: “O tla bidiwa Monasaretha.” 
Matthew3:1 Mehleng yeo Johane Mokolobetsi a tla a bolela lesokeng la Judea. 
Matthew3:1 Mehleng yeo Johane Mokolobetsi a tla a bolela lesokeng la Judea. 
Matthew3:2 A re: Sokologang, gobane mmuso wa magodimo o batametse." 
Matthew3:3 Gobane yo ke yena yo moporofeta Jesaya a boletsego ka yena ge a be a re: Lentsu la yo a goeletsago lesokeng: Lokisa tsela ya Jehofa, lokisa ditsela tsa gagwe." 
Matthew3:4 Johane yoo o be a swere seaparo sa gagwe sa boya bja kamela le lepanta la letlalo lethekeng la gagwe; dijo tsa gagwe e be e le ditsie le todi ya dinose tsa naga. 
Matthew3:5 Ke moka Jerusalema le Judea ka moka le naga ka moka ya go dikologa Noka ya Jorodane ba tswa go yena. 
Matthew3:5 Ke moka Jerusalema le Judea ka moka le naga ka moka ya go dikologa Noka ya Jorodane ba tswa go yena. 
Matthew3:6 Ba kolobetswa ke yena Nokeng ya Jorodane leba ipobola dibe tsa bona. 
Matthew3:7 Eupsa ge a bona Bafarisei le Basadutsei ba bantsi ba etla kolobetsong ya gagwe, a re go bona: Moloko wa dinoga, ke mang yo a le lemositsego gore le tshabe bogale bjo bo tlago?" 
Matthew3:8 Ke moka e tsweletse dienywa tse di swanetsego go sokologa. 
Matthew3:9 Le se ke la nagana go ipotsa gore: “Re na le Aberahame bakeng sa tatago rena, ka gobane ke le botsa gore Modimo o na le matla a go tsosetsa Aberahame bana maswikeng a." 
Matthew3:10 Bjale selepe le sona se beilwe modung wa dihlare; ka baka leo sehlare se sengwe le se sengwe seo se sa enywego dienywa tse dibotse se a rengwa lesa lahlelwa mollong. 
Matthew3:11 Ruri ke le kolobetsa ka meetse a go sokologa; eupsa yo a tlago ka morago ga ka o mpheta ka maatla, yo ke sa swanelegego go rwala dieta tsa gagwe; o tla le kolobetsa ka Moya o Mokgethwa le ka mollo." 
Matthew3:12 Mogopo wa gagwe o swere seatleng sa gagwe, a hlwekise lebato la gagwe ka mo go feletsego, a kgoboketse mabele a gagwe ka lesakeng; eupsa mmoko o tla fisa ka mollo wo o sa timego." 
Matthew3:13 Ke moka Jesu a tloga Galilea a tla Nokeng ya Jorodane go Johane gore a kolobetswe ke yena. 
Matthew3:14 Eupsa Johane a mo thibela, a re: Ke nyaka go kolobetswa ke wena, lena o tla go nna?" 
Matthew3:15 Jesu a mo fetola a re: A go be bjalo bjale, ka gobane ka tsela ye re swanetse go phethagatsa toko ka moka. Ke moka a tlaisega." 
Matthew3:16 Ge Jesu a kolobeditswe, gateetee a rotoga a etswa meetseng; lebona, magodimo a buletswe yena, lea bona Moya wa Modimo o theoga bjalo ka leeba leo ikhutsa godimo ga Yena." 
Matthew3:17 Go kwa lentsu le le tswago legodimong leo le rego: Ye ke Morwa wa ka yo a rategago yo ke mo kgahlago kudu. 
Matthew4:1 Ke moka Jesu a iswa ke Moya leganateng gore a leke diabolo. 
Matthew4:2 Ka morago ga ge a ikona dijo matsatsi a masomenne le masego a masomenne, ka morago ga moo a swerwe ke tlala." 
Matthew4:3 Ge moleki a fihla go yena, a re: Ge e ba o le Morwa wa Modimo, laela gore maswika a a dirwe senkgwa." 
Matthew4:4 Eupsa Yena a araba a re: Go ngwadilwe gwa thwe: Motho a ka se phele ka bogobe fela, eupsa ka lentsu le lengwe le le lengwe leo le tswago ka molomo wa Modimo." 
Matthew4:5 Ka morago ga moo, Diabolo a mo rotosetsa motseng o mokgethwa, a mo dudisa tlhoreng ya tempele." 
Matthew4:6 Leo re go yena: Ge o le Morwa wa Modimo, itahlela fase; gobane go ngwadilwe gwa thwe: O tla laela barongwa ba gagwe ka lena; leswika." 
Matthew4:7 Jesu a re go yena: Go ngwadilwe gape: “O se ke wa leka Morena Modimo wa gago. 
Matthew4:8 Diabolo gape o mo isa thabeng e telele kudu lea mmontsha mebuso ka moka ya lefase le letago la yona; 
Matthew4:9 A re go yena: “Dilo tse ka moka ke tla go fa tsona ge o ka wa fase wa nkhunamela. 
Matthew4:10 Ke moka Jesu a re go yena: Sepela, Sathane, gobane go ngwadilwe gwa thwe: O rapele Morena Modimo wa gago o mo hlankele o nnosi." 
Matthew4:11 Diabolo a mo tlogela, a bona barongwa ba tla ba mo direla." 
Matthew4:12 Jesu ge a ekwa gore Johane o lahletswe kgolegong, a tloga a ya Galilea." 
Matthew4:13 Ge a tloga Natsaretha, a tla a dula Kaperenaume, yeo e lego lebopong la lewatle, mollwaneng wa Sebulone le Nafutali." 
Matthew4:14 Gore seo se boletswego ke moporofeta Jesaya se phethagatswe ka go re. 
Matthew4:15 Naga ya Sebulone le naga ya Naftalime, ka thoko ga lewatle, ka mosola wa Noka ya Jorodane, Galilea ya ditshaba;" 
Matthew4:16 Batho bao ba bego ba dutse leswiswing ba bona seetsa se segolo; lego bao ba dulago tikologong le moriting wa lehu, seetsa se hlatlogile." 
Matthew4:17 Go tloga fao, Jesu a thoma go rera a re: Sokologang, gobane Mmuso wa magodimo o batametse." 
Matthew4:18 Jesu ge a sepela kgauswi le lewatle la Galilea, a bona bana babo ba babedi, Simone yo a bitswago Petere le Andrea ngwanabo, ba lahlela lokwa ka lewatleng, ka gobane e be e le barei ba dihlapi." 
Matthew4:19 LeA re go bona: Ntatele, leke tla le dira barei ba batho." 
Matthew4:20 Gateetee ba tlogela malokwa a bona ba mo latela. 
Matthew4:21 Go tloga moo a bona bana babo ba bangwe ba babedi, e lego Jakobo, morwa wa Tsebedeo, le Johane, ngwanabo, ba le ka sekepeng le tatago bona Tsebedeo, ba lokisa malokwa a bona. A ba bitsa." 
Matthew4:22 Gateetee ba tlogela sekepe le tatago bona ba mo latela. 
Matthew4:23 Jesu a dikologa Galilea ka moka, a ruta disinagogeng tsa bona, a bolela Ebangedi ya Mmuso, a fodisa malwetsi ka moka le malwetsi ka moka gare ga setshaba." 
Matthew4:24 Botumo bja gagwe bja fetela Siria ka moka, ba tlisa balwetsi ka moka bao ba bego ba swerwe ke malwetsi a mehuta ka moka le ditlhokofatso, le bao ba bego ba swerwe ke batemona, le bao ba hlanyago le bao ba golofetsego; leO ile a ba fodisa." 
Matthew4:25 Masaba a magolo a batho a mo latela go tswa Galilea le Dekapoli le Jerusalema le Judea le ka mosola wa Noka ya Jorodane. 
Matthew4:25 Masaba a magolo a batho a mo latela go tswa Galilea le Dekapoli le Jerusalema le Judea le ka mosola wa Noka ya Jorodane. 
Matthew5:1 Lege A bona lesaba, A namela thaba; lege A dutse fase, barutiwa ba gagwe ba tla go Yena." 
Matthew5:2 A bula molomo wa gagwe a ba ruta a re. 
Matthew5:3 Go lehlogonolo badiidi moyeng, gobane Mmuso wa magodimo ke wa bona." 
Matthew5:4 Go lehlogonolo bao ba llago, gobane ba tla homotswa." 
Matthew5:5 Ba lehlogonolo ba boleta, gobane ba tla tsea bohwa bja lefase." 
Matthew5:6 Ba lehlogonolo bao ba swerwego ke tlala le go nyorelwa go loka, gobane ba tla kgora." 
Matthew5:7 Go lehlogonolo ba gaugelago, gobane ba tla gaugela." 
Matthew5:8 Ba lehlogonolo ba dipelo tse di hlwekilego, gobane ba tla bona Modimo." 
Matthew5:9 Go lehlogonolo badira khutso, gobane ba tla bitswa bana ba Modimo." 
Matthew5:10 Ba lehlogonolo bao ba tlaiswago ka baka la toko, gobane Mmuso wa magodimo ke wa bona." 
Matthew5:11 Le lehlogonolo ge batho ba le gobosa le go le tlaisa le go le bolela ka maaka ka mehuta ka moka ya bobe, ka baka la ka." 
Matthew5:12 Thabang le thaba kudu, gobane moputso wa lena ke o mogolo legodimong; gobane ka tsela yeo ba ile ba tlaisa baporofeta bao ba bego ba le pele ga lena." 
Matthew5:13 Le letswai la lefase, eupsa ge e ba letswai le lahlegetswe ke tatso ya lona, le tla tshelwa letswai ka eng? go tloga bjale ga go na mohola lefeela, ge e se go lahlelwa ka ntle le go gatakelwa ka fase ga dinao tsa batho." 
Matthew5:14 O seetsa sa lefase. Motse wo o rapaletsego mmotong o ka se ute. 
Matthew5:15 Le gona motho ga a gote kerese a e bea ka tlase ga kgamelo ya go ela, eupsa a e bea godimo ga lebone; lee hlabisa bohle bao ba lego ka ntlong." 
Matthew5:16 Anke seetsa sa lena se bonege pele ga batho, gore ba bone mediro ya lena e mebotse leba tagafatse Tatago lena yo a lego magodimong." 
Matthew5:17 Le se ke la nagana gore ke tlile go fedisa molao goba baporofeta; Ga se ka tla go senya, eupsa ke tlile go phethagatsa." 
Matthew5:18 Gobane ruri ke re go lena, go fihlela legodimo le lefase di fela, ga go na le ge e le e tee goba lesata le tee leo le tlago go feta molaong go fihlela tsohle di phethagala." 
Matthew5:19 Ka gona yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a robago e nngwe ya ditaelo tse tse dinyenyane lea ruta setshaba ka tsela yeo, o tla bitswa yo monyenyane Mmusong wa magodimo; eupsa mang le mang yo a dirago le go ruta se, o tla bitswa yo mogolo Mmusong wa magodimo." 
Matthew5:20 Gobane ke a le botsa gore ge toko ya lena e sa fete toko ya bamangwalo le ya Bafarisei, le ka mohla le ka se tsene Mmusong wa magodimo." 
Matthew5:21 Le kwele gore go boletswe kgale: O se ke wa bolaya; leyo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a bolayago o kotsing ya go ahlolwa. 
Matthew5:22 Eupsa ke le botsa gore motho le ge e le ofe yo a galefelago ngwanabo ka ntle le lebaka o kotsing ya go ahlolwa; lemang le mang yo a rego go ngwanabo: Raka, o tla ba kotsing go tswa Lekgotleng; eupsa yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a rego: Wena lesilo! e tla ba kotsing ya mollo wa dihele." 
Matthew5:23 Ka gona, ge o ka tlisa mpho ya gago aletareng lemoo o gopola gore ngwaneno o na le se sengwe kgahlanong le wena;" 
Matthew5:24 Tlogela mpho ya gago moo pele ga aletare leo sepele; thoma ka go boelana le ngwaneno, ke moka o tle o nee mpho ya gago." 
Matthew5:25 Etla le lenaba la gago ka pela, ge o le tseleng le yena; gore moganetsi a se ke a go gafela go moahlodi lemoahlodi a go gafela go mohlankedi lewa lahlelwa kgolegong." 
Matthew5:26 Ruri ke re go wena, ruri o ka se tswe moo go fihlela o lefa tefetso e kgolo kudu." 
Matthew5:27 Le kwele gore go be go thwe go tloga mehleng ya bogologolo: O se ke wa otswa. 
Matthew5:28 Eupsa ke le botsa gore yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a lebelelago mosadi gore a mo kganyoge o setse a otswa le yena pelong ya gagwe. 
Matthew5:29 Ge e ba leihlo la gago la le letona le go kgopisa, le gagole o le lahle; gobane go go hola gore setho se tee sa gago se hwe, e sego gore mmele wa gago ka moka o lahlelwe diheleng." 
Matthew5:30 Ge e ba seatla sa gago sa le letona se go kgopisa, se kgaole o se lahle; gobane go go hola gore setho se tee sa gago se hwe, e sego gore mmele wa gago ka moka o lahlelwe diheleng." 
Matthew5:31 Go ile gwa thwe: Mang le mang yo a hlalago mosadi wa gagwe o swanetse go mo nea lengwalo la tlhalo. 
Matthew5:32 Eupsa ke le botsa gore mang le mang yo a hlalago mosadi wa gagwe, ka ntle le ka baka la bootswa, o mo dira bohlotlolo; lemang le mang yo a hladilwego le yena o dira bohlotlolo." 
Matthew5:33 Gape o kwele gore batho ba bogologolo ba be ba re: O ka se ikane, eupsa o swanetse go phethagatsa keno ya gago go Jehofa." 
Matthew5:34 Eupsa ke re go lena: Le se ke la ena le gatee; le ka legodimo; gobane se ke sedulo sa bogosi sa Modimo. 
Matthew5:35 Le gona ka lefase; gobane ke setulo sa gagwe sa dinao; le gona kua Jerusalema; gobane ke motse wa Kgosi e kgolo. 
Matthew5:36 Le gona o se ke wa ena ka hlogo ya gago, ka gobane o ka se kgone go dira moriri o tee o mosweu goba o motsothwa." 
Matthew5:37 Eupsa poledisano ya lena e be: Ee, ee; Aowa, aowa, ka gobane se sengwe le se sengwe seo se fetago seo se tswa bobeng." 
Matthew5:38 Le kwele gore go thwe: Leihlo ka leihlo le leino ka leino. 
Matthew5:39 Eupsa ke le botsa gore ga le ganetse bobe; eupsa mang le mang yo a go itiago lerameng la gago la le letona, a mo retolosetse lerameng le lengwe." 
Matthew5:40 Ge e ba motho a nyaka go go sekisa lea tsee kobo ya gago, le yena a be le kobo ya gago." 
Matthew5:41 Mang le mang yo a go gapeletsago go sepela dikhilomithara tse pedi, sepela le yena tse pedi." 
Matthew5:42 Mo nee yo a go kgopelago, leyo a nyakago go go adima, o se ke wa furalela." 
Matthew5:43 Le kwele gore go thwe: O rate wa geno leo hloye lenaba la gago. 
Matthew5:44 Eupsa nna ke re go lena: Le swanetse go rata manaba a lena, le segofatse bao ba le rogakago, le direle bao ba le hloilego tse botse, le go rapelela bao ba le gobosago le go le tlaisa;" 
Matthew5:45 e le gore le be bana ba Tatago lena yo a lego legodimong, ka gobane o hlabisetsa ba babe le ba ba lokilego letsatsi la gagwe, leo nesetsa ba lokilego le bao ba sa lokago pula." 
Matthew5:46 Gobane ge o rata bao ba go ratago, o na le moputso ofe? na le balekgetho ga ba swane?" 
Matthew5:47 Ge e ba o dumedisa bana beno feela, o dira’ng go feta ba bangwe? na ga se le balekgetho?" 
Matthew5:48 Ka gona, lena yo a phethagetsego, go etsa ge Tatago lena yo a lego magodimong a phethagetse." 
Matthew6:1 Hlokomela gore o se ke wa bontsha dimpho tsa gago tsa dimpho pele ga setshaba gore se bonwe ke bona; go sego bjalo ga le na moputso wo o tswago go Tatago lena yo a lego magodimong. 
Matthew6:2 Ka gona, ge o bontsha dimpho tsa gago, o se ke wa letsa phalafala pele ga gago go etsa ge baikaketsi ba dira disinagogeng le mebileng, gore ba tle ba hlompshe go setshaba. Ruri ke a le botsa gore ba na le moputso wa bona." 
Matthew6:3 Eupsa ge o nea dimpho tsa ditshelete, o se ke wa tsebisa seatla sa gago sa le letshadi seo seatla sa gago sa le letona se se dirago." 
Matthew6:4 E le gore dimpho tsa lena di be ka sephiring; leTatago lena yo a bonago ka sephiring o tla le putsa phatlalatsa. 
Matthew6:5 Ge le rapela, le se ke la swana le baikaketsi, ka gobane ba rata go rapela ba eme disinagogeng le dikhutlong tsa ditarateng, gore ba bonwe ke batho. Ruri ke a le botsa gore ba na le moputso wa bona." 
Matthew6:6 Eupsa wena ge o rapela, tsena ka phaposing ya gago ya ka gare leo notlele mojako wa gago, rapela Tatago yo a lego ka sephiring; leTatago yo a bonago ka sephiring o tla go putsa pepeneneng." 
Matthew6:7 Eupsa ge le rapela, le se ke la dirisa poeletso ya lefeela go etsa ge baheitene ba dira, ka gobane ba nagana gore ba tla kwewa ka baka la mantsu a bona a mantsi." 
Matthew6:8 Ka gona o se ke wa swana le bona, ka gobane Tatago o tseba dilo dife tseo o di hlokago pele o mo kgopela." 
Matthew6:9 Ke moka o rapela: Tatago rena yo a lego magodimong, leina la gago a le kgethagatswe." 
Matthew6:10 Mmuso wa gago a o tle. Anke thato ya gago e dirwe mo lefaseng go etsa ge e dirwa legodimong. 
Matthew6:11 Re fe lehono bogobe bja rena bja ka mehla. 
Matthew6:12 O re lebalele melato ya rena, bjalo ka ge le rena re lebalela bao ba re kolotago." 
Matthew6:13 O se re ise molekong, eupsa re hlakodise go yo mobe, ka gobane mmuso le maatla le letago ke tsa Wena go ya go ile. Amene." 
Matthew6:14 Gobane ge le lebalela batho dikarogo tsa bona, Tatago lena wa legodimong le yena o tla le lebalela." 
Matthew6:15 Eupsa ge e ba le sa lebalele batho dikarogo tsa bona, le Tatago lena a ka se le lebalele dikarogo tsa lena." 
Matthew6:16 Ge o ikona dijo, o se ke wa swana le baikaketsi ba ponagalo e nyamisago; Ruri ke a le botsa gore ba na le moputso wa bona." 
Matthew6:17 Eupsa wena ge o ikona dijo, tlotsa dihlogo tsa gago leo hlape difahlego tsa gago;" 
Matthew6:18 gore le se ke la iponagatsa go batho le ikona dijo, eupsa le iponagatse go Tatago lena yo a lego ka sephiring; leTatago yo a bonago ka sephiring o tla go putsa pepeneneng." 
Matthew6:19 Le se ke la ipolokela matlotlo mo lefaseng moo ditshosane le moruswi di senyago le moo mahodu a thubago lea utswa. 
Matthew6:20 Eupsa ipolokele matlotlo legodimong, moo go se nago ditshosane goba moruswi wo o senyago le moo mahodu a sa thubego goba a utswa;" 
Matthew6:21 Gobane moo letlotlo la gago le lego gona, le pelo ya gago e tla ba gona." 
Matthew6:22 Seetsa sa mmele ke leihlo; ka gona ge e ba leihlo la gago le le se tee, mmele wa gago ka moka o tla tlala seetsa." 
Matthew6:23 Eupsa ge e ba leihlo la gago e le le lebe, mmele wa gago ka moka o tla ba leswiswi. Ge e ba seetsa seo se lego go wena e le leswiswi, gona lefsifsi leo ke le legolo gakaakang!" 
Matthew6:24 Ga go yo a ka hlankelago beng ba babedi, ka gobane o tla hloya yo mongwe lea rata yo mongwe; go sego bjalo o tla swara yo mongwe a nyatsa yo mongwe. O ka se hlankele Modimo le Mamon." 
Matthew6:25 Ka baka leo ke re go lena: Le se ke la tshwenyega ka bophelo bja lena, le gore le tla ja eng le gore le tla nwa eng; le ge e le bakeng sa mmele wa gago wo o swanetsego go o apara. Na bophelo ga bo fete nama le mmele go feta diaparo?" 
Matthew6:26 Lebelelang dinonyana tsa leratadima, gobane ga di bjale e bile ga di bune e bile ga di kgobokane masemong; le ge go le bjalo Tatago wa legodimong o a ba fepa. Na ga o ba kaone kudu?" 
Matthew6:27 Ke mang go lena yo a ka oketsago kubiti e tee go botelele bja gagwe ka go nagana? 
Matthew6:28 leke ka baka la’ng o nagana ka diaparo? Lebelelang dilili tsa naga, kamoo di melago ka gona; ga ba itapise, ga ba dikologe;" 
Matthew6:29 Le ge go le bjalo ke le botsa gore le Solomone letagong la gagwe ka moka ga se a apara bjalo ka yo mongwe wa bona. 
Matthew6:30 Ka fao, ge Modimo a ka apesa bjang bja naga, bjo bo lego lehono le gosasa bo lahlelwa ka ontong, na a ka se le apese kudu, badumedi ba bannyane?" 
Matthew6:31 Ka gona le se ke la nagana la re: Re tla ja eng? goba: Re tla nwa eng? goba: Re tla apeswa ka eng? 
Matthew6:32 (Gobane Baditshaba ba tsoma ka morago ga dilo tse ka moka.) Ka gobane Tatago lena wa legodimong o a tseba gore le hloka dilo tse ka moka. 
Matthew6:33 Eupsa tsoma Mmuso wa Modimo le toko ya gagwe pele; ledilo tse ka moka le tla le okeletswa. 
Matthew6:34 Bjale le se ke la nagana ka gosasa, gobane gosasa go tla nagana ka dilo tsa sona. Bobe bja yona bo lekane go fihla le lehono." 
Matthew7:1 Le se ke la ahlola, gore le se ahlolwe." 
Matthew7:2 Gobane kahlolo ye le ahlolago ka yona, le tla ahlolwa; leka tekanyo yeo o e elago ka yona, e tla le elwa." 
Matthew7:3 Le gona ke ka baka la’ng o bona lesoba leo le lego leihlong la ngwaneno, eupsa o sa nagane ka kota yeo e lego leihlong la gago?" 
Matthew7:4 Goba o tla re bjang go ngwaneno: “E re ke ntshe lesoba leihlong la gago; lebona, go na le mahlare leihlong la gago?" 
Matthew7:5 Wena moikaketsi, thoma ka go lahlela kota yeo e tswago leihlong la gago; leka morago o tla bona gabotse go lahlela molomo leihlong la ngwaneno." 
Matthew7:6 Le se ke la nea dimpsa se sekgethwa, le gona dipheta tsa lena le se ke la lahlela pele ga dikolobe, gore di se ke tsa di gatakela ka tlase ga dinao tsa tsona, tsa di phekgola letsa le gagola diripa." 
Matthew7:7 Kgopela, lele tla fiwa; nyakang, lele tla hwetsa; kokota, leo tla bulelwa." 
Matthew7:8 Gobane yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a kgopelago o a amogela; leyo a tsomago o a hwetsa; leyo a kokotago o tla bulelwa. 
Matthew7:9 Goba ke motho ofe gare ga lena yo a ka mo neago leswika ge morwa wa gagwe a kgopela senkgwa? 
Matthew7:10 Goba ge a ka kgopela hlapi, na o tla mo fa noga?" 
Matthew7:11 Ge e ba lena ba babe le tseba go nea bana ba lena dimpho tse dibotse, gona Tatago lena yo a lego magodimong a tla nea bao ba mo kgopelago dilo tse dibotse gakaakang?" 
Matthew7:12 Ka gona, selo le ge e le sefe seo o nyakago gore batho ba go direle sona, le wena o ba dire, gobane molao le baporofeta ke wona." 
Matthew7:13 Tsena ka kgoro e tshesane, gobane kgoro e nabile le tsela yeo e isago tshenyegong e nabile, lego na le ba bantsi bao ba tsenago ka yona." 
Matthew7:14 Gobane kgoro ye tshesane le tsela ye tshesane ye e isago bophelong, leba e hwetsago ke ba sego kae." 
Matthew7:15 Hlokomelang baporofeta ba maaka bao ba tlago go lena ba apere diaparo tsa dinku, eupsa ka gare e le diphiri tse di tshosago." 
Matthew7:16 Le tla ba tseba ka dienywa tsa bona. Na batho ba kgoboketsa merara meetlweng, goba mago e tswa meutleng?" 
Matthew7:17 Ka mo go swanago sehlare se sengwe le se sengwe se sebotse se enywa dienywa tse dibotse; eupsa sehlare se se bodilego se enywa dienywa tse mpe. 
Matthew7:18 Sehlare se sebotse se ka se enywe dienywa tse mpe, le sehlare se sebe le sona se ka se enywe dienywa tse dibotse." 
Matthew7:19 Sehlare se sengwe le se sengwe seo se sa enywego dienywa tse dibotse se a rengwa lesa lahlelwa mollong. 
Matthew7:20 Ka gona le tla ba tseba ka dienywa tsa bona. 
Matthew7:21 Ga se yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a rego go nna: Morena, Morena, yo a tlago go tsena Mmusong wa magodimo; eupsa ke yo a dirago thato ya Tate yo a lego magodimong." 
Matthew7:22 Ba bantsi ba tla re go nna letsatsing leo: Morena, Morena, na ga se ra porofeta ka leina la gago? le leleka batemona ka leina la gago? lea dira mehlolo e mentsi ka leina la gago?" 
Matthew7:23 Ka morago ke tla ipolela go bona: Ga se nke ka le tseba; tloga go Nna, lena ba ba dirago bokgopo." 
Matthew7:24 Ka gona, yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a kwago mantsu a ka lea a phetha, ke tla mo bapetsa le monna yo bohlale yo a agilego ntlo ya gagwe godimo ga leswika." 
Matthew7:25 Pula ya na, mafula a tla, diphefo tsa foka, tsa betha ntlo yeo; ga se ya wa, ka gobane e theilwe godimo ga leswika." 
Matthew7:26 Motho yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a kwago mantsu a a ka lea sa a phethe o tla bapetswa le monna wa lesilo yo a agilego ntlo ya gagwe lesabasabeng. 
Matthew7:27 Pula ya na, mafula a tla, diphefo tsa foka, tsa betha ntlo yeo; ya wa, lego wa ga yona e be e le mo gogolo." 
Matthew7:28 Ya re ge Jesu a feditse mantsu a, setshaba sa makatswa ke thuto ya gagwe." 
Matthew7:29 Gobane o ile a ba ruta bjalo ka yo a nago le matla a taolo, e sego bjalo ka bamangwalo." 
Matthew8:1 Ge a theoga thabeng, masaba a magolo a mo latela." 
Matthew8:2 Jaanong, molephera a tla lea mo khunamela lea re: Morena, ge o nyaka, O ka ntlhwekisa." 
Matthew8:3 Jesu a otlolla seatla sa gagwe a mo kgwatha a re: Ke a rata; o hlweke legateetee lephera la gagwe la hlwekiswa. 
Matthew8:4 Jesu a re go yena: Bona, ga o botse motho taba ye; eupsa eya, o ipontshe go moperisita, o nee mpho ye Moshe a e laetsego, e le bohlatse go bona." 
Matthew8:5 Ge Jesu a tsena Kaperenama, molaodi wa madira a tla go yena, a mo kgopela." 
Matthew8:6 A re: Morena, mohlanka wa ka o robetse ka gae a babja ke bolwetsi bja go golofala, a tlaiswa kudu." 
Matthew8:7 Jesu a re go yena: Ke tla tla go mo fodisa. 
Matthew8:8 Molaodi wa madira a araba a re: Morena, ga ke swanelwe ke gore O tsene ka fase ga marulelo a ka; eupsa bolela lentsu feela, lemohlanka wa ka o tla fola." 
Matthew8:9 Gobane ke motho yo a lego ka tlase ga taolo leke na le masole ka tlase ga ka; leke re go monna yo: Sepela, leo a ya; le go yo mongwe: Tlang, leo a tla; le go mohlanka wa ka: Dira se, leyena a se dira." 
Matthew8:10 Ge Jesu a ekwa seo, a makala lea re go bao ba bego ba latela: “Ruri ke re go lena: Ga se ka hwetsa tumelo e kgolo gakaakaa gaesita le Isiraeleng." 
Matthew8:11 Ke le botsa gore ba bantsi ba tla tla go tswa bohlabela le bodikela leba dula fase le Aberahame le Isaka le Jakobo Mmusong wa magodimo. 
Matthew8:12 Eupsa bana ba Mmuso ba tla lahlelwa lefsifsing la ka ntle; go tla ba le go lla le go loma meno. 
Matthew8:13 Jesu a re go molaodi wa madira: “Sepela; lebjalo ka ge le dumetse, a le dirwe. Mohlanka wa gagwe a fola ka yona nako yeo." 
Matthew8:14 Ge Jesu a tsena ntlong ya Petere, a bona mmago mosadi wa gagwe a robetse a babja ke letshollo." 
Matthew8:15 A mo kgwatha seatla, letshollo la mo tlogela, a tsoga a ba hlankela." 
Matthew8:16 Ge mantsiboa a fihla, ba tlisa go yena ba bantsi bao ba bego ba swerwe ke batemona; a leleka meoya ka lentsu la gagwe, a fodisa bohle bao ba babjago." 
Matthew8:17 Gore seo se boletswego ke moporofeta Jesaya se phethagatswe, yo a ilego a re: O ile a itseela mafokodi a rena lea rwala mafokodi a rena." 
Matthew8:18 Lege Jesu a bona masaba a magolo go mo dikologa, a laela gore ba ye ka thoko." 
Matthew8:19 Mongwaledi yo mongwe a tla a re go yena: Moruti, ke tla go latela kae le kae mo o yago gona." 
Matthew8:20 Jesu a re go yena: Diphokojwe di na le mekoti, dinonyana tsa leratadima di a dira dihlaga; eupsa Morwa wa motho ga a na mo a ka beago hlogo ya gagwe." 
Matthew8:21 Barutiwa ba gagwe yo mongwe a re go yena: “Morena, ntumelele ke ye go boloka tate pele." 
Matthew8:22 Eupsa Jesu a re go yena: Ntatele; le bahu ba boloka bahu ba bona. 
Matthew8:23 Ge a namela sekepe, barutiwa ba gagwe ba mo latela." 
Matthew8:24 Yaba ledimo le legolo ka lewatleng, moo sekepe sa apeswago ke maphoto, eupsa yena a robetse." 
Matthew8:25 Barutiwa ba gagwe ba tla go yena, ba mo tsosa ba re: Morena, re pholose, re a timela." 
Matthew8:26 A re go bona: Ke ka baka la’ng le boifa, lena ba tumelo e nyenyane? Ke moka a tsoga a kgalema diphefo le lewatle; legwa ba le khutso ye kgolo." 
Matthew8:27 Eupsa banna bao ba makala leba re: Monna yo ke eng, gore le diphefo le lewatle di mo kwa!" 
Matthew8:28 Lege A fihla ka lehlakoreng le lengwe nageng ya Bagergesene, ba babedi ba batemona bao ba bego ba swerwe ke moya ba tla go mo gahlanetsa ba etswa mabitleng, ba sehlogo kudu, mo e lego gore go se be le yo a fetago tseleng yeo." 
Matthew8:29 Lebona, ba goeletsa leba re: Re amana bjang le Wena, Jesu, Morwa wa Modimo? o tla mo go re tlaisa nako pele ga nako?" 
Matthew8:30 Jaanong go be go na le mohlape wa dikolobe tse dintsi tseo di fulago kgole le bona. 
Matthew8:31 Ke moka batemona ba mo kgopela leba re: Ge o re raka ka ntle, re dumelele go tsena mohlapeng wa dikolobe." 
Matthew8:32 A re go bona: Sepela. Ge ba tswile, ba tsena mohlapeng wa dikolobe, lebona mohlape ka moka wa dikolobe o kitima ka bogale go theoga lebotong la lewatle lewa hwelela ka meetseng." 
Matthew8:33 Bao ba bego ba di disa ba tshaba, ba tsena motseng, ba botsa tsohle le seo se diragetsego go bao ba bego ba swerwe ke batemona." 
Matthew8:34 Lebona, motse ka moka wa tswa go yo gahlanetsa Jesu; lege ba mmona, ba mo kgopela gore a tloge nageng ya bona." 
Matthew9:1 A namela seketswana a tshela a fihla motseng wa gabo. 
Matthew9:2 Lebona, ba tlisa go Yena monna yo a golofetsego yo a robetsego malaong; lege Jesu a bona tumelo ya bona, O ile a re go mogole: Morwa, tia sebete; dibe tsa gago di lebaletswe." 
Matthew9:3 Lebona, ba bangwe ba bamangwalo ba re ka pelong: Monna yo o a nyefola." 
Matthew9:4 Jesu a tseba dikgopolo tsa bona lea re: Ke ka baka la’ng le nagana bobe dipelong tsa lena? 
Matthew9:5 Gobane goba go bonolo go re: Le lebaletswe dibe tsa lena? goba go re: Tsoga o sepele? 
Matthew9:6 Eupsa gore le tsebe gore Morwa Motho o na le maatla a go lebalela dibe mo lefaseng, ke moka o re go mogole: Tsoga, tsea malao a gago o ye ntlong ya gago." 
Matthew9:7 A tsoga a ya ntlong ya gagwe. 
Matthew9:8 Eupsa ge lesaba le bona seo, la makala lela tagafatsa Modimo yo a filego setshaba matla a bjalo." 
Matthew9:9 Ge Jesu a tloga fao, a bona monna yo a bitswago Mateo a dutse lefelong la go lefela; leA re go yena: Ntatele. A tsoga a mo latela." 
Matthew9:10 Ge Jesu a be a le tafoleng ka ntlong, balekgetho ba bantsi le badiradibe ba tla ba dula le yena le barutiwa ba gagwe." 
Matthew9:11 Ge Bafarisei ba bona se, ba re go barutiwa ba gagwe: “Ke ka baka la’ng Mong wa gago a eja le balekgetho le badiradibe?" 
Matthew9:12 Jesu ge a ekwa seo, a re go bona: Bao ba phetsego gabotse ga ba nyake ngaka, eupsa ba babja." 
Matthew9:13 Eupsa eya o ithute seo se bolelwago ke se: Ke nyaka kgaugelo e sego sehlabelo, ka gobane ga se ka tla go bitsa baloki, eupsa ke tla go bitsa badiradibe gore ba sokologe." 
Matthew9:14 Ke moka barutiwa ba Johane ba tla go yena ba re: Ke ka baka la’ng rena le Bafarisei re ikona dijo gantsi, eupsa barutiwa ba gago ba sa ikona dijo?" 
Matthew9:15 Jesu a re go bona: Na monyadi a ka lla ge feela monyadi a na le bona? eupsa go tla tla matsatsi ao monyadi a tlago go tloswa go bona, ke moka ba ikona dijo." 
Matthew9:16 Ga go na motho yo a beago lesela le lefsa seaparong sa kgale, ka gobane seo se lahlelwago ka gare gore se tlatswe se tsea seaparo seo, lemegokgo e mpefala." 
Matthew9:17 Le gona batho ga ba tshele beine e mpsha ka gare ga masela a kgale; go sego bjalo mekotla e a thubega, lebeine ya fela, mekotla ya hwelela; eupsa ba tshela beine e mpsha ka matlakaleng a mafsa, lebobedi bja tsona di a bolokwa." 
Matthew9:18 Ge a be a bolela ditaba tse le bona, bona mmusi yo mongwe a tla a mo khunamela a re: Morwedi wa ka o setse a hwile; eupsa etla o bee seatla sa gago godimo ga gagwe, leo tla phela." 
Matthew9:19 Jesu a ema a mo latela, le barutiwa ba gagwe ba dira bjalo." 
Matthew9:20 Mosadi yo a bego a babja ke go elela ga madi ka nywaga e lesomepedi, a rotoga ka morago ga gagwe lea kgwatha molala wa seaparo sa gagwe." 
Matthew9:21 Gobane a ipotsa a re: Ge nka kgona go kgwatha seaparo sa gagwe, ke tla fola." 
Matthew9:22 Eupsa Jesu a retologa, lege a mmona, a re: Morwedi, iketlile; tumelo ya gago e go fodisitse. Mosadi yoo a fola go tloga ka nako yeo." 
Matthew9:23 Jesu ge a tsena ka ntlong ya mmusi, a bona kamoo badiredi le setshaba ba bego ba dira lesata ka gona." 
Matthew9:24 A re go bona: “Tlogelang, gobane lekgoba ga se la hwa, eupsa le robetse. Leba mo sega." 
Matthew9:25 Eupsa ge banna bao ba rometswe, a tsena a mo swara ka seatla, lelekgoba leo la ema." 
Matthew9:26 Botumo bja se bja fihla nageng ka moka. 
Matthew9:27 Lege Jesu a tloga fao, banna ba babedi ba difofu ba mo latela, ba goeletsa ba re: Morwa wa Dafida, re gaugele!" 
Matthew9:28 Lege A tsena ka ntlong, difofu di ile tsa tla go Yena; leJesu a re go bona: Na le a dumela gore nka kgona go dira se? Ba re go Yena: Ee, Morena!" 
Matthew9:29 Ke moka a ba kgoma mahlo a re: A e be ya lena go ya ka tumelo ya lena. 
Matthew9:30 Mahlo a bona a bulega; leJesu a ba fa ditaelo tse di tiilego, a re: Hlokomelang gore go se be le yo a tsebago se." 
Matthew9:31 Eupsa ge ba tloga, ba phatlalatsa botumo bja gagwe nageng yeo ka moka." 
Matthew9:32 Ge ba be ba etswa, ba tlisa semumu se se nago le motemona go yena." 
Matthew9:33 Ge Diabolo a rakwa, semumu sa bolela;" 
Matthew9:34 Eupsa Bafarisei ba re: O raka batemona ka mmusi wa batemona. 
Matthew9:35 Jesu a sepelasepela metseng ka moka le metseng ka moka, a ruta disinagogeng tsa yona, a bolela Ebangedi ya Mmuso, a fodisa malwetsi ka moka le malwetsi ka moka gare ga batho." 
Matthew9:36 Eupsa ge a bona lesaba, a ba kwela bohloko kudu, ka gobane ba ile ba idibala leba gasane bjalo ka dinku tse di se nago modisi." 
Matthew9:37 Ke moka a re go barutiwa ba gagwe: Ruri puno ke e kgolo, eupsa basomi ke ba sego kae;" 
Matthew9:38 Ke moka o rapele Morena wa puno, gore a rome basomi punong ya gagwe." 
Matthew10:1 Ka morago ga ge a biditse barutiwa ba gagwe ba lesomepedi go yena, a ba fa maatla kgahlanong le meoya ye e sa hlwekago, go e raka ka ntle le go fodisa malwetsi ka moka le malwetsi ka moka." 
Matthew10:2 Maina a baapostola ba lesomepedi ke a; Wa pele e be e le Simone yo a bitswago Petere, le Andrea ngwanabo; Jakobo morwa wa Sebedeo le Johane ngwanabo;" 
Matthew10:3 Filipi le Bartolomeo; Thomase le Mateo, molekgetho; Jakobo, morwa wa Alfeo, le Lebaeo, yo sefane sa gagwe e bego e le Thaddeus;" 
Matthew10:4 Simone wa Mokanana le Judase Isikariote, le bona ba mo eka." 
Matthew10:5 Jesu a roma ba lesomepedi ba go tswa, a ba laela, a re: Le se ke la sepela tseleng ya Bantle, le se ke la tsena motseng le ge e le ofe wa Ba Samarea." 
Matthew10:6 Go e na le moo, eya go dinku tse di timetsego tsa ntlo ya Isiraele." 
Matthew10:7 Lege o sepela, rera leo re: Mmuso wa magodimo o batametse." 
Matthew10:8 Fodisa balwetsi, o hlwekise balephera, o tsose bahu, o rake batemona; o amogetse ka bolokologi, neela ka bolokologi." 
Matthew10:9 Le se ke la bea gauta goba silifera goba koporo ka dikhwameng tsa lena. 
Matthew10:10 Le se ke la sesa leeto la gago, le diaparo tse pedi goba dieta goba dithupa tse dingwe, ka gobane mosomi o swanelwa ke dijo tsa gagwe." 
Matthew10:11 Motseng le ge e le ofe goba motseng le ge e le ofe wo o ka tsenago, le hlahlobje gore ke mang yo a swanelegago go wona; leo dule fao go fihlela o tloga fao." 
Matthew10:12 Ge o tsena ka ntlong, e dumedise." 
Matthew10:13 Ge e ba ntlo yeo e e swanelwa ke yona, anke khutso ya gago e be godimo ga yona; eupsa ge e ba e sa swanelege, anke khutso ya lena e boele go lena." 
Matthew10:14 Mang le mang yo a sa go amogelego e bile a sa kwe mantsu a gago, ge o etswa ka ntlong yeo goba motseng woo, o sisinye lerole maotong a gago." 
Matthew10:15 Ruri ke le botsa gore letsatsi la kahlolo le tla kgotlelela naga ya Sodoma le Gomora go feta motse woo. 
Matthew10:16 Bonang, ke le roma bjalo ka dinku gare ga diphiri; ke moka le be bohlale bjalo ka dinoga lele se be kotsi bjalo ka maeba." 
Matthew10:17 Eupsa hlokomelang setshaba, ka gobane ba tla le gafela makgotleng, ba le otla disinagogeng tsa bona;" 
Matthew10:18 Le tla tliswa pele ga babusi le dikgosi ka baka la ka, e le bohlatse kgahlanong le bona le Ditshaba." 
Matthew10:19 Eupsa ge ba go gafela, o se ke wa nagana kamoo o swanetsego go bolela ka gona goba seo o swanetsego go se bolela, gobane ka yona nako yeo o tla fiwa seo o tlago go se bolela." 
Matthew10:20 Gobane ga se lena le bolelago, eupsa ke Moya wa Tatago lena wo o bolelago ka lena." 
Matthew10:21 Ngwanesu o tla gafela ngwanabo lehu, tatago ngwana a gafe; bana ba tla tsogela batswadi ba bona, ba ba bolaya." 
Matthew10:22 Le tla hloiwa ke bohle ka baka la leina la ka; eupsa yo a kgotlelelago go fihla bofelong o tla pholoswa. 
Matthew10:23 Eupsa ge ba le tlaisa motseng wo, tshabeleng go yo mongwe; gobane ruri ke le botsa gore le ka se fete metseng ya Isiraele go fihlela Morwamotho a etla." 
Matthew10:24 Morutiwa ga a fete mong wa gagwe, le mohlanka ga a fete mong wa gagwe." 
Matthew10:25 Go lekane morutiwa gore a swane le mong wa gagwe lemohlanka a swana le mong wa gagwe. Ge ba ka bitsa mong wa ntlo yeo gore ke Beeletsebuba, gona ba tla ba bitsa ba lapa la gagwe gakaakang?" 
Matthew10:26 O se ke wa ba boifa, gobane ga go na selo se se khupeditswego seo se ka se utollwago; lee utilwe, e ka se tsebje." 
Matthew10:27 Se ke le botsago sona leswiswing, le bolela seetseng; leseo le se kwago tsebeng, le se tsebatsa godimo ga dintlo." 
Matthew10:28 Le se boife bao ba bolayago mmele, eupsa ba sa kgone go bolaya moya; eupsa go e na le moo o boife Yena yo a ka senyago moya le mmele diheleng." 
Matthew10:29 Na dithaga tse pedi ga di rekiswe ka peni? lega go le o tee wa bona yo a tlago go wela fase ntle le Tatago lena. 
Matthew10:30 Eupsa meriri ya dihlogo tsa lena e balwa ka moka. 
Matthew10:31 Bjale o se ke wa boifa, o bohlokwa go feta dithaga tse dintsi." 
Matthew10:32 Ka gona yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a tlago go ipolela pele ga batho, le nna ke tla ipolela yena pele ga Tate yo a lego magodimong." 
Matthew10:33 Eupsa mang le mang yo a ntatolago pele ga batho, le nna ke tla mo latola pele ga Tate yo a lego magodimong." 
Matthew10:34 O se ke wa nagana gore ke tlile go romela khutso lefaseng; Ga se ka tla go romela khutso, eupsa ke tlile go romela tshosa." 
Matthew10:35 Gobane ke tlile go bea monna kgahlanong le tatagwe, morwedi kgahlanong le mmagwe, le ngwetsi kgahlanong le mmatswale wa gagwe." 
Matthew10:36 Manaba a motho e tla tswa lapeng la gagwe. 
Matthew10:37 Yo a ratago tate goba mma go mpheta ga a swanelwe ke nna; lemang le mang yo a ratago morwa goba morwedi go mpheta ga a swanelwe ke nna. 
Matthew10:38 Leyo a sa rwalego sefapano sa gagwe lea ntatela ga a swanelwe ke Nna. 
Matthew10:39 Yo a hwetsago bophelo bja gagwe o tla bo lahlegelwa; leyo a lahlegelwago ke bophelo bja gagwe ka baka la Ka o tla bo hwetsa. 
Matthew10:40 Mang le mang yo a le amogelago o a Nkamogela, lemang le mang yo a nkamogelago o amogela yo a nthomilego." 
Matthew10:41 Yo a amogelago moporofeta ka leina la moporofeta o tla amogela moputso wa moporofeta; leyo a amogelago moloki ka leina la moloki o tla amogela moputso wa moloki. 
Matthew10:42 Mang le mang yo a neago yo mongwe wa bana ba banyenyane komiki ya meetse a tonyago feela ka leina la morutiwa, ruri ke a le botsa gore a ka se lahlegelwe ke moputso wa gagwe le gatee." 
Matthew11:1 Jesu ge a feditse go laela barutiwa ba gagwe ba lesomepedi, a tloga moo go yo ruta le go bolela metseng ya bona." 
Matthew11:2 Johane ge a le kgolegong a ekwa mediro ya Keresete, a roma barutiwa ba gagwe ba babedi." 
Matthew11:3 A re go yena: Na ke wena yo a bego a tla tla, goba re nyaka yo mongwe?" 
Matthew11:4 Jesu a fetola a re go bona: Eyang gape le bontshe Johane seo le se kwago le go se bona. 
Matthew11:5 Difofu di a bona ledihlotsa di a sepela, balephera ba a hlwekiswa ledifoa di a kwa, bahu ba a tsoswa lebadiidi ba bolelwa Ebangedi." 
Matthew11:6 Go segofaditswe yo a sa Nkgopisego. 
Matthew11:7 Ge ba tloga, Jesu a thoma go botsa lesaba ka Johane: “Le ile la ya lesokeng go yo bona eng? Lehlaka leo le sisinywago ke phefo?" 
Matthew11:8 Eupsa o tswile go bona eng? Monna yo a aperego diaparo tse boleta? bona, bao ba aparago diaparo tse boleta ba ka dintlong tsa bogosi." 
Matthew11:9 Eupsa o ile wa tswa go yo bona eng? Moporofeta? ee, ke re go lena, le go feta moporofeta." 
Matthew11:10 Gobane yo ke yena yo go ngwadilwego ka yena: “Bona, ke roma motseta wa ka pele ga sefahlego sa gago, yo a tlago go lokisetsa tsela ya gago pele ga gago.”" 
Matthew11:11 Ruri ke re go lena, gare ga bao ba belegwego ke basadi, ga go yo a tsogilego yo mogolo go feta Johane Mokolobetsi; eupsa yo monyenyane Mmusong wa magodimo o mo feta." 
Matthew11:12 Go tloga mehleng ya Johane Mokolobetsi go fihla bjale, Mmuso wa magodimo o hlaselwa ke bosoro, leba soro ba o tsea ka kgapeletso." 
Matthew11:13 Gobane baporofeta ka moka le molao ba be ba porofeta go fihla Johane. 
Matthew11:14 Ge e ba o nyaka go e amogela, ke Eliya yo a bego a tla tla." 
Matthew11:15 Yo a nago le ditsebe tsa go kwa, a a kwe." 
Matthew11:16 Eupsa ke tla bapetsa moloko wo le eng? Go swana le bana bao ba dulago mebarakeng ba bitsa bagwera ba bona," 
Matthew11:17 a re: Re ile ra le bapalela seletso, lega se la bina; re ile ra le llela, le wena ga se la llela." 
Matthew11:18 Ka gobane Johane a tla a se je goba a nwa, leba re: O na le diabolo." 
Matthew11:19 Morwa wa motho o tlile a eja a enwa, leba re: Go na le monna wa go ja le monwi wa beine, mogwera wa balekgetho le badiradibe. Eupsa bohlale bo lokafatswa ke bana ba bjona." 
Matthew11:20 Ke moka a thoma go gobosa metse yeo bontsi bja mediro ya gagwe e matla e dirilwego go yona, ka gobane ga se ba sokologa." 
Matthew11:21 Go madimabe wena Korasin! go madimabe wena Betsaida! gobane ge nkabe mediro ye maatla yeo e dirilwego go wena e dirilwe kua Tiro le Sidone, ba be ba tla sokologa kgale ba apere mokotla le molora." 
Matthew11:22 Eupsa ke re go lena: Tiro le Sidone di tla kgotlelelwa kudu letsatsing la kahlolo go feta lena. 
Matthew11:23 Wena Kaperenaume yo o ilego wa phagamisetswa legodimong, o tla lahlelwa diheleng; gobane ge nkabe mediro ye maatla yeo e dirilwego mo go wena e diregile Sodoma, nkabe e ile ya dula go fihla le lehono." 
Matthew11:24 Eupsa ke le botsa gore letsatsi la kahlolo le tla kgotlelela naga ya Sodoma go feta lena. 
Matthew11:25 Ka nako yeo Jesu a araba a re: Ke a go leboga, Tate, Morena wa legodimo le lefase, ka ge o utile dilo tse go ba bohlale le ba bohlale lewa di utollela bana ba bannyane." 
Matthew11:26 Ka mo go swanago, Tate, ka gobane go be go bonala e le mo gobotse mahlong a gago." 
Matthew11:27 Tsohle di gafetswe go Nna ke Tate, lega go yo a tsebago Morwa ge e se Tate; le gona ga go na motho yo a tsebago Tate ge e se Morwa, le mang le mang yo Morwa a kgethago go iponatsa go yena." 
Matthew11:28 Tlang go Nna, lena ka moka bao le lapilego le bao ba imelwago, leke tla le khutsisa." 
Matthew11:29 Tsea joko ya ka godimo ga gago leo ithute go nna; gobane ke yo boleta e bile ke ikokobeditse pelo, lele tla khutsisa meoya ya lena." 
Matthew11:30 Gobane joko ya ka e bonolo, morwalo wa ka o bofefo." 
Matthew12:1 Ka nako yeo Jesu a phatsa korong ka letsatsi la Sabatha; barutiwa ba gagwe ba swerwe ke tlala, ba thoma go kga le go ja." 
Matthew12:2 Eupsa ge Bafarisei ba bona se, ba re go yena: Bona, barutiwa ba gago ba dira seo se sa dumelelwago go se dira ka letsatsi la Sabatha." 
Matthew12:3 Eupsa yena a re go bona: Na ga se la bala seo Dafida a se dirilego ge a be a swerwe ke tlala le bao ba bego ba na le yena; 
Matthew12:4 O ile a tsena bjang ka ntlong ya Modimo lea ja dinkgwa tsa pontsho tseo a bego a sa dumelelwa go di ja, gaesita le tsa bao ba bego ba na le yena, eupsa tsa baperisita feela?" 
Matthew12:5 Goba na ga se la bala molaong gore baperisita ba tempeleng ka Sabatha ba gobosa Sabatha lega ba na bosodi? 
Matthew12:6 Eupsa ke le botsa gore lefelong le go na le yo a fetago tempele. 
Matthew12:7 Eupsa ge e ba le be le tseba seo se bolelwago, ke nyaka kgaugelo e sego sehlabelo, le be le ka se ahlole bao ba se nago molato." 
Matthew12:8 Gobane Morwa wa Motho le yena ke Morena wa letsatsi la Sabatha. 
Matthew12:9 Ge a tloga fao, a tsena sinagogeng ya bona." 
Matthew12:10 Lebona, go be go na le monna yo seatla sa gagwe se omeletsego. Leba mmotsisa, ba re: Na go dumeletswe go fodisa ka Sabatha? gore ba ka mo latofatsa." 
Matthew12:11 LeA re go bona: Ke monna ofe yo a tlago go ba gare ga lena yo a tlago ba le nku e tee, lege e ka wela ka moleteng ka letsatsi la Sabatha, a ka se e sware lea e ntsha?" 
Matthew12:12 Motho o phala nku gakaakang? Ke ka fao go dumeletswego go dira botse ka matsatsi a Sabatha. 
Matthew12:13 Ke moka a re go monna yoo: Otlolla seatla sa gago. A e otlolla; lee lokisitswe ka mo go feletsego go swana le tse dingwe. 
Matthew12:14 Ke moka Bafarisei ba tswa ba mo eletsa gore ba mo fedise. 
Matthew12:15 Eupsa ge Jesu a tseba se, o ile a gomela morago kua, lemasaba a magolo a mo latela, lea ba fodisa ka moka;" 
Matthew12:16 Ba laela gore ba se ke ba mo tsebisa. 
Matthew12:17 Gore seo se boletswego ke moporofeta Jesaya se phethagatswe ka go re. 
Matthew12:18 Go na le mohlanka wa ka yo ke mo kgethilego; moratiwa wa ka, yo moya wa ka o mo kgahlago; Ke tla bea Moya wa ka godimo ga gagwe, leyena o tla botsa Baditshaba kahlolo." 
Matthew12:19 A ka se ke a ngangisana goba a lla; lega go yo a tlago go kwa lentsu la gagwe ditarateng. 
Matthew12:20 Lehlaka le le pshatlagantswego a ka se ke a le roba, a ka se ke a le tima folaxe yeo e kgogago, go fihlela a romela kahlolo phenyong." 
Matthew12:21 Baditshaba ba tla bota leina la gagwe. 
Matthew12:22 Ke moka monna yo a bego a swerwe ke batemona, sefofu le semumu, a tliswa go yena; leA mo fodisa, mo e lego gore bobedi difofu le dimumu di ile tsa bolela letsa bona." 
Matthew12:23 Setshaba ka moka sa makala, sa re: Na yo ga se morwa wa Dafida?" 
Matthew12:24 Eupsa ge Bafarisei ba ekwa se, ba re: Monna yo ga a rake batemona, eupsa o leleka ka Beeletsebube, mmusi wa batemona." 
Matthew12:25 Jesu a tseba dikgopolo tsa bona lea re go bona: Mmuso wo mongwe le wo mongwe wo o aroganego o a fediswa; lemotse o mongwe le o mongwe goba ntlo e nngwe le e nngwe yeo e aroganego kgahlanong le yona e ka se be gona. 
Matthew12:26 Ge Sathane a raka Sathane, o a arogana; bjale mmuso wa gagwe o tla ba gona bjang?" 
Matthew12:27 Ge e ba ke leleka batemona ka Beeletsebube, bana ba gago ba ba raka ka mang? ka baka leo e tla ba baahlodi ba lena." 
Matthew12:28 Eupsa ge e ba ke leleka batemona ka Moya wa Modimo, gona Mmuso wa Modimo o tlile go lena." 
Matthew12:29 Goba motho a ka tsena bjang ka ntlong ya monna yo matla a thopa dithoto tsa gagwe, ge e ba a sa tlama monna yo matla pele? leka morago o tla senya ntlo ya gagwe." 
Matthew12:30 Yo a sego le nna o lwantshana le nna; leyo a sa kgobokanego le Nna o a phatlalatsa. 
Matthew12:31 Ka gona ke re go lena: Mehuta ka moka ya sebe le thogako e tla lebalelwa batho, eupsa thogako ya Moya o Mokgethwa e ka se lebalelwe." 
Matthew12:32 Mang le mang yo a bolelago lentsu kgahlanong le Morwa wa motho, o tla lebalelwa; eupsa mang le mang yo a bolelago kgahlanong le Moya o Mokgethwa, a ka se lebalelwe lefaseng le goba lefaseng le le tlago." 
Matthew12:33 E ka ba dira gore sehlare se be se sebotse ledienywa tsa sona di be tse botse; goba go sego bjalo o dira gore sehlare se senye le dienywa tsa sona, ka gobane sehlare se tsebja ka dienywa tsa sona." 
Matthew12:34 Moloko wa dinoga, lena ba babe le ka bolela bjang ditaba tse dibotse? gobane molomo o bolela ka bontsi bja pelo." 
Matthew12:35 Motho yo mobotse o ntsha dilo tse dibotse letlotlong le lebotse la pelo, leyo mobe o ntsha dilo tse mpe ka letlotlong le lebe." 
Matthew12:36 Eupsa ke le botsa gore lentsu le lengwe le le lengwe la lefeela leo batho ba le bolelago, ba tla ikarabela ka lona letsatsing la kahlolo." 
Matthew12:37 Gobane ka mantsu a gago o tla lokafatswa, leka mantsu a gago o tla ahlolwa." 
Matthew12:38 Bangwadi ba bangwe le ba Bafarisei ba araba ba re: Moruti, re be re tla bona seka se se tswago go Wena." 
Matthew12:39 Eupsa A araba lea re go bona: Moloko wo mobe le wa bohlotlolo o nyaka seka; a ka se fiwe pontsho ge e se pontsho ya moporofeta Jona. 
Matthew12:40 Gobane bjalo ka ge Jona a feditse matsatsi a mararo le masego a mararo a le ka mpeng ya leruarua; Morwa wa motho o tla dula matsatsi a mararo le masego a mararo pelong ya lefase. 
Matthew12:41 Banna ba Ninife ba tla ema gotee le moloko wo kahlolong, ba o ahlola, ka gobane ba sokologile ge Jona a be a bolela ditaba tse dibotse; lebona, yo ke yo mogolo go feta Jona." 
Matthew12:42 Mohumagadi wa Borwa o tla ema le moloko wo kahlolong lea o ahlola; gobane o tlile a etswa maphekong a lefase go tlo kwa bohlale bja Solomone; lebona, yo ke yo mogolo go feta Solomone." 
Matthew12:43 Ge moya o silafetsego o tswile mothong, o sepela mafelong a omilego lea tsoma khutso lega a hwetse le ge e le efe." 
Matthew12:44 Ke moka a re: Ke tla boela ntlong ya ka moo ke ilego ka tswa gona; lege a etla, o hwetsa e se na selo, e phumotswe e bile e kgabisitswe." 
Matthew12:45 Ke moka a ya a tsea meoya e mengwe e supago e mebe go mo feta, leya tsena leya dula moo; leboemo bja mafelelo bja monna yoo bo mpe go feta bja pele. Go tla ba bjalo le ka moloko wo o kgopo." 
Matthew12:46 Ge a sa bolela le batho, mmagwe le bana babo ba ema ka ntle leba nyaka go bolela le yena." 
Matthew12:47 Ke moka motho yo mongwe a re go yena: Bona mmago le bana beno ba eme ka ntle leba nyaka go bolela le wena. 
Matthew12:48 Eupsa yena a araba a re go yo a mmoditsego se: Mma ke mang? lebana beso ke bomang? 
Matthew12:49 A otlollela letsogo la gagwe go barutiwa ba gagwe a re: Mma le bana beso ke ba! 
Matthew12:50 Gobane mang le mang yo a dirago thato ya Tate yo a lego legodimong, ke ngwaneso le kgaetsedi ya ka le mma." 
Matthew13:1 Ka lona letsatsi leo Jesu a tswa ka ntlong a dula kgauswi le lewatle. 
Matthew13:2 Masaba a magolo a kgobokana go yena, moo a ilego a namela seketswana a dula fase; lesaba ka moka la ema lebopong." 
Matthew13:3 A ba botsa dilo tse dintsi ka diswantsho lea re: Bonang, mobjadi o ile a tswa go yo bjala;" 
Matthew13:4 Ge a bjetse, tse dingwe tsa peu tsa wela ka thoko ga tsela, dinonyana tsa tla tsa e ja." 
Matthew13:5 Tse dingwe di ile tsa wela mafelong a maswika moo di bego di se na mmu o montsi, legateetee tsa hloga, ka gobane di be di se na botebo bja lefase." 
Matthew13:6 Ge letsatsi le hlaba, ba fiswa; leka ge di be di se na modu, di ile tsa pona." 
Matthew13:7 Ba bangwe ba wela gare ga meetlwa; meutlwa ya hloga ya e kgama. 
Matthew13:8 Eupsa tse dingwe tsa wela mobung o mobotse letsa enywa dienywa, e nngwe e be e le makga a lekgolo, e nngwe ka makga a masometshela, e nngwe ka makga a masometharo." 
Matthew13:9 Yo a nago le ditsebe tsa go kwa, a a kwe." 
Matthew13:10 Barutiwa ba tla ba re go yena: Ke ka baka la’ng o bolela le bona ka diswantsho? 
Matthew13:11 A ba araba a re: Ka gobane le filwe go tseba diphiri tsa Mmuso wa magodimo, eupsa bona ga se la fiwa." 
Matthew13:12 Gobane yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a nago le yena o tla fiwa, leo tla ba le tse ntsi; eupsa mang le mang yo a se nago selo, le tse a nago le tsona o tla amogwa go yena." 
Matthew13:13 Ka gona ke bolela le bona ka diswantsho, gobane bao ba bonago ga ba bone; ge ba sa dutse ba e-kwa, ga ba kwe e bile ga ba kwesise." 
Matthew13:14 Leka fao boporofeta bja Jesaya bo phethagaditswe, bjo bo rego: Ka go kwa, le tla kwa lela se kwesise; lege o bona o tla bona wa se bone;" 
Matthew13:15 Gobane dipelo tsa setshaba se di godile, ditsebe tsa sona di sa kwe, di tswaletse mahlo; gore ba ka se tsoge ba bone ka mahlo a bona leba kwa ka ditsebe tsa bona leba kwesisa ka dipelo tsa bona leba sokologa leke be ke tla ba fodisa." 
Matthew13:16 Eupsa mahlo a gago a a segofaditswe, ka gobane a a bona, le ditsebe tsa gago, ka gobane di a kwa." 
Matthew13:17 Ruri ke le botsa gore baporofeta ba bantsi le baloki ba be ba kganyoga go bona seo le se bonago, eupsa ga se ba se bona; le go kwa tse le di kwago lela se di kwe." 
Matthew13:18 Ke moka o kwe seswantsho sa mobjadi. 
Matthew13:19 Ge motho a ekwa lentsu la Mmuso a sa le kwesise, yo kgopo o tla a swara seo se bjetswego pelong ya gagwe. Ke yena a amogetsego peu tseleng." 
Matthew13:20 Eupsa yo a amogetsego peu mafelong a maswika, ke yena yo a kwago lentsu lea le amogela ka lethabo;" 
Matthew13:21 Eupsa ga a na modu ka go yena, eupsa o phegelela ka nakwana, ka gobane ge masetla-pelo goba tlaiso e tlile ka baka la lentsu, gona o a kgopisega." 
Matthew13:22 Yo a amogetsego peu gare ga meetlwa ke yena yo a kwago lentsu; ledipelaelo tsa lefase le le boradia bja mahumo di kgama lentsu, lela ba moopa." 
Matthew13:23 Eupsa yo a amogetsego peu mobung o mobotse ke yena yo a kwago lentsu lea le kwesisa; le tsona di enywago dienywa ledi enywa ga lekgolo, le lengwe ga masometshela, le lengwe ka makga a masometharo." 
Matthew13:24 A ba botsa seswantsho se sengwe lea re: Mmuso wa magodimo o bapetswa le motho yo a bjetsego peu e botse nageng ya gagwe. 
Matthew13:25 Eupsa ge setshaba se robetse, lenaba la lona la tla la bjala mefoka gare ga korong lela tloga." 
Matthew13:26 Eupsa ge legare le hloga lela enywa dienywa, mefoka le yona ya tswelela." 
Matthew13:27 Ke moka bahlanka ba mong wa ntlo ba tla ba re go yena: “Mohlomphegi, na ga se wa bjala peu e botse nageng ya gago? mofoka wo o tswa kae?" 
Matthew13:28 A re go bona: Lenaba le dirile se. Bahlanka ba re go yena: Na o nyaka gore re ye go ba kgoboketsa? 
Matthew13:29 Eupsa yena a re: Aowa! gore ge o dutse o kgoboketsa mefoka, o se ke wa phumola korong ka medu ka yona." 
Matthew13:30 Bobedi bja tsona a di gole gotee go fihla puno; lenakong ya puno ke tla re go babuni: Sa pele le kgoboketse mefoka lele e tleme ka dihlopha gore le e fise; eupsa o kgoboketse korong ka lesakeng la ka. 
Matthew13:31 A ba botsa seswantsho se sengwe lea re: Mmuso wa magodimo o swana le peu ya mosetareta yeo motho a e tserego a e bjala nageng ya gagwe. 
Matthew13:32 Ruri ke ye nnyane go feta dipeu ka moka, eupsa ge e gotse, ke ye kgolo go feta mesunkwane lee fetoga sehlare, mo e lego gore dinonyana tsa leratadima di tla di robala makaleng a yona." 
Matthew13:33 A ba botsa seswantsho se sengwe; Mmuso wa magodimo o swana le komelo yeo mosadi a e tserego a e uta ka gare ga dikelo tse tharo tsa bupi go fihlela e komelo ka moka. 
Matthew13:34 Jesu a botsa lesaba dilo tse ka moka ka diswantsho; lentle le seswantsho Ga se a ka a bolela le bona. 
Matthew13:35 Ka gona seo se boletswego ke moporofeta se phethagatswe ka go re: Ke tla bula molomo wa ka ka diswantsho; Ke tla bolela dilo tseo di bego di bolokilwe e le sephiri go tloga mathomong a lefase. 
Matthew13:36 Ke moka Jesu a roma lesaba lea tsena ka ntlong, barutiwa ba gagwe ba tla go yena ba re: “Re botse seswantsho sa mefoka ya naga.”" 
Matthew13:37 A fetola a re go bona: Yo a bjalago peu ye botse ke Morwa wa Motho; 
Matthew13:38 Tshemo ke lefase; peu e botse ke bana ba mmuso; eupsa mefoka ke bana ba yo mobe; 
Matthew13:39 Lenaba leo ba le bjetsego ke Diabolo; puno ke bofelo bja lefase; babuni ke barongwa. 
Matthew13:40 Ke ka baka leo mefoka e kgoboketswago leya fiswa ka mollo; go tla ba bjalo bofelong bja lefase le. 
Matthew13:41 Morwa wa motho o tla roma barongwa ba gagwe leba kgoboketsa mmusong wa gagwe dilo ka moka tseo di kgopisago le bao ba dirago bokgopo. 
Matthew13:42 A di lahlela ka sebesong sa mollo; 
Matthew13:43 Ke moka baloki ba tla phadima bjalo ka letsatsi Mmusong wa Tatago bona. Yo a nago le ditsebe tsa go kwa, a a kwe." 
Matthew13:44 Le mo, Mmuso wa magodimo o swana le letlotlo leo le utilwego tshemong; yeo, ge mang le mang a e hwetsa, e e utago, leka lethabo e feta godimo ga yona leya rekisa tsohle tseo a nago le tsona, leya reka seripa seo sa naga." 
Matthew13:45 Le mo, Mmuso wa magodimo o swana le morekisi yo a tsomago dipheta tse dibotse." 
Matthew13:46 Ge a hwetsa perela e tee ya theko e kgolo, a ya a rekisa tsohle tseo a bego a na le tsona lea e reka." 
Matthew13:47 Le mo, Mmuso wa magodimo o swana le lokwa leo le lahlilwego ka lewatleng lela kgoboketswa ka mehuta ka moka." 
Matthew13:48 Ge e tletse, ba ya lebopong, ba dula fase, ba kgoboketsa tse botse ka dipitseng, eupsa tse mpe ba lahla." 
Matthew13:49 Go tla ba bjalo bofelong bja lefase, barongwa ba tla tswa ba aroganya ba kgopo gare ga baloki." 
Matthew13:50 A di lahlela ka sebesong sa mollo; 
Matthew13:51 Jesu a re go bona: Na le kwesisitse dilo tse ka moka? Ba re go Yena: Ee, Morena!" 
Matthew13:52 Ke moka a re go bona: Ka gona mongwaledi yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a rutwago Mmuso wa magodimo o swana le monna yo e lego mong wa ntlo, yo a ntshago dilo tse difsa le tsa kgale matlotlong a gagwe." 
Matthew13:53 Jesu ge a feditse diswantsho tse, a tloga fao." 
Matthew13:54 Ge a fihla nageng ya gabo, a ba ruta ka sinagogeng ya bona, mo ba ilego ba makala leba re: Monna yo o tsere kae bohlale bjo le mediro ye e matla?" 
Matthew13:55 Na yo ga se morwa wa mmetli? na mmagwe ga a bitswe Maria? le bana babo, Jakobo le Josese, Simone le Judase?" 
Matthew13:56 Le dikgaetsedi tsa gagwe, na ga di na le rena ka moka? Monna yo o tsere kae dilo tse ka moka?" 
Matthew13:57 Ba kgopiswa ke yena. Eupsa Jesu a re go bona: Moporofeta ga a hlompshe, ge e se nageng ya gabo le ntlong ya gagwe." 
Matthew13:58 Ga se a ka a dira mediro e mentsi e matla moo ka baka la go se dumele ga bona. 
Matthew14:1 Ka nako yeo, Heroda, mmusisi, a kwa ka botumo bja Jesu." 
Matthew14:2 A re go bahlanka ba gagwe: Yo ke Johane Mokolobetsi; o ile a tsoswa bahung; leka fao mediro ye maatla e utollwa go yena. 
Matthew14:3 Gobane Heroda o ile a swara Johane a mo tlema a mo golega ka baka la Herodia mosadi wa Filipi ngwanabo. 
Matthew14:4 Gobane Johane a re go yena: Ga go molaong gore o be le yena. 
Matthew14:5 Ge a be a nyaka go mmolaya, a boifa lesaba, ka gobane ba be ba mo tsea e le moporofeta." 
Matthew14:6 Eupsa ge letsatsi la matswalo la Heroda le ketekwa, morwedi wa Heroda a bina pele ga bona lea kgahlisa Heroda." 
Matthew14:7 Ke moka a mo tshepisa ka keno gore o tla mo fa se sengwe le se sengwe seo a ka se kgopelago. 
Matthew14:8 Leka morago ga ge a rutilwe pele ke mmagwe, a re: Mphe hlogo ya Johane Mokolobetsi ka sekotlelo." 
Matthew14:9 Kgosi ya nyama; eupsa ka baka la keno le bao ba bego ba le tafoleng le yena, a laela gore a fiwe yona." 
Matthew14:10 A roma batho gore ba kgaole Johane hlogo kgolegong. 
Matthew14:11 Hlogo ya gagwe ya tliswa ka sebjaneng, ya newa ngwanenyana, a e tlisetsa mmagwe." 
Matthew14:12 Barutiwa ba gagwe ba tla ba tsea setopo ba se boloka ba ya ba botsa Jesu. 
Matthew14:13 Ge Jesu a ekwa se, a tloga moo ka sekepe a ya lefelong le le se nago batho leo le lego lekatana; ge masaba a ekwa, a mo latela ka maoto go tswa metseng." 
Matthew14:14 LeJesu a tswa a bona lesaba le legolo, lea ba kwela bohloko kudu, lea fodisa balwetsi ba bona." 
Matthew14:15 Ge e setse e le mantsiboa, barutiwa ba gagwe ba tla go yena ba re: Le ke lefelo la lesoka, lenako bjale e fedile; lesa lesaba, gore le ye metseng, le yo ithekela dijo." 
Matthew14:16 Eupsa Jesu a re go bona: Ga go nyakege gore ba tloge; di fe gore di je. 
Matthew14:17 Ba re go yena: Mo re na le dinkgwa tse hlano le dihlapi tse pedi feela. 
Matthew14:18 A re: Ba tlisetse mo go nna. 
Matthew14:19 A laela lesaba gore le dule bjanyeng, a tsea dinkgwa tse hlano le dihlapi tse pedi a lebelela legodimong, a segofatsa, a ngwatha, a nea barutiwa ba gagwe dinkgwa, barutiwa ba di nea lesaba." 
Matthew14:20 Ka moka ga bona ba ja ba kgora, ledikarolwana tse di setsego ba kgoboketsa diroto tse lesomepedi tse di tletsego." 
Matthew14:21 Bao ba bego ba eja e be e le banna ba ka bago dikete tse hlano, ka ntle le basadi le bana." 
Matthew14:22 Gateetee Jesu a gapeletsa barutiwa ba gagwe gore ba namele sekepe ba mo eta pele go ya ka mosola, mola yena a tlosa lesaba." 
Matthew14:23 Leka morago ga ge A rometse lesaba, O ile a beela thabeng go rapela; lege e le mantsiboa, O be a le fao a nnosi." 
Matthew14:24 Eupsa sekepe se be se le gare ga lewatle, se sisinywa ke maphoto, ka gobane phefo e be e le kgahlanong." 
Matthew14:25 Ka nako ya bone, Jesu a ya go bona ge a be a sepela godimo ga lewatle." 
Matthew14:26 Lege barutiwa ba mmona a sepela godimo ga lewatle, ba tshoga leba re: Ke moya; ba goeletsa ka poifo." 
Matthew14:27 Eupsa gateetee Jesu a bolela le bona a re: Tia sebete; ke nna; o se ke wa tshaba," 
Matthew14:28 le Petere a mo araba a re: Morena, ge e le Wena, laela gore ke tle go Wena godimo ga meetse." 
Matthew14:29 A re: Tlang! lege Petere a fologa sekepeng, a sepela godimo ga meetse gore a ye go Jesu." 
Matthew14:30 Eupsa ge a bona phefo e hlasela, a tshoga; lea thoma go nwelela, a goeletsa a re: Morena, mpholose!" 
Matthew14:31 Gateetee Jesu a otlolla seatla sa gagwe a mo swara a re go yena: Wena wa tumelo e nyenyane, ke ka baka la’ng o ile wa belaela?" 
Matthew14:32 Ge ba namela sekepe, phefo ya hwa." 
Matthew14:33 Ke moka bao ba bego ba le ka seketswaneng ba tla ba mo khunamela ba re: Ruri o Morwa wa Modimo. 
Matthew14:34 Ge ba feta, ba fihla nageng ya Genesarete." 
Matthew14:35 Ge banna ba lefelong leo ba mo tseba, ba romela batho nageng ka moka ya go dikologa, ba tlisa bohle bao ba babjago go yena;" 
Matthew14:36 A mo kgopela gore ba kgwathe fela molala wa seaparo sa gagwe, lebohle bao ba bego ba se kgwatha ba fodile ka mo go feletsego." 
Matthew15:1 Bamangwalo le Bafarisei bao ba bego ba etswa Jerusalema ba tla go Jesu ba re. 
Matthew15:2 Ke ka baka la’ng barutiwa ba gago ba roba setso sa bagolo? gobane ba be ba sa hlapa diatla ge ba eja bogobe. 
Matthew15:3 Eupsa yena a ba araba a re: Ke ka baka la’ng le lena le tshela taelo ya Modimo ka setso sa lena? 
Matthew15:4 Gobane Modimo o laetse lea re: Hlompha tatago le mmago, gomme: Mang le mang yo a rogakago tatago goba mmago, a a hwe." 
Matthew15:5 Eupsa wena o re: Mang le mang yo a rego tatagwe goba mmagwe: Ye ke mpho, ka tsohle o ka holega go nna;" 
Matthew15:6 O se ke wa hlompha tatagwe goba mmagwe, o tla lokologa. Ka tsela yeo le dirile gore taelo ya Modimo e se be le maatla ka setso sa lena." 
Matthew15:7 Baikaketsi, Jesaya o porofetile gabotse ka lena ka go re." 
Matthew15:8 Setshaba se se Ntamela ka molomo wa sona lese nkgodisa ka melomo ya sona; eupsa dipelo tsa bona di kgole le nna. 
Matthew15:9 Eupsa ba Nkhunamela ka lefeela ka go ruta dithuto tseo e lego ditaelo tsa batho. 
Matthew15:10 A bitsa lesaba, a re go lona: Kwang le kwesise!" 
Matthew15:11 Ga se seo se tsenago ka ganong seo se dirago gore motho a se hlweke; eupsa seo se tswago molomong se silafatsa motho. 
Matthew15:12 Barutiwa ba gagwe ba tla go yena ba re: Na o a tseba gore Bafarisei ba be ba kgopisegile ka morago ga ge ba kwele lentsu le? 
Matthew15:13 Eupsa yena a araba a re: Sebjalo se sengwe le se sengwe seo Tate wa legodimong a sa kago a se bjala se tla tumolwa ka medu. 
Matthew15:14 A ba eme, ke baetapele ba difofu ba difofu. Lege sefofu se eta pele sefofu, bobedi bja bona ba tla wela ka moleteng." 
Matthew15:15 Ke moka Petere a mo fetola a re: Re hlalosetse seswantsho se. 
Matthew15:16 Jesu a re: Na le lena le sa hloka kwesiso? 
Matthew15:17 Na ga se la hlwa le kwesisa gore se sengwe le se sengwe seo se tsenago ka molomo se tsena ka mpeng lesa lahlelwa ka ntle ka kgokgotheng? 
Matthew15:18 Eupsa dilo tseo di tswago molomong di tswa pelong; ba dira gore motho a se hlweke. 
Matthew15:19 Gobane go tswa pelong go tswa dikgopolo tse mpe, dipolao, dihlotlolo, bootswa, bohodu, bohlatse bja maaka, le thogako." 
Matthew15:20 Tse ke dilo tseo di silafatsago motho, eupsa go ja ka diatla tse di sa hlapiswago ga go silafatse." 
Matthew15:21 Ke moka Jesu a tloga moo a ya dileteng tsa Tiro le Sidone. 
Matthew15:22 Lebona, mosadi wa Mokanana a tla go tswa seleteng sona lea mmitsa lea re: Nkgaugele, Morena, Morwa wa Dafida! morwedi wa ka o tlaiswa gampe ke diabolo." 
Matthew15:23 Eupsa ga se a ka a mo araba le lentsu le tee. Barutiwa ba gagwe ba tla ba mo lopa, ba re: Mo romele; gobane o a re bitsa ka morago ga rena." 
Matthew15:24 Eupsa yena a araba a re: Ga se ka romelwa, ge e se go dinku tse di timetsego tsa ntlo ya Isiraele." 
Matthew15:25 Ke moka a tla a mo khunamela a re: Morena, nthuse!" 
Matthew15:26 Eupsa yena a araba a re: Ga go loke go tsea senkgwa sa bana lewa se lahlela dimpsa. 
Matthew15:27 Lea re: Ruri, Morena, dimpsa di ja makwapi ao a wago tafoleng ya beng ba tsona." 
Matthew15:28 Jesu a mo fetola a re: Mosadi, tumelo ya gago ke ye kgolo; a e be go wena ka mo o ratago. Morwedi wa gagwe a fola go tloga ka yona nako yeo." 
Matthew15:29 Jesu a tloga moo a batamela lewatle la Galilea. Lea namela thaba lea dula fase fao. 
Matthew15:30 Lemasaba a magolo a tla go Yena, lea na le digole, difofu, dimumu, digole, le ba bangwe ba bantsi, leba itahlela fase maotong a Jesu; leO ba fodisitse:" 
Matthew15:31 Ka gona lesaba la makala ge le bona gore dimumu di a bolela, digole di fodiswa, digole di sepela le difofu di bona; ba tumisa Modimo wa Isiraele." 
Matthew15:32 Jesu a bitsa barutiwa ba gagwe go yena, a re: Ke kwela lesaba bohloko, ka gobane le setse le na le matsatsi a mararo a dula le nna lega ba na selo sa go ja; mme nka se ba dumelele go ikona dijo, gore ba se ke ba lapa tseleng." 
Matthew15:33 Barutiwa ba gagwe ba re go yena: “Re be re tla hwetsa kae dijo tse dintsi gakaakaa leganateng gore re kgotsofatse lesaba le legolo gakaakaa? 
Matthew15:34 Jesu a re go bona: Le na le dinkgwa tse kae? leba re: Dihlapi tse supago le tse mmalwa. 
Matthew15:35 LeA laela lesaba go dula fase fase. 
Matthew15:36 A tsea dinkgwa tse supago le dihlapi, a leboga, a di ngwatha, a di fa barutiwa ba gagwe le barutiwa go lesaba." 
Matthew15:37 Ka moka ga bona ba ja ba kgora, leka dijo tse di robegilego tse di setsego, ba tlatsa diroto tse supago." 
Matthew15:38 Bao ba bego ba jele e be e le banna ba dikete tse nne, ka ntle le basadi le bana." 
Matthew15:39 Ke moka a roma lesaba lea namela sekepe lea fihla seleteng sa Magdala. 
Matthew16:1 Bafarisei le bona ba tla le Basadutsei leba mo kgopela gore a ba bontshe pontsho e tswago legodimong. 
Matthew16:2 A ba fetola a re go bona: Ge e setse e le mantsiboa, le re: E tla ba boemo bjo bobotse bja leratadima, ka gobane leratadima le khubedu." 
Matthew16:3 Mesong go tla ba boso bjo bobe lehono, ka gobane leratadima le khubedu e bile le lefsifsi. Lena baikaketsi, le kgona go lemoga sefahlego sa legodimo; eupsa na o ka se kgone go lemoga dipontsho tsa mehla?" 
Matthew16:4 Moloko o kgopo le wa dihlotlolo o tsoma pontsho; a ka se fiwe pontsho ge e se pontsho ya moporofeta Jona. A ba tlogela a tloga. 
Matthew16:5 Ge barutiwa ba gagwe ba fihla ka mosola, ba lebala go tsea senkgwa." 
Matthew16:6 Ke moka Jesu a re go bona: Hlokomelang, le hlokomele komelo ya Bafarisei le ya Basadutsei." 
Matthew16:7 Ba boledisana ba re: Ke ka gobane ga se ra tsea senkgwa. 
Matthew16:8 Jesu ge a bona se, a re go bona: Badumedi ba bannyane, ke ka lebaka la eng le ngangisana ka ge le se la tlisa bogobe?" 
Matthew16:9 Na ga se la hlwa le kwesisa e bile ga le nagane ka dinkgwa tse hlano tsa ba dikete tse hlano le diroto tse kae tseo o di kgobokeditsego? 
Matthew16:10 Le gona le tsere dinkgwa tse supago tsa ba dikete tse nne, le diroto tse kae?" 
Matthew16:11 Go tlile bjang gore le sa kwesise gore ga se ka le botsa taba ye ka senkgwa, gore le hlokomele komelo ya Bafarisei le ya Basadutsei?" 
Matthew16:12 Ke moka ba kwesisa gore o ba laetse gore ba se ke ba hlokomela komelo ya dinkgwa, eupsa ba hlokomele thuto ya Bafarisei le Basadutsei." 
Matthew16:13 Ge Jesu a fihla seleteng sa Kesarea-Filipi, a botsisa barutiwa ba gagwe a re: Batho ba re ke nna Morwa wa motho?" 
Matthew16:14 Leba re: Ba bangwe ba re o Johane Mokolobetsi; le ba bangwe, Jeremia, goba yo mongwe wa baporofeta." 
Matthew16:15 A re go bona: Eupsa lena, le re ke nna mang?" 
Matthew16:16 Simone Petere a fetola a re: O Keresete, Morwa wa Modimo yo a phelago." 
Matthew16:17 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “O segofaditswe, Simone Barjona, ka gobane nama le madi ga se tsa go utollela se, eupsa Tate yo a lego magodimong." 
Matthew16:18 Legape ke go botsa gore o Petere, legodimo ga leswika le ke tla aga kereke ya ka; dikgoro tsa Hadese di ka se ke tsa e fenya." 
Matthew16:19 Ke tla go fa dinotlelo tsa Mmuso wa magodimo, leselo le ge e le sefe seo o ka se tlemago mo lefaseng se tla tlemiwa legodimong; leselo le ge e le sefe seo o ka se phatlalatsago mo lefaseng se tla phatlalatswa legodimong." 
Matthew16:20 Ke moka a laela barutiwa ba gagwe gore ba se botse motho gore ke Jesu Keresete. 
Matthew16:21 Go tloga ka nako yeo Jesu a thoma go bontsha barutiwa ba gagwe kamoo a swanetsego go ya Jerusalema lea tlaisega kudu ke bagolo le baperisita ba bagolo le bamangwalo, lea bolawe a tsoswa ka letsatsi la boraro." 
Matthew16:22 Ke moka Petere a mo tsea lea thoma go mo kgalema, a re: A go be kgole le wena, Morena, go ka se go diragalele." 
Matthew16:23 Eupsa a retologa a re go Petere: “Tloga ka morago ga ka, Sathane!" 
Matthew16:24 Jesu a re go barutiwa ba gagwe: Ge motho a rata go ntatela, a a itatole, a rwale sefapano sa gagwe a ntatele." 
Matthew16:25 Gobane mang le mang yo a nyakago go pholosa bophelo bja gagwe o tla bo lahlegelwa; leyo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a lahlegelwago ke bophelo bja gagwe ka baka la Ka o tla bo hwetsa. 
Matthew16:26 Gobane motho o hola’ng ge a ka hwetsa lefase ka moka lea lahlegelwa ke moya wa gagwe? goba motho o tla neela eng bakeng sa moya wa gagwe? 
Matthew16:27 Gobane Morwa wa motho o tla tla ka letago la Tatagwe le barongwa ba gagwe; ke moka o tla putsa yo mongwe le yo mongwe go ya ka mediro ya gagwe. 
Matthew16:28 Ruri ke le botsa gore go na le ba bangwe bao ba emego mo bao ba ka se kego ba latswa lehu go fihlela ba bona Morwa wa Motho a etla Mmusong wa gagwe. 
Matthew17:1 Ka morago ga matsatsi a tshelelago Jesu a tsea Petere, Jakobo le Johane ngwanabo, a ba tlisa ka thoko thabeng e telele." 
Matthew17:2 A fetoswa sebopego pele ga bona, sefahlego sa gagwe sa phadima bjalo ka letsatsi, diaparo tsa gagwe tsa tshweu bjalo ka seetsa." 
Matthew17:3 Ba bona Moshe le Eliya ba boledisana le yena. 
Matthew17:4 Ke moka Petere a fetola Jesu a re: Morena, ke mo gobotse ge re le mo; ge O rata, a re direng dikhukhu tse tharo mo; e tee ya gago, e nngwe ya Moshe, e nngwe ya Eliya." 
Matthew17:5 Ge a sa bolela, bona, leru le le phadimago la ba apesa, legwa kwagala lentsu le le tswago lerung la re: Yo ke Morwa wa ka yo a rategago yo ke mo kgahlago kudu; mo kwe." 
Matthew17:6 Ge barutiwa ba ekwa se, ba wela fase ka difahlego, ba tshoga kudu." 
Matthew17:7 Jesu a tla, a ba kgwatha, a re: Ema, le se ke la boifa." 
Matthew17:8 Ge ba emisitse mahlo, ga se ba bona motho ge e se Jesu a nnosi." 
Matthew17:9 Ge ba theoga thabeng, Jesu a ba laela a re: Le se ke la botsa motho pono yeo go fihlela Morwamotho a tsoga bahung." 
Matthew17:10 Barutiwa ba gagwe ba mmotsisa ba re: “Bjale ke ka baka la’ng bamangwalo ba re Eliya o swanetse go tla pele? 
Matthew17:11 Jesu a ba araba a re: Eliya o tla tla pele, a tsosolosa tsohle." 
Matthew17:12 Eupsa ke le botsa gore Eliya o setse a tlile, leba be ba sa mo tsebe, eupsa ba mo dirile seo ba bego ba se nyaka. Ka mokgwa woo Morwa wa motho o tla tlaisega gare ga bona." 
Matthew17:13 Ke moka barutiwa ba kwesisa gore o boletse le bona ka Johane Mokolobetsi. 
Matthew17:14 Ge ba fihla lesabeng, monna yo mongwe a tla go yena yo a ilego a khunama pele ga gagwe a re." 
Matthew17:15 Morena, gaugele morwa wa ka, ka gobane o hlanya e bile o galefile kudu, ka gobane gantsi o wela mollong legantsi o wela ka meetseng." 
Matthew17:16 Ka mo tlisa go barutiwa ba gago leba palelwa ke go mo fodisa. 
Matthew17:17 Jesu a araba a re: Wena moloko o sa dumelego le o kgopamego, ke tla ba le lena go fihla neng? ke tla kgotlelela go fihla neng go mo tlisa mo go nna." 
Matthew17:18 Jesu a kgalema Diabolo; a tloga go yena, lengwana a fola go tloga ka yona nako yeo." 
Matthew17:19 Ke moka barutiwa ba tla go Jesu ka thoko, ba re: Ke ka baka la’ng re sa kgone go mo raka?" 
Matthew17:20 Jesu a re go bona: Ka go se dumele ga lena; ka gobane ruri ke re go lena, ge le na le tumelo bjalo ka peu ya mosetareta, le tla re go thaba ye: Eya mo lefelong leo; lee tla tloswa; lega go selo seo se tlago go se kgonege go wena." 
Matthew17:21 Eupsa mohuta wo ga o tswe ka thapelo le go ikona dijo. 
Matthew17:22 Ge ba sa dutse Galilea, Jesu a re go bona: Morwamotho o tla gafelwa diatleng tsa batho." 
Matthew17:23 Ba tla mmolaya, leka letsatsi la boraro o tla tsoswa. Leba be ba itshola kudu." 
Matthew17:24 Ge ba fihla Kaperenaume, bao ba amogelago tshelete ya motshelo ba tla go Petere ba re: Na mong wa gago ga a lefe motshelo?" 
Matthew17:25 O re: Ee. Ge a tsena ka ntlong, Jesu a itlhagisa a re: Simone, o nagana eng? dikgosi tsa lefase di tsea lekgetho goba metshelo go bomang? ba bana ba bona, goba ba basele?" 
Matthew17:26 Petere a re go yena: Go tswa go basele. Jesu a re go yena: Ke moka bana ba lokologile. 
Matthew17:27 Eupsa e le gore re se ke ra ba kgopisa, eya lewatleng o lahlele sekgoketsane leo tsee dihlapi tse di rotogago pele; ge o ka bula molomo wa gagwe, o tla hwetsa seripa sa tshelete; tsea o ba nee ka baka la ka le wena." 
Matthew18:1 Ka yona nako yeo barutiwa ba tla go Jesu ba re: Ke mang yo mogolo Mmusong wa magodimo? 
Matthew18:2 Jesu a bitsa ngwana yo monnyane go yena, a mo dudisa gare ga bona." 
Matthew18:3 A re: Ruri ke re go lena, ge le sa sokologe lela swana le bana ba bannyane, le ka se tsene Mmusong wa magodimo." 
Matthew18:4 Mang le mang yo a ikokobetsago bjalo ka ngwana yo, ke yena yo mogolo Mmusong wa magodimo." 
Matthew18:5 Yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a amogelago ngwana yo bjalo ka leina la ka o a nkamogela. 
Matthew18:6 Eupsa mang le mang yo a kgopisago yo mongwe wa bana ba ba banyenyane ba ba dumelago go Nna, go be go ka ba kaone go yena ge a ka fegwa lefsika la tshilo molaleng wa gagwe le gore a nwele ka gare ga botebo bja lewatle." 
Matthew18:7 Go madimabe lefase ka baka la dikarogo! gobane go swanetse go ba mo go kgonthiseditswego gore dikarogo di tla; eupsa go madimabe monna yoo molato o tlago ka yena! 
Matthew18:8 Ka gona, ge seatla sa gago goba leoto la gago le go kgopisa, di kgaole o di lahlele kgole le wena; go kaone gore o tsene bophelong o golofetse goba o golofetse go e na le go ba le diatla tse pedi goba maoto a mabedi gore o lahlelwe mollong wo o sa felego." 
Matthew18:9 Ge e ba leihlo la gago le go kgopisa, le gagole o le lahlele kgole le wena; go kaone gore o tsene bophelong ka leihlo le tee, go e na le go ba le mahlo a mabedi gore o lahlelwe mollong wa dihele." 
Matthew18:10 Hlokomela gore o se ke wa nyatsa yo mongwe wa bana ba ba banyenyane; gobane ke le botsa gore barongwa ba bona ba legodimong ba dula ba bona sefahlego sa Tate yo a lego magodimong. 
Matthew18:11 Gobane Morwa wa motho o tlile go pholosa se se timetsego. 
Matthew18:12 O nagana’ng? Ge motho a na le dinku tse lekgolo, lee tee ya tsona e timetse, na a ka se tlogele tse masomesenyane-senyane, a ya dithabeng a yo nyaka yeo e timetsego?" 
Matthew18:13 Ge a e hwetsa, ruri ke a le botsa gore o thaba kudu ka dinku tseo go feta tse masomesenyane-senyane tseo di sa arogago." 
Matthew18:14 Ka gona ga se thato ya Tatago lena legodimong gore yo mongwe wa bana ba banyenyane a hwe. 
Matthew18:15 Ge e ba ngwaneno a go tshela, eya o mmotse molato wa gagwe magareng ga gago le yena o nnosi; ge a go theeletsa, o thopile ngwaneno." 
Matthew18:16 Eupsa ge e ba a sa go theetse, gona tsea o tee goba tse pedi tse dingwe le wena, e le gore molomong wa dihlatse tse pedi goba tse tharo lentsu le lengwe le le lengwe le tiiswe." 
Matthew18:17 Ge e ba a hlokomologa go ba theetsa, o botse phuthego; eupsa ge e ba a theetsa phuthego, a go lena a be bjalo ka moheitene le molekgetho." 
Matthew18:18 Ruri ke le botsa gore se sengwe le se sengwe seo le ka se tlemago mo lefaseng se tla tlemiwa legodimong; lese sengwe le se sengwe seo o se phatlalatsago mo lefaseng se tla tswalela legodimong. 
Matthew18:19 Gape ke le botsa gore ge ba babedi ba lena le dumelelana mo lefaseng ka selo le ge e le sefe seo ba tlago go se kgopela, se tla ba direla sona ke Tate yo a lego magodimong." 
Matthew18:20 Gobane moo ba babedi goba ba bararo ba kgobokanego ka leina la ka, ke moo ke lego gare ga bona." 
Matthew18:21 Ke moka Petere a tla go yena a re: Morena, ngwaneso o tla ntseela ga kae leke mo lebalela? go fihla ka makga a supago?" 
Matthew18:22 Jesu a re go yena: Ga ke re go wena: E sego go fihla gasupa, eupsa go fihla ga masomesupa gasupa." 
Matthew18:23 Ke ka baka leo mmuso wa magodimo o bapetswago le kgosi e itsego, yeo e bego e tla ikarabela le bahlanka ba yona." 
Matthew18:24 Ge a thoma go dula, a tliswa yo mongwe yo a bego a mo kolota ditalente tse dikete tse lesome." 
Matthew18:25 Eupsa ka ge a be a sa swanela go lefa, mong wa gagwe o ile a laela gore a rekiswe le mosadi wa gagwe le bana le tsohle tseo a nago le tsona, letefo e lefelwe." 
Matthew18:26 Ke moka mohlanka a wela fase a mo khunamela a re: Morena, nkgotlelela leke tla go lefa tsohle." 
Matthew18:27 Mong wa mohlanka yoo a itshola kudu, a mo lokolla, a mo lebalela molato." 
Matthew18:28 Eupsa mohlanka yoo a tswa a hwetsa yo mongwe wa bahlanka-gotee le yena yo a bego a mo kolota dipente tse lekgolo; lea bea diatla tsa gagwe godimo ga gagwe lea mo swara ka kgokgokgo lea re: Ntefele seo o se kolotago. 
Matthew18:29 Mohlanka-gotee le yena a wela fase maotong a gagwe a mo kgopela, a re: Nkgotlelela leke tla go lefa tsohle." 
Matthew18:30 A gana, a ya a mo lahlela kgolegong go fihlela a lefa sekoloto." 
Matthew18:31 Ge bahlanka-gotee le yena ba bona seo se diregilego, ba nyama kudu leba tla ba botsa mong wa bona tsohle tseo di diregilego."
