Mark6:2 Ge letsatsi la Sabatha le fihla, a thoma go ruta ka sinagogeng; ba bantsi bao ba mo kwelego ba makala, ba re: “Motho yo o tswa kae dilo tse?” ke bohlale bofe bjo a bo filwego, gore le mediro e bjalo e matla e phethwa ka diatla tsa gagwe?" 
Mark6:3 Na ga se mmetli, morwa wa Maria, ngwanabo Jakobo le Josese le wa Juda le Simone? le dikgaetsedi tsa gagwe ga di na le rena mo? Ba mo kgopisega." 
Mark6:4 Eupsa Jesu a re go bona: “Moporofeta ga a nyatsege, eupsa ga a nyatsege nageng ya gabo le gare ga lapa la gagwe le lapeng la gagwe." 
Mark6:5 Ga se a ka a kgona go dira mediro e matla moo, ge e se gore a bea diatla tsa gagwe godimo ga balwetsi ba sego kae lea ba fodisa." 
Mark6:6 A makatswa ke go se dumele ga bona. A ralala metse, a ruta." 
Mark6:7 A bitsa ba lesomepedi, a thoma go ba romela ka bobedi ka bobedi; a ba fa maatla godimo ga meoya ye e sa hlwekago;" 
Mark6:8 Ba laela gore ba se ke ba tsea selo leetong la bona, ge e se lepara feela; ga go na sekurufu, ga go na borotho, ga go na tshelete ka sekhwameng sa bona." 
Mark6:9 Eupsa le apare dieta; le o se ke wa apara dijase tse pedi. 
Mark6:10 Le a re go bona: Kae le kae moo le tsenago ka ntlong, dula fao go fihlela le tloga lefelong leo." 
Mark6:11 Mang le mang yo a sa go amogelego e bile a sa go theetse, ge o tloga moo, o sisinye lerole ka tlase ga dinao tsa gago e le bohlatse kgahlanong le bona. Ruri ke re go lena: Sodoma le Gomora letsatsing la kahlolo di tla kgotlelelwa go feta motse woo." 
Mark6:12 Ba tswa ba rera gore setshaba se sokologe. 
Mark6:13 Ba raka batemona ba bantsi, ba tlotsa balwetsi ba bantsi ka makhura leba ba fodisa." 
Mark6:14 Kgosi Heroda a kwa ka yena; (gobane leina la gagwe le phatlaletse gohle) lea re: Johane Mokolobetsi o tsositswe bahung, leka fao mediro ye maatla e bonagatswa go yena." 
Mark6:15 Ba bangwe ba re: Ye ke Eliya. Leba bangwe ba re: Ke moporofeta, goba go swana le yo mongwe wa baporofeta." 
Mark6:16 Eupsa ge Heroda a ekwa se, a re: Ke Johane yo ke mo kgaotsego hlogo; a tsoga bahung." 
Mark6:17 Gobane Heroda ka boyena a roma batho ba yo swara Johane lea mo tlema kgolegong ka baka la Herodia, mosadi wa Filipi ngwanabo, ka ge a be a mo nyetse." 
Mark6:18 Gobane Johane a re go Heroda: “Ga go molaong gore o be le mosadi wa ngwaneno. 
Mark6:19 Ke ka baka leo Herodia a ilego a ngangisana le yena lea nyaka go mmolaya; eupsa o be a sa kgone go: 
Mark6:20 Gobane Heroda o be a boifa Johane, ka gobane o be a tseba gore ke monna yo a lokilego le yo mokgethwa, leo be a mo sireletsa; ge a mo kwa, a dira dilo tse dintsi, a mo kwa a thabile." 
Mark6:21 Ge letsatsi le le loketsego le fihla, Heroda ka letsatsi la gagwe la matswalo a direla marena a gagwe, e lego babusi ba bagolo le babusi ba Galilea monyanya." 
Mark6:22 Ge morwedi wa Herodia yo a boletswego a tsena a bina a kgahlisa Heroda le bao ba dutsego le yena, kgosi ya re go ngwanenyana: “Mpotse feela seo o se nyakago, ke tla go nea sona.”" 
Mark6:23 A mo enela a re: Se sengwe le se sengwe seo o tlago go nkgopela sona, ke tla go nea seripa-gare sa mmuso wa ka." 
Mark6:24 A tswa a re go mmagwe: Ke tla kgopela eng? lea re: Hlogo ya Johane Mokolobetsi. 
Mark6:25 Gateetee a akgofela go kgosi a kgopela a re: Ke nyaka gore o mphe hlogo ya Johane Mokolobetsi godimo ga sekotlelo. 
Mark6:26 Kgosi ya nyama kudu; eupsa ka baka la keno ya gagwe le ka baka la bao ba dulago le yena, a se ke a mo gana." 
Mark6:27 Gateetee kgosi ya roma mmolai leya laela gore a tlise hlogo ya gagwe; a ya a mo kgaola hlogo kgolegong. 
Mark6:28 A tlisa hlogo ya gagwe ka sebjaneng a e nea ngwanenyana, ngwanenyana a e nea mmagwe." 
Mark6:29 Barutiwa ba gagwe ge ba ekwa se, ba tla ba tsea setopo sa gagwe ba se roba lebitleng." 
Mark6:30 Baapostola ba kgobokana le Jesu, ba mmotsa tsohle, tse ba di dirilego le tse ba ithutilego tsona." 
Mark6:31 LeA re go bona: Etlang ka bolena ka thoko lefelong la lesoka lele khutse lebakanyana, ka gobane go be go na le ba bantsi bao ba bego ba etla le go tloga, leba be ba se na nako ya go ja." 
Mark6:32 Ba tloga ba arogane ka sekepe ba ya lefelong le le se nago batho. 
Mark6:33 Setshaba sa ba bona ba tloga, ba bantsi ba mo tseba, ba tshaba metseng ka moka, ba ikgogela ka ntle leba kgobokana go yena." 
Mark6:34 Ge Jesu a etswa, a bona batho ba bantsi lea ba kwela bohloko kudu, ka gobane ba be ba swana le dinku tse di se nago modisi; leA thoma go ba ruta dilo tse dintsi." 
Mark6:35 Ge letsatsi le fedile, barutiwa ba gagwe ba tla go yena ba re: Lefelo le ke lesope, lebjale nako e fedile." 
Mark6:36 Ba romele kgole, gore ba ye nageng ya kgauswi le metseng, ba ithekele bogobe, ka gobane ga ba na selo sa go ja." 
Mark6:37 A fetola a re go bona: “Ineele go ba ja. Ba re go yena: Na re tla ya re reka bogobe ka dipente tse makgolo a mabedi lere di je? 
Mark6:38 A re go bona: Le na le dinkgwa tse kae? eya go bona lege ba e tseba, ba re: Dihlapi tse hlano le tse pedi." 
Mark6:39 A ba laela ka moka gore ba dule ka dihlopha bjanyeng bjo botala. 
Mark6:40 Ba dula fase ka methaladi, ka makgolo le ka masomehlano." 
Mark6:41 Leka morago ga ge a tsere dinkgwa tse hlano le dihlapi tse pedi, O ile a lebelela godimo legodimong lea segofatsa le go kgaola dinkgwa lea di fa barutiwa ba gagwe gore ba di bee pele ga tsona; dihlapi tse pedi a di arolela bohle." 
Mark6:42 Ka moka ba ja, ba kgora." 
Mark6:43 Ba tsea diroto tse lesomepedi tseo di tletsego ka diripana le dihlapi. 
Mark6:44 Bao ba bego ba eja dinkgwa tseo e be e le banna ba dikete tse hlano. 
Mark6:45 Gateetee a gapeletsa barutiwa ba gagwe gore ba namele sekepe leba ye ka thoko ya Betsaida, mola yena a tlosa setshaba." 
Mark6:46 Leka morago ga gore A ba rome, O ile a ya thabeng go rapela." 
Mark6:47 Ge e setse e le mantsiboa, sekepe se be se le gare ga lewatle, leyena a nnosi a le nageng." 
Mark6:48 A bona kamoo ba bego ba soka ka gona; ka gobane phefo e be e le kgahlanong le bona, lemo e ka bago ka nako ya bone ya bosego O ile a tla go bona a sepela godimo ga lewatle lea ba feta." 
Mark6:49 Eupsa ge ba mmona a sepela godimo ga lewatle, ba nagana gore ke moya, ba goeletsa." 
Mark6:50 Gobane bohle ba mmone leba tshwenyega. Legateetee O ile a bolela le bona lea re go bona: Eba le sebete se sebotse! Ke nna; o se ke wa tshaba. 
Mark6:51 A rotogela go bona ka seketswana; phefo ya hwa, ba makala kudu ka gare ga bona, ba makala." 
Mark6:52 Gobane ba be ba sa nagane ka mohlolo wa dinkgwa, ka gobane dipelo tsa bona di be di thatafala." 
Mark6:53 Ge ba feta, ba fihla nageng ya Genesarete, ba hudugela lebopong." 
Mark6:54 Ge ba etswa sekepeng, ba mo tseba gateetee." 
Mark6:55 A kitima lefelong leo ka moka go dikologa lea thoma go rwala balwetsi malaong ao ba kwelego gore o gona. 
Mark6:56 Kae le kae moo a bego a tsena gona, metseng goba metseng goba dinageng, ba be ba robatsa balwetsi ditarateng leba mo kgopela gore a kgwathe ge e ba e be e le feela mosito wa seaparo sa gagwe; bohle bao ba bego ba mo kgwatha ba fodiswa." 
Mark7:1 Ke moka Bafarisei le ba bangwe ba bamangwalo bao ba bego ba tlile go tswa Jerusalema ba kgobokana go yena. 
Mark7:2 Ge ba bona ba bangwe ba barutiwa ba gagwe ba eja bogobe ka diatla tse di sa hlwekago, ke gore diatla tse di sa hlapiswago, ba hwetsa molato." 
Mark7:3 Gobane Bafarisei le Bajuda ka moka ga ba je ka ntle le go hlapa diatla tsa bona kgafetsakgafetsa, go ya ka setso sa bagolo." 
Mark7:4 Ge ba etswa mmarakeng, ga ba je ge e se ba hlapa. Lego sa na le dilo tse dingwe tse ntsi tseo ba di amogetsego go di boloka, go swana le go hlatswa dikomiki le dipitsa, dibjana tsa koporo le ditafola." 
Mark7:5 Bafarisei le bamangwalo ba mmotsisa ba re: “Ke ka baka la’ng barutiwa ba gago ba sa sepele ka mokgwa wa bagolo, eupsa ba ja bogobe ka diatla tse di sa hlapiswago?" 
Mark7:6 A fetola a re go bona: Jesaya o porofetile gabotse ka lena baikaketsi, bjalo ka ge go ngwadilwe: Setshaba se se nkgodisa ka melomo ya sona, eupsa dipelo tsa sona di kgole le Nna." 
Mark7:7 Eupsa ba Ntlhompha ka lefeela ka go ruta dithuto tseo e lego ditaelo tsa batho. 
Mark7:8 Gobane ge le laela taelo ya Modimo ka thoko, le kgomarela ka go tia setso sa batho, go swana le go hlatswa dipitsa le dikomiki, le dilo tse dingwe tse dintsi tse di swanago le tseo le di dirago." 
Mark7:9 A re go bona: Le gana taelo ya Modimo ka mo go feletsego, gore le kgone go boloka setso sa lena." 
Mark7:10 Gobane Moshe o rile: Hlompha tatago le mmago; le: Mang le mang yo a rogakago tate goba mma, a a hwe lehu." 
Mark7:11 Eupsa le re: Ge monna a ka re go tatagwe goba mmagwe: Ye ke Corban, ke gore mpho, ka tsohle o ka holega go nna; o tla lokologa." 
Mark7:12 Ga o sa mo dumelela go direla tatagwe goba mmagwe selo; 
Mark7:13 le dira gore lentsu la Modimo le se some ka setso sa lena seo le se fetisitsego, le dilo tse bjalo le di dira kudu." 
Mark7:14 Ge a bitsa setshaba ka moka go yena, a re go bona: Ntheetseng, yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa lena, leo kwesise." 
Mark7:15 Ga go selo se se tswago ka ntle seo se tsenago ka yena seo se ka mo silafatsago; eupsa seo se tswago go yena, ke sona se se dirago gore motho a se hlweke." 
Mark7:16 Ge e ba motho a na le ditsebe tsa go kwa, a a kwe." 
Mark7:17 Ge a tsena ka ntlong ya setshaba, barutiwa ba gagwe ba mmotsisa ka seswantsho seo." 
Mark7:18 A re go bona: Na le lena le hloka kwesiso? Na ga o lemoge gore tsohle tse di tsenago motho ka ntle di ka se mo silafatse; 
Mark7:19 Ka gobane ga e tsene pelong ya gagwe, eupsa e tsene ka mpeng, e tswela ka ntle ga moya, e hlwekisa dijo ka moka?" 
Mark7:20 A re: Se se tswago mothong, seo se dirago gore motho a se hlweke." 
Mark7:21 Gobane go tswa ka gare, dipelong tsa batho, go tswa dikgopolo tse mpe, bohlotlolo, bootswa, polao." 
Mark7:22 Bohodu, megabaru, bokgopo, boradia, go lokologana, leihlo le lebe, thogako, boikgogomoso, bosilo;" 
Mark7:23 Dilo tse ka moka tse mpe di tswa ka gare ledi dira gore motho a se hlweke. 
Mark7:24 Go tloga moo a tsoga a ya mellwaneng ya Tiro le Sidone a tsena ka ntlong lea sa nyake gore motho a e tsebe, eupsa a palelwa ke go utega." 
Mark7:25 Gobane mosadi yo mongwe yo morwedi wa gagwe yo monyenyane a nago le moya o silafetsego o ile a kwa ka yena lea tla a wela maotong a gagwe. 
Mark7:26 Mosadi yoo e be e le Mogerika, e be e le mo-Sirofoenikia ka setshaba; lea Mo kgopela gore a lahle diabolo go morwedi wa gagwe." 
Mark7:27 Eupsa Jesu a re go yena: Anke bana ba kgotsofatswe pele, ka gobane ga go loke go tsea senkgwa sa bana lewa se lahlela dimpsa." 
Mark7:28 A mo fetola a re: Ee, Morena, dimpsa di ja makwapi a bana ka fase ga tafola." 
Mark7:29 Ke moka a re go yena: Eya lentsung le; diabolo o tswile go morwedi wa gago. 
Mark7:30 Ge a fihla ntlong ya gagwe, a hwetsa Diabolo a tswile, morwedi wa gagwe a robetse malaong." 
Mark7:31 Ge a tloga mabopong a Tiro le Sidone, a fihla lewatleng la Galilea, a phatsa mabopong a Dekapoli." 
Mark7:32 Ba mo tlisetsa motho yo a bego a sa kwe selo, a na le tshitiso ya polelo; ba mo rapela gore a mo bee seatla." 
Mark7:33 A mo aroganya le lesaba, a mo tsenya menwana ditsebeng, a tshwela mare a mo kgwatha leleme;" 
Mark7:34 A lebelela legodimong, a hemela godimo a re go yena: Effata, ke gore: Bula!" 
Mark7:35 Gateetee ditsebe tsa gagwe tsa bulega, thapo ya leleme la gagwe ya lokollwa, a bolela gabotse." 
Mark7:36 A ba laela gore ba se ke ba botsa motho; 
Mark7:37 leba makala kudu, ba re: O dirile tsohle gabotse: O dira gore difoa di kwe ledimumu di bolele." 
Mark8:1 Mehleng yeo ge lesaba le be le le legolo kudu lele se na selo sa go ja, Jesu a bitsa barutiwa ba gagwe a re go bona." 
Mark8:2 Ke kwela lesaba bohloko, ka gobane le na le matsatsi a mararo le nna le nna lega le na selo sa go ja." 
Mark8:3 Ge nka ba romela magaeng a bona ba ikona dijo, ba tla idibala tseleng, ka gobane ba mmalwa ba bona ba tlile ba etswa kgole." 
Mark8:4 Barutiwa ba gagwe ba mo fetola ba re: Go tswa kae motho yo a ka kgotsofatsago banna ba mo leganateng ka bogobe? 
Mark8:5 A ba botsisa a re: Le na le dinkgwa tse kae? leba re: Supa. 
Mark8:6 LeA laela batho go dula fase fase; a tsea dinkgwa tse supago, a leboga, a di ngwatha, a di fa barutiwa ba gagwe gore ba di bee pele ga bona; ba itlhagisa pele ga setshaba." 
Mark8:7 Ba be ba na le dihlapi tse nnyane, a segofatsa a laela gore le tsona di bee pele ga bona." 
Mark8:8 Ke moka ba ja, ba kgora, lego nama ye e robegilego yeo e setsego, ba tsea diroto tse supago." 
Mark8:9 Bao ba bego ba eja e be e le ba dikete tse nne, lea ba raka." 
Mark8:10 Gateetee a namela sekepe le barutiwa ba gagwe ba fihla dileteng tsa Dalmanutha. 
Mark8:11 Bafarisei ba tswa ba thoma go mmotsisa dipotsiso leba mo tsoma pontsho go tswa legodimong go mo leka. 
Mark8:12 A hemela godimo moyeng wa gagwe lea re: Ke ka baka la’ng moloko wo o nyaka pontsho? Ruri ke a le botsa gore moloko wo o ka se fiwe pontsho. 
Mark8:13 A ba tlogela, a namela sekepe, a boela ka thoko." 
Mark8:14 Barutiwa ba lebala go tsea senkgwa, ba se na senkgwa se tee ka sekepeng." 
Mark8:15 A ba laela a re: Hlokomelang komelo ya Bafarisei le komelo ya Heroda. 
Mark8:16 Ba boledisana ba re: Ke ka gobane ga re na bogobe. 
Mark8:17 Jesu ge a tseba seo, a re go bona: Ke ka baka la’ng le ngangisana ka gobane le se na bogobe? a ga se la hlwa le lemoga le go kwesisa? o sa thatafaditse pelo ya gago?" 
Mark8:18 Ge e ba o na le mahlo, na ga o bone? ge e ba le na le ditsebe, ga le kwe? lega o gopole?" 
Mark8:19 Ge ke be ke robega dinkgwa tse hlano ka tlase ga dikete tse hlano, le ile la topa diroto tse kae tseo di tletsego dikarolwana? Ba re go yena: Lesomepedi." 
Mark8:20 Ka morago ga moo ba supago ba ka tlase ga dikete tse nne, o topa diroto tse kae tseo di tletsego dikarolwana? leba re: Supa." 
Mark8:21 LeA re go bona: Go tla bjang gore le sa kwesise? 
Mark8:22 A fihla Betsaida; ba tlisa sefofu go yena, ba mo kgopela gore a mo kgwathe." 
Mark8:23 A swara sefofu ka seatla, a se ntsha motseng; ge a mo tshwela mare mahlong a mo bea diatla, a mmotsisa ge e ba a bona selo." 
Mark8:24 A lebelela godimo a re: Ke bona batho ba go swana le mehlare ba sepela. 
Mark8:25 Ke moka a boela a bea diatla tsa gagwe mahlong a gagwe lea mo lebelela godimo; lea fola lea bona yo mongwe le yo mongwe gabotse. 
Mark8:26 A mo romela ntlong ya gagwe a re: O se ke wa tsena motseng leo se ke wa botsa motho yo motseng se. 
Mark8:27 Jesu a tloga le barutiwa ba gagwe metseng ya Kesarea Filipi; letseleng a botsisa barutiwa ba gagwe lea re go bona: Batho ba re ke nna mang? 
Mark8:28 Ba fetola ba re: Johane Mokolobetsi, eupsa ba bangwe ba re: Eliya! ba bangwe ba re: Yo mongwe wa baporofeta." 
Mark8:29 A re go bona: Eupsa le re ke nna mang? Petere a mo fetola a re: Ke wena Keresete. 
Mark8:30 A ba laela gore ba se ke ba botsa motho ka yena. 
Mark8:31 Lea thoma go ba ruta gore Morwa wa Motho o swanetse go tlaisega kudu lea lahlelwe ke bagolo le baperisita ba bagolo le bamangwalo lea bolawe le go tsoga ka morago ga matsatsi a mararo. 
Mark8:32 A bolela lentsu leo pepeneneng. Petere a mo swara, a thoma go mo kgalema." 
Mark8:33 Eupsa ge a retologa lea bona barutiwa ba gagwe, a kgalema Petere lea re: Tlogela morago, Sathane, ka gobane ga o thabele dilo tsa Modimo, eupsa o thabela dilo tsa batho." 
Mark8:34 Lege A bitsa setshaba go Yena mmogo le barutiwa ba gagwe, O ile a re go bona: Yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a nyakago go tla morago ga Nna o swanetse go itemola lea rwale sefapano sa gagwe lea Ntatele." 
Mark8:35 Gobane mang le mang yo a nyakago go pholosa bophelo bja gagwe o tla bo lahlegelwa; eupsa mang le mang yo a lahlegelwago ke bophelo bja gagwe ka baka la ka le ebangedi, o tla bo pholosa." 
Mark8:36 Gobane motho go hola eng ge a ka hwetsa lefase ka moka lea senyega moyeng wa gagwe ka nosi? 
Mark8:37 Goba motho o tla neela’ng bakeng sa moya wa gagwe? 
Mark8:38 Ka gona yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a hlabjago ke dihlong ka nna le mantsu a ka molokong wo wa bohlotlolo le wa sebe; Morwa Motho le yena o tla mo hlabja ke dihlong ge a etla ka letago la Tatagwe le barongwa ba bakgethwa. 
Mark9:1 LeA re go bona: Ruri ke re go lena, go na le ba bangwe ba bao ba emego mo, bao ba ka se latswego lehu go fihlela ba bona mmuso wa Modimo o etla ka maatla." 
Mark9:2 Leka morago ga matsatsi a tshela Jesu a tsea Petere le Jakobo le Johane le yena lea ba eta pele ba nnosi thabeng ye e phagamego, lea fetoswa sebopego pele ga bona." 
Mark9:3 Diaparo tsa gagwe tsa phadima, tse tshweu kudu bjalo ka lehlwa; e le gore ga go na fuller lefaseng yo a ka di sweufatsago." 
Mark9:4 Eliya a iponagatsa go bona le Moshe, ba boledisana le Jesu." 
Mark9:5 Petere a araba Jesu a re: Moruti, ke mo gobotse gore re mo, lea re direng mesasa ye meraro; e tee ya gago, e nngwe ya Moshe, e nngwe ya Eliya." 
Mark9:6 Gobane o be a sa tsebe gore a reng; gobane ba be ba tshogile kudu. 
Mark9:7 Legwa ba le leru leo le ba apesitsego, lelentsu la tswa lerung la re: Yo ke Morwa wa ka yo a rategago; mo theeletse." 
Mark9:8 Gateetee ge ba lebelela go dikologa, ba se sa bona motho, ge e se Jesu a nnosi a na le bona." 
Mark9:9 Ge ba theoga thabeng, a ba laela gore ba se botse motho seo ba se bonego go fihlela Morwamotho a tsoga bahung." 
Mark9:10 Ba boloka lentsu leo go bona, ba botsisa magareng ga bona gore tsogo bahung e be e tla bolela eng." 
Mark9:11 Ba mmotsisa ba re: Ke ka baka la’ng bamangwalo ba re Eliya o swanetse go tla pele? 
Mark9:12 A ba araba a re: Eliya o tla pele ka nnete leo tsosolosa tsohle; le ka fao go ngwadilwego ka Morwa wa motho, gore O swanetse go tlaisega kudu lea lahlelwe." 
Mark9:13 Eupsa ke le botsa gore Eliya o tlile e le ka kgonthe, leba mo dira tsohle tseo ba bego ba di nyaka, go etsa ge go ngwadilwe ka yena." 
Mark9:14 Ge a fihla go barutiwa ba gagwe, a bona lesaba le legolo le ba dikologile, le bamangwalo ba boledisana le bona." 
Mark9:15 Gateetee setshaba ka moka ge se mmona, sa makala kudu, sa kitimela go yena sa mo dumedisa." 
Mark9:16 A botsisa bamangwalo a re: Le ba kgopela eng? 
Mark9:17 Leyo mongwe wa lesaba a araba lea re: Moruti, ke tlisitse morwa wa ka, yo a nago le moya wa semumu, go Wena;" 
Mark9:18 Kae le kae moo a mo isago gona, o a mo gagola; a foma, a tsikitlanya meno, a lla. Leba be ba sa kgone." 
Mark9:19 A mo fetola a re: Wena moloko wo o sa dumelego, ke tla ba le wena go fihla neng? ke tla kgotlelela go fihla neng go mo tlisa go nna?" 
Mark9:20 Ba mo tlisa go yena, ge a mmona, moya wa mo tlaisa gateetee; leo wela fase lea dikologa a foma." 
Mark9:21 A botsisa tatagwe a re: E setse e le nako e kaaka’ng go tloga mola se se mo diragalelago? lea re: Go tloga ngwana. 
Mark9:22 Gantsi e be e mo lahlela mollong le ka meetseng gore e mo fedise; eupsa ge O kgona go dira selo le ge e le sefe, O a re gaugela leo re thuse." 
Mark9:23 Jesu a re go yena: Ge o kgona go dumela, tsohle di a kgonega go yo a dumelago." 
Mark9:24 Gateetee tatago ngwana a goeletsa a re ka megokgo: Morena, ke a dumela; thusa go se dumele ga ka." 
Mark9:25 Jesu ge a bona lesaba le kitima gotee, a kgalema moya wo o sa hlwekago a re go yena: Wena moya wa semumu le wa difoa, ke a go laela gore o tswe go yena leo se sa tsena go yena." 
Mark9:26 Moya wa goeletsa wa mo gagola, wa tswa go yena, a ba bjalo ka motho yo a hwilego; mo e lego gore ba bantsi ba re: O hwile." 
Mark9:27 Eupsa Jesu a mo swara ka seatla a mo emisetsa godimo; lea ema. 
Mark9:28 Lege A fihla ka ntlong, barutiwa ba gagwe ba mmotsisa a nnosi gore: Ke ka lebaka la eng re sa kgone go mo raka ka ntle?" 
Mark9:29 LeA re go bona: Mohuta wo o ka se tswe go selo, ntle le ka thapelo le go ikona dijo." 
Mark9:30 Ba tloga moo, ba phatsa Galilea; leo be a sa nyake gore motho a tsebe." 
Mark9:31 Gobane o ile a ruta barutiwa ba gagwe lea re go bona: Morwa wa motho o gafetswe diatleng tsa batho leba tla mmolaya; ka morago ga ge a bolailwe, a tsoge ka letsatsi la boraro." 
Mark9:32 Eupsa ba be ba sa kwesise lentsu leo leba tshaba go mmotsisa. 
Mark9:33 A fihla Kaperenaume, ge a be a le ka ntlong, a ba botsisa a re: Le ile la ngangisana ka eng tseleng?" 
Mark9:34 Eupsa ba homola, ka gobane tseleng ba be ba ngangisana magareng ga bona gore ke mang yo a tlago go ba yo mogolo." 
Mark9:35 A dula fase a bitsa ba lesomepedi, a re go bona: Ge motho a rata go ba wa pele, e tla ba wa mafelelo go bohle le mohlanka wa bohle." 
Mark9:36 A tsea mosemane a mo emisa gare ga bona; a mo gokarela, a re go bona:" 
Mark9:37 Yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a amogelago yo mongwe wa bana ba bjalo ka leina la ka o a nkamogela; leyo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a nkamogelago ga a nkamogele, eupsa yo a Nthomilego." 
Mark9:38 Johane a mo fetola a re: Moruti, re bone motho a leleka batemona ka leina la gago, lega a re latele; ra mo thibela, ka gobane ga a re latele." 
Mark9:39 Eupsa Jesu a re: O se ke wa mo thibela, ka gobane ga go na motho yo a tlago go dira mohlolo ka leina la ka, yo a ka bolelago gampe ka nna." 
Mark9:40 Gobane yo a sa re ganetsego o ka lehlakoreng la rena. 
Mark9:41 Gobane mang le mang yo a le fago komiki ya meetse gore le nwe ka leina la ka, ka ge le le ba Keresete, ruri ke re go lena, a ka se lahlegelwe ke moputso wa gagwe." 
Mark9:42 Mang le mang yo a kgopisago yo mongwe wa bana ba banyenyane ba bao ba dumelago go Nna, go kaone go yena gore a fegwe lefsika la tshilo molaleng lea lahlelwe ka lewatleng." 
Mark9:43 Ge seatla sa gago se go kgopisa, se kgaole; go kaone gore o tsene bophelong o golofetse go feta go ba le diatla tse pedi gore o tsene diheleng, mollong wo o ka se kego wa tingwa." 
Mark9:44 Moo seboko sa bona se sa hwego lemollo o sa time. 
Mark9:45 Ge leoto la gago le go kgopisa, le kgaole; go kaone gore o tsene bophelong go e na le go ba le maoto a mabedi gore o lahlelwe diheleng, mollong wo o ka se kego wa tingwa." 
Mark9:46 Moo seboko sa bona se sa hwego lemollo o sa time. 
Mark9:47 Ge e ba leihlo la gago le go kgopisa, le gagole; go kaone gore o tsene Mmusong wa Modimo ka leihlo le tee go e na le go ba le mahlo a mabedi gore o lahlelwe mollong wa dihele." 
Mark9:48 Moo seboko sa bona se sa hwego lemollo o sa time. 
Mark9:49 Gobane yo mongwe le yo mongwe o tla tshelwa letswai ka mollo, sehlabelo se sengwe le se sengwe se tla tshelwa letswai ka letswai." 
Mark9:50 Letswai ke le lebotse, eupsa ge e ba letswai le lahlegetswe ke letswai, le tla le latswa ka eng? Bolokang letswai ka gare ga lena le boloka khutso le yo mongwe le yo mongwe." 
Mark10:1 A tsoga moo a fihla dileteng tsa Judea ka mosola wa Noka ya Jorodane; lebjalo ka ge a be a tlwaetse, a ba ruta gape." 
Mark10:1 A tsoga moo a fihla dileteng tsa Judea ka mosola wa Noka ya Jorodane; lebjalo ka ge a be a tlwaetse, a ba ruta gape." 
Mark10:2 Bafarisei ba tla go yena ba mmotsisa ba re: Na go dumeletswe gore monna a hlale mosadi wa gagwe? mo goketsa. 
Mark10:3 A ba araba a re: Moshe o le laetse eng? 
Mark10:4 Leba re: Moshe o ile a dumelela go ngwala lengwalo la tlhalo le go mo tlosa. 
Mark10:5 Jesu a ba fetola a re: Ka baka la go thatafala ga pelo ya lena o le ngwaletse taelo ye. 
Mark10:6 Eupsa go tloga mathomong a tlholo, Modimo o ba dirile monna le mosadi." 
Mark10:7 Ka gona monna o tla tlogela tatagwe le mmagwe, a kgomarela mosadi wa gagwe;" 
Mark10:8 Bobedi bja bona e tla ba nama e tee; ka gona ga e sa le ba babedi, eupsa e le nama e tee." 
Mark10:9 Se Modimo a se kopantsego, ga go motho yo a ka se aroganyago." 
Mark10:10 Ka ntlong barutiwa ba gagwe ba mmotsisa gape ka taba yeo. 
Mark10:11 A re go bona: “Mang le mang yo a hlalago mosadi wa gagwe lea nyala yo mongwe o mo hlotswa. 
Mark10:12 Ge mosadi a hlala monna wa gagwe a nyala yo mongwe, o a dira bohlotlolo." 
Mark10:13 Leba tlisa bana ba bannyane go Yena, gore a ba kgwathe; barutiwa ba gagwe ba kgalema bao ba di tlisitsego." 
Mark10:14 Eupsa ge Jesu a bona se, o ile a se thabele kudu lea re go bona: A bana ba bannyane ba tle go Nna leba se ba sitise, ka gobane mmuso wa Modimo ke wa ba bjalo." 
Mark10:15 Ruri ke re go lena: Mang le mang yo a sa amogelego Mmuso wa Modimo bjalo ka ngwana yo monyenyane, a ka se tsene go wona." 
Mark10:16 A ba swara, a ba bea diatla lea ba segofatsa." 
Mark10:17 Lege A etswa tseleng, yo mongwe a tla a kitima lea khunama pele ga gagwe lea mmotsisa gore: Moruti yo mobotse, ke swanetse go dira eng gore ke hwetse bophelo bjo bo sa felego?" 
Mark10:18 Jesu a re go yena: Ke ka baka la’ng o mpitsa yo botse? ga go yo mobotse ge e se o tee, e lego Modimo." 
Mark10:19 O tseba ditaelo: O se ke wa otswa, o se ke wa bolaya, o se ke wa utswa, o se ke wa nea bohlatse bja maaka, o se ke wa fora, o hlomphe tatago le mmago." 
Mark10:20 A mo fetola a re: Moruti, ke hlokometse tse ka moka go tloga bofseng bja ka." 
Mark10:21 Jesu ge a mmona, a mo rata lea re go yena: Selo se tee seo o se hlokago: sepela o rekise tsohle tse o nago le tsona o di nee badiidi, leo tla ba le letlotlo legodimong; leo tle, rwale sefapano leo ntatele." 
Mark10:22 A nyamiswa ke lentsu le lea tloga a nyamile, ka gobane o be a na le dithoto tse dintsi." 
Mark10:23 Jesu a lebelela go dikologa, a re go barutiwa ba gagwe: “Go tla ba thata gakaakang go bahumi go tsena Mmusong wa Modimo!" 
Mark10:24 Barutiwa ba makatswa ke mantsu a gagwe. Eupsa Jesu a araba gape a re go bona: Bana, go thata gakaakang go bao ba botago mahumo go tsena Mmusong wa Modimo!" 
Mark10:25 Go bonolo gore kamela e tsene ka leihlong la nalete go e na le gore mohumi a tsene Mmusong wa Modimo. 
Mark10:26 Leba makala kudu leba re: “Bjale ke mang yo a ka pholoswago? 
Mark10:27 Jesu a ba lebelela a re: Go batho ga go kgonege, eupsa e sego go Modimo, ka gobane go Modimo dilo ka moka di a kgonega." 
Mark10:28 Ke moka Petere a thoma go re go yena: Bona, re tlogetse tsohle lera go latela." 
Mark10:29 Jesu a fetola a re: Ruri ke a le botsa, ga go yo a tlogetsego ntlo goba bana babo goba dikgaetsedi goba tate goba mma goba mosadi goba bana goba naga ka baka la Nna le Ebangedi," 
Mark10:30 Eupsa bjale mo nakong ye o tla amogela dintlo le bana babo le dikgaetsedi le bomme le bana le naga ka makga a lekgolo, ka tlaiso; le lefaseng le le tlago bophelo bjo bo sa felego." 
Mark10:31 Eupsa ba bantsi bao e lego ba pele e tla ba ba mafelelo; le ya mafelelo ya pele. 
Mark10:32 Ba be ba le tseleng ya go ya Jerusalema; Jesu a tswa pele ga bona, ba tlabega; lege ba dutse ba latela, ba tshoga. A busa a tsea ba lesomepedi, a thoma go ba botsa seo se bego se tla mo diragalela." 
Mark10:33 A re: Bonang, re rotogela Jerusalema; Morwamotho o tla gafelwa go baperisita ba bagolo le bamangwalo; ba tla mo ahlolela lehu, ba mo gafela go Baditshaba." 
Mark10:34 Ba tla mo kwera, ba mo otla, ba mo tshwela ka mare, ba mmolaya; leka letsatsi la boraro o tla tsoga." 
Mark10:35 LeJakobo le Johane, barwa ba Tsebedeo, ba tla go Yena leba re: Moruti, re nyaka gore o re direle se sengwe le se sengwe seo re se nyakago." 
Mark10:36 A re go bona: Le nyaka gore ke le direle eng? 
Mark10:37 Ba re go yena: “Re fe re dule, yo mongwe ka letsogong la gago la le letona leyo mongwe ka letsogong la gago la nngele, re dule letagong la gago.”" 
Mark10:38 Eupsa Jesu a re go bona: Ga le tsebe seo le se kgopelago; na o ka nwa senwelo seo ke nwago go sona? leke kolobetswe ka kolobetso yeo ke kolobeditswego ka yona? 
Mark10:39 Leba re go yena: Re ka kgona. Jesu a re go bona: Ruri le tla nwa senwelo seo ke se nwago; leka kolobetso yeo ke kolobeditswego ka yona, le tla kolobetswa." 
Mark10:40 Eupsa go dula ka letsogong la ka la le letona le la ka la nngele ga se ga ka go neela; eupsa e tla fiwa bao e ba lokiseleditswego. 
Mark10:41 Ge ba lesome ba ekwa taba ye, ba thoma go nyamiswa kudu ke Jakobo le Johane." 
Mark10:42 Eupsa Jesu a ba bitsa go yena lea re go bona: Le a tseba gore bao ba balwago go busa Baditshaba ba a ba busa; le bagolo ba bona ba ba laola. 
Mark10:43 Eupsa go ka se be bjalo gare ga lena; eupsa mang le mang yo a nyakago go ba yo mogolo gare ga lena e swanetse go ba mohlanka wa lena. 
Mark10:44 Yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa lena yo a lego bohlokwa kudu e tla ba mohlanka wa bohle. 
Mark10:45 Gobane le Morwa wa motho ga se a tla go hlankelwa, eupsa o tlile go hlankela le go gafa bophelo bja gagwe e le topollo ya ba bantsi." 
Mark10:46 Ba fihla Jeriko, lege a be a tloga Jeriko le barutiwa ba gagwe le batho ba bantsi, Bartimeo morwa wa Timaeo wa sefofu o be a dutse kgauswi le tsela a kgopela." 
Mark10:47 Ge a ekwa gore ke Jesu wa Natsaretha, a thoma go goeletsa a re: “Jesu, Morwa wa Dafida, nkgaugele.”" 
Mark10:48 Ba bantsi ba mo laela gore a homole, eupsa a goeletsa le go feta a re: “Morwa wa Dafida, nkgaugele!" 
Mark10:49 Jesu a ema, a laela gore a bitswe. Leba bitsa sefofu leba re go yena: Iketlile, ema; o a go bitsa." 
Mark10:50 A lahla seaparo sa gagwe, a ema a tla go Jesu." 
Mark10:51 Jesu a mo fetola a re: O nyaka gore ke go dire eng? Monna wa sefofu a re go Yena: Morena, gore ke bone." 
Mark10:52 Jesu a re go yena: Sepela; tumelo ya gago e go fodisitse. Gateetee a bona Jesu a mo latela tseleng. 
Mark11:1 Ge ba batamela Jerusalema, Bethefage le Bethania, Thabeng ya Mehlware, a roma barutiwa ba gagwe ba babedi." 
Mark11:2 A re go bona: Eyang motseng wo o lebanego le lena; mo lokolle o mo tlise. 
Mark11:3 Ge motho a re go wena: Ke ka baka la’ng o dira se? o re Morena o a mo hloka; legateetee o tla mo romela mo. 
Mark11:4 Ba tloga ba hwetsa pokolo yeo e tlemilwe ka ntle mojakong, lefelong leo ditsela tse pedi di kopanago go lona; ba mo lokolla." 
Mark11:5 Ba bangwe ba bao ba bego ba eme moo ba re go bona: Le dira’ng ge le lokolla pokolo? 
Mark11:6 Ba re go bona bjalo ka ge Jesu a laetse; leba ba lokolla ba sepela. 
Mark11:7 Ba tlisa pokolo yeo go Jesu, ba mo lahlela diaparo tsa bona; a dula godimo ga gagwe." 
Mark11:8 Ba bantsi ba phurolla diaparo tsa bona tseleng, ba bangwe ba rema makala a dihlare, ba a gasanya tseleng." 
Mark11:9 Bao ba bego ba etile pele le bao ba bego ba latela ba goeletsa ba re: Hosanna! Go lehlogonolo yo a tlago ka leina la Morena. 
Mark11:10 Go segofatswe mmuso wa Dafida tatago rena, wo o tlago ka leina la Jehofa: Hosanna magodimong a phagamego." 
Mark11:11 Jesu a tsena Jerusalema le tempeleng. Leka morago ga ge A lebeletse gohle, lebjale mantsiboa a fihlile, O ile a tswa le ba lesomepedi go ya Bethania." 
Mark11:12 Letsatsing le le latelago, ge ba etswa Bethania, O be a swerwe ke tlala." 
Mark11:13 Ge a bona sehlare sa mogo kgole se na le matlakala, a tla, ge e ba mohlomongwe a ka hwetsa se sengwe godimo ga sona; ge a fihla go yona, a se hwetse selo ge e se matlakala; gobane nako ya mago e be e seso ya hlwa e le gona." 
Mark11:14 Jesu a mo fetola a re: Ga go na motho yo a jago dienywa go wena go ya go ile ka morago ga se. Barutiwa ba gagwe ba e kwa. 
Mark11:15 Ba fihla Jerusalema, Jesu a tsena ka tempeleng, a thoma go raka bao ba rekisago le go reka ka tempeleng, a phethola ditafola tsa baananyi ba tshelete le ditulo tsa bao ba rekisago maeba;" 
Mark11:16 O be a sa dumelele motho le ge e le ofe go rwala selo le ge e le sefe ka tempeleng. 
Mark11:17 LeA ruta lea re go bona: Na ga se gwa ngwalwa: Ntlo ya ka e tla bitswa ntlo ya thapelo go ditshaba ka moka? eupsa wena o e dirile lesaka la bahlakodi. 
Mark11:18 Lebamangwalo le baperisita ba bagolo ba kwa se leba nyaka gore ba ka mo fedisa bjang, ka gobane ba be ba mmoifa, ka baka la gore batho ka moka ba be ba makaditswe ke thuto ya gagwe." 
Mark11:19 Ge e setse e le mantsiboa, a tswa motseng." 
Mark11:20 Mesong ge ba dutse ba feta, ba bona sehlare sa mogo seo se omilego go tswa medung." 
Mark11:21 Le Petere a e gopola lea re go yena: Moruti, lebelela, sehlare sa mogo seo O se rogetsego se pona." 
Mark11:22 Jesu a ba araba a re: Dumelang Modimo. 
Mark11:23 Gobane ruri ke re go lena, yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a rego thabeng ye: A phagamiswe, o lahlelwe ka lewatleng; lea ka se belaele pelong ya gagwe, eupsa a dumele gore seo a se bolelago se tla direga; o tla ba le se sengwe le se sengwe seo a se bolelago." 
Mark11:24 Ka gona ke re go lena: Se sengwe le se sengwe seo le se kganyogago ge le rapela, dumela gore le a se amogela lele tla se hwetsa." 
Mark11:25 Ge le ema le rapela, lebalela ge le na le se sengwe kgahlanong le motho le ge e le ofe, e le gore Tatago lena yo a lego legodimong le yena a le lebalele dikarogo tsa lena." 
Mark11:26 Eupsa ge e ba le sa lebalele, le Tatago lena yo a lego magodimong a ka se le lebalele dikarogo tsa lena." 
Mark11:27 Ba boela Jerusalema, lege a be a sepela ka tempeleng, baperisita ba bagolo le bamangwalo le bagolo ba tla go yena." 
Mark11:28 O re go yena: O dira dilo tse ka matla afe? ke mang yo a le filego maatla a go dira dilo tse? 
Mark11:29 Jesu a ba araba a re: Le nna ke tla le botsisa potsiso e tee le karabo ya Ka, leke tla le botsa gore ke dira dilo tse ka maatla afe." 
Mark11:30 Kolobetso ya Johane, na e be e etswa legodimong goba e tswa bathong? nkarabe." 
Mark11:31 Leba bea mabaka le bona ba re: Ge re ka re: Go tswa legodimong; o tla re: Bjale ke ka baka la’ng le sa mo dumele? 
Mark11:32 Eupsa ge re ka re: Ka batho; ba be ba boifa batho, ka gobane bohle ba be ba tsea Johane e le moporofeta wa nnete." 
Mark11:33 Ba fetola ba re go Jesu: Re ka se bolele seo. Jesu a fetola a re go bona: Le nna ga ke le botse gore ke dira dilo tse ka maatla afe. 
Mark12:1 Lea thoma go bolela le bona ka diswantsho. Monna yo mongwe a bjala serapa sa merara lea se dikologa legora lea epa lefelo la makhura a beine lea aga tora a e dumelela balemi lea ya nageng ya kgole. 
Mark12:2 Ka nako yeo a roma mohlanka go balemi gore a amogele dienywa tsa serapa sa merara go balemi. 
Mark12:3 Ba mo swara ba mo itia, ba mo romela a se na selo." 
Mark12:4 A roma mohlanka yo mongwe gape go bona; ba mo lahlela ka maswika, ba mo gobatsa hlogong, ba mo raka e le seo se bego se hlabisa dihlong." 
Mark12:5 A roma yo mongwe gape; le yena ba mmolaya, le ba bangwe ba bantsi; ba bangwe ba betha leba bangwe ba bolaya." 
Mark12:6 Ge a na le morwa o tee gape, moratiwa wa gagwe, le yena a mo romela wa mafelelo go bona lea re: Ba tla sireletsa morwa wa ka." 
Mark12:7 Eupsa balemi bao ba re magareng ga bona: Yo ke mojabohwa; etlang re mmolaye, bohwa e tla ba bja rena." 
Mark12:8 Ba mo tsea ba mmolaya, ba mo lahlela ka ntle ga serapa sa merara." 
Mark12:9 Bjale mong wa serapa sa merara o tla dira eng? o tla tla a fedisa balemi, a nea ba bangwe serapa sa merara." 
Mark12:10 Na ga se la bala Lengwalo le; Lefsika leo baagi ba le gannego le fetogile lefsika la sekhutlo. 
Mark12:11 Morena o dirile se, lese a makatsa mahlong a rena?" 
Mark12:12 Ba leka go mo swara, eupsa ba boifa setshaba, ka gobane ba be ba tseba gore o ba boditse seswantsho seo; leba Mo tlogela ba tloga." 
Mark12:13 Ba roma ba bangwe ba Bafarisei le ba bangwe ba Baheroda go yena gore ba mo sware ka mantsu a gagwe. 
Mark12:14 Lege ba fihla, ba re go Yena: Moruti, re a tseba gore O wa nnete ebile ga o na taba le motho; gobane ga o hlomphe motho wa batho, eupsa o ruta tsela ya Modimo ka thereso: Na go a dumelelwa go lefisa Kesara lekgetho goba aowa?" 
Mark12:15 Na re tla neela, goba re ka se nee? Eupsa ka ge a be a tseba boikaketsi bja bona, O ile a re go bona: Ke ka baka la’ng le nteka? ntlisetse leswao, gore ke le bone." 
Mark12:16 Ba e tlisa. LeA re go bona: Seswantsho le mongwalo wo ke wa mang? leba re go yena: Ya mmusisi. 
Mark12:17 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Neang Kesara tse e lego tsa Kesara, le Modimo tse e lego tsa Modimo.” Leba mo makala." 
Mark12:18 Ke moka Basadutsei ba tla go yena, ba re ga go na tsogo; ba mmotsisa ba re:" 
Mark12:19 Mong, Moshe o re ngwaletse gore: Ge ngwanabo monna a ka hwa lea tlogela mosadi wa gagwe lea se tlogele bana, ngwanabo o swanetse go tsea mosadi wa gagwe lea belege ngwanabo bana." 
Mark12:20 Go be go na le bana babo rena ba supago, wa mathomo a tsea mosadi, a se tlogele peu." 
Mark12:21 Wa bobedi a mo tsea a hwa, a se tlogele peu, wa boraro le yena." 
Mark12:22 Ba supago ba be ba na le yena leba se tlogele peu; la mafelelo go tsohle mosadi le yena o ile a hwa. 
Mark12:23 Bjale tsogong, ge ba tsoga, e tla ba mosadi wa mang gare ga bona? gobane ba supago ba be ba na le mosadi wa gagwe." 
Mark12:24 Jesu a ba araba a re: Na ga le phoso, ka gobane ga le tsebe Mangwalo goba maatla a Modimo?" 
Mark12:25 Gobane ge ba tsoga bahung, ga ba nyale e bile ga ba nyalwe; eupsa ba swana le barongwa ba legodimong." 
Mark12:26 Ge e le bahu bao ba tsogilego: na ga se la bala ka pukung ya Moshe kamoo Modimo a boletsego le yena sethokgweng sa meetlwa a re: Ke nna Modimo wa Aberahame le Modimo wa Isaka le Modimo wa Jakobo? 
Mark12:27 Ga se Modimo wa bahu, eupsa ke Modimo wa ba ba phelago; ka fao o fositse kudu." 
Mark12:28 Yo mongwe wa bamangwalo a tla a ba kwa a ba ahlaahla lea lemoga gore o ba arabile gabotse, a mmotsisa a re: Taelo ya pele go tsohle ke efe?" 
Mark12:29 Jesu a mo fetola a re: Taelo ya pele go melao ka moka ke: Ekwa, Isiraele! Morena Modimo wa rena ke Morena o tee." 
Mark12:30 O rate Jehofa Modimo wa gago ka dipelo tsa gago ka moka le ka moya wa gago ka moka le ka monagano wa gago ka moka le ka matla a gago ka moka. 
Mark12:31 Ya bobedi e swana le, e lego: O rate moagisani wa gago bjalo ka ge o ithata. Ga go na taelo ye nngwe ye e fetago ye." 
Mark12:32 Mongwaledi a re go yena: Go lokile, Moruti, o boletse thereso, ka gobane go na le Modimo o tee; lega go yo mongwe ge e se yena." 
Mark12:33 Go mo rata ka pelo ka moka le ka monagano ka moka le ka moya ka moka le ka matla ka moka, le go rata wa gabo bjalo ka ge a ithata, go feta dihlabelo ka moka tsa go fiswa le bahlaselwa." 
Mark12:34 Jesu ge a bona gore o arabile ka bohlale, a re go yena: Ga o kgole le mmuso wa Modimo. Lega go yo a ilego a ba le sebete sa go mmotsisa potsiso efe goba efe ka morago ga fao." 
Mark12:35 Jesu a fetola a re ge a be a ruta tempeleng: “Bamangwalo ba bolela bjang gore Keresete ke Morwa wa Dafida? 
Mark12:36 Gobane Dafida ka boyena o boletse ka Moya o Mokgethwa: “Jehofa a re go Morena wa ka: Dula ka letsogong la ka la le letona go fihlela ke dira manaba a gago setulo sa dinao tsa gago. 
Mark12:37 Dafida ka boyena o mmitsa Morena; gona morwa wa gagwe o kae? lebatho ba tlwaelegilego ba ile ba mo kwa ka lethabo. 
Mark12:38 Ge a ruta a re go bona: Hlokomelang bamangwalo bao ba ratago go sepela ka diaparo tse ditelele le go dumedisa mebarakeng. 
Mark12:39 Babusi ba dula disinagogeng le diphaposing tsa ka godimo menyanyang; 
Mark12:40 bao ba jago dintlo tsa bahlologadi leba rapela dithapelo tse telele bakeng sa go itira eka ke bona. 
Mark12:41 Jesu a dula fase go lebana le lefelo la matlotlo, a bona lesaba le tshollela tshelete ka polokelong ya matlotlo, lebahumi ba bantsi ba tshollela tshelete ye ntsi." 
Mark12:42 Go tla mohlologadi yo mongwe wa modiidi, a lahlela ditshelete tse pedi tseo di lekanago le sente." 
Mark12:43 A bitsa barutiwa ba gagwe go yena a re go bona: Ruri ke re go lena, mohlologadi yo wa modiidi o tsentse tshelete ye ntsi go feta bohle bao ba tsenyago matlotlong." 
Mark12:44 Gobane ba tshollela tsohle tse di tletsego tsa bona; eupsa ka baka la go hloka ga gagwe o ile a lahlela tsohle tseo a bego a e-na le tsona, gaesita le bophelo bja gagwe ka moka." 
Mark13:1 Lege A etswa ka tempeleng, yo mongwe wa barutiwa ba gagwe a re go yena: Moruti, lebelela gore ke maswika a mohuta mang le meago efe yeo e lego mo!" 
Mark13:2 Jesu a mo fetola a re: Na o bona meago ye megolo ye? go ka se tlogelwe lefsika le tee godimo ga le lengwe leo le ka se kego la phusolwa. 
Mark13:3 Ge a dutse Thabeng ya Mehlware go lebana le tempele, Petere le Jakobo le Johane le Andrea ba mmotsisa ka thoko." 
Mark13:4 Re botse gore dilo tse di tla direga neng? lepontsho e tla ba efe ge dilo tse ka moka di tla phethagala? 
Mark13:5 Jesu a ba araba, a thoma go re: Hlokomelang gore go se be le motho yo a le forago." 
Mark13:6 Gobane ba bantsi ba tla tla ka fase ga leina la ka leba re: Ke nna Keresete; leo tla fora ba bantsi. 
Mark13:7 Ge le ekwa ka dintwa le mabarebare a dintwa, le se ke la tshoga, gobane dilo tse bjalo di swanetse go direga; eupsa bofelo bo ka se hlwe bo fihla." 
Mark13:8 Gobane setshaba se tla tsogela setshaba, mmuso kgahlanong le mmuso, go tla ba le ditshisinyego tsa lefase mafelong a fapa-fapanego, go tla ba le ditlala le ditlaisego." 
Mark13:9 Eupsa itlhokomeleng, gobane ba tla le gafela dikeletso; leka disinagogeng le tla bethwa, lela tliswa pele ga babusi le dikgosi ka baka la ka, e le bohlatse kgahlanong le bona." 
Mark13:10 Ebangedi e swanetse go bolelwa pele gare ga ditshaba ka moka. 
Mark13:11 Eupsa ge ba go eta pele ba go gafela, o se ke wa nagana e sa le pele ka seo o tlago go se bolela, leo se ke wa naganisisa e sa le pele; eupsa tsohle tseo o tlago go di fiwa ka nako yeo, o di bolela; gobane ga se lena le le bolelago, eupsa ke Moya o Mokgethwa." 
Mark13:12 Ngwaneso o tla eka ngwanabo yoo a hwe, tate a mo eka morwa; bana ba tla tsogela batswadi ba bona, ba ba bolaya." 
Mark13:13 Le tla hloiwa ke bohle ka baka la leina la ka; eupsa yo a kgotlelelago go fihla bofelong, o tla pholoswa." 
Mark13:14 Eupsa ge le bona makgapha a lesope, ao a boletswego ke moporofeta Daniele, a eme moo e sego ya lona, anke yo a balago a a kwesise, gona bao ba lego Judea ba swanetse go tshabela dithabeng." 
Mark13:14 Eupsa ge le bona makgapha a lesope, ao a boletswego ke moporofeta Daniele, a eme moo e sego ya lona, anke yo a balago a a kwesise, gona bao ba lego Judea ba swanetse go tshabela dithabeng." 
Mark13:15 Yo a lego marulelong a se ke a theogela ka ntlong goba a tsena go yona go yo tsea selo le ge e le sefe ntlong ya gagwe. 
Mark13:16 Yo a lego tshemong a se ke a retologa go yo tsea seaparo sa gagwe. 
Mark13:17 Eupsa go madimabe basadi ba baimana le bao ba amusago mehleng yeo! 
Mark13:18 Le rapele gore go tshaba ga gago go se be ka marega. 
Mark13:19 Gobane mehleng yeo go tla ba le masetla-pelo ao a sa kago a ba gona go tloga mathomong a tlholo ao Modimo a a bopilego go fihla ga bjale, le gona a ka se be gona." 
Mark13:20 Ka ntle le ge Jehofa a be a khutsufaditse matsatsi ao, ga go nama yeo e bego e tla pholoswa; eupsa ka baka la bakgethwa bao a ba kgethilego, o khutsufaditse matsatsi." 
Mark13:21 Ge motho a ka re go lena: Bona, Keresete ke yo; goba lebelela, o gona; o se ke wa mo dumela:" 
Mark13:22 Gobane Keresete ya maaka le baporofeta ba maaka ba tla tsoga ba dira mehlolo le mehlolo gore ge nkabe go kgonega, ba goketsa le bakgethwa." 
Mark13:23 Eupsa hlokomelang: bona, ke le boditse tsohle e sa le pele." 
Mark13:24 Eupsa mehleng yeo, ka morago ga masetlapelo ao, letsatsi le tla fifala, lengwedi o ka se bonege." 
Mark13:25 Dinaledi tsa legodimo di tla wa lematla a legodimong a tla sisinywa. 
Mark13:26 Ke moka ba tla bona Morwa wa Motho a etla godimo ga maru ka maatla a magolo le letago. 
Mark13:27 Leka morago O tla romela barongwa ba Gagwe lea kgoboketsa bakgethwa ba gagwe go tswa diphefong tse nne, go tloga mafelelong a lefase go fihla mafelelong a legodimo." 
Mark13:28 Bjale ithute seswantsho sa mogo; Ge lekala la gagwe le sa le boleta lematlakala a hloga, o a tseba gore selemo se kgauswi." 
Mark13:29 Ka gona le lena le tseba, ge le bona dilo tse di direga, gore di kgauswi, ee, mejakong." 
Mark13:30 Ruri ke le botsa gore moloko wo o ka se fete go fihlela dilo tse ka moka di direga. 
Mark13:31 Legodimo le lefase di tla feta, eupsa mantsu a ka a ka se fete." 
Mark13:32 Eupsa letsatsi leo le iri yeo ga go yo a tsebago, gaesita le barongwa ba legodimong, gaesita le Morwa, eupsa Tate." 
Mark13:33 Hlokomelang, phakgameng le rapele, gobane ga le tsebe gore nako e tla fihla neng." 
Mark13:34 Gobane Morwa wa motho o swana le monna yo a sepelago kgole, yo a tlogetsego ntlo ya gagwe, a nea bahlanka ba gagwe le yo mongwe le yo mongwe matla a gagwe modiro wa gagwe lea laela moleti wa kgoro gore a phakgame." 
Mark13:35 Ka gona, phakgame, ka gobane ga le tsebe gore mong wa ntlo o tla tla neng, mantsiboa goba bosegogare goba ge mokoko o lla goba mesong." 
Mark13:36 E le gore a se ke a tla gateetee a go hwetsa o robetse. 
Mark13:37 Se ke le botsago sona, ke se botsa bohle: Phakgama." 
Mark14:1 Ka morago ga matsatsi a mabedi gwa ba monyanya wa Paseka le monyanya wa dinkgwa tse di sa omelwago; 
Mark14:2 Eupsa ba re: E sego ka letsatsi la monyanya, gore go se be le khuduego gare ga setshaba." 
Mark14:3 Ge a be a le Bethania ntlong ya Simone wa molephera, ge a be a le tafoleng, gwa tla mosadi a swere lepokisi la alabaster leo le nago le setlolo se se bohlokwa kudu sa dipikiri. Lea thuba lepokisi leo lea le tshollela hlogong ya gagwe." 
Mark14:4 Lego be go na le ba bangwe bao ba bego ba galefile ka gare ga bona leba re: Ke ka lebaka la eng ditlakala tse di dirilwe ka setlolo? 
Mark14:5 Gobane e be e ka rekiswa ka dipente tse fetago makgolo a mararo leya newa badiidi. Ba mo ngunanguna. 
Mark14:6 Jesu a re: A eme; ke ka lebaka la eng o mo tshwenya? o dirile mosomo o mogolo go nna. 
Mark14:7 Ka gobane o dula o na le badiidi, lege o nyaka, o ka ba direla botse; eupsa ga se ka mehla o nago le Nna." 
Mark14:8 O ile a dira seo a ka se kgonago, a tla pele go tlo tlotsa setopo sa ka gore se bolokwe." 
Mark14:9 Ruri ke le botsa gore kae le kae mo Ebangedi ye e tlago go bolelwa gona lefaseng ka bophara, seo a se dirilego le sona se tla bolelwa e le segopotso go yena." 
Mark14:10 Judase Isikariote, yo mongwe wa ba lesomepedi, a ya go baperisita ba bagolo gore a mo eke go bona." 
Mark14:11 Ge ba ekwa seo, ba thaba leba mo holofetsa gore ba tla mo fa tshelete. Leo ile a nyaka kamoo a ka mo ekago ka gona gabonolo." 
Mark14:12 Letsatsing la mathomo la dinkgwa tse di sa omelwago, ge ba hlaba Paseka, barutiwa ba gagwe ba re go yena: O nyaka gore re ye kae re yo lokisetsa gore o je Paseka?" 
Mark14:13 A roma barutiwa ba gagwe ba babedi a re go bona: Eyang motseng, lemoo le tla kopana le monna yo a rwelego pitsana ya meetse; Mo latele." 
Mark14:14 Kae le kae moo a tsenago gona, botsa mong wa ntlo o re: Moruti o re: Ka phaposing ya baeng yeo ke tlago go ja Paseka go yona le barutiwa ba ka e kae?" 
Mark14:15 O tla go bontsha phaposi e kgolo ya ka godimo yeo e nago le dithoto e bile e lokile; re itokisetse. 
Mark14:16 Barutiwa ba gagwe ba tswa ba tsena motseng, ba hwetsa kamoo a ba boditsego ka gona; ba lokisa Paseka." 
Mark14:17 Mantsiboa o tla le ba lesomepedi. 
Mark14:18 Ge ba dutse ba eja, Jesu a re: Ruri ke re go lena, yo mongwe wa lena yo a jago le nna o tla nkeka." 
Mark14:19 Leba thoma go nyama leba re go yena ka o tee ka o tee: Na ke nna? yo mongwe a re: Na ke nna? 
Mark14:20 A ba araba a re: Yo ke yo mongwe wa ba lesomepedi bao ba kolobetsago le nna ka sebjaneng. 
Mark14:21 Morwa wa Motho o a tloga, bjalo ka ge go ngwadilwe ka yena, eupsa go madimabe motho yo Morwa wa Motho a ekilwego ka yena! go be go tla ba kaone go monna yoo ge nkabe a se a ka a belegwa." 
Mark14:22 Ge ba sa eja, Jesu a tsea senkgwa, a segofatsa lea se ngwatha, a ba fa a re: Tseang, le je, wo ke mmele wa ka." 
Mark14:23 LeA tsea senwelo, leka morago ga go leboga, a ba fa sona; leka moka ba nwa go yona." 
Mark14:24 LeA re go bona: A ke madi a ka a testamente ye mpsha, ao a tshollwago ka baka la ba bantsi." 
Mark14:25 Ruri ke le botsa gore nka se sa nwa dienywa tsa morara, go fihla letsatsing leo ka lona ke tlago go di nwa e mpsha Mmusong wa Modimo." 
Mark14:26 Ka morago ga go opela sefela, ba tswela ka ntle ba ya Thabeng ya Mehlware." 
Mark14:27 Jesu a re go bona: “Ka moka ga lena le tla kgopiswa ke nna bosegong bjo, ka gobane go ngwadilwe gwa thwe: “Ke tla otla modisi ledinku di tla gasana.”" 
Mark14:28 Eupsa ka morago ga ge ke tsogile, ke tla le etelela pele kua Galilea." 
Mark14:29 Eupsa Petere a re go yena: “Le ge bohle ba ka kgopisega, nna nka se kgopise." 
Mark14:30 Jesu a re go yena: Ruri ke re go wena, lehono, le bosegong bjo, pele kgogo e lla gabedi, o tla ntatola gararo." 
Mark14:31 Eupsa yena a bolela ka go hlabosa le go feta: “Ge nka hwa le wena, nka se go latole le gatee. Ka gona ka moka ba re." 
Mark14:32 Ba fihla lefelong leo le bitswago Getsemane, a re go barutiwa ba gagwe: “Dulang mo ke sa rapela.”" 
Mark14:33 A tsea Petere le Jakobo le Johane, a thoma go makala, a imela kudu;" 
Mark14:34 Leo ba botse: Moya wa ka o nyamile kudu go fihla lehung; dula mo leo lebelele. 
Mark14:35 A ya pele gannyane, a wela fase, a rapela gore, ge go kgonega, iri e fete go yena." 
Mark14:36 LeA re: Abba, Tate, se sengwe le se sengwe se a kgonega go Wena; ntseele senwelo se; le ge go le bjalo e sego seo ke se ratago, eupsa seo O se ratago." 
Mark14:37 LeA tla a ba hwetsa ba robetse lea re go Petere: Simone, na o robetse? o be o ka se kgone go dula o phafogile iri e tee?" 
Mark14:38 Phafoga le rapele, gore le se tsene molekong. Moya o itokisitse e le ka kgonthe, eupsa nama e fokola." 
Mark14:39 Legape O ile a tloga lea rapela lea bolela mantsu a a swanago. 
Mark14:40 Ge a boa, a ba hwetsa ba robetse gape, ka gobane mahlo a bona a be a imela, leba be ba sa tsebe gore ba ka mo araba eng." 
Mark14:41 LeA tla ka lekga la boraro lea re go bona: Robalang bjale lele khutse. Go lekane, iri e fihlile; bona, Morwa wa motho o gafetswe diatleng tsa badiradibe." 
Mark14:42 Tsoga, a re sepele; bona, yo a nkekago o kgauswi." 
Mark14:43 Gateetee ge a sa bolela, Judase, yo mongwe wa ba lesomepedi, a tla, a na le lesaba le legolo le le swerego ditshosa le dithupa, go tswa go baperisita ba bagolo le bamangwalo le bagolo." 
Mark14:44 Yo a mo ekilego a ba nea pontsho lea re: Mang le mang yo ke tlago go mo atla, ke yena; mo tsee o mo etelele pele a bolokegile." 
Mark14:45 Gateetee ge a fihla, gateetee a ya go yena lea re: Moruti, mong! lea mo atla." 
Mark14:46 Ba mo bea diatla, ba mo swara." 
Mark14:47 Yo mongwe wa bao ba bego ba eme moo a ntsha tshosa lea itia mohlanka wa moperisita yo mogolo, a mo kgaola tsebe." 
Mark14:48 Jesu a fetola a re go bona: Na le tswile bjalo ka ge le lebane le lehodu le swere ditshosa le dikota go ntshwara? 
Mark14:49 Ke be ke na le lena letsatsi le letsatsi tempeleng ke ruta, lega se la Ntsea, eupsa Mangwalo a swanetse go phethagatswa." 
Mark14:50 Ka moka ga bona ba mo lahla ba tshaba. 
Mark14:51 Lesogana le lengwe la mo latela, ka lesela la linene leo le lahlilwego go dikologa mmele wa Gagwe wo o sa aparago; masogana a mo swara." 
Mark14:52 A tlogela lesela la linene a ba tshaba a sa apara selo. 
Mark14:53 Ba isa Jesu go moperisita yo mogolo, lebaperisita ba bagolo ka moka le bagolo le bamangwalo ba kgobokana le yena." 
Mark14:54 Petere a mo latela a le kgole a tsena ka mosate wa moperisita yo mogolo; a dula fase le bahlanka, a ruthetsa mollong." 
Mark14:55 Baperisita ba bagolo le Lekgotla ka moka ba nyaka bohlatse kgahlanong le Jesu gore ba mmolaye; lega se a hwetsa selo. 
Mark14:56 Gobane ba bantsi ba ile ba hlatsela maaka kgahlanong le yena, eupsa dihlatse tsa bona di be di sa dumelelane." 
Mark14:57 Ba bangwe ba ema ba mo hlatsela maaka ba re. 
Mark14:58 Re mo kwele a re: Ke tla phusola tempele ye yeo e dirilwego ka diatla, leka matsatsi a mararo ke tla aga ye nngwe yeo e dirilwego ka diatla." 
Mark14:59 Eupsa bohlatse bja bona le bjona ga se bja dumelelana le seo. 
Mark14:60 Moprista yo mogolo a ema gare a botsisa Jesu lea re: Na ga o arabe selo? ke eng seo ba se hlatselago kgahlanong le wena? 
Mark14:61 Eupsa yena a homola lea se arabe selo. Gape moperisita yo mogolo a mmotsisa lea re go yena: Na o Kreste, Morwa wa Mohlogonolo?" 
Mark14:62 LeJesu a re: Ke nna, lele tla bona Morwamotho a dutse ka letsogong le letona la maatla lea etla godimo ga maru a legodimo." 
Mark14:63 Ke moka moperisita yo mogolo a gagola diaparo tsa gagwe lea re: Ke dihlatse dife tse dingwe tseo re di hlokago? 
Mark14:64 Le kwele thogako yeo; o nagana eng leka moka ba mo ahlolela lehu. 
Mark14:65 Ba bangwe ba thoma go mo tshwela ka mare, ba mo khupetsa sefahlego, ba mo itia ka difihla ba re go yena: Porofeta! bahlanka ba mo otla ka diatla tsa bona." 
Mark14:66 Ge Petere a sa le ka mosate, a tla yo mongwe wa makgoba a moperisita yo mogolo." 
Mark14:67 Ge a bona Petere a ruthetsa, a mo lebelela a re: Le wena o be o na le Jesu wa Natsaretha." 
Mark14:68 Eupsa a latola lea re: Ga ke tsebe, ebile ga ke kwesise seo o se bolelago. A tswela ka ntle a ya ka phaposing ya ka ntle; le sehlopha sa mokoko." 
Mark14:69 Mohlanka wa mosadi o ile a mmona gape lea thoma go bolela go bao ba emego moo: Yo ke yo mongwe wa bona. 
Mark14:70 A e latola gape. Lenako ye nnyane ka morago ga fao, bao ba emego fao gape ba re go Petere: Ka nnete, o yo mongwe wa bona, ka gobane o Mogalilea, lepolelo ya gago e dumelelana le yona." 
Mark14:71 Eupsa a thoma go roga le go ikana lea re: Ga ke mo tsebe monna yo o bolelago ka yena. 
Mark14:72 Gomme ka lekga la bobedi kgogo ya namela. Le Petere a nagana ka lentsu leo Jesu a mmoditsego lona: Pele kgogo e lla gabedi, o tla Ntatola gararo. Lege a nagana ka seo, a lla." 
Mark15:1 Gateetee mesong baperisita ba bagolo ba swara lekgotla le bagolo le bamangwalo le lekgotla ka moka, leJesu a tlemiwa a iswa lea gafelwa Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Pilato a mmotsisa a re: Na o Kgosi ya Bajuda? A mo fetola a re: O bolela bjalo. 
Mark15:3 Baperisita ba bagolo ba mo latofatsa ka dilo tse dintsi, eupsa a se arabe selo." 
Mark15:4 LePilato a mmotsisa gape lea re: Na ga o arabe selo? bona gore ba go hlatsela dilo tse dintsi gakaakang. 
Mark15:5 Eupsa Jesu ga se a ka a araba selo; moo Pilato a ilego a makala. 
Mark15:6 Lemonyanyeng woo A ba lokollela mogolegwa o tee, mang le mang yo ba bego ba mo nyaka." 
Mark15:7 Go be go na le yo mongwe yo a bitswago Baraba, yo a bego a robetse a tlemilwe ka dithapo tsa diatla gotee le bao ba rabelago le yena, yo a ilego a bolaya borabeleng bjoo." 
Mark15:8 Lesaba leo le bego le goeletsa ka go hlabosa la thoma go kganyoga gore a dire bjalo ka ge a be a le dira ka mehla. 
Mark15:9 Eupsa Pilato a ba araba a re: Na le nyaka gore ke le lokolle Kgosi ya Bajuda? 
Mark15:10 Gobane o be a tseba gore baperisita ba bagolo ba mo lokolotse ka baka la mona. 
Mark15:11 Eupsa baperisita ba bagolo ba kgothatsa setshaba gore se ba lokolle Baraba. 
Mark15:12 Pilato a ba araba gape a re: Le nyaka gore ke dire eng go yo le mmitsago Kgosi ya Bajuda? 
Mark15:13 Ba goeletsa gape ba re: Mo bapoleng. 
Mark15:14 Ke moka Pilato a re go bona: “Ke ka baka la’ng, ke bobe bofe bjo a bo dirilego? leba goeletsa le go feta: Mo bapoleng." 
Mark15:15 Ka gona Pilato, yo a bego a ikemiseditse go kgotsofatsa setshaba, a ba lokolla Baraba leka morago ga go mo otla, a gafela Jesu gore a bapolwe." 
Mark15:16 Masole a mo isa holong yeo e bitswago Praetorium; leba bitsa sehlopha ka moka mmogo. 
Mark15:17 Ba mo apesa diaparo tse diphepolo, ba loga mphapahlogo wa meetlwa, ba o apara hlogong ya gagwe." 
Mark15:18 A thoma go mo dumedisa: “Dumela, Kgosi ya Bajuda!" 
Mark15:19 Ba mo itia hlogong ka lehlaka, ba mo tshwela ka mare, ba khunama ka mangwele ba mo khunamela." 
Mark15:20 Leka morago ga ge ba mo kwera, ba mo apola seaparo se se pherese leba mo apara diaparo tsa gagwe ka nosi leba mo eta pele go yo mo bapola." 
Mark15:21 Ke moka ba gapeletsa Simone yo mongwe wa Kirene yo a bego a feta mo nageng, tatago Alexander le Rufo, gore a rwale sefapano sa gagwe." 
Mark15:22 Ba mo isa lefelong leo la Gologotha, leo ge e ba le fetoletswe e lego lefelo la legata." 
Mark15:23 Ba mo nea beine yeo e hlakantswego le mira gore a e nwe, eupsa a se e amogele." 
Mark15:24 Ge ba mo bapotse, ba arola diaparo tsa gagwe leba lahlela matengwa ao yo mongwe le yo mongwe a bego a tla a tsea." 
Mark15:25 Lee be e le iri ya boraro, leba mo bapola." 
Mark15:26 Hlogo ya tatofatso ya gagwe e ngwadilwe ka godimo: Kgosi ya Bajuda. 
Mark15:27 Lemmogo le Yena ba bapola mahodu a mabedi; yo mongwe ka letsogong la gagwe la le letona leyo mongwe ka letsogong la gagwe la nngele. 
Mark15:28 LeLengwalo la phethagala leo le rego: le o ile a balwa le batlodi. 
Mark15:29 Lebao ba fetago ba mo rora leba sikinya dihlogo leba re: Ao, Wena yo a phusolago tempele lewa e aga ka matsatsi a mararo!" 
Mark15:30 Ipoloke o fologe sefapanong. 
Mark15:31 Ka yona tsela yeo baperisita ba bagolo ba boledisana le bamangwalo ka go kwera ba re: O pholositse ba bangwe; a ka se kgone go ipholosa. 
Mark15:32 A Kreste, Kgosi ya Isiraele, a theogele sefapanong bjale, gore re kgone go bona le go dumela. Lebao ba bapotswego le Yena ba mo gobosa." 
Mark15:33 Ge iri ya botshelela e fihla, lefsifsi la ba godimo ga naga ka moka go fihla ka iri ya senyane." 
Mark15:34 Ka iri ya senyane Jesu a goeletsa ka lentsu le legolo, a re: Eloi, Eloi, lama sabagtani? ke, ge e fetoletswe: Modimo wa ka, Modimo wa ka, ke ka baka la’ng o ntlogetse?" 
Mark15:35 Ba bangwe ba bao ba emego moo ge ba ekwa ba re: Bonang, o bitsa Eliya." 
Mark15:36 Yo mongwe a kitima a tlatsa sepontshe se se tletsego asene lea se bea godimo ga lehlaka lea mo nwa lea re: E tlogele! a re bone ge e ba Elias a tla tla go mo tsea. 
Mark15:37 Jesu a goeletsa ka lentsu le legolo lea gafa moya. 
Mark15:38 Sesiro sa tempele sa gagoga ka diripa go tloga godimo go ya fase. 
Mark15:39 Ge molaodi wa madira yo a bego a eme go lebana le yena a bona gore o goeletsa ka tsela ye lea gafa moya, a re: Ka nnete, monna yo e be e le Morwa wa Modimo." 
Mark15:40 Gape go be go na le basadi bao ba bego ba lebeletse ba le kgole; 
Mark15:41 (bao le bona ge a be a le Galilea, ba mo latela, ba mo hlankela) le basadi ba bangwe ba bantsi bao ba ilego ba rotogela Jerusalema le yena." 
Mark15:42 Bjale ge mantsiboa a fihla, ka ge e be e le go lokisetsa, ke letsatsi la pele ga Sabatha." 
Mark15:43 Josefa wa Arimatea, moeletsi yo a hlomphegago, yo le yena a bego a letetse mmuso wa Modimo, a tla, a tsena ka sebete Pilato, a kganyoga setopo sa Jesu." 
Mark15:44 Pilato a ipotsisa ge e ba a setse a hwile; lea bitsa molaodi wa madira go Yena lea mmotsisa ge e ba a hwile lebakanyana. 
Mark15:45 Ge a tseba seo go tswa go molaodi wa madira, a nea setopo go Josefa." 
Mark15:46 A reka lesela le lebotse, a mo folosa a mo phuthela ka lesela la linene, a mo robatsa lebitleng leo le betlilwego leswikeng, a kgokolosetsa leswika mojakong wa lebitla." 
Mark15:47 Maria Magdalena le Maria mmago Josese ba bona moo a robaletswego gona. 
Mark16:1 Ge Sabatha e fedile, Maria Magdalena le Maria mmago Jakobo le Salome ba reka dinoko gore ba tle ba mo tlotse." 
Mark16:2 Mesong e sa le ka pela, ka letsatsi la mathomo la beke, ba fihla lebitleng ge letsatsi le hlaba." 
Mark16:3 Ba re: “Ke mang yo re tlago go kgokolosa leswika mojakong wa lebitla? 
Mark16:4 Ge ba lebelela, ba bona leswika leo le kgokologile, ka gobane e be e le le legolo kudu." 
Mark16:5 Ge ba tsena ka lebitleng, ba bona lesogana le dutse ka lehlakoreng le letona, le apere kobo e telele e tshweu. Ba tshoga kudu." 
Mark16:6 A re go bona: Le se ke la tshoga. O nyaka Jesu wa Natsaretha yo a bapotswego; A ema; Ga a gona mo; lebelela lefelo leo ba mo robaditsego go lona. 
Mark16:7 Eupsa eyang le botse barutiwa ba gagwe le Petere gore o ya pele ga lena Galilea; fao o tla mmona, bjalo ka ge a go boditse." 
Mark16:8 Kapejana ba tswa ba tshaba lebitleng; gobane ba be ba thothomela, ba makala; leba se bolele selo go motho; ka gobane ba be ba tshogile." 
Mark16:9 Ge Jesu a tsoga e sa le ka pela ka letsatsi la mathomo la beke, o ile a iponagatsa pele go Maria Magdalena, yo a ilego a lahlela batemona ba supago go yena." 
Mark16:10 A ya a botsa bao ba bego ba na le yena, ge ba be ba lla le go lla." 
Mark16:11 Ge ba ekwa gore o a phela e bile o bonwe ke yena, ba se dumele." 
Mark16:12 Ka morago ga moo a tswelela ka sebopego se sengwe go ba babedi ba bona ge ba sepela ba tsena nageng. 
Mark16:13 Ba ya ba botsa ba bangwe ka yona; mme ba se ba dumele. 
Mark16:14 Ka morago ga moo a iponagatsa go ba lesometee ge ba be ba le tafoleng, a ba sola ka go se dumele ga bona le ka go thatafala ga dipelo, ka gobane ba be ba sa dumele bao ba mmonego ka morago ga tsogo ya gagwe." 
Mark16:15 LeA re go bona: Eyang lefaseng ka moka leo rere ebangedi go sebopiwa se sengwe le se sengwe. 
Mark16:16 Yo a dumelago lea kolobetswa o tla pholoswa; eupsa yo a sa dumelego o tla ahlolwa. 
Mark16:17 Gomme bao ba dumelago, dipontsho tse di tla latela; Ba tla leleka batemona ka leina la ka; ba tla bolela ka maleme a maswa;" 
Mark16:18 Ba tla tsea dinoga; ge ba ka nwa selo le ge e le sefe se se bolayago, se ka se ba gobatse; ba tla bea diatla godimo ga balwetsi, leba tla fola." 
Mark16:19 Ka morago ga gore Jehofa a bolele le bona, a rotosetswa legodimong a dula fase ka letsogong le letona la Modimo." 
Mark16:20 Ba tswela pele ba bolela gohle, mola Jehofa a be a soma le bona lea tiisetsa lentsu ka dipontsho tseo di le latetsego. Amene." 
Luke1:1 Ka ge ba bantsi ba ikemiseditse go bolela ditaba tse di dumelwago e le ka kgonthe gare ga rena. 
Luke1:2 Go etsa ge ba ile ba ineela go rena, bao go tloga mathomong e bego e le dihlatse tse di bonego ka mahlo le bahlanka ba lentsu;" 
Luke1:3 Le gona ke ile ka bonala e le mo gobotse go nna, ka ge ke be ke na le dilo tsohle tse di phethagetsego go tloga mathomong, go go ngwalela ka thulaganyo, Theophilo yo mobotse." 
Luke1:4 E le gore le tsebe go kgonthisega ga dilo tseo le rutilwego ka tsona. 
Luke1:5 Mehleng ya Heroda kgosi ya Judea, go be go na le moperisita yo mongwe yo a bitswago Sakaria, yo a tswago sehlopheng sa Abia. Mosadi wa gagwe e be e le wa barwedi ba Arone, leina la gagwe e be e le Elisabetha." 
Luke1:5 Mehleng ya Heroda kgosi ya Judea, go be go na le moperisita yo mongwe yo a bitswago Sakaria, yo a tswago sehlopheng sa Abia. Mosadi wa gagwe e be e le wa barwedi ba Arone, leina la gagwe e be e le Elisabetha." 
Luke1:6 Bobedi bja bona ba be ba lokile pele ga Modimo leba sepela ba se na bosodi melaong ka moka le melaong ya Jehofa. 
Luke1:7 Ba be ba se na ngwana, ka gobane Elisabetha e be e le moopa, lebobedi bja bona ba be ba setse ba babja ka mengwaga." 
Luke1:8 Legwa direga gore ge a be a swere mosomo wa moperisita pele ga Modimo go ya ka thulaganyo ya tsela ya gagwe," 
Luke1:9 Go ya ka mokgwa wa boprista, pheletso ya gagwe e be e le go tshuma diorelo ge a tsena tempeleng ya Morena." 
Luke1:10 Lesaba ka moka la batho la rapela ka ntle nakong ya diorelo. 
Luke1:11 Morongwa wa Jehofa a iponagatsa go yena a eme ka lehlakoreng le letona la aletare ya diorelo. 
Luke1:12 Ge Sakaria a mmona, a tshoga, lea wela poifo." 
Luke1:13 Eupsa morongwa a re go yena: Sakaria, o se ke wa boifa, gobane thapelo ya gago e arabilwe; mosadi wa gago Elisabetha o tla go belega morwa, leo mo ree leina la Johane." 
Luke1:14 Le tla ba le lethabo le lethabo; leba bantsi ba tla thaba ge a belegwa. 
Luke1:15 Gobane e tla ba yo mogolo mahlong a Jehofa lea ka se nwe beine goba seno se se tagago; o tla tlala Moya o Mokgethwa, e le go tloga popelong ya mmagwe." 
Luke1:16 Bana ba bantsi ba Isiraele o tla sokolla go Jehofa Modimo wa bona. 
Luke1:17 O tla mo etelela pele ka moya le ka matla a Eliya, gore a fetose dipelo tsa bo-tatago bana le bao ba sa kwego bohlale bja baloki; go lokisetsa Morena setshaba." 
Luke1:18 Sakaria a re go morongwa: Ke tla tseba bjang se? gobane ke mokgalabje, mosadi wa ka o a babja ka mengwaga." 
Luke1:19 Morongwa a mo fetola a re: Ke nna Gabariele yo a emego pele ga Modimo; lea romelwa go bolela le lena le go le botsa ditaba tse tse di thabisago. 
Luke1:20 Lebona, o tla ba semumu lewa se kgone go bolela, go fihla letsatsing leo dilo tse di tlago go dirwa ka lona, ka gobane ga le dumele mantsu a ka, ao a tlago phethagatswa ka nako ya ona." 
Luke1:21 Setshaba sa letela Sakaria lesa makatswa ke ge a dutse tempeleng nako e telele gakaakaa. 
Luke1:22 Ge a etswa, a palelwa ke go bolela le bona, leba lemoga gore o bone pono ka tempeleng;" 
Luke1:23 legwa direga gore, gateetee ge matsatsi a bodiredi bja gagwe a fedile, a ya ntlong ya gagwe." 
Luke1:24 Ka morago ga matsatsi ao mosadi wa gagwe Elisabetha a ima lea iphihla dikgwedi tse hlano lea re. 
Luke1:25 Morena o ile a ntira ka mokgwa wo matsatsing ao a mponego ka ona, go tlosa kgoboso ya ka gare ga batho." 
Luke1:26 Ka kgwedi ya botshelela morongwa Gabariele a romelwa go Modimo motseng wa Galilea wo o bitswago Natsaretha. 
Luke1:27 Go kgarebe yeo e beeleditswego go monna yo a bitswago Josefa, yo a tswago lapeng la Dafida; leina la kgarebe e be e le Maria." 
Luke1:28 Morongwa a tsena go yena a re: Dumela, wena yo botse kudu, Morena o na le wena; o segofaditswe gare ga basadi." 
Luke1:29 Ge a mmona, a tshwenyega ka baka la lentsu la gagwe, a nagana ka monaganong wa gagwe gore e tla ba tumediso e kaakang." 
Luke1:30 Morongwa a re go yena: “O se ke wa boifa, Maria, gobane o amogetswe ke Modimo." 
Luke1:31 O tla ima ka popelong ya gago lewa belega morwa leo mo ree leina la Jesu. 
Luke1:32 E tla ba yo mogolo lea bitswa Morwa wa Yo Godimodimo, leJehofa Modimo o tla mo nea sedulo sa bogosi sa tatagwe Dafida." 
Luke1:33 E tla ba kgosi ya ntlo ya Jakobo ka mo go sa felego; mme mmuso wa gagwe o ka se fele. 
Luke1:34 Ke moka Maria a re go morongwa: Go tla ba bjang, ka ge ke sa tsebe motho?" 
Luke1:35 Morongwa a mo fetola a re: Moya o Mokgethwa o tla go wela, maatla a Yo Godimodimo a tla go apesa; ka fao le mokgethwa yo a tlago go tswalwa go wena o tla bitswa Morwa wa Modimo." 
Luke1:36 Lebona, motswala wa gago Elisabetha, le yena o ile a ima morwa ka mengwaga ya gagwe; ke kgwedi ya botshelela le yena yo a bego a bitswa moopa." 
Luke1:37 Gobane go Modimo ga go selo seo se ka se kgonego. 
Luke1:38 Maria a re: Mohlanka wa Morena ke yo; a e be go nna go ya ka lentsu la gago. Morongwa a tloga go yena. 
Luke1:39 Mehleng yeo Maria a tsoga a akgofela dithabeng, motseng wa Juda;" 
Luke1:40 A tsena ka ntlong ya Sakaria a dumedisa Elisabetha. 
Luke1:41 Ya re ge Elisabetha a ekwa ditumediso tsa Maria, lesea la tlolela diropeng tsa gagwe; Elisabetha a tlala Moya o Halalelang." 
Luke1:42 Lea bolela ka lentsu le legolo lea re: O lehlogonolo gare ga basadi, ledienywa tsa popelo ya gago di segofaditswe." 
Luke1:43 Go tlile kae go nna, gore mmago Morena wa ka a tle go nna?" 
Luke1:44 Ka baka la gore lebelela, ge lentsu la tumediso ya gago le lla ditsebeng tsa ka, ngwana yo monnyane diropeng tsa ka o ile a tlola ka lethabo." 
Luke1:45 Go segofaditswe yo a dumeletsego, ka gobane go tla phethagala ga dilo tseo a di boditswego ke Morena." 
Luke1:46 LeMaria a re: Moya wa ka o godisa Morena," 
Luke1:47 Moya wa ka wa thaba go Modimo, Mopholosi wa ka." 
Luke1:48 Gobane o bone dithoto tse nnyane tsa lekgoba la gagwe la mosadi, ka gobane go tloga bjale go ya pele meloko ka moka e tla mpitsa yo a segofaditswego." 
Luke1:49 Gobane yo a tiilego o ntiretse dilo tse dikgolo; mme leina la gagwe ke le lekgethwa. 
Luke1:50 Kgaugelo ya gagwe e tloga melokong go ya go bao ba mmoifago. 
Luke1:51 A bontsha matla ka letsogo la gagwe; O phatlaladitse baikgogomosi ka monaganong wa dipelo tsa bona. 
Luke1:52 A bea bagale ditulong tsa bona fase, a phagamisa ba tlasana." 
Luke1:53 A tlatsa bao ba swerwego ke tlala ka dilo tse dibotse; lebahumi o ile a ba romela ba se na selo. 
Luke1:54 A boloka mohlanka wa gagwe Isiraele, a gopola botho bja gagwe;" 
Luke1:55 Bjalo ka ge A boletse le borakgolokhukhu ba rena, go Aberahame le ditlogolo tsa gagwe go ya go ile." 
Luke1:56 Maria a dula le yena dikgwedi tse ka bago tse tharo, a boela ntlong ya gagwe." 
Luke1:57 Bjale nako ya Elisabethe e be e fihlile ya gore a belege; a belega morwa. 
Luke1:58 Baagisani ba gagwe le bomotswala ba gagwe ba kwa kamoo Jehofa a mo gaugelago ka gona; ba thaba le yena. 
Luke1:59 Legwa direga gore ka letsatsi la seswai ba tla go bolotsa mosemane; ba mmitsa Sakaria ka leina la tatagwe. 
Luke1:60 Mmagwe a araba a re: Ga go bjalo; eupsa o tla bitswa Johane. 
Luke1:61 Ba re go yena: Ga go le o tee wa lapa la gago yo a bitswago ka leina le. 
Luke1:62 Ba direla tatagwe dipontsho kamoo a bego a nyaka gore a bitswe ka gona. 
Luke1:63 Lea kgopela tafola ya go ngwala lea ngwala lea re: Leina la gagwe ke Johane. Leka moka ba ile ba makala. 
Luke1:64 Gateetee molomo wa gagwe wa bulega, leleme la gagwe la lokollwa, a bolela a reta Modimo." 
Luke1:65 Bohle bao ba bego ba ba dikologile ba tshoga, lemantsu a ka moka a phagamiswa dithabeng ka moka tsa Judea." 
Luke1:65 Bohle bao ba bego ba ba dikologile ba tshoga, lemantsu a ka moka a phagamiswa dithabeng ka moka tsa Judea." 
Luke1:66 Bohle bao ba e kwelego ba e bea ka dipelong tsa bona leba re: Ye e tla ba ngwana mang? Letsogo la Morena le be le na le yena. 
Luke1:67 Tatagwe Sakaria a tlala Moya o Mokgethwa lea porofeta a re. 
Luke1:68 A go tumiswe Jehofa Modimo wa Isiraele; gobane o ile a etela setshaba sa gagwe lea se lopolla. 
Luke1:69 A re emisetsa lenaka la pholoso ka ntlong ya mohlanka wa gagwe Dafida; 
Luke1:70 Bjalo ka ge a boletse ka molomo wa baporofeta ba gagwe ba bakgethwa, bao ba bilego gona go tloga ge lefase le thoma." 
Luke1:71 Gore re kgone go pholoswa manabeng a rena le diatleng tsa bohle bao ba re hloilego; 
Luke1:72 Go phethagatsa kgaugelo yeo e holofeditswego borakgolokhukhu ba rena, le go gopola kgwerano ya gagwe ye kgethwa;" 
Luke1:73 Ke keno yeo a e enetsego Aberahame tatago rena. 
Luke1:74 Gore a re nee, gore rena, bao re lokolotswego diatleng tsa manaba a rena, re mo hlankele ntle le poifo." 
Luke1:75 Ka bokgethwa le go loka pele ga gagwe, matsatsi ka moka a bophelo bja rena." 
Luke1:76 Lewena ngwana yo monnyane, o tla bitswa moporofeta wa Yo Godimodimo, ka gobane o swanetse go ya pele ga sefahlego sa Jehofa go lokisa ditsela tsa gagwe;" 
Luke1:77 go nea batho ba gagwe tsebo ya pholoso ka tebalelo ya dibe tsa bona. 
Luke1:78 Ka kgaugelo ye boleta ya Modimo wa rena; ka yona sediba sa matsatsi se tswago godimo se ilego sa re etela," 
Luke1:79 go fa seetsa go bao ba dulago leswiswing le moriting wa lehu, go hlahla maoto a rena tseleng ya khutso." 
Luke1:80 Ngwana a gola a tia moyeng, a dula lesokeng go fihla letsatsing la gagwe la go iponagatsa Isiraele." 
Luke2:1 Mehleng yeo go ile gwa tswa taelo go tswa go Kesara Augusto ya gore lefase ka moka le lefelwe motshelo. 
Luke2:2 (Lekgetho le le ile la bewa la mathomo ge Kirene e be e le mmusisi wa Siria). 
Luke2:3 Bohle ba ya go lefiswa motshelo, yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ya motseng wa gabo." 
Luke2:4 Josefa le yena a rotogela Galilea, motseng wa Natsaretha, Judea, motseng wa Dafida, wo o bitswago Betlelehema. (Ka gobane e be e le wa lapa le lesika la Dafida)" 
Luke2:4 Josefa le yena a rotogela Galilea, motseng wa Natsaretha, Judea, motseng wa Dafida, wo o bitswago Betlelehema. (Ka gobane e be e le wa lapa le lesika la Dafida)" 
Luke2:5 Go imelwa ke Maria, mosadi wa gagwe yo a nyetswego, yo mogolo ka boimana." 
Luke2:6 Go bile bjalo gore, ge ba be ba sa le moo, matsatsi a go belega a fedile." 
Luke2:7 A belega morwa wa gagwe wa leitsibulo, a mo phuthela ka diaparo tsa go mo phuthela, a mo robatsa ka lepong la diphoofolo; gobane go be go se na sebaka sa bona ka ntlong ya baeti." 
Luke2:8 Go be go e-na le badisi nageng yeo, bao ba bego ba dula tshemong leba hlokomela mohlape wa bona bosego." 
Luke2:9 Lebona, Lengeloi la Morena le tla godimo ga bona, leletago la Morena la phadima go ba dikologa, leba tshoga kudu." 
Luke2:10 Morongwa a re go bona: “Le se ke la boifa, gobane bonang, ke le tlisetsa ditaba tse dibotse tsa lethabo le legolo tseo di tlago go ba tsa setshaba ka moka." 
Luke2:11 Gobane lehono motseng wa Dafida o belegetswe Mopholosi, yo ke Keresete Morena." 
Luke2:12 Se e tla ba pontsho go lena; O tla hwetsa lesea le phuthetswe ka diaparo tsa go phuthela lele robetse ka legopong. 
Luke2:13 Gateetee gwa ba le morongwa yoo lesaba la madira a legodimong le tumisa Modimo lela re. 
Luke2:14 Letago go Modimo magodimong a godimodimo, le khutso lefaseng, thato e botse go batho." 
Luke2:15 Ge barongwa ba tloga go bona ba ya legodimong, badisi ba re go yo mongwe le yo mongwe: A re yeng go fihla Betlelehema lere bone selo se se diregilego, seo Jehofa a re tsebisitsego sona." 
Luke2:16 Ba tla ka lebelo, ba hwetsa Maria le Josefa le lesea ba robetse ka lepong." 
Luke2:17 Ge ba bona seo, ba tsebisa lentsu leo le ba boditswego ka ngwana yo yo monyenyane." 
Luke2:18 Bohle bao ba e kwelego ba makatswa ke dilo tseo badisi ba bego ba ba boditse tsona. 
Luke2:19 Eupsa Maria a boloka dilo tse ka moka lea di naganisisa ka pelong ya gagwe. 
Luke2:20 Badisi ba boa, ba tagafatsa le go reta Modimo ka baka la tsohle tseo ba di kwelego le go di bona, go etsa ge ba boditswe." 
Luke2:21 Ge go fetile matsatsi a seswai a lebollo la ngwana, leina la gagwe la bitswa Jesu, yo a ilego a bitswa bjalo ke morongwa pele a amogelwa ka popelong ya mma." 
Luke2:22 Ge matsatsi a tlhwekiso ya gagwe go ya ka molao wa Moshe a fedile, ba mo tlisa Jerusalema gore ba mo nee go Morena." 
Luke2:23 Bjalo ka ge go ngwadilwe molaong wa Morena: Monna yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a bulago popelo o tla bitswa yo mokgethwa go Morena; 
Luke2:24 Le dire sehlabelo go ya ka seo se boletswego Molaong wa Jehofa: maeba a mabedi goba maeba a mabedi. 
Luke2:25 Go be go na le monna yo mongwe kua Jerusalema yo a bitswago Simeone; monna yoo e be e le yo a lokilego e bile a ineetse, a letetse khomotso ya Isiraele, leMoya o Mokgethwa o be o le godimo ga gagwe." 
Luke2:26 Moya o mokgethwa a utollwa gore a ka se bone lehu go fihlela a bona Keresete wa Morena. 
Luke2:27 Ke moka a tla ka Moya tempeleng, lege batswadi ba tlisa Ngwana Jesu, go mo direla go ya ka mokgwa wa molao." 
Luke2:28 Ke moka a mo gokarela a reta Modimo a re. 
Luke2:29 Morena, mohlanka wa gago bjale a sepele ka khutso, go ya ka lentsu la gago." 
Luke2:30 Gobane mahlo a ka a bone pholoso ya gago; 
Luke2:31 yeo o e lokisitsego pele ga ditshaba ka moka; 
Luke2:32 Seetsa sa go sedimosa Baditshaba le letago la setshaba sa gago sa Isiraele. 
Luke2:33 Josefa le mmagwe ba makatswa ke dilo tseo di boletswego ka yena. 
Luke2:34 Simeone a ba segofatsa lea re go Maria mmagwe: Bonang, ngwana yo o itokiseleditse go wa le tsogo ya ba bantsi kua Isiraele; le bakeng sa pontsho yeo e tlago go ganetswa;" 
Luke2:35 (Ee, tshosa le yona e tla hlaba moya wa gago), gore dikgopolo tsa dipelo tse dintsi di utollwe." 
Luke2:36 Go be go na le Ana, moporofeta wa mosadi, morwedi wa Fanuele, wa moloko wa Ashere." 
Luke2:37 E be e le mohlologadi wa nywaga e ka bago e masomeseswai-nne, yo a sa kago a aroga tempeleng, eupsa a hlankela Modimo ka go ikona dijo le ka dithapelo bosego le bosego." 
Luke2:38 A tla ka yona nako yeo, a leboga Morena, a bolela ka yena go bohle bao ba bego ba letetse pholoso kua Jerusalema." 
Luke2:39 Ka morago ga ge ba phethile tsohle go ya ka molao wa Jehofa, ba boela Galilea, motseng wa gabo bona wa Natsaretha." 
Luke2:40 Ngwana a gola a tia moyeng, a tlala bohlale, lekgaugelo ya Modimo e be e le godimo ga gagwe." 
Luke2:41 Batswadi ba gagwe ba be ba eya Jerusalema ngwaga le ngwaga ka Paseka. 
Luke2:42 Ge a na le mengwaga ye lesomepedi, ba rotogela Jerusalema go ya ka mokgwa wa monyanya." 
Luke2:43 Ge ba phetha matsatsi, Ngwana Jesu, ge ba boa, a sala morago kua Jerusalema; Josefa le mmagwe ba be ba sa e tsebe." 
Luke2:44 Eupsa ba nagana gore o be a le sehlopheng, leba tsea leeto la letsatsi; ba mo tsoma gare ga ba leloko la bona le bao ba ba tlwaetsego." 
Luke2:45 Ge ba sa mo hwetse, ba boela Jerusalema ba mo nyaka." 
Luke2:46 Leka morago ga matsatsi a mararo ba mo hwetsa ka tempeleng a dutse gare ga dingaka lea ba kwa lea ba botsisa dipotsiso. 
Luke2:47 Bohle bao ba mo kwelego ba makatswa ke kwesiso ya gagwe le dikarabo tsa gagwe. 
Luke2:48 Lege ba mmona, ba makala; mme mmagwe a re go yena: Morwa, ke ka lebaka la eng o re dirile se? lebelela, nna le tatago re bakile manyami a gago." 
Luke2:49 LeA re go bona: Le Nnyakile bjang? Na le be le sa tsebe gore ke swanetse go ba mokgweng wa Tate? 
Luke2:50 Leba be ba sa kwesise lentsu leo a ba boditsego lona. 
Luke2:51 A theoga le bona, a tla Natsaretha, a ikokobeletsa bona; eupsa mmagwe o ile a boloka mantsu a ka moka pelong ya gagwe." 
Luke2:52 Jesu a gola ka bohlale le bogolo bja mmele le ka go amogelwa ke Modimo le batho. 
Luke3:1 Ngwageng wa lesomehlano wa puso ya Tiberio Kesara, Pontio Pilato e be e le mmusisi wa Judea, Heroda e be e le mmusisi wa Galilea, ngwanabo Filipi e le mmusisi wa Ituraea le tikologong ya Trakonite, le Lisania e le mmusisi wa Abilene." 
Luke3:1 Ngwageng wa lesomehlano wa puso ya Tiberio Kesara, Pontio Pilato e be e le mmusisi wa Judea, Heroda e be e le mmusisi wa Galilea, ngwanabo Filipi e le mmusisi wa Ituraea le tikologong ya Trakonite, le Lisania e le mmusisi wa Abilene." 
Luke3:2 Anna le Kayafa bao e bego e le baperisita ba bagolo, lentsu la Modimo la tla go Johane morwa wa Sakaria leganateng." 
Luke3:3 A tla nageng ka moka yeo e dikologilego Noka ya Jorodane lea bolela ka kolobetso ya tshokologo ya tebalelo ya dibe; 
Luke3:4 Go etsa ge go ngwadilwe ka pukung ya mantsu a moporofeta Jesaya, yeo e rego: Lentsu la yo a goeletsago lesokeng: Lokisa tsela ya Jehofa, lokisa ditsela tsa gagwe." 
Luke3:5 Moedi o mongwe le o mongwe o tla tlala, dithaba le dithaba ka moka di tla kokobetswa; ditsela tse di kgopamego di tla lokiswa, ditsela tse di kgopamego di be boreledi;" 
Luke3:6 Nama ka moka e tla bona pholoso ya Modimo. 
Luke3:7 Ke moka a re go lesaba leo le tswilego go kolobetswa ke yena: Moloko wa dinoga, ke mang yo a le lemositsego gore le tshabe bogale bjo bo tlago?" 
Luke3:8 Bjale enywa dienywa tse di swanelwago ke tshokologo, lele se ke la thoma go ipotsa gore: Re na le Aberahame bakeng sa tatago rena; gobane ke le botsa gore Modimo o kgona go tsosetsa Aberahame bana maswikeng a." 
Luke3:9 Bjale selepe se beilwe modung wa dihlare, ka baka leo sehlare se sengwe le se sengwe seo se sa enywego dienywa tse dibotse se a rengwa lesa lahlelwa mollong." 
Luke3:10 Lelesaba la mmotsisa lela re: Bjale re tla dira eng? 
Luke3:11 A ba araba a re: Yo a nago le dikobo tse pedi, a a botse yo a se nago tsona; lemang le mang yo a nago le dijo, a a dire bjalo." 
Luke3:12 Ke moka balekgetho le bona ba tla go kolobetswa leba re go yena: Moruti, re swanetse go dira eng?" 
Luke3:13 A re go bona: “Le se ke la nyaka go feta kamoo le kgethilwego ka gona. 
Luke3:14 Masole le ona a mmotsisa a re: lere tla dira eng? leA re go bona: Le se ke la dira bosoro go motho le ge e le ofe lele se ke la latofatsa ka maaka; le kgotsofale ka moputso wa lena. 
Luke3:15 Lege batho ba be ba lebeletse leka moka ba naganisisa ka dipelong tsa bona ka Johane ge e ba e be e le Keresete goba aowa; 
Luke3:16 Johane a fetola a re go bohle: Ruri ke le kolobetsa ka meetse; eupsa yo a mphetago ka maatla o a tla, yo ke sa swanelegego go lokolla dieta tsa gagwe; o tla le kolobetsa ka Moya o Mokgethwa le ka mollo." 
Luke3:17 Yo sefepi sa gagwe se ka seatleng sa gagwe, a hlwekisa lebato la gagwe ka moka, a kgoboketsa mabele ka lesakeng la gagwe; eupsa mmoko o tla o fisa ka mollo wo o sa timego." 
Luke3:18 O ile a botsa batho dilo tse dingwe tse dintsi ka kgothatso ya gagwe. 
Luke3:19 Eupsa Heroda molaodi, a kgalema ka yena ka Herodia, mosadi wa Filipi ngwanabo, le mabapi le bobe ka moka bjo Heroda a bo dirilego." 
Luke3:20 Go feta tsohle, ya oketsa ka gore o ile a tswalela Johane kgolegong." 
Luke3:21 Ge batho ka moka ba kolobeditswe, Jesu le yena a kolobetsa a rapela, lelegodimo la bulega." 
Luke3:22 LeMoya wo Mokgethwa wa theogela godimo ga gagwe ka sebopego sa mmele bjalo ka leeba, lelentsu la tswa legodimong leo le rego: O Morwa wa ka yo a rategago; ka Wena ke thabile kudu." 
Luke3:23 Jesu ka boyena a thoma go ba le nywaga e ka bago e masometharo, e le morwa wa Josefa, yo e bego e le morwa wa Heli." 
Luke3:24 Yo e bego e le morwa wa Matathe, yo e bego e le morwa wa Lefi, yo e bego e le morwa wa Melgi, yo e bego e le morwa wa Janna, yo e bego e le morwa wa Josefa." 
Luke3:25 Yo e bego e le morwa wa Matatia, yo e bego e le morwa wa Amosi, yo e bego e le morwa wa Naume, yo e bego e le morwa wa Esli, yo e bego e le morwa wa Nage." 
Luke3:26 Yoo e bego e le morwa wa Maate, morwa wa Matatia, morwa wa Shimei, morwa wa Josefa, morwa wa Juda." 
Luke3:27 Yoo e bego e le morwa wa Joana, morwa wa Resa, morwa wa Serubabele, morwa wa Salatiele, morwa wa Neri." 
Luke3:28 Yena morwa wa Melgi, morwa wa Adi, morwa wa Kosame, morwa wa Elmodama, morwa wa Ere." 
Luke3:29 Yoo e bego e le morwa wa Josefa, morwa wa Eliesere, morwa wa Jorime, morwa wa Matathe, morwa wa Lefi." 
Luke3:30 E le morwa wa Simeone, morwa wa Juda, morwa wa Josefa, morwa wa Jonane, morwa wa Eliakime." 
Luke3:31 Yo e bego e le morwa wa Melea, yo e bego e le morwa wa Menane, yo e bego e le morwa wa Matatha, yo e bego e le morwa wa Nathane, yo e bego e le morwa wa Dafida." 
Luke3:32 Yena morwa wa Jese, morwa wa Obede, morwa wa Boose, morwa wa Salmone, morwa wa Naasone."
