Luke3:33 Yoo e bego e le morwa wa Aminadaba, yo e bego e le morwa wa Siria, yo e bego e le morwa wa Eserome, yo e bego e le morwa wa Farese, yo e bego e le morwa wa Juda." 
Luke3:34 Yoo e bego e le morwa wa Jakobo, morwa wa Isaka, morwa wa Aberahame, morwa wa Thara, morwa wa Nagoro." 
Luke3:35 Yoo e bego e le morwa wa Saruge, yo e bego e le morwa wa Ragau, yo e bego e le morwa wa Falek, yo e bego e le morwa wa Hebere, yo e bego e le morwa wa Sala." 
Luke3:36 Yoo e bego e le morwa wa Kenane, yo e bego e le morwa wa Arfaksada, yo e bego e le morwa wa Seme, yo e bego e le morwa wa Noage, yo e bego e le morwa wa Lameke." 
Luke3:37 Yo e bego e le morwa wa Methusela, yo e bego e le morwa wa Henoge, yo e bego e le morwa wa Jarede, yo e bego e le morwa wa Maleleele, yo e bego e le morwa wa Kenane." 
Luke3:38 E be e le morwa wa Enose, morwa wa Sethe, morwa wa Adama, morwa wa Modimo." 
Luke4:1 Jesu a tletse Moya o Mokgethwa, a boa nokeng ya Jorodane, a iswa ke Moya lesokeng." 
Luke4:2 Ka gobane o ile a lekwa ke Diabolo ka matsatsi a masomenne. Mehleng yeo o be a sa je selo, lege a fedile, a swerwe ke tlala ka morago ga moo." 
Luke4:3 Diabolo a re go yena: Ge e ba o le Morwa wa Modimo, laela leswika le gore e be senkgwa." 
Luke4:4 Jesu a mo fetola a re: Go ngwadilwe gwa thwe: Motho a ka se phele ka bogobe fela, eupsa ka lentsu le lengwe le le lengwe la Modimo." 
Luke4:5 Lediabolo a mo isa thabeng ye e phagamego lea mmontsha mebuso ka moka ya lefase ka motsotswana wa nako. 
Luke4:6 Diabolo a re go yena: Ke tla go fa maatla a ka moka le letago la ona, ka gobane a neetswe go nna; leyo ke ratago, ke a mo nea." 
Luke4:7 Bjale ge le nyaka go Nrapela, tsohle e tla ba tsa gago." 
Luke4:8 Jesu a mo fetola a re: Tloga ka morago ga ka, Sathane, ka gobane go ngwadilwe gwa thwe: O swanetse go rapela Morena Modimo wa gago leo mo hlankele o nnosi." 
Luke4:9 A mo tlisa Jerusalema, a mo bea godimo ga tlhora ya tempele, a re go yena: Ge e ba o le Morwa wa Modimo, itahlela fase go tloga moo." 
Luke4:10 Gobane go ngwadilwe gwa thwe: O tla laela barongwa ba gagwe gore ba go dise. 
Luke4:11 Ba swanetse go go rwala ka diatleng tsa bona, gore o se ke wa thula leoto la gago leswikeng." 
Luke4:12 Jesu a mo fetola a re: Go thwe: O ka se leke Morena Modimo wa gago. 
Luke4:13 Ge Diabolo a fedisitse moleko ka moka, a tloga go yena ka nakwana." 
Luke4:14 Jesu a boela Galilea ka maatla a Moya, lebotumo bja tswa go yena tikologong ka moka." 
Luke4:15 A ruta ka disinagogeng tsa bona, mola a be a tagafatswa ke bohle." 
Luke4:16 A fihla Natsaretha moo a goletsego gona; lebjalo ka mokgwa wa gagwe, a tsena sinagogeng ka letsatsi la Sabatha, a ema go bala." 
Luke4:17 Ke moka a newa puku ya moporofeta Jesaya. Ge a bula puku yeo, a hwetsa lefelo leo le ngwadilwego go lona." 
Luke4:18 Moya wa Morena o godimo ga Nna, ka gobane o ntloditse gore ke bolele badiidi Ebangedi; O Nthomile go fodisa bao ba robegilego dipelo, go tsebatsa pholoso go mathopsa le go fola ga pono go difofu, go lokolla bao ba robegilego dipelo," 
Luke4:19 Go tsebatsa ngwaga wo o amogelegago wa Morena. 
Luke4:20 A tswalela puku yeo, a e nea modiredi gape lea dula fase. Lemahlo a bohle bao ba bego ba le sinagogeng a be a mo tsepeletse." 
Luke4:21 A thoma go ba re: Lehono Lengwalo le le phethagaditswe ditsebeng tsa lena. 
Luke4:22 Bohle ba mo hlatsela leba makatswa ke mantsu a botho ao a tswago molomong wa gagwe. Leba re: Na yo ga se morwa wa Josefa? 
Luke4:23 LeA re go bona: Ruri o tla mpotsa seema se: Ngaka, iphodise; tsohle tse re di kwelego di dirwa kua Kaperenaume, di dire le mo nageng ya geno." 
Luke4:24 Lea re: Ruri ke a le botsa, ga go moporofeta yo a amogelwago nageng ya gabo." 
Luke4:25 Eupsa thereso ke le botsa gore mehleng ya Eliya go be go na le bahlologadi ba bantsi Isiraele, ge legodimo le tswaletswe ka nywaga e meraro le dikgwedi tse tshela, mola go be go e-na le tlala e kgolo nageng ka moka;" 
Luke4:26 Eupsa ga go le o tee wa bona yo Eliya a ilego a romelwa go mosadi yo e bego e le mohlologadi, ge e se go Sarepta, motse wa Sidone." 
Luke4:27 Mehleng ya moporofeta Elisa e be e le balephera ba bantsi Isiraele; lega go le o tee wa bona yo a ilego a hlwekiswa, ge e se Naamane wa Mosiria." 
Luke4:28 Bohle bao ba bego ba le sinagogeng ba tlala pefelo ge ba ekwa se. 
Luke4:29 Ba tsoga ba mo raka motseng, ba mo isa moeding wa mmoto wo motse wa bona o agilwego go wona, gore ba mo lahlele fase gape." 
Luke4:30 Eupsa yo a bego a feta magareng ga bona o ile a sepela. 
Luke4:31 A theogela Kaperenaume, motse wa Galilea, a ba ruta ka matsatsi a Sabatha." 
Luke4:32 Ba ile ba makatswa ke thuto ya gagwe, ka gobane lentsu la gagwe le be le le matla." 
Luke4:33 Ka sinagogeng go be go na le monna yo a nago le moya wa Diabolo yo a sa hlwekago, a goeletsa ka lentsu le legolo." 
Luke4:34 A re: A re emeng; re dira eng ka Wena Jesu wa Nasaretha? o tla go re fedisa? Ke go tseba seo o lego sona; Mokgethwa wa Modimo. 
Luke4:35 Jesu a mo kgalema a re: Homola o tswe go yena. Ge Diabolo a mo lahlela gare, a tswa go yena, a se mo dire selo." 
Luke4:36 Ka moka ga bona ba makala leba boledisana, ba re: A lentsu le ke lona! gobane ka maatla le maatla o laela meoya ye e sa hlwekago, leya tswa." 
Luke4:37 Botumo bja gagwe bja phatlalalela mafelong ka moka a naga. 
Luke4:38 A tsoga sinagogeng a tsena ntlong ya Simone. Mmago mosadi wa Simone a swarwa ke letshollo le legolo; leba mo kgopela. 
Luke4:39 A ema godimo ga gagwe a kgalema letshollo; gateetee a tsoga a ba direla. 
Luke4:40 Ge letsatsi le sobela, bohle bao ba bego ba babja ke malwetsi a mehuta ka moka ba a tlisa go Yena; a bea yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa bona ka diatla, a ba fodisa." 
Luke4:41 Batemona le bona ba tswa go ba bantsi leba goeletsa ba re: O Keresete, Morwa wa Modimo. LeYena yo a ba kgalemilego ga se a ba dumelela go bolela. Ka baka la gore ba be ba tseba gore E be e le Keresete." 
Luke4:42 Ge e setse e le mosegare, a tloga a ya lefelong le le se nago selo;" 
Luke4:43 A re go bona: Ke swanetse go bolela le mmuso wa Modimo metseng e mengwe, ka gobane ke ka baka leo ke rometswego." 
Luke4:44 A rera disinagogeng tsa Galilea. 
Luke5:1 Ge setshaba se mo gatelela gore a kwe lentsu la Modimo, a ema kgauswi le letsha la Genesarete." 
Luke5:2 A bona dikepe tse pedi di eme kgauswi le letsha, eupsa barei ba dihlapi ba be ba tswile go tsona leba hlatswa malokwa a bona." 
Luke5:3 A namela se sengwe sa dikepe tseo e bego e le tsa Simone, a mo rapela gore a kgoromeletse go se nene nageng. A dula fase a ruta batho a le ka seketswaneng." 
Luke5:4 Ge a kgaotsa go bolela, a re go Simone: “Tshatla ka bodibeng lemalokwa a gago a lahlelwe ka ntle bakeng sa go goga." 
Luke5:5 Simone a mo fetola a re: Moruti, re ile ra soma ka thata bosego ka moka lera se tsee selo; le ge go le bjalo ka lentsu la gago ke tla lahlela lokwa." 
Luke5:6 Ge ba dirile se, ba swara dihlapi tse dintsi kudu, lemalokwa a bona a phatloga." 
Luke5:7 Ke moka ba bontsha balekane ba bona bao ba bego ba le ka sekepeng se sengwe gore ba tle ba ba thuse. Ba tla ba tlatsa dikepe tseo ka bobedi, moo di ilego tsa thoma go nwelela." 
Luke5:8 Ge Simone Petere a bona seo, a wela fase pele ga matolo a Jesu a re: Tlogela go nna; gobane ke motho wa sebe, Morena." 
Luke5:9 Gobane yena le bohle bao ba bego ba na le yena ba be ba makaditswe ke go huduga ga dihlapi tseo ba di swerego. 
Luke5:10 Jakobo le Johane, barwa ba Tsebedeo, bao ba bego ba na le Simone, ba be ba le bjalo. Jesu a re go Simone: O se ke wa boifa; go tloga bjale go ya pele o tla swara batho." 
Luke5:11 Ge ba tlisa dikepe tsa bona lebopong, ba tlogela tsohle ba mo latela." 
Luke5:12 Ge a le motseng o mongwe, go be go na le monna yo a tletsego lephera. Yo a bonago Jesu o wela ka sefahlego lea mo kgopela a re: Morena, ge O nyaka, O ka ntlhwekisa." 
Luke5:13 A otlolla seatla sa gagwe a mo kgwatha a re: Ke a rata, o hlweke. Gateetee lephera la tloga go yena." 
Luke5:14 A mo laela gore a se ke a botsa motho; eupsa eya o iponagatse go moperisita, o neelane ka tlhwekiso ya gago, bjalo ka ge Moshe a laetse, e le bohlatse go bona." 
Luke5:15 Eupsa botumo bjo bo oketsegilego bo ile bja mo tla, lemasaba a magolo a kgobokana go kwa le go fodiswa malwetsing a ona ka Yena." 
Luke5:16 A gomela lesokeng a rapela. 
Luke5:17 Leka letsatsi le lengwe, ge a be a ruta, go be go na le Bafarisei le bamangwalo bao ba bego ba etla go tswa motseng wo mongwe le wo mongwe wa Galilea le Judea le Jerusalema, lemaatla a Morena a be a le gona go ba fodisa." 
Luke5:17 Leka letsatsi le lengwe, ge a be a ruta, go be go na le Bafarisei le bamangwalo bao ba bego ba etla go tswa motseng wo mongwe le wo mongwe wa Galilea le Judea le Jerusalema, lemaatla a Morena a be a le gona go ba fodisa." 
Luke5:18 Banna bao ba tlisa monna yo a golofetsego malaong, leba nyaka ditsela tsa go mo tsenya le go mo robatsa." 
Luke5:19 Ge, ka baka la lesaba, ba be ba sa hwetse tsela yeo ba ka mo tsenyago ka yona, ba ya godimo ga marulelo leba mo theosa ka sofa ya gagwe ka gare ga dithaele go fihla bogareng pele ga Jesu." 
Luke5:20 Ge a bona tumelo ya bona, a re go yena: Motho, dibe tsa gago di lebaletswe." 
Luke5:21 Bamangwalo le Bafarisei ba thoma go bea mabaka ba re: Ke mang yo a bolelago thogako? Ke mang yo a ka lebalelago dibe ge e se Modimo a nnosi? 
Luke5:22 Eupsa ge Jesu a bona megopolo ya bona, a araba lea re go bona: Le beakanya eng ka dipelong tsa lena?" 
Luke5:23 Ge e ba go bonolo go bolela gore: Le lebaletswe dibe tsa lena; goba go re: Tsoga o sepele? 
Luke5:24 Eupsa gore o tsebe gore Morwa wa Motho o na le maatla a go lebalela dibe mo lefaseng, O ile a re go mogole: Ke re go wena: Tsoga, tsea malao a gago o ye ntlong ya gago." 
Luke5:25 Gateetee a ema pele ga bona, a tsea seo a bego a robetse go sona, a ya ntlong ya gagwe lea tumisa Modimo." 
Luke5:26 Ka moka ga bona ba makala, ba tagafatsa Modimo leba tlala poifo, ba re: Re bone dilo tse di makatsago lehono." 
Luke5:27 Ka morago ga dilo tse a tswa a bona molekgetho yo a bitswago Levi a dutse ntlong ya go lefela; lea re go yena: Ntatele. 
Luke5:28 A tlogela tsohle, a tsoga a mo latela." 
Luke5:29 Lefi a mo lokisetsa monyanya o mogolo ka ntlong ya gagwe, legwa ba le lesaba le legolo la balekgetho le ba bangwe bao ba dulago le bona." 
Luke5:30 Eupsa bamangwalo ba bona le Bafarisei ba ngunanguna ka barutiwa ba gagwe ba re: Ke ka baka la’ng le eja le go nwa le balekgetho le badiradibe? 
Luke5:31 Jesu a ba araba a re: Bao ba phetsego gabotse ga ba hloke ngaka; eupsa bao ba babjago. 
Luke5:32 Ga se ka tla go bitsa baloki, eupsa ke tlile go bitsa badiradibe gore ba sokologe." 
Luke5:33 Ba re go yena: Ke ka baka la’ng barutiwa ba Johane ba ikona dijo le go rapela gantsi, le barutiwa ba Bafarisei ba dira bjalo? eupsa wena o a ja le go nwa?" 
Luke5:34 LeA re go bona: Na le ka dumelela bana ba lenyalo go ikona dijo mola monyadi a sa na le bona? 
Luke5:35 Eupsa go tla tla matsatsi ao monyadi a tlago go tloswa go bona leka morago ba ikona dijo matsatsing ao. 
Luke5:36 LeO ile a ba botsa seswantsho; Ga go yo a apesago seaparo se sefsa mo go mokgalabje; ge e ba go se bjalo, gona bobedi tse difsa di dira se se hlwekilego, leseripa seo se tserwego go se sefsa ga se dumelelane le sa kgale." 
Luke5:37 Ga go na motho yo a tshelago beine e mpsha ka gare ga masela a kgale; go sego bjalo beine e mpsha e tla phatloga matlalo, ya tshollwa, matlalo ao a tla hwelela." 
Luke5:38 Eupsa beine e mpsha e swanetse go tsenywa ka gare ga matlalo a mafsa a beine; lebobedi bja tsona di bolokilwe. 
Luke5:39 Ga go yo a nwelego beine ya kgale yo a kganyogago e mpsha gateetee; gobane o re: Mokgalabje o kaone. 
Luke6:1 Ka Sabatha ya bobedi ka morago ga ya pele a phatsa masemong a korong; barutiwa ba gagwe ba kga dithoro, ba di ja, ba di silila ka diatla tsa bona." 
Luke6:2 Bafarisei ba bangwe ba re go bona: Ke ka baka la’ng le dira tse di sa dumelelwego go di dira ka Sabatha? 
Luke6:3 Jesu a ba araba a re: Na ga se la bala kudu seo Dafida a se dirilego ge a be a swerwe ke tlala le bao ba bego ba na le yena; 
Luke6:4 kamoo a ilego a tsena ka ntlong ya Modimo, a tsea senkgwa sa pontsho, a se ja, a se nea le bao ba bego ba na le yena; yeo e sa dumelelwego go ja, ge e se baperisita ba nnosi?" 
Luke6:5 A re go bona: Morwa wa motho le yena ke Morena wa Sabatha. 
Luke6:6 Leka Sabatha ye nngwe le yena a tsena sinagogeng lea ruta; lego be go na le monna yo seatla sa gagwe sa le letona se bego se omile. 
Luke6:7 Bamangwalo le Bafarisei ba mo lebelela go bona ge e ba a tla fodisa ka letsatsi la Sabatha; gore ba hwetse molatofatso kgahlanong le yena. 
Luke6:8 Eupsa yena a tseba dikgopolo tsa bona lea re go monna wa seatla se se omeletsego: Tsoga o eme gare. Lea tsoga a tsoga. 
Luke6:9 Jesu a re go bona: Ke tla le botsisa selo se tee; Na go a dumelelwa go dira botse goba bobe ka Sabatha? go pholosa bophelo, goba go bo fedisa?" 
Luke6:10 A ba lebelela ka moka, a re go monna yoo: Otlolla seatla sa gago. Lea dira bjalo, leseatla sa gagwe sa fola bjalo ka se sengwe." 
Luke6:11 Ba tlala bohlanya; leba botsana seo ba bego ba tla se dira go Jesu. 
Luke6:12 Mehleng yeo a ya thabeng go yo rapela, a dula bosego ka moka a rapela Modimo." 
Luke6:13 Ge e setse e le mosegare, a bitsa barutiwa ba gagwe go yena; lego bona O kgethile ba lesomepedi, bao gape a ba bitsago baapostola;" 
Luke6:14 Simone (yo a ilego a mo bitsa Petere) le Andrea ngwanabo, Jakobo le Johane, Filipi le Bartolome." 
Luke6:15 Mateo le Thomase, Jakobo morwa wa Alfeo, le Simone yo a bitswago Tselote." 
Luke6:16 Judase ngwanabo Jakobo le Judase Isikariote, yo le yena e bego e le moeki." 
Luke6:17 A theoga le bona a ema lebaleng le lesaba la barutiwa ba gagwe le lesaba le legolo la batho go tswa Judea ka moka le Jerusalema le lebopong la lewatle la Tiro le Sidone, bao ba ilego ba tla go mo theetsa, le go fodiswa malwetsi a bona;" 
Luke6:17 A theoga le bona a ema lebaleng le lesaba la barutiwa ba gagwe le lesaba le legolo la batho go tswa Judea ka moka le Jerusalema le lebopong la lewatle la Tiro le Sidone, bao ba ilego ba tla go mo theetsa, le go fodiswa malwetsi a bona;" 
Luke6:18 Bao ba bego ba tlaiswa ke meoya e silafetsego, ba fodiswa." 
Luke6:19 Lesaba ka moka la leka go mo kgwatha, ka gobane maatla a ile a tswa go yena lea ba fodisa ka moka." 
Luke6:20 A emisa mahlo a gagwe go barutiwa ba gagwe lea re: Go lehlogonolo lena badiidi, gobane mmuso wa Modimo ke wa lena." 
Luke6:21 Go lehlogonolo lena bao le swerwego ke tlala bjale, gobane le tla kgora. Go lehlogonolo lena bao ba llago bjale, gobane le tla sega." 
Luke6:22 O lehlogonolo ge setshaba se tla go hloya, sa go aroganya le lesaba la sona, sa go sola, sa raka leina la gago e le bobe ka baka la Morwa wa motho." 
Luke6:23 Thabang ka letsatsi le, le tlole ka lethabo, ka gobane bona moputso wa lena ke o mogolo legodimong, ka gobane borakgolokhukhu ba bona ba dirile bjalo ka baporofeta." 
Luke6:24 Eupsa go madimabe lena bahumi! gobane o amogetse khomotso ya gago. 
Luke6:25 Go madimabe lena bao le kgotsofetsego! gobane o tla bolawa ke tlala. Go madimabe lena bao le segago bjale! gobane o tla lla, wa lla." 
Luke6:26 Go madimabe lena ge bohle ba bolela gabotse ka wena! gobane botatago bona ba dirile bjalo ka baporofeta ba maaka. 
Luke6:27 Eupsa ke re go lena bao ba kwago: Le rate manaba a lena, le dire botse go bao ba le hloilego." 
Luke6:28 Segofatsa bao ba go rogakago, leo rapelele bao ba go gobosago." 
Luke6:29 Yo a go itiago lerameng le lengwe, le nee le le lengwe; yo a go amogago kobo ya gago, a ka se amoge le kobo ya gago." 
Luke6:30 Neela yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a go kgopelago; lego yo a go amogago dithoto tsa gago, o se ke wa di kgopela gape." 
Luke6:31 Go etsa ge le rata gore batho ba le dire, le lena le ba dire bjalo." 
Luke6:32 Ge e ba o rata bao ba go ratago, gona o na le ditebogo dife? gobane badiradibe le bona ba rata bao ba ba ratago." 
Luke6:33 Ge e ba o dira botse go bao ba go dirago botse, o na le ditebogo dife? ka gobane badiradibe le bona ba dira se se swanago." 
Luke6:34 Ge e ba o adima bao o holofelago go ba amogela, o na le ditebogo dife? gobane badiradibe le bona ba adima badiradibe e le gore ba hwetse tse ntsi gape." 
Luke6:35 Eupsa o rate manaba a gago, o dire botse, o adime o sa holofele selo sa go busetsa; lemoputso wa lena e tla ba o mogolo, lele tla ba bana ba Yo Godimodimo, ka gobane o lokile go bao ba sa lebogego le ba kgopo." 
Luke6:36 Ka gona, le gaugele, go etsa ge Tatago lena le yena a gaugela." 
Luke6:37 O se ke wa ahlola, leo ka se ahlolwe; o se ke wa ahlola, leo ka se ahlolwe; lebalela, leo tla lebalelwa." 
Luke6:38 Neang, leo tla fiwa; tekanyo e botse, yeo e gateletswego le go sisinywa gotee le go tshologa, e tla nea batho sehubeng sa gago. Ka gobane ka tekanyo yeo le elago ka yona, le tla elwa gape." 
Luke6:39 LeA ba botsa seswantsho: Na sefofu se ka hlahla sefofu? Na bobedi bja bona ba ka se wele ka moleteng? 
Luke6:40 Morutiwa ga a fete mong wa gagwe, eupsa yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a phethagetsego o tla swana le mong wa gagwe." 
Luke6:41 Le gona ke ka baka la’ng o bona lesoba leo le lego leihlong la ngwaneno, eupsa o sa bone lesoba leo le lego leihlong la gago?" 
Luke6:42 Goba o ka re go ngwaneno bjang: “Ngwaneso, e re ke ntshe lesoba leo le lego ka leihlong la gago, mola wena ka nosi o sa bone kota yeo e lego ka leihlong la gago? Moikaketsi, thoma ka go lahlela kota yeo ka leihlong la gago, leka morago o tla bona gabotse gore o ntshe mouta wo o lego ka leihlong la ngwaneno." 
Luke6:43 Gobane sehlare se sebotse ga se enywe dienywa tse mpe; le sehlare se se bodilego ga se enywe dienywa tse dibotse. 
Luke6:44 Gobane sehlare se sengwe le se sengwe se tsebja ka dienywa tsa sona. Gobane batho ga ba kgoboketse mago meetlweng, le sethokgweng sa meetlwa ga ba kgoboketse morara." 
Luke6:45 Motho yo botse o ntsha se sebotse ka letlotlong le lebotse la pelo ya gagwe; lemonna yo kgopo o ntsha se sebe ka letlotlong le lebe la pelo ya gagwe, ka gobane molomo wa gagwe o bolela ka bontsi bja pelo." 
Luke6:46 Leke ka lebaka la eng o mpitsa Morena, leo sa dire dilo tse ke di bolelago?" 
Luke6:47 Yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a tlago go Nna lea theeletsa mantsu a ka lea a phetha, ke tla go bontsha yo a lekanago le yena." 
Luke6:48 O swana le motho yo a agilego ntlo, a epa ka mo go tseneletsego, a thea motheo leswikeng; ge meetse-fula a etla, moela a betha ntlo yeo ka bogale leya palelwa ke go e sisinya, ka gobane e be e theilwe godimo ga leswika." 
Luke6:49 Eupsa yo a kwago a sa dire o swana le motho yo a agilego ntlo mo lefaseng e se nago motheo; kgahlanong le yona lephoto le ilego la betha ka bogale, legateetee la wa; letshenyo ya ntlo yeo e be e le e kgolo." 
Luke7:1 Ka morago ga ge a feditse mantsu a gagwe ka moka pele ga batheetsi ba setshaba, a tsena Kaperenaume." 
Luke7:2 Mohlanka wa molaodi yo mongwe wa madira yo a bego a mo rata, o be a babja e bile a loketse go hwa." 
Luke7:3 Ge a ekwa ka Jesu, a roma bagolo ba Bajuda go yena, ba mo kgopela gore a tle a fodise mohlanka wa gagwe." 
Luke7:4 Lege ba fihla go Jesu, ba mo kgopela gateetee, ba re: Gore o swanelega yo a bego a tla mo direla se." 
Luke7:5 Ka gobane o rata setshaba sa rena, leo re agetse sinagoge." 
Luke7:6 Ke moka Jesu a sepela le bona. Ge a be a se kgole le ntlo, kgosana ya roma bagwera ba go feta lekgolo go yena gore ba re go yena: Morena, o se ke wa tshwenyega, ka gobane ga ke swanelwe ke gore o tsene ka fase ga marulelo a ka." 
Luke7:7 Ka gona ga se ka ipona ke swanelwa ke go tla go lena, eupsa ke bolele lentsu le tee, lemohlanka wa ka o tla fola." 
Luke7:8 Gobane le nna ke monna yo a beilwego ka fase ga taolo, ke na le masole ka fase ga ka, leke re go yo mongwe: Sepela, yena o a sepela; le go yo mongwe: Tlang, leo a tla; le go mohlanka wa ka: Dira se, leyena a se dira." 
Luke7:9 Ge Jesu a ekwa se, a mo makala, a retologa a re go batho bao ba mo latetsego: Ke a le botsa gore ga se ka hwetsa tumelo ye kgolo gakaakaa, gaesita le Isiraeleng." 
Luke7:10 Bao ba bego ba rometswe ba boela ntlong leba hwetsa lekgoba leo le babjago. 
Luke7:11 Letsatsing la ka morago ga moo a tsena motseng wo o bitswago Naine; barutiwa ba gagwe ba bantsi ba sepela le yena, le batho ba bantsi." 
Luke7:12 Ge a batamela kgoro ya motse, gwa rwalwa monna yo a hwilego, e lego morwa a nnosi wa mmagwe, lee be e le mohlologadi, lebatho ba bantsi ba motse ba be ba na le yena." 
Luke7:13 Ge Morena a mmona, a mo kwela bohloko kudu lea re go yena: O se ke wa lla." 
Luke7:14 A tla a kgwatha setopo, lebao ba mo rwelego ba ema ba sa sisinyege. Lea re: Lesogana, ke re go wena: Tsoga!" 
Luke7:15 Yo a hwilego a dula a thoma go bolela. Lea ineela go mmagwe. 
Luke7:16 Legwa tla poifo godimo ga bohle, leba tagafatsa Modimo leba re: Go ile gwa tsoga moporofeta yo mogolo gare ga rena; le: Gore Modimo o etetse batho ba gagwe." 
Luke7:17 Mabarebare a ka yena a phatlalala Judea ka moka le gohle. 
Luke7:17 Mabarebare a ka yena a phatlalala Judea ka moka le gohle. 
Luke7:18 Barutiwa ba Johane ba mo tsebisa ka dilo tse ka moka. 
Luke7:19 Johane a bitsa barutiwa ba gagwe ba babedi go yena, a ba romela go Jesu a re: Na ke wena yo a bego a tla tla? goba re nyaka e nngwe?" 
Luke7:20 Ge banna bao ba fihla go Yena, ba re: Johane Mokolobetsi o re rometse go Wena go re: Na ke wena yo a bego a tla tla? goba re nyaka e nngwe?" 
Luke7:21 Leka yona nako yeo o ile a fodisa malwetsi a bona a mantsi le dikotlo le meoya ye mebe; leba bantsi ba difofu a bona. 
Luke7:22 Jesu a fetola a re go bona: Sepela le botse Johane tse le di bonego le go di kwa; kamoo difofu di bonago, digole di sepela, balephera ba hlwekiswa, difoa di kwa, bahu ba tsoswa, ebangedi e bolelwa go badiidi." 
Luke7:23 Go segofaditswe yo a sa Nkgopisego. 
Luke7:24 Ge baromiwa ba Johane ba tloga, a thoma go bolela le setshaba ka Johane a re: Le ile la ya lesokeng go yo bona eng? Lehlaka leo le sisinywago ke phefo?" 
Luke7:25 Eupsa o tswile go bona eng? Monna yo a aperego diaparo tse boleta? Bonang, bao ba aperego gabotse le bao ba phelago ka bothakga, ba ka malapeng a dikgosi." 
Luke7:26 Eupsa o tswile go bona eng? Moporofeta? Ee, ke a le botsa, le go feta moporofeta kudu." 
Luke7:27 Ke yena yo go ngwadilwego ka yena: “Bona, ke roma motseta wa ka pele ga sefahlego sa gago, yo a tlago go lokisetsa tsela ya gago pele ga gago.”" 
Luke7:28 Gobane ke le botsa gore gare ga bao ba belegwego ke basadi ga go na moporofeta yo mogolo go feta Johane Mokolobetsi; eupsa yo monyenyane Mmusong wa Modimo o mo feta. 
Luke7:29 Batho ka moka bao ba mo kwelego le balekgetho, ba lokafatsa Modimo ka go kolobetswa ka kolobetso ya Johane." 
Luke7:30 Eupsa Bafarisei le bamangwalo ba gana keletso ya Modimo kgahlanong le bona, ka gobane ba be ba se ba kolobetswa ke yena." 
Luke7:31 LeMorena a re: Bjale ke tla bapetsa banna ba moloko wo le eng? ledi bjang? 
Luke7:32 Ba swana le bana bao ba dulago mmarakeng ba bitsana ba re: Re le letsa seletso, lega se la bina; re ile ra le llela, mme la se lle." 
Luke7:33 Gobane Johane Mokolobetsi o ile a tla lea se je senkgwa goba a nwa beine; leo re: O na le diabolo. 
Luke7:34 Morwamotho a tla a eja a enwa; leo re: Go na le moja letagwa, mogwera wa balekgetho le badiradibe!" 
Luke7:35 Eupsa bohlale bo lokafatswa ke bana ba bjona ka moka. 
Luke7:36 Yo mongwe wa Bafarisei a mo kgopela gore a je le yena. A tsena ka ntlong ya Mofarisei, a dula fase go ja." 
Luke7:37 Mosadi yo mongwe motseng, yo e bego e le modiradibe, ge a tseba gore Jesu o dutse tafoleng ka ntlong ya Mofarisei, a tlisa lepokisi la ditlolo tsa alabaster." 
Luke7:38 Mosadi a ema maotong a gagwe ka morago ga gagwe, a lla, a thoma go mo hlapa maoto ka megokgo, a a omisa ka moriri wa hlogo ya gagwe, a mo atla maoto, a a tlotsa ka setlolo." 
Luke7:39 Ge Mofarisei yo a mo laleditsego a bona se, a bolela le yena a re: Monna yo, ge nkabe e le moporofeta, nkabe a tsebile gore mosadi yo a mo kgomago ke mang le gore ke wa mohuta mang, ka gobane ke modiradibe." 
Luke7:40 Jesu a mo fetola a re: Simone, ke na le se sengwe seo nka go botsago sona. Lea re: Mong, bolelela pele." 
Luke7:41 Go be go na le mokoloti yo mongwe yo a bego a na le bakoloti ba babedi: yo mongwe a kolota dipente tse makgolo a mahlano leyo mongwe a kolota dipente tse masomehlano. 
Luke7:42 Ge ba be ba se na selo seo ba ka se lefago, a ba lebalela ka potego ka bobedi. Bjale mpotse gore ke mang wa bona yo a tlago go mo rata kudu?" 
Luke7:43 Simone a fetola a re: Ke nagana gore yo a mo swareletsego kudu. A re go yena: O ahlotse gabotse. 
Luke7:44 A retologela go mosadi yoo a re go Simone: Na o mmona mosadi yo? Ke tsene ka ntlong ya gago, Ga se wa mpha meetse a maoto a ka; eupsa o ile a hlapa maoto a ka ka megokgo, a a omisa ka moriri wa hlogo ya gagwe." 
Luke7:45 Ga se wa ka wa nkatla, eupsa mosadi yo go tloga nakong ya ge ke tsena ga se a ka a kgaotsa go atla maoto a ka." 
Luke7:46 Ga se wa tlotsa hlogo ya ka ka makhura, eupsa mosadi yo o tloditse maoto a ka ka setlolo." 
Luke7:47 Ka baka leo ke re go lena: Dibe tsa gagwe tse dintsi di lebaletswe; gobane o be a rata kudu, eupsa yo a lebaletswego go se nene, yena o mo rata ganyenyane." 
Luke7:48 A re go yena: Dibe tsa gago di lebaletswe. 
Luke7:49 Lebao ba bego ba le tafoleng le Yena ba thoma go ipotsa gore: Ke mang Yena yo le yena a lebalelago dibe? 
Luke7:50 A re go mosadi: Tumelo ya gago e go pholositse; sepela ka khutso. 
Luke8:1 Ka morago ga moo a phatsa metse le metse e nngwe le e nngwe, a tsebatsa le go tsebatsa ditaba tse di thabisago tsa Mmuso wa Modimo; ba lesomepedi ba be ba na le yena;" 
Luke8:2 Basadi ba bangwe bao ba bego ba fodisitswe meoya e mebe le malwetsi bao ba bitswago Maria Magdalena, yo batemona ba supago ba tswilego go yena." 
Luke8:3 Joana, mosadi wa Kusa, molaodi wa Heroda, le Susana le ba bangwe ba bantsi bao ba bego ba mo hlankela ka dithoto tsa bona." 
Luke8:4 Ge batho ba bantsi ba kgobokane leba etla go yena ba etswa motseng o mongwe le o mongwe, a bolela ka seswantsho." 
Luke8:5 Mobjadi o ile a tswa go yo bjala peu ya gagwe; ge a sa bjala, ba bangwe ba wela ka thoko ga tsela; ya gatakelwa fase, dinonyana tsa leratadima tsa e ja." 
Luke8:6 Ba bangwe ba wela leswikeng; legateetee ge e rotoga, ya pona, ka gobane e be e hloka monola." 
Luke8:7 Ba bangwe ba wela gare ga meetlwa; meutlwa ya hloga le yona ya e kgama. 
Luke8:8 Ba bangwe ba wela mobung o mobotse, ba mela leba enywa dienywa ka makga a lekgolo. Lege A bolela se, O ile a goeletsa: Yo a nago le ditsebe tsa go kwa, a a kwe." 
Luke8:9 Barutiwa ba gagwe ba mmotsisa ba re: Seswantsho se e ka ba eng? 
Luke8:10 LeA re: Go lena le filwe go tseba diphiri tsa mmuso wa Modimo, eupsa go ba bangwe ka diswantsho; e le gore ba se bone, lege ba ekwa, ba ka se kwesise." 
Luke8:11 Seswantsho ke se: Peu ke lentsu la Modimo. 
Luke8:12 Ba ba lego tseleng ke bona ba kwago; ke moka diabolo o tla a tlosa lentsu dipelong tsa bona, gore ba se dumele leba pholoswa." 
Luke8:13 Ke bona bao ba lego leswikeng bao ge ba e kwa, ba amogelago lentsu ka lethabo; lega ba na modu, bao ba dumelago ka nakwana, ba wa nakong ya moleko." 
Luke8:14 Bao ba welego gare ga meetlwa ke bao ge ba ekwa, ba tswa ba kgangwa ke dipelaelo le mahumo le maipshino a bophelo bjo, leba sa tlise dienywa tse di phethagetsego." 
Luke8:15 Eupsa ke motheong o mobotse gore ka morago ga ge ba kwele lentsu, ba le boloka leba enywa dienywa ka go se fele pelo ka dipelo tse di botegago le tse dibotse." 
Luke8:16 Ga go yo a gotsitsego kerese yo a e khupetsago ka selo goba a e bea ka fase ga malao; eupsa e beye godimo ga sebjana sa mabone, gore bao ba tsenago ba bone seetsa." 
Luke8:17 Gobane ga go selo se se utilwego seo se ka se utollwago; goba selo le ge e le sefe se se utilwego seo se ka se tsebjego lesa tswa. 
Luke8:18 Ka gona, hlokomela kamoo le kwago ka gona; gobane mang le mang yo a nago le yena o tla fiwa; lemang le mang yo a se nago yona, le seo a bonalago a na le sona, o tla amogwa." 
Luke8:19 Ke moka mmagwe le bana babo ba tla go yena, leba palelwa ke go tla go yena ka baka la kgateletso." 
Luke8:20 Ba bangwe ba mmotsa ba bangwe bao ba ilego ba re: Mmago le bana beno ba eme ka ntle leba kganyoga go go bona. 
Luke8:21 A ba araba a re: Ke mma le bana beso bao ba kwago lentsu la Modimo leba le dira. 
Luke8:22 Ka letsatsi le lengwe a namela sekepe le barutiwa ba gagwe, a re go bona: A re tsheleng ka mosola wa letsha. Leba thoma go tloga." 
Luke8:23 Eupsa ge ba be ba sepela ka sekepe, a robala lephefo ya ledimo ya theogela letseng. Leba be ba tletse meetse leba le kotsing." 
Luke8:24 Leba tla go Yena leba mo tsosa ba re: Moruti, Moruti, re a timela. Ke moka a tsoga a kgalema phefo le meetse a magolo; ba ema, legwa tla setu." 
Luke8:25 A re go bona: Tumelo ya lena e kae? Ge ba tshogile, ba makala, ba re: Motho yo ke mang? gobane O laela le diphefo le meetse, lea a mo kwa." 
Luke8:26 Ba fihla nageng ya Bagadarene yeo e lebanego le Galilea. 
Luke8:27 Ge a tswile nageng, monna yo mongwe yo a tswago motseng, yo e lego kgale a e-na le batemona e bile a sa apare diaparo, e bile a sa dule ntlong le ge e le efe, ge e se mabitleng." 
Luke8:28 Ge a bona Jesu, a goeletsa, a wela fase pele ga gagwe, a re ka lentsu le le hlabosago: “Ke dira’ng le wena Jesu, Morwa wa Modimo, Yo Godimodimo? Ke a Go kgopela, o se ke wa ntlhokofatsa." 
Luke8:29 (Gobane o ile a laela moya wo o sa hlwekago gore o tswe go monna yoo, ka gobane gantsi o be o mo swara, a tlemilwe ka diketane le ditlemo, a roba ditlemo lea kgorometswa ke Diabolo leganateng.)" 
Luke8:30 Jesu a mmotsisa a re: Leina la gago ke mang? lea re: Legion, ka gobane batemona ba bantsi ba tsene go yena." 
Luke8:31 Leba mo kgopela gore a se ke a ba laela gore ba tswe ka bodibeng. 
Luke8:32 Lego be go na le mohlape wa dikolobe tse ntsi tseo di fulago thabeng, leba mo kgopela gore a di dumelele go tsena ka go tsona. Lea di kgotlelela." 
Luke8:33 Ke moka batemona ba tswa go monna yoo ba tsena dikolobeng; 
Luke8:34 Ge bao ba ba fepago ba bona se se diregilego, ba tshaba ba ya go botsa seo motseng le nageng." 
Luke8:35 Ke moka ba tswa go yo bona seo se diregilego; a tla go Jesu lea hwetsa monna yo batemona ba tswilego go yena, a dutse maotong a Jesu, a apere e bile a na le monagano o lokilego; leba tshoga." 
Luke8:36 Bao ba ilego ba bona seo ba ile ba ba botsa kamoo yo a bego a swerwe ke batemona a fodisitswego ka gona. 
Luke8:37 Ke moka lesaba ka moka la naga ya Bagadarene la mo kgopela gore a ba tloge; a namela sekepe a boa. 
Luke8:38 Monna yo batemona ba tlogilego go yena a mo kgopela gore a be le yena, eupsa Jesu a mo raka a re." 
Luke8:39 Boela ntlong ya gago leo botse kamoo Modimo a go diretsego dilo tse dikgolo ka gona. A tloga, a tsebisa motseng ka moka ka dilo tse dikgolo tseo Jesu a mo diretsego tsona." 
Luke8:40 Ge Jesu a boa, batho ba mo amogela ka lethabo, ka gobane bohle ba be ba mo letetse." 
Luke8:41 Lebona, gwa tla monna yo a bitswago Jairo, e be e le mmusi wa sinagoge; a wela maotong a Jesu a mo kgopela gore a tsene ka ntlong ya gagwe." 
Luke8:42 Gobane o be a na le morwedi o tee a nnosi, yo a bego a na le mengwaga ye e ka bago ye lesomepedi, lea robetse a ehwa. Eupsa ge a sepela, batho ba kgobokana go mo dikologa." 
Luke8:43 Mosadi yo a bego a na le go elela ga madi ka nywaga e lesomepedi, a fetsa bophelo bja gagwe ka moka a le dingaka lea se a fodiswa ke motho." 
Luke8:44 A tla ka morago ga gagwe a kgwatha mosito wa seaparo sa gagwe, legateetee go elela ga madi ga gagwe gwa nwelela." 
Luke8:45 LeJesu a re: Ke mang yo a nkgwathilego? Ge bohle ba e latola, Petere le bao ba bego ba na le yena ba re: Moruti, lesaba le a go pitlaganya lele go gatelela, leO re: Ke mang yo a Nkgomilego?" 
Luke8:46 LeJesu a re: Motho yo mongwe o nkgomile, ka baka la gore ke bona gore bokwala bo tswile go Nna." 
Luke8:47 Mosadi yoo a bona gore ga se a utega, a tla a thothomela, a wela fase pele ga gagwe, a mmotsa pele ga batho ka moka lebaka leo a mo kgwathilego le kamoo a fodilego ka gona gateetee." 
Luke8:48 A re go yena: Morwedi, kgonthisetsa; tumelo ya gago e go pholositse; sepela ka khutso." 
Luke8:49 Ge a sa bolela, yo mongwe wa babusi ba ntlo ya sinagoge a tla a re go yena: Morwedi wa gago o hwile; mathata e sego Mong." 
Luke8:50 Eupsa ge Jesu a ekwa se, a mo araba lea re: O se ke wa boifa; dumela feela, leo tla fodiswa." 
Luke8:51 Ge a tsena ka ntlong, ga se a ka a dumelela motho go tsena, ntle le Petere le Jakobo le Johane le tate le mmago ngwanenyana." 
Luke8:52 Bohle ba lla ba mo llela, eupsa yena a re: O se ke wa lla; ga se a hwa eupsa o robetse." 
Luke8:53 Ba mo sega, ka gobane ba be ba tseba gore o hwile." 
Luke8:54 A di ntsha ka moka lea mo swara ka seatla lea bitsa a re: Ngwanenyana, tsoga!" 
Luke8:55 Moya wa gagwe wa boa, a tsoga gateetee, a laela gore a mo fe dijo." 
Luke8:56 Batswadi ba gagwe ba makala, eupsa a ba laela gore ba se botse motho seo se diregilego." 
Luke9:1 Ke moka a bitsa barutiwa ba gagwe ba lesomepedi, a ba nea matla le taolo godimo ga batemona ka moka le go fodisa malwetsi." 
Luke9:2 A ba roma go yo bolela ka Mmuso wa Modimo le go fodisa balwetsi. 
Luke9:3 Ke moka a re go bona: “Le se ke la tsea selo bakeng sa leeto la lena, le se ke la tsea dithupa goba lesela la mokotla goba senkgwa goba tshelete; goba dijase tse pedi e nngwe le e nngwe." 
Luke9:4 Ka ntlong le ge e le efe yeo o tsenago ka yona, dula moo leo tloge moo." 
Luke9:5 Mang le mang yo a sa le amogelego, ge le etswa motseng woo, le sisinye lerole leo le lego maotong a lena e le bohlatse kgahlanong le bona." 
Luke9:6 Ba tloga ba phatsa metse, ba bolela Ebangedi le go fodisa gohle." 
Luke9:7 Heroda kgosana a kwa ka tsohle tseo di dirilwego ke yena; 
Luke9:8 Go ba bangwe, Eliya a tswelela; lego ba bangwe, gore yo mongwe wa baporofeta ba kgale a tsoga." 
Luke9:9 Heroda a re: Johane ke kgaotse hlogo, eupsa ke mang yo ke kwago dilo tse bjalo ka yena? leo be a nyaka go mmona." 
Luke9:10 Ge baapostola ba boa, ba mmotsa tsohle tseo ba di dirilego. A ba tsea, a ya a nnosi lefelong la lesope la motse wo o bitswago Betsaida." 
Luke9:11 Lege batho ba tseba se, ba mo latela; a ba amogela, a bolela le bona ka mmuso wa Modimo, a fodisa bao ba bego ba nyaka go fodiswa." 
Luke9:12 Ge mosegare o thoma go hlaba, ba lesomepedi ba tla ba re go yena: “Roma lesaba, gore le ye metseng le dileteng leba robale bosego leba hwetse dijo; gobane re mo lefelong la leganateng." 
Luke9:13 Eupsa yena a re go bona: “Ineele go ba ja. Leba re: Re na le dinkgwa tse hlano fela le dihlapi tse pedi; ntle le gore re swanetse go ya go rekela batho ba ka moka nama. 
Luke9:14 Gobane e be e le banna ba dikete tse hlano. A re go barutiwa ba gagwe: A ba dule ba masome a mahlano ka sehlopha. 
Luke9:15 Ba dira bjalo, ba ba dudisa ka moka." 
Luke9:16 Ke moka a tsea dinkgwa tse hlano le dihlapi tse pedi, a lebelela legodimong, a di segofatsa a di ngwatha, a di nea barutiwa gore ba di bee pele ga lesaba." 
Luke9:17 Ba ja, ba kgora ka moka, lego masaledi ao a bego a ba sala, ba kgoboketswa diroto tse lesomepedi." 
Luke9:18 Lege a be a rapela a nnosi, barutiwa ba gagwe ba be ba na le Yena; le a ba botsisa lea re: Batho ba re ke nna mang?" 
Luke9:19 Ba fetola ba re: Johane Mokolobetsi; eupsa ba bangwe ba re: Eliya! ba bangwe ba re, yo mongwe wa baporofeta ba kgale o tsogile." 
Luke9:20 A re go bona: Eupsa le re ke nna mang? Petere a fetola a re: Kreste wa Modimo. 
Luke9:21 A ba laela ka thata, a ba laela gore ba se ke ba botsa motho;" 
Luke9:22 lea re: Morwa wa motho o swanetse go tlaisega kudu lea lahlwe ke bagolo le baperisita ba bagolo le bamangwalo lea bolawe lea tsoswe ka letsatsi la boraro. 
Luke9:23 LeA re go bohle: Ge motho a nyaka go tla morago ga Nna, a a itatole lea rwale sefapano sa gagwe letsatsi le lengwe le le lengwe lea Ntatele." 
Luke9:24 Gobane mang le mang yo a nyakago go pholosa bophelo bja gagwe o tla bo lahlegelwa; eupsa mang le mang yo a lahlegelwago ke bophelo bja gagwe ka baka la ka, o tla bo pholosa." 
Luke9:25 Gobane motho go hola’ng ge a ka hwetsa lefase ka moka lea lahlegelwa goba a lahlwa? 
Luke9:26 Gobane mang le mang yo a hlabjago ke dihlong ka Nna le mantsu a ka, yena Morwa wa motho o tla hlabja ke dihlong ge a etla ka letago la gagwe le ka letago la Tatagwe le la barongwa ba bakgethwa." 
Luke9:27 Eupsa thereso ke le botsa gore go na le ba bangwe bao ba emego mo bao ba ka se kego ba latswa lehu go fihlela ba bona Mmuso wa Modimo. 
Luke9:28 Mo e ka bago matsatsi a seswai ka morago ga mantsu a a tsea Petere le Johane le Jakobo a rotogela thabeng go yo rapela. 
Luke9:29 Ge a rapela, sebopego sa sefahlego sa gagwe sa fetoga, diaparo tsa gagwe tsa ba tse tshweu e bile di phadima." 
Luke9:30 Lebona, fao banna ba babedi ba bolela le yena, e be e le Moshe le Eliya." 
Luke9:31 Yo a ilego a tswelela ka letago lea bolela ka lehu la gagwe, leo a bego a tla le phethagatsa kua Jerusalema." 
Luke9:32 Eupsa Petere le bao ba bego ba na le yena ba be ba imela boroko. Ge ba phafoga, ba bona letago la gagwe le banna ba babedi bao ba bego ba eme kgauswi le yena." 
Luke9:33 Lege ba Mo tlogetse, Petere a re go Jesu: Moruti, go botse gore re mo, lea re direng mesasa ye meraro; e tee ya gago, e nngwe ya Moshe, e nngwe ya Eliya, a sa tsebe seo a se boletsego." 
Luke9:34 Ge a sa bolela ka tsela ye, leru la tla la ba apesa; ba tshoga ge ba tsena lerung." 
Luke9:35 Legwa kwa lentsu go tswa lerung la re: Ye ke Morwa wa ka yo a rategago; mo theeletse. 
Luke9:36 Ge lentsu le fedile, Jesu a hwetswa a nnosi. Leba e boloka kgauswi leba se botse motho mehleng yeo ka dilo tseo ba di bonego." 
Luke9:37 Legwa direga gore letsatsing le le latelago, ge ba theoga go tswa mmotong, batho ba bantsi ba gahlanetsana le yena." 
Luke9:38 Lebona, monna wa lesaba a goeletsa lea re: Moruti, ke a Go kgopela, lebelela morwa wa ka, ka gobane ke ngwana wa ka a nnosi." 
Luke9:39 Lebona, moya o ile wa mo swara, legateetee a goeletsa; lego mo gagola gore a foma gape, lego mo pshatlaganya ga go mo tloge ka thata." 
Luke9:40 Ka kgopela barutiwa ba gago gore ba mo rake; leba be ba sa kgone. 
Luke9:41 LeJesu a araba a re: Wena moloko wo o sa dumelego le wo o fosagetsego, ke tla ba le lena go fihla neng leka le kgotlelela? Tlisa morwa wa gago mo." 
Luke9:42 Ge A sa etla, Diabolo a mo lahlela fase lea mo gatakela. Jesu a kgalema moya wo o sa hlwekago, a fodisa ngwana, a mo nea tatagwe." 
Luke9:43 Ka moka ga bona ba makatswa ke matla a magolo a Modimo. Eupsa ge ka moka ba be ba makaditswe ke tsohle tseo Jesu a di dirilego, o ile a re go barutiwa ba gagwe:" 
Luke9:44 Anke mantsu a a nwele ditsebeng tsa lena, gobane Morwamotho o tla gafelwa diatleng tsa batho." 
Luke9:45 Eupsa ba be ba sa kwesise lentsu le, lele ile la ba utega, mo ba sa lemogego; leba tshaba go mmotsisa ka lentsu le." 
Luke9:46 Ke moka gwa tsoga ngangisano gare ga bona ya gore ke mang go bona yo a tlago go ba yo mogolo. 
Luke9:47 Jesu ge a lemoga kgopolo ya dipelo tsa bona, a tsea ngwana a mo dudisa le yena," 
Luke9:48 lea re go bona: Mang le mang yo a amogelago ngwana yo monnyane yo ka leina la ka o a nkamogela; leyo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a nkamogelago o amogela Yo a Nthomilego; gobane yo monyenyane gare ga lena ka moka, e tla ba yo mogolo." 
Luke9:49 Johane a araba a re: Moruti, re bone motho a leleka batemona ka leina la gago; ra mo thibela, ka gobane ga a latele le rena." 
Luke9:50 Jesu a re go yena: O se ke wa mo thibela, ka gobane yo a sa re ganetsego o lebane le rena." 
Luke9:51 Ya re ge nako ya gore a rotoswe, a ikemiseditse go ya Jerusalema." 
Luke9:52 Ba roma baromiwa pele ga gagwe, ba ya motsaneng wa Ba Samarea go yo mo lokisetsa." 
Luke9:53 Ga se ba mo amogela, ka gobane sefahlego sa gagwe se be se le bjalo ka ge eka o be a tla ya Jerusalema." 
Luke9:54 Ge barutiwa ba gagwe Jakobo le Johane ba bona se, ba re: Morena, na o nyaka gore re laele mollo gore o theoge legodimong leo ba fise, go etsa ge Eliya a dirile?" 
Luke9:55 Eupsa a retologa a ba kgalema a re: Ga le tsebe gore le moya wa mohuta mang. 
Luke9:56 Morwa wa motho ga se a tla go fedisa maphelo a batho, eupsa o tlile go ba pholosa. Leba ya motseng o mongwe." 
Luke9:57 Lege ba sa sepela tseleng, monna yo mongwe a re go yena: Morena, ke tla go latela kae le kae mo o yago gona." 
Luke9:58 Jesu a re go yena: Ditshosane di na le mekoti le dihlaga tsa dinonyana tsa leratadima; eupsa Morwa wa motho ga a na mo a ka beago hlogo ya gagwe. 
Luke9:59 A re go yo mongwe: Ntatele. Eupsa a re: Morena, ntumelele ke ye go boloka tate pele." 
Luke9:60 Jesu a re go yena: A bahu ba boloke bahu ba bona, eupsa eya o tsebatse Mmuso wa Modimo." 
Luke9:61 Leyo mongwe le yena a re: Morena, ke tla go latela; eupsa e re ke ye pele ke ye go ba dumedisa, bao ba lego ka gae ntlong ya ka." 
Luke9:62 Jesu a re go yena: Ga go yo a beago seatla sa gagwe mogoma lea lebelela morago yo a swanetsego mmuso wa Modimo. 
Luke10:1 Ka morago ga dilo tse, Morena a kgetha le ba bangwe ba masome a supago, a ba romela ka bobedi ka bobedi pele ga sefahlego sa gagwe motseng o mongwe le o mongwe le lefelong le lengwe le le lengwe leo yena a bego a tla tla go lona." 
Luke10:2 Ka fao a re go bona: Ruri puno ke ye kgolo, eupsa basomi ke ba mmalwa; ke moka o rapele Morena wa puno gore a rome basomi punong ya gagwe." 
Luke10:3 Tswela pele: bona, ke go roma bjalo ka dikwanyana gare ga diphiri." 
Luke10:4 Le se ke la rwala sekhwama goba mokotla goba dieta, le se ke la dumedisa motho tseleng." 
Luke10:5 Leka ntlong efe goba efe yeo o tsenago ka yona, pele o re: Khutso ntlong ye!" 
Luke10:6 Ge e ba morwa wa khutso a le moo, khutso ya gago e tla dula godimo ga yona; ge e ba go se bjalo, e tla boela go wena gape." 
Luke10:7 Le dule ka ntlong e tee le je le go nwa tse ba di neago, ka gobane mosomi o swanetse moputso wa gagwe. O se ke wa ya ka ntlo le ntlo." 
Luke10:8 Motseng le ge e le ofe wo o tsenago ka wona leba go amogela, le je dilo tseo di beilwego pele ga lena." 
Luke10:9 O fodise balwetsi bao ba lego go wona, o ba botse: Mmuso wa Modimo o le batametse." 
Luke10:10 Eupsa motseng o mongwe le o mongwe wo o tsenago ka wona leba sa go amogele, tswa ditarateng tsa wona leo re." 
Luke10:11 Gaesita le lerole la motse wa geno leo le re kgomaretsego, re le phumola; eupsa o swanetse go kgonthisega gore mmuso wa Modimo o go batametse." 
Luke10:12 Eupsa ke le botsa gore letsatsing leo Sodoma e tla kgotlelelwa go feta motse woo. 
Luke10:13 Go madimabe wena Korasin! go madimabe wena Betsaida! gobane ge e ba mediro e megolo yeo e dirilwego go lena e dirilwe Tiro le Sidone, ba ile ba sokologa kgale ba dutse ba apere mokotla le molora." 
Luke10:14 Eupsa Tiro le Sidone e tla kgotlelelwa kudu nakong ya kahlolo go feta lena. 
Luke10:15 Wena Kaperenaume yo o ilego wa phagamisetswa legodimong, o tla lahlelwa diheleng." 
Luke10:16 Mang le mang yo a le theeletsago o a Ntheeletsa; leyo a go nyatsago o a Nnyatsa; yo a nnyatsago o nyatsa yo a nthomilego. 
Luke10:17 Ba masomesupa ba boa ka lethabo ba re: Morena, le batemona ba re ikokobeletsa ka leina la gago." 
Luke10:18 A re go bona: Ke bone Sathane a wa bjalo ka legadima go tswa legodimong. 
Luke10:19 Bonang, ke le fa maatla a go gata dinoga le diphepheng, le maatla ka moka a lenaba, lega go selo seo se le gobatsago." 
Luke10:20 Eupsa ga le thabele ge meoya e le ikokobeletsa; eupsa go e na le moo thabang, gobane maina a lena a ngwadilwe legodimong." 
Luke10:21 Ka nako yeo Jesu o ile a thaba moyeng lea re: Ke a go leboga, Tate, Morena wa legodimo le lefase, ka ge o utetse batho ba bohlale le ba bohlale dilo tse lewa di utollela bana ba bannyane; ka gobane ke ka fao e bego e bonala gabotse mahlong a gago." 
Luke10:22 Tsohle di gafetswe go Nna ke Tate, lega go yo a tsebago gore Morwa ke mang, ge e se Tate; le yo e lego Tate ge e se Morwa, le yo Morwa a tlago go iponatsa go yena." 
Luke10:23 A retologela go barutiwa ba gagwe a re a nnosi: “Go lehlogonolo mahlo ao a bonago seo le se bonago. 
Luke10:24 Gobane ke le botsa gore baporofeta ba bantsi le dikgosi ba be ba kganyoga go bona seo le se bonago, eupsa ga se ba se bona; le go kwa tse le di kwago lela se di kwe." 
Luke10:25 Lebona, ramolao yo mongwe a ema lea mo leka, a re: Moruti, ke swanetse go dira eng gore ke hwetse bohwa bja bophelo bjo bo sa felego?" 
Luke10:26 A re go yena: Ke eng seo se ngwadilwego molaong? o bala bjang? 
Luke10:27 A araba a re: O rate Morena Modimo wa gago ka pelo ya gago ka moka le ka moya wa gago ka moka le ka maatla a gago ka moka le ka monagano wa gago ka moka; le moagisani wa gago bjalo ka wena. 
Luke10:28 A re go yena: O arabile ka nepo; dira se, leo tla phela." 
Luke10:29 Eupsa yena yo a bego a ikemiseditse go itokafatsa, a re go Jesu: “Moagisani wa ka ke mang?" 
Luke10:30 Jesu a araba a re: Monna yo mongwe o ile a theoga Jerusalema a ya Jeriko, a wela gare ga mahodu, a mo hlobola diaparo, a mo gobatsa, a tloga a mo tlogela a hwile seripagare." 
Luke10:31 Ka kotsi moperisita yo mongwe a theogela moo, ge a mmona, a feta ka mosola." 
Luke10:32 Leka mokgwa woo, Molefi, ge a be a le lefelong leo, a tla a mo lebelela lea feta ka lehlakoreng le lengwe." 
Luke10:33 Eupsa Mo Samarea yo mongwe a tla leetong moo a bego a le gona; lege a mmona, a mo kwela bohloko kudu." 
Luke10:34 A ya go yena, a tlema dintho tsa gagwe, a tshela makhura le beine, a mo nametsa phoofolong ya gagwe, a mo tlisa ntlong ya baeti lea mo hlokomela." 
Luke10:35 Letsatsing le le latelago ge a tloga, a ntsha dipeni tse pedi a di nea madira lea re go yena: Mo hlokomele; lese sengwe le se sengwe seo o se dirisago, ke tla go lefa ge ke boa." 
Luke10:36 O nagana gore ke mang go ba bararo bao e bego e le kgauswi kudu le yo a ilego a wela gare ga bahlakodi? 
Luke10:37 Lea re: Yo a mo gaugelago. Ke moka Jesu a re go yena: Sepela o dire bjalo. 
Luke10:38 Ge ba sa sepela, a tsena motseng o mongwe lemosadi yo mongwe yo a bitswago Mareta a mo amogela ka ntlong ya gagwe." 
Luke10:39 O be a na le kgaetsedi yo a bitswago Maria, yo le yena a ilego a dula dinaong tsa Jesu lea kwa lentsu la gagwe." 
Luke10:40 Eupsa Mareta o ile a imelwa ke tirelo ye ntsi lea tla go yena lea re: Morena, na ga o tshwenyege ka gore kgaetsedi ya ka e ntumelela go hlankela ke nnosi? ke moka o mo rapele gore a nthuse." 
Luke10:41 Jesu a mo fetola a re: Mareta, Mareta, o hlokolosi ebile o tshwenyegile ka dilo tse dintsi." 
Luke10:42 Eupsa go nyakega selo se tee, leMaria a kgetha karolo yeo e botse yeo e ka se amogwego go yena." 
Luke11:1 Ge a be a rapela lefelong le lengwe, yo mongwe wa barutiwa ba gagwe ge a ema, a re go yena: Morena, re rute go rapela, bjalo ka ge Johane le yena a rutile barutiwa ba gagwe." 
Luke11:2 LeA re go bona: Ge le rapela, re: Tatago rena wa legodimong, leina la gago a le kgethelwe. Mmuso wa gago o tle. Thato ya gago a e dirwe bjalo ka ge e dirwa legodimong, le mo lefaseng." 
Luke11:3 Re fe bogobe bja rena bja letsatsi le letsatsi. 
Luke11:4 O re lebalele dibe tsa rena; gobane le rena re lebalela yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a nago le molato wa rena. O se re ise molekong; eupsa re hlakodise bobeng. 
Luke11:5 LeA re go bona: Ke mang wa lena yo a tlago go ba le mogwera, lea ya go yena bosegogare lea re go yena: Mogwera, nkadime dinkgwa tse tharo;" 
Luke11:6 Gobane mogwera wa ka yo mongwe leetong la gagwe o tlile go nna, lega ke na selo seo nka mmontshago sona?" 
Luke11:7 O tla araba go tswa ka gare lea re: O se ke wa ntshwenya; mojako bjale o tswaletswe, lebana ba ka ba robala le nna; Ga ke kgone go tsoga ka go fa." 
Luke11:8 Ke a le botsa, le ge a ka se tsoge a mo nee, ka gobane e le mogwera wa gagwe, eupsa ka baka la go goboswa ga gagwe o tla tsoga a mo nea tse a di hlokago." 
Luke11:9 Leke re go lena: Kgopela, lele tla fiwa; nyakang, lele tla hwetsa; kokota, leo tla bulelwa." 
Luke11:10 Gobane yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a kgopelago o a amogela; leyo a tsomago o a hwetsa; leyo a kokotago o tla bulelwa. 
Luke11:11 Ge e ba morwa wa yo mongwe wa lena yo e lego tate a kgopela senkgwa, na o tla mo nea leswika? goba ge a ka kgopela hlapi, na o tla mo fa noga ka hlapi?" 
Luke11:12 Goba ge a ka kgopela lee, na o tla mo neela phepheng?" 
Luke11:13 Ge e ba lena ba babe le tseba go nea bana ba lena dimpho tse dibotse, gona Tatago lena wa legodimong o tla nea moya o mokgethwa gakaakang go bao ba mo rapelago?" 
Luke11:14 O be a leleka motemona, e le semumu. Ge Diabolo a tswile, dimumu tsa bolela; mme batho ba makala." 
Luke11:15 Eupsa ba bangwe ba bona ba re: O raka batemona ka Beeletsebube, kgosana ya batemona." 
Luke11:16 Ba bangwe ba mo leka, ba mo tsoma pontsho go tswa legodimong." 
Luke11:17 Eupsa a tseba dikgopolo tsa bona lea re go bona: Mmuso wo mongwe le wo mongwe wo o aroganego o a fediswa; lentlo yeo e aroganego le ntlo e a wa. 
Luke11:18 Ge e ba Sathane le yena a arogane, mmuso wa gagwe o tla ema bjang? gobane o re ke leleka batemona ka Beeletsebube." 
Luke11:19 Ge e ba ke raka batemona ka Beeletsebube, gona barwa ba gago ba ba raka ka mang? ka baka leo e tla ba baahlodi ba lena." 
Luke11:20 Eupsa ge e ba ke leleka batemona ka monwana wa Modimo, gona mmuso wa Modimo o le tletse ka ntle le pelaelo." 
Luke11:21 Ge monna yo matla yo a itlhamilego a disa mosate wa gagwe, dithoto tsa gagwe di ba ka khutso;" 
Luke11:22 Eupsa ge motho yo matla go mo feta a mo wela lea mo fenya, o mo amoga ditlhamo tsa gagwe ka moka tseo a bego a di botile, lea arola dithebola tsa gagwe." 
Luke11:23 Yo a sego le nna o lwantshana le nna; yo a sa kgobokanego le nna o a phatlalatsa. 
Luke11:24 Ge moya o silafetsego o tswile mothong, o sepela mafelong a omilego leo tsoma khutso; ge a sa hwetse selo, a re: “Ke tla boela ntlong ya ka yeo ke tswago go yona.”" 
Luke11:25 Ge a fihla, o hwetsa e gogolwa e bile e kgabisitswe." 
Luke11:26 Ka morago ga moo a ya a tsea meoya e mengwe e supago, e mebe go mo feta; leba tsena leba dula fao, leboemo bja mafelelo bja monna yoo bo mpe go feta bja pele." 
Luke11:27 Ge a sa bolela dilo tse, mosadi yo mongwe yo a tswago lesabeng a hlabosa lentsu a re go yena: “Go lehlogonolo popelo yeo e go belegilego le melomo yeo e go anyago." 
Luke11:28 Eupsa yena o re: Ee, go lehlogonolo bao ba kwago lentsu la Modimo leba le boloka." 
Luke11:29 Lege batho ba kgobokana, A thoma go re: Ye ke moloko wo mobe; ba nyaka seka; e ka se fiwe pontsho ge e se pontsho ya moporofeta Jona." 
Luke11:30 Gobane bjalo ka ge Jona e be e le pontsho go Baninife, Morwamotho le yena o tla ba moloko wo." 
Luke11:31 Mohumagadi wa Borwa o tla ema kahlolong le banna ba moloko wo lea ba ahlola; gobane o tlile a etswa maphekong a lefase go tlo kwa bohlale bja Solomone; lebona, yo ke yo mogolo go feta Solomone." 
Luke11:32 Banna ba Ninife ba tla ema le moloko wo kahlolong, ba o ahlola; lebona, yo ke yo mogolo go feta Jona." 
Luke11:33 Ga go na motho, ge a gotsitse lebone, yo a le beago lefelong le le utilwego, gaesita le ka tlase ga kgamelo ya go ela, eupsa godimo ga lebone, gore bao ba tsenago ba bone seetsa." 
Luke11:34 Seetsa sa mmele ke leihlo; ka baka leo ge leihlo la gago le sa le nosi, mmele wa gago ka moka le wona o tletse seetsa; eupsa ge leihlo la gago le le lebe, mmele wa gago le wona o tletse leswiswi." 
Luke11:35 Ka gona hlokomelang gore seetsa seo se lego go wena e se lefsifsi. 
Luke11:36 Ge e ba mmele wa gago ka moka o tletse seetsa lego se na karolo yeo e nago le leswiswi, gona ka moka ga wona e tla tlala seetsa, go etsa ge go phadima ga kerese go go bonesa." 
Luke11:37 Ge a sa bolela, Mofarisei yo mongwe a mo kgopela gore a je le yena; a tsena, a dula fase go ja." 
Luke11:38 Ge Mofarisei a bona se, a makala gore ga se a ka a hlapa le pele ga dijo tsa mantsiboa." 
Luke11:39 Morena a re go yena: Bjale lena Bafarisei le hlwekisa ka ntle ga senwelo le poleiti; eupsa dikagare tsa lena di tletse karogano le bobe. 
Luke11:40 Lena masilo, na Yo a dirilego ka ntle ga se a dira le tse di lego ka gare?" 
Luke11:41 Eupsa go e na le moo, nea dimpho tsa ditshelete go tswa go seo o nago le sona; lebona, tsohle di hlwekile go lena." 
Luke11:42 Eupsa go madimabe lena Bafarisei! gobane le ntsha karolo ya lesome ya koena le rue le mehuta ka moka ya mesunkwane, lele ahlola le lerato la Modimo;" 
Luke11:43 Go madimabe lena Bafarisei! gobane le rata ditulo tsa ka godimo disinagogeng le go dumedisa mebarakeng. 
Luke11:44 Go madimabe lena bamangwalo le Bafarisei, baikaketsi! gobane o swana le mabitla ao a sa bonwego, lebanna bao ba sepelago godimo ga ona ga ba a tsebe." 
Luke11:45 Ke moka yo mongwe wa bamangwalo a mo fetola a re: Moruti, le wena o re sola ka se." 
Luke11:46 Lea re: Go madimabe le lena boramolao! ka gobane le imetsa setshaba ka merwalo e boima ya go rwala, lelena ka nosi ga le kgwathe merwalo yeo ka monwana wa lena." 
Luke11:47 Go madimabe lena! gobane o aga mabitla a baporofeta, leborakgolokhukhu ba gago ba a bolaile." 
Luke11:48 Ruri, le hlatsela gore le dumelela mediro ya borakgolokhukhu ba lena, ka gobane ba ba bolaile, lele aga mabitla a bona." 
Luke11:49 Ka fao bohlale bja Modimo le bjona bja re: Ke tla romela baporofeta le baapostola go bona, leba bangwe ba bona ba tla ba bolaya le go ba tlaisa." 
Luke11:50 E le gore madi a baporofeta ka moka ao a tsholotswego ga e sa le go tloga go hlongwa ga lefase, a nyakege moloko wo;" 
Luke11:51 Go tloga mading a Abele go fihla mading a Sakaria yo a ilego a fediswa magareng ga aletare le tempele; ruri ke a le botsa, e tla nyakega molokong wo." 
Luke11:52 Go madimabe lena boramolao! gobane le tsere senotlelo sa tsebo; lena ka nosi ga se la tsena, lebao ba tsenago ba le thibela." 
Luke11:53 Ge a sa ba botsa dilo tse, bamangwalo le Bafarisei ba thoma go mo kgothatsa ka bogale le go mo hlohleletsa go bolela ka dilo tse dintsi." 
Luke11:54 O mo lalela leo leka go swara se sengwe molomong wa gagwe, gore ba tle ba mo latofatse." 
Luke12:1 Mo nakong ye, ge go be go kgobokane lesaba le le sa balegego la batho, moo ba ilego ba gatana, o ile a thoma go bolela go barutiwa ba gagwe gore: Hlokomela komelo ya Bafarisei, ke boikaketsi." 
Luke12:2 Gobane ga go selo se se khupeditswego seo se ka se utollwago; goba go utega, mo go ka se tsebjego." 
Luke12:3 Ka gona, tsohle tseo o di boletsego lefsifsing di tla kwewa seetseng; leseo o se boletsego tsebeng ka phaposing ya ka gare, se tla tsebatswa godimo ga dintlo." 
Luke12:4 Ke re go lena, bagwera ba ka: Le se ke la boifa bao ba bolayago setopo leka morago ba se setse selo seo ba ka se dirago." 
Luke12:5 Eupsa ke tla le lemosa e sa le pele gore ke mang yo le swanetsego go mmoifa: Boifang Yo a nago le maatla a go lahlela diheleng; ee, ke re go wena: Mo boife." 
Luke12:6 Na dithaga tse hlano ga di rekiswe ka diranta tse pedi lega go le e tee ya tsona yeo e lebetswego pele ga Modimo? 
Luke12:7 Eupsa le meriri ya dihlogo tsa lena e balwa ka moka. Bjale o se ke wa boifa: o bohlokwa go feta dithaga tse dintsi. 
Luke12:8 Gape ke re go lena: Mang le mang yo a tlago go ipolela pele ga batho, yena Morwa wa Motho le yena o tla ipolela pele ga barongwa ba Modimo." 
Luke12:9 Eupsa yo a ntanetsago pele ga batho o tla latolwa pele ga barongwa ba Modimo. 
Luke12:10 Mang le mang yo a bolelago lentsu kgahlanong le Morwa wa motho, o tla lebalelwa; eupsa yo a nyefolago Moya o Mokgethwa, a ka se lebalelwe." 
Luke12:11 Ge ba le tlisa disinagogeng le go bomaseterata le babusi, le se ke la nagana gore le tla araba bjang goba gore le tla araba eng." 
Luke12:12 Gobane Moya o Mokgethwa o tla le ruta ka yona nako yeo seo le swanetsego go se bolela. 
Luke12:13 Yo mongwe wa lesaba a re go yena: Moruti, bolela le ngwaneso gore a abelane le nna bohwa bjoo." 
Luke12:14 A re go yena: Monna, ke mang yo a nkgethilego go ba moahlodi goba moahlodi go wena?" 
Luke12:15 LeA re go bona: Hlokomelang le go hlokomela megabaru, ka gobane bophelo bja motho ga bo bopsa ke bontsi bja dithoto tsa gagwe." 
Luke12:16 A ba botsa seswantsho a re: Naga ya mohumi yo mongwe e ile ya tsweletsa kudu. 
Luke12:17 A nagana ka pelong a re: Ke tla dira eng, ka gobane ga ke na lefelo la go neela dienywa tsa ka?" 
Luke12:18 A re: Ke tla dira se: Ke tla phusola masaka a ka leka aga tse dikgolo; lemoo ke tla neela dienywa tsa ka ka moka le dithoto tsa ka. 
Luke12:19 Ke tla re go moya wa ka: Moya, o na le dilo tse dintsi tseo di lahlilwego ka nywaga e mentsi; tsea nako ya gago, ja, nwa leo thabe." 
Luke12:20 Eupsa Modimo a re go yena: Wena lesilo, bosegong bjo moya wa gago o tla nyakega;" 
Luke12:21 Go bjalo le ka yo a ipolokelago matlotlo lea sa hume go Modimo. 
Luke12:22 A re go barutiwa ba gagwe: “Ke ka baka leo ke le botsago: Le se tshwenyege ka bophelo bja lena, gore le tla ja eng; le ge e le bakeng sa mmele wo o swanetsego go o apara." 
Luke12:23 Bophelo bo feta nama, le mmele o feta diaparo." 
Luke12:24 Ela hloko digwagwa ka gobane ga di bjale e bile ga di bune; yeo e se nago phaposi ya polokelo goba lesaka; leModimo o a ba fepa. O phala dinonyana gakaakang? 
Luke12:25 Ke mang go lena yo a ka oketsago kubiti e tee go botelele bja gagwe ka go nagana? 
Luke12:26 Bjale ge le sa kgone go dira se senyenyane, ke ka baka la’ng le nagana ka tse dingwe?" 
Luke12:27 Lebelelang dilili kamoo di golago ka gona, ga di some, ga di dikologe; le ge go le bjalo ke le botsa gore Solomone ka letago la gagwe ka moka ga se a apara bjalo ka yo mongwe wa bona." 
Luke12:28 Ge e ba Modimo a apesa bjang bjo bo lego gona lehono tshemong legosasa bja lahlelwa ka sebesong; O tla go apesa gakaakang, lena ba tumelo ye nnyane?" 
Luke12:29 O se ke wa tsoma seo o tlago go se ja goba seo o tlago go se nwa, leo se ke wa belaela." 
Luke12:30 Gobane dilo tse ka moka di tsome ditshaba tsa lefase, leTatago lena o a tseba gore le a hloka dilo tse." 
Luke12:31 Go e na le moo, tsoma Mmuso wa Modimo; ledilo tse ka moka le tla le okeletswa." 
Luke12:32 O se boife, mohlape o monyenyane; gobane Tatago lena o kgahlwa ke go le nea mmuso." 
Luke12:33 Rekisa tse o nago le tsona leo nee dimpho tsa ditshelete; le nee dipotla tse di sa tsofalago, letlotlo legodimong leo le sa kgaotsego, moo go se nago lehodu leo le batamelago le go se be le tshosane yeo e senyago." 
Luke12:34 Gobane moo letlotlo la gago le lego gona, le pelo ya gago e tla ba gona." 
Luke12:35 Anke matheka a gago a tlemilwe lemabone a gago a tuka; 
Luke12:36 Lena ka nosi le swana le banna bao ba letetsego mong wa bona ge a boa lenyalong; e le gore ge a ka tla a kokota, ba ka mo bulela gateetee." 
Luke12:37 Go lehlogonolo bahlanka bao Jehofa a tlago go ba hwetsa ba letetse ge a etla; ruri ke le botsa gore o tla itlama, a di apara, a tswa a di hlankela." 
Luke12:38 Ge a ka tla ka nako ya bobedi ya go lebelela goba a tla ka nako ya boraro a ba hwetsa ba le bjalo, go thaba bahlanka bao." 
Luke12:39 Le tsebe gore ge nkabe mong wa ntlo a tsebile gore lehodu le tla tla ka iri yeo, nkabe a ile a phafoga lea se dumelele go thubja ntlo ya gagwe." 
Luke12:40 Ka gona, itokisetseng ka gobane Morwa wa motho o tla ka nako yeo le sa e naganego." 
Luke12:41 Ke moka Petere a re go yena: “Morena, na o re botsa seswantsho se goba gaesita le go bohle?" 
Luke12:42 Morena a re: Bjale ke mang molaodi yoo yo a botegago le yo bohlale yo a tlago go bea mong wa gagwe godimo ga lapa la gagwe, gore a ba nee kabelo ya bona ya nama ka nako ye e swanetsego?" 
Luke12:43 Go lehlogonolo mohlanka yoo mong wa gagwe ge a etla, a tlago go mo hwetsa a swaregile." 
Luke12:44 Ruri ke le botsa gore o tla mo bea mmusi wa tsohle tseo a nago le tsona. 
Luke12:45 Eupsa ge mohlanka yoo a ka re pelong ya gagwe: Mong wa ka o diegisa go tla ga gagwe; leba tla thoma go betha bahlanka le makgoba a basadi, ba ja, ba nwa, ba tagwa;" 
Luke12:46 Mong wa mohlanka yoo o tla tla ka letsatsi leo a sa mo lebelelego ka lona le ka iri yeo a sa e tsebego, leo tla mo kgaola lea laela kabelo ya gagwe le bao ba sa dumelego." 
Luke12:47 Mohlanka yoo yo a bego a tseba thato ya mong wa gagwe lea sa mo lokisetse e bile a sa dire go ya ka thato ya gagwe, o tla bethwa ka dikotlo tse dintsi." 
Luke12:48 Eupsa yo a sa tsebego le go dira dilo tse di swanetsego go bethwa, o tla bethwa ka dikotlo tse sego kae. Gobane yo a filwego mo gontsi, o tla nyakega mo gontsi; leyo setshaba se mo gafetsego mo gontsi, ba tla mo kgopela le go feta." 
Luke12:49 Ke tlile go romela mollo lefaseng; leke tla dira eng ge e setse e bonesitswe? 
Luke12:50 Eupsa ke na le kolobetso yeo ke swanetsego go kolobetswa ka yona; leke tlaletswe gakaakang go fihlela e phethwa! 
Luke12:51 Na o re ke tlile go tlisa khutso mo lefaseng? Ke a le botsa, Aowa; eupsa go e na le moo karogano:" 
Luke12:52 Go tloga bjale go ya pele go tla ba ba bahlano bao ba aroganego ka ntlong e tee, ba bararo ba lwantshana le ba babedi leba babedi ba lwantshana le ba bararo." 
Luke12:53 Tate o tla arogana le morwa, morwa o tla arogana le tate; mma a lwa le morwedi, morwedi a lwa le mma; mmatswale kgahlanong le ngwetsi ya gagwe, lengwetsi kgahlanong le mmatswale wa gagwe." 
Luke12:54 Legape a re go batho: Ge le bona leru le rotoga go tswa bodikela, gateetee le re: Go na le pula ye e tlago; lego bjalo." 
Luke12:55 Lege o bona phefo ya borwa e foka, o re: Go tla ba le phiso; legwa direga." 
Luke12:56 Baikaketsi, le ka kgona go hlaola sefahlego sa legodimo le lefase; eupsa go tla bjang gore le sa hlaole nako ye?" 
Luke12:57 Ee, gona ke ka baka la’ng le lena le sa ahlole ka bolena se se lokilego?" 
Luke12:58 Ge o eya go mmasepala le lenaba la gago, ge o le tseleng, katanela gore o lokollwe go yena; gore a se go rute go moahlodi, moahlodi a go gafela go mohlankedi, mohlankedi a go lahlela kgolegong." 
Luke12:59 Ke a le botsa: O se ke wa tloga fao go fihlela o lefile tshelete ya mafelelo. 
Luke13:1 Go be go na le ba bangwe bao ba bego ba le gona ka nako yeo bao ba ilego ba mmotsa ka Bagalalea bao madi a bona Pilato a ilego a hlakanya le dihlabelo tsa bona. 
Luke13:2 Jesu a ba fetola a re: Na le nagana gore Bagalalea ba e be e le badiradibe go feta Bagalalea ka moka, ka ge ba ile ba tlaiswa ke dilo tse bjalo?" 
Luke13:3 Ke a le botsa: Aowa, eupsa ge le sa sokologe, ka moka ga lena le tla hwelela ka tsela e swanago." 
Luke13:4 Goba bao ba lesomeseswai bao tora e ilego ya ba wela kua Siloama leya ba bolaya, na o nagana gore e be e le badiradibe go feta batho ka moka bao ba bego ba dula Jerusalema?" 
Luke13:5 Ke a le botsa: Aowa, eupsa ge le sa sokologe, ka moka ga lena le tla hwelela ka tsela e swanago." 
Luke13:6 O ile a bolela le seswantsho se; Monna yo mongwe o be a bjetswe sehlare sa mogo serapeng sa gagwe sa merara; a tla a nyaka dienywa godimo ga yona, a se hwetse le ge e le efe." 
Luke13:7 Ke moka a re go molemi wa serapa sa merara ya gagwe: “Bonang, mengwaga ye meraro ke tla go nyaka dienywa mohlareng wo wa mogo, eupsa ga ke hwetse selo; e reme fase; ke ka baka la’ng e rapaletse fase?" 
Luke13:8 A mo fetola a re: Morena, a e eme le ngwaga wo, go fihlela ke epa ka yona leke e fosa." 
Luke13:9 Ge e ka enywa dienywa, gabotse; lege e ba go se bjalo, gona o swanetse go e rema ka morago ga moo." 
Luke13:10 O be a ruta ka Sabatha go ye nngwe ya disinagoge. 
Luke13:11 Lebona, go be go na le mosadi yo a bego a na le moya wa bofokodi mengwaga ye lesomeseswai, lea khunama lea sa kgone go itsosa le gatee." 
Luke13:12 Jesu ge a mmona, a mmitsa go yena a re go yena: Mosadi, o lokolotswe bofokoding bja gago." 
Luke13:13 A bea diatla tsa gagwe godimo ga gagwe, legateetee a ema lea tumisa Modimo." 
Luke13:14 Mmusi wa sinagoge a araba ka bogale, ka gobane Jesu o ile a fodisa ka letsatsi la Sabatha, a re go setshaba: “Go na le matsatsi a tshelelago ao motho a swanetsego go soma ka ona; ke moka o tsene ka go tsona leo fodiswe, e sego ka letsatsi la Sabatha." 
Luke13:15 Morena a mo fetola a re: Wena moikaketsi, na yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa lena ga a lokolle kgomo ya gagwe goba pokolo ya gagwe setaleng ka Sabatha lea e ise meetseng?" 
Luke13:16 Na mosadi yo e lego morwedi wa Aberahame, yo Sathane a mo tlemilego ka nywaga e lesomeseswai, a ka se lokollwe bokgobeng bjo ka letsatsi la Sabatha?" 
Luke13:17 Lege A bolela se, manaba a gagwe ka moka a ile a hlabja ke dihlong, lesetshaba ka moka sa thaba ka dilo ka moka tsa letago tseo di dirilwego ke Yena." 
Luke13:18 Ke moka a re: Mmuso wa Modimo o lebelega bjang? leke tla lebelega bjang? 
Luke13:19 Go swana le peu ya mosetareta yeo motho a e tserego a e lahlela serapeng sa gagwe; ya gola ya ba sehlare se segolo; dinonyana tsa legodimo di be di dula makaleng a yona. 
Luke13:20 Legape a re: Ke tla bapetsa mmuso wa Modimo le eng? 
Luke13:21 Go swana le komelo yeo mosadi a e tserego a e uta ka gare ga dikelo tse tharo tsa bupi go fihlela e komelo ka moka. 
Luke13:22 A phatsa metse le metse, a ruta, a ya Jerusalema." 
Luke13:23 Ke moka yo mongwe a re go yena: Morena, na ke ba mmalwa bao ba pholositswego? A re go bona:" 
Luke13:24 Katana le go tsena kgorong e tshesane, ka gobane ba bantsi, ke a le botsa, ba tla leka go tsena leba ka se kgone." 
Luke13:25 Ge mong wa ntlo a kile a tsoga a notlela lebati, leo thoma go ema ka ntle o kokota mojakong wa re: Morena Morena, re bulele; o tla araba, a re go wena: Ga ke go tsebe gore o tswa kae." 
Luke13:26 Ke moka o tla thoma go re: Re jele re nwa pele ga gago, lewa ruta ditarateng tsa rena." 
Luke13:27 Eupsa yena o tla re: Ke a go botsa: Ga ke go tsebe moo o tswago gona; Tlogelang go Nna, badiri ka moka ba bokgopo!" 
Luke13:28 Go tla ba le go lla le go tsikitlanya ga meno ge le bona Aberahame le Isaka le Jakobo le baporofeta ka moka Mmusong wa Modimo, lelena ka nosi le rakwa." 
Luke13:29 Ba tla tla go tswa bohlabela le bodikela le ka leboa le borwa leba tla dula Mmusong wa Modimo. 
Luke13:30 Lebona, go na le ba mafelelo bao e tlago go ba ba pele, lego na le ba pele bao ba tlago go ba ba mafelelo." 
Luke13:31 Ka lona letsatsi leo, ba bangwe ba Bafarisei ba tla leba re go yena: Tsamaya o tloge mo, ka gobane Heroda o tla go bolaya." 
Luke13:32 LeA re go bona: Eyang le botse phokojwe yeo: Bonang, ke leleka batemona, leke fodisa lehono le gosasa, leka letsatsi la boraro ke tla ba yo a phethagetsego." 
Luke13:33 Eupsa ke swanetse go sepela lehono le gosasa le letsatsing le le latelago, ka gobane ga go kgonege gore moporofeta yo a tswago Jerusalema a hwe." 
Luke13:34 Wena Jerusalema, Jerusalema, o bolayago baporofeta, wa kgatla bao ba rometswego go wena ka maswika; ke gantsi gakaakang ke bego ke nyaka go kgoboketsa bana ba gago bjalo ka ge kgogo e kgoboketsa bana ba yona ka tlase ga maphego a yona, lewa se rate!" 
Luke13:35 Bona, ntlo ya gago e tlogetswe e le lesope ka baka la gago; leka nnete ke re go lena, le ka se mpone, go fihlela nako e fihla yeo le tlago re: Go lehlogonolo Yo a tlago ka Leina la Morena." 
Luke14:1 Ge a tsena ka ntlong ya yo mongwe wa Bafarisei ba bagolo go yo ja senkgwa ka letsatsi la Sabatha, ba mo lebelela." 
Luke14:2 Go be go na le monna yo mongwe pele ga gagwe yo a bego a swerwe ke bolwetsi bja go rothisa mare. 
Luke14:3 Jesu a araba, a bolela le bamangwalo le Bafarisei, a re: Na go dumeletswe go fodisa ka letsatsi la Sabatha?" 
Luke14:4 Ba homola. A mo tsea a mo fodisa, a mo lokolla a sepela;" 
Luke14:5 Bona ba araba ba re: Ke mang go lena yo a ka lesago pokolo goba kgomo e wela ka moleteng lea se e goge gateetee ka letsatsi la Sabatha? 
Luke14:6 Leba palelwa ke go Mo araba gape ka dilo tse. 
Luke14:7 LeO ile a botsa ba laleditswego seswantsho, ge A lemoga ka fao ba kgethilego diphaposi tse kgolo; ba botse gore:" 
Luke14:8 Ge o laleditswe lenyalong ke motho yo mongwe, o se ke wa dula fase ka phaposing ya godimodimo; gore ga go na monna yo a hlomphegago go feta kamoo le laetswego ka gona ke yena;" 
Luke14:9 Yo a go laetsego le yena, o tla a re go wena: Neela monna yo sebaka; leo thoma ka dihlong go tsea phaposi ya ka tlase." 
Luke14:10 Eupsa ge e ba o laleditswe, dula fase ka phaposing ya ka tlase; gore yo a go laetsego a re go wena: Mogwera, rotogela godimo; ke moka o rapele pele ga bao ba dulago tafoleng le wena." 
Luke14:11 Gobane yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a ikgogomosago o tla kokobetswa; leyo a ikokobetsago o tla godiswa. 
Luke14:12 Ke moka a re go yo a mo laelago: “Ge o dira dijo goba dijo, o se ke wa bitsa bagwera ba gago goba bana beno goba ba leloko goba baagisani ba gago ba bahumi; gore le bona ba se ke ba go rapela gape leba amogela tefo ya gago." 
Luke14:13 Eupsa ge o dira monyanya, badiidi, digole, digole, difofu di goeletsa." 
Luke14:14 Le tla segofatswa; gobane ba ka se kgone go le lefa, gobane le tla lefsa ka tsogo ya baloki." 
Luke14:15 Ge yo mongwe wa bao ba bego ba le tafoleng le yena a ekwa ditaba tse, a re go yena: Go lehlogonolo yo a jago bogobe Mmusong wa Modimo." 
Luke14:16 Ke moka a re go yena: Monna yo mongwe o ile a dira dijo tse dikgolo lea neela ka bontsi. 
Luke14:17 Ge ba le dijong, a roma mohlanka wa gagwe gore a yo botsa bao ba laleditswego: “Etlang! ka gobane dilo ka moka bjale di lokile." 
Luke14:18 Ka moka ga bona ba thoma go itshwara. Wa pele a re go yena: Ke rekile naga, leke swanetse go ya go e bona. E re ke lebalelwe." 
Luke14:19 Yo mongwe a re: Ke rekile dipara tse hlano tsa dikgomo, leke ya go di leka. E re ke lebalelwe." 
Luke14:20 Leyo mongwe a re: Ke nyetse mosadi, leka fao nka se kgone go tla." 
Luke14:21 Mohlanka yoo a tla a botsa mong wa gagwe ditaba tse. Ke moka mong wa ntlo a galefa, a re go mohlanka wa gagwe: “Tswa ka lebelo ditarateng le ditseleng tsa motse, o tlise badiidi le ba golofetsego le ba ba sa sisinyegego le difofu." 
Luke14:22 Ke moka mohlanka a re: Morena, go dirilwe ka mo o laetsego ka gona, eupsa go na le sebaka." 
Luke14:23 Ke moka Jehofa a re go mohlanka: “Tswa ditseleng le dikoteng, o ba gapeletse go tsena, gore ntlo ya ka e tlale." 
Luke14:24 Gobane ke le botsa gore ga go le o tee wa banna bao ba laleditswego yo a tlago go latswa dijo tsa ka tsa mantsiboa. 
Luke14:25 Masaba a magolo a sepela le yena, a retologa a re go bona." 
Luke14:26 Ge motho a ka tla go nna a sa hloye tatagwe le mmagwe le mosadi wa gagwe le bana ba gagwe le bana babo le dikgaetsedi tsa gagwe, ee, le bophelo bja gagwe ka nosi, a ka se hloye morutiwa wa ka." 
Luke14:27 Mang le mang yo a sa rwalego sefapano sa gagwe lea tla morago ga Nna a ka se be morutiwa wa ka. 
Luke14:28 Gobane ke mang gare ga lena yo a ikemiseditsego go aga tora yo a sa thomego go dula fase lea bala ditshenyagalelo, ge e ba a na le tse di lekanego go e fetsa?" 
Luke14:29 Go sego bjalo, ka morago ga ge a theile motheo lea sa kgone go o fetsa, bohle bao ba o bonago ba tla thoma go mo kwera." 
Luke14:30 A re: Monna yo o ile a thoma go aga lea palelwa ke go fetsa. 
Luke14:31 Goba ke kgosi efe yeo e yago ntweng le kgosi ye nngwe, leya se dule fase pele leya ahlaahla ge e ba e ka kgona go kopana le ba dikete tse lesome yo a tlago go lwa le yona ka ba dikete tse masomepedi?" 
Luke14:32 Go sego bjalo, ge yo mongwe a sa le kgole, o romela moromiwa lea kganyoga dipeelano tsa khutso." 
Luke14:33 Ka gona le yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa lena yo a sa tlogelego tsohle tseo a nago le tsona a ka se be morutiwa wa ka. 
Luke14:34 Letswai ke le lebotse, eupsa ge e ba letswai le lahlegetswe ke tatso ya lona, le tla nokwa ka eng?" 
Luke14:35 Ga e swanelegele naga, goba molete wa mantle; eupsa batho ba e lahlela ka ntle. Yo a nago le ditsebe tsa go kwa, a a kwe." 
Luke15:1 Balekgetho ka moka le badiradibe ba tla go yena go mo theletsa. 
Luke15:2 Bafarisei le bamangwalo ba ngunanguna ba re: Monna yo o amogela badiradibe leo ja le bona. 
Luke15:3 A ba botsa seswantsho se, a re:" 
Luke15:4 Ke monna ofe gare ga lena yo a nago le dinku tse lekgolo, ge a ka lahlegelwa ke e tee ya tsona, a sa tlogele tse masomesenyane-senyane lesokeng lea latele tse di timetsego go fihlela a di hwetsa?" 
Luke15:5 Ge a e hwetsa, o e robatsa magetleng a gagwe ka lethabo." 
Luke15:6 Ge a boa gae, o bitsa bagwera ba gagwe le baagisani ba gagwe lea re go bona: Thabang le nna; gobane ke hweditse dinku tsa ka tse di timetsego." 
Luke15:7 Ke le botsa gore go tla ba le lethabo le legolo legodimong ka baka la modiradibe o tee yo a itsholago, go feta ka baka la baloki ba masomesenyane-senyane bao ba sa nyakego go sokologa." 
Luke15:8 Goba ke mosadi ofe yo a nago le ditsekana tse lesome tsa silifera, ge a lahlegetswe ke seripa se tee, a sa gotego kerese a swela ntlo, a phuruphutsa ka mafolofolo go fihlela a e hwetsa?" 
Luke15:9 Ge a e hwetsa, o bitsa bagwera ba gagwe le baagisani ba gagwe lea re: Thabang le nna; ka gobane ke hweditse seripa seo ke se lahlegetswego." 
Luke15:10 Ka mo go swanago ke le botsa gore barongwa ba Modimo go na le lethabo ka baka la modiradibe o tee yo a itsholago. 
Luke15:11 A re: Monna yo mongwe o be a na le barwa ba babedi. 
Luke15:12 Yo monyenyane go bona a re go tatagwe: Tate, mphe kabelo ya tse botse tseo e lego tsa ka. Lea ba aba tshelete ya gagwe ya go iphedisa." 
Luke15:13 Lee sego matsatsi a mantsi ka morago ga moo morwa yo monyenyane ka moka a kgobokana lea ya nageng ya kgole lemoo a senya dithoto tsa gagwe ka bophelo bja meferefere. 
Luke15:14 Ge a feditse ka moka, gwa tsoga tlala ye kgolo nageng yeo; lea thoma go tlaisega." 
Luke15:15 A ya a ikopanya le moagi wa naga yeo; a mo romela tshemong ya gagwe go yo fepa dikolobe. 
Luke15:16 O be a tla thaba go tlatsa mpa ya gagwe ka makwapi ao dikolobe di jelego, legwa se be le yo a mo fago ona." 
Luke15:17 Ge a ipotsa, a re: Ke basomi ba bakae ba mosegare ba tate bao ba nago le bogobe bjo bo lekanego le bja go se setse, lenna ke bolawa ke tlala!" 
Luke15:18 Ke tla tsoga ka ya go tate leka re go yena: Tate, ke dirile sebe malebana le legodimo le pele ga gago." 
Luke15:19 Ga ke sa swanelwa ke go bitswa morwa wa gago; nketse yo mongwe wa basomi ba gago ba mosegare. 
Luke15:20 A tsoga a tla go tatagwe. Eupsa ge a be a sa le kgole, tatagwe o ile a mmona lea kweswa bohloko lea kitima a wela molaleng lea mo atla." 
Luke15:21 Morwa a re go yena: Tate, ke dirile sebe malebana le legodimo le pele ga mahlo a gago, lega ke sa swanelwa ke go bitswa morwa wa gago." 
Luke15:22 Eupsa tate a re go bahlanka ba gagwe: Ntshang seaparo se sebotse kudu, le mo apare; a mo apara palamonwana seatleng le dieta maotong a gagwe." 
Luke15:23 Le tlise namane yeo e nonnego mo le e hlabe; lea re jeng re thabe. 
Luke15:24 Gobane morwa wa ka yo o be a hwile lea boela a phela; o be a timetse, leo a hwetswa. Leba thoma go thaba." 
Luke15:25 Morwa wa gagwe yo mogolo o be a le tshemong, ge a fihla a batamela ntlo, a kwa mmino le go bina." 
Luke15:26 A bitsa yo mongwe wa bahlanka a mmotsisa gore dilo tse di ra go reng. 
Luke15:27 A re go yena: Ngwaneno o tlile; tatago a hlaba namane yeo e nonnego, ka gobane o mo amogetse a bolokegile." 
Luke15:28 A galefa a se ke a tsena; ka fao tatagwe a tswa a mo kgopela. 
Luke15:29 A fetola a re go tatagwe: Bona, mengwaga ye mentsi ke go hlanketse, lega se nke ka tshela taelo ya gago; lele ge go le bjalo ga se wa ka wa mpha potsanyane gore ke thabe le bagwera ba ka." 
Luke15:30 Eupsa gateetee ge morwa wa gago yo a e-tla, yo a bego a eja dijo tsa gago le digweba-ka-mmele, wa mo hlabela namane yeo e nonnego." 
Luke15:31 LeA re go yena: Morwa, o na le nna ka mehla, leka moka tse ke nago le tsona ke tsa gago." 
Luke15:32 E be e le mo go swanetsego gore re thabe le go thaba, ka gobane ngwaneno yo o be a hwile lea tsosoloswa; lea lahlega, lea hwetswa." 
Luke16:1 Legape a re go barutiwa ba gagwe: Go be go na le monna yo mongwe wa mohumi yo a bego a na le molaki; a latofatswa ke yena ka gore o sentse dilo tsa gagwe. 
Luke16:2 A mmitsa a re go yena: Ke kwa se bjang go wena? nea pego ya bolebeledi bja gago; gobane o ka no se sa ba molaki. 
Luke16:3 Ke moka molaodi a re ka pelong: Ke dire eng? gobane mong wa ka o ntsea bolebeledi; ga ke kgone go epa; go kgopela ke hlabja ke dihlong. 
Luke16:4 Ke ikemiseditse seo ke swanetsego go se dira, e le gore ge ke rakwa mosomong wa bolebeledi, ba tle ba nkamogele magaeng a bona." 
Luke16:5 Ke moka a bitsa yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa bao ba kolotago mong wa gagwe go yena lea re go wa pele: O kolota mong wa ka bokae? 
Luke16:6 Lea re: Ditekanyo tse lekgolo tsa makhura. A re go yena: Tsea pego ya gago leo dule fase ka pela o ngwale masomehlano. 
Luke16:7 Ke moka a re go yo mongwe: Le gona o kolota bokae? lea re: Ditekanyo tse lekgolo tsa korong. A re go yena: Tsea pego ya gago leo ngwale masomeseswai. 
Luke16:8 Morena a reta molaodi yo a sa lokago, ka gobane o dirile ka bohlale, ka gobane bana ba lefase le ba bohlale molokong wa bona go feta bana ba seetsa." 
Luke16:9 Leke re go lena: Dira bagwera ba Mammon wa bokgopo; e le gore ge le palelwa, ba le amogele bodulong bjo bo sa felego." 
Luke16:10 Yo a botegago go tse dinyenyane o a botega le go tse dikgolo; leyo a sa lokago le ganyenyane ga a loka go yo mogolo. 
Luke16:11 Bjale ge e ba o be o sa botege go Mamone yo a sa lokago, ke mang yo a tlago go gafela mahumo a kgonthe?" 
Luke16:12 Ge e ba o se wa botega go tsa motho yo mongwe, ke mang yo a tlago go go nea seo e lego sa gago?" 
Luke16:13 Ga go mohlanka yo a ka hlankelago beng ba babedi, ka gobane o tla hloya yo mongwe lea rata yo mongwe; go sego bjalo o tla swara yo mongwe a nyatsa yo mongwe. O ka se hlankele Modimo le Mamon." 
Luke16:14 Bafarisei le bona bao ba bego ba na le megabaru, ba kwa dilo tse ka moka, ba mo sega." 
Luke16:15 LeA re go bona: Ke lena bao le itokafatsago pele ga batho; eupsa Modimo o tseba dipelo tsa lena, gobane se se hlompshago bathong ke makgapha mahlong a Modimo." 
Luke16:16 Molao le baporofeta ba be ba le gona go fihla Johane. 
Luke16:17 Le gona go bonolo gore legodimo le lefase di fete go e na le gore lengwalo le tee la molao le fele. 
Luke16:18 Mang le mang yo a hlalago mosadi wa gagwe lea nyala yo mongwe, o dira bohlotlolo;" 
Luke16:19 Go be go na le monna yo mongwe wa mohumi yo a bego a apere diaparo tsa mmala o mophepolo le wa lesela le lebotse lea phela ka maemo a godimo letsatsi le lengwe le le lengwe; 
Luke16:20 Go be go na le mokgopedi yo mongwe yo a bitswago Latsaro, yo a bego a robaditswe kgorong ya gagwe a tletse masoba." 
Luke16:21 Ba be ba nyaka go fepsa ka makwapi ao a bego a wa tafoleng ya mohumi, ledimpsa tsa tla tsa mo latswa diso." 
Luke16:22 Mokgopedi a hwa a rwalwa ke barongwa ka sehubeng sa Aberahame; mohumi le yena a hwa a bolokwa; 
Luke16:23 Kua Hadese a emisa mahlo a gagwe ge a be a tlaiswa, a bona Aberahame a le kgole leLatsaro a le sehubeng sa gagwe." 
Luke16:24 Lea goeletsa a re: Tate Aberahame, nkgaugele o rome Latsaro, gore a ine ntlha ya monwana wa gagwe ka meetseng lea fodise leleme la ka; gobane ke tlaiswa ke kgabo ye." 
Luke16:25 Eupsa Aberahame a re: Morwa, gopola gore bophelong bja gago o amogetse dilo tsa gago tse dibotse, le Latsaro yo mobe o dirile bjalo; eupsa bjale o a homotswa, le lena le a tlaiswa." 
Luke16:26 Ka ntle le tse ka moka, go hlomilwe sekgoba se segolo magareng ga rena le lena, moo bao ba nyakago go tshela go tloga mo go ya go wena ba ka se kgonego; le gona ga ba kgone go feta go rena, yeo e bego e tla tswa moo." 
Luke16:27 Ke moka a re: Ke go rapela, tate, gore o mo romele ntlong ya tate." 
Luke16:28 Gobane ke na le bana beso ba bahlano; gore A ba hlatsele, gore le bona ga ba tle lefelong le la tlhokofatso." 
Luke16:29 Aberahame a re go yena: “Ba na le Moshe le baporofeta; a ba theeletse. 
Luke16:30 Lea re: Aowa, tate Aberahame, eupsa ge motho a ka ya go bona go tswa bahung, ba be ba tla sokologa." 
Luke16:31 A re go yena: Ge ba ka se theetse Moshe le baporofeta, le bona ba ka se kgodisege, le ge motho a ka tsoga bahung." 
Luke17:1 Ke moka a re go barutiwa: “Ga go kgonege ge e se gore go tla ba le kgopiso, eupsa go madimabe yo ba tlago ka yena!" 
Luke17:2 Go be go le kaone go yena gore a fegilwe molala wa tshilo lea lahlelwe ka lewatleng, go e na le gore a kgopise yo mongwe wa bana ba ba banyenyane." 
Luke17:3 Itlhokomeleng: Ge ngwaneno a ka le tshela, mo kgaleme; lege a sokologa, mo swarele." 
Luke17:4 Lege a ka le tshela gasupa ka letsatsi lea boela go lena gasupa ka letsatsi lea re: Ke a sokologa; o swanetse go mo swarela. 
Luke17:5 Baapostola ba re go Morena: Oketsa tumelo ya rena. 
Luke17:6 Morena a re: Ge o be o na le tumelo ya go swana le peu ya mosetareta, o be o tla kgona go re go sehlare se sa mokure: Tumolwa ka medu o bjetswe ka lewatleng; lee swanetse go go kwa." 
Luke17:7 Eupsa ke mang go lena yo a nago le mohlanka yo a lemago goba yo a hlokomelago diruiwa, ge a etswa tshemong, a re go yena: Dula fase o je?" 
Luke17:8 Gomme a ka se ke a re go yena: Lokisa dijo ka tse nka kgonago, o itlama o ntebelele go fihlela ke eja le go nwa; leka morago ga moo o swanetse go ja le go nwa?" 
Luke17:9 Na o leboga mohlanka yoo ka ge a dirile seo a se boditswego? Ga ke nyale.
