Acts3:1 Petere le Johane ba rotogela tempeleng ka nako ya thapelo, e be e le iri ya senyane." 
Acts3:2 Monna yo mongwe yo a bego a golofetse go tloga popelong ya mmagwe a rwalwa, yoo letsatsi le letsatsi ba bego ba mo robatsa kgorong ya tempele yeo e bitswago Clean, gore a kgopele dimpho go bao ba tsenago ka tempeleng." 
Acts3:3 Yo a ilego a bona Petere le Johane ba le kgauswi le go tsena ka tempeleng o ile a kgopela dimpho tsa dimpho. 
Acts3:4 Petere a retolosetsa mahlo a gagwe go yena le Johane, a re: Re lebelele." 
Acts3:5 A ba theetsa ka tebelelo ya go amogela se sengwe go bona. 
Acts3:6 Ke moka Petere a re: Ga ke na silifera le gauta; eupsa seo ke nago le sona ke go fa sona: ka Leina la Jesu Keresete, Monatsarena, tsoga o sepele." 
Acts3:7 A mo swara ka letsogo la le letona, a mo emisetsa godimo, gateetee maoto a gagwe le maqaqailaneng a gagwe a matlafala." 
Acts3:8 A tlolela, a ema, a sepela, a tsena ka tempeleng le bona, a sepela, a tlola, a tumisa Modimo." 
Acts3:9 Setshaba ka moka sa mmona a sepela a reta Modimo. 
Acts3:10 Ba tseba gore ke Yena yo a bego a dutse kgorong e botse ya tempele bakeng sa dimpho tsa ditshelete, leba tlala ka go makala le go makala ka baka la seo se mo diragetsego." 
Acts3:11 Ge monna yo a fodisitswego a be a swere Petere le Johane, setshaba ka moka sa kitimela go bona ka go makala kudu ka mojakong wo o bitswago wa Solomone." 
Acts3:12 Petere ge a bona se, a araba setshaba a re: Banna ba Isiraele, ke ka baka la’ng le makatswa ke se? goba ke ka lebaka la eng o re lebelela ka go tia gakaakaa, bjalo ka ge eka ka maatla a rena goba bokgethwa bja rena re dirile gore monna yo a sepele?" 
Acts3:13 Modimo wa Aberahame le wa Isaka le wa Jakobo, Modimo wa borakgolokhukhu ba rena, a tagafatsa Morwa wa gagwe Jesu; yo a go ekilego a mo latola pele ga Pilato ge a be a ikemiseditse go mo lokolla." 
Acts3:14 Eupsa le ile la latola Mokgethwa le Moloki lela kganyoga gore le newe mmolai; 
Acts3:15 Kgosana ya bophelo, yeo Modimo a e tsositsego bahung, ya bolaya; yeo re dihlatse tsa yona." 
Acts3:16 Leina la gagwe, ka tumelo leineng la gagwe, le dirile gore monna yo yo le mmonago le yo le mo tsebago a tie. Ee, tumelo ye e lego ka yena e mo file bophelo bjo bjo bo phethagetsego pele ga lena ka moka." 
Acts3:17 Bjale bana beso, ke a tseba gore le dirile ka baka la go hloka tsebo, go swana le babusi ba lena." 
Acts3:18 Eupsa dilo tseo Modimo a di tsebisitsego pele ka molomo wa baporofeta ba gagwe ka moka gore Keresete o tla tlaisega, o ile a di phethagatsa." 
Acts3:19 Sokologang lele sokologe, gore dibe tsa lena di phumolwe, ge dinako tsa go lapolosa sefahlegong sa Morena di tla tla;" 
Acts3:20 Ke moka o tla roma Jesu Keresete, yo le boletswego go lena pele." 
Acts3:21 Yeo legodimo le swanetsego go e amogela go fihla dinakong tsa tsosoloso ya dilo tsohle, tseo Modimo a di boletsego ka molomo wa baporofeta ba gagwe ka moka ba bakgethwa go tloga mathomong a lefase." 
Acts3:22 Gobane Moshe o boditse borakgolokhukhu ka nnete: “Jehofa Modimo wa lena o tla le tsosetsa moporofeta gare ga bana babo lena go swana le nna; O swanetse go mo kwa go se sengwe le se sengwe seo a go botsago sona. 
Acts3:23 Go tla direga gore moya o mongwe le o mongwe wo o sa theetsego moporofeta yoo o tla fediswa gare ga batho. 
Acts3:24 Ee, le baporofeta ka moka go tloga ka Samuele le bao ba latelago, bohle bao ba boletsego, le bona ba boletse e sa le pele ka matsatsi a." 
Acts3:25 Le bana ba baporofeta le ba kgwerano yeo Modimo a e dirilego le borakgolokhukhu ba rena ka go re go Aberahame: Meloko ka moka ya lefase e tla segofatswa ka bana ba gago. 
Acts3:26 Modimo o le romile fela, ka morago ga go tsosa Morwa wa gagwe Jesu, gore a le segofatse ka go lahla yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa makgopo a gagwe." 
Acts4:1 Ge ba sa bolela le setshaba, baprista le babusi ba tempele le Basadutsei ba ba tla." 
Acts4:2 Ba be ba nyamile ka gobane ba be ba ruta batho le go bolela ka go tsoswa bahung ka Jesu. 
Acts4:3 Ba bea diatla tsa bona godimo ga tsona, ba di swara go fihla letsatsing le le latelago, ka gobane bjale e be e le mantsiboa." 
Acts4:4 Eupsa ba bantsi ba bao ba kwelego lentsu ba dumela; palo ya banna bao e be e ka ba dikete tse hlano. 
Acts4:5 Letsatsing le le latelago ba na le babusi le bagolo le bamangwalo. 
Acts4:6 Anna, moperisita yo mogolo, le Kayafa, le Johane, le Aleksendere, le moloko ka moka wa moperisita yo mogolo, ba kgobokane Jerusalema." 
Acts4:7 Ge ba ipea gare, ba botsisa gore: O dirile se ka maatla afe goba ka leina lefe?" 
Acts4:8 Ke moka Petere a tletse Moya o Mokgethwa a re go bona: “Babusi ba setshaba le bagolo ba Isiraele! 
Acts4:9 Ge e ba lehono re hlahlobja ka baka la tiro e botse yeo e dirilwego motho yo a fokolago, o fola bjang;" 
Acts4:10 A le tsebje ka moka ga lena le go setshaba ka moka sa Isiraele gore ka Leina la Jesu Keresete wa Natsaretha, yo le mo bapotsego, yo Modimo a mo tsositsego bahung, ee, ka yena monna yo o eme pele ga lena." 
Acts4:11 Le ke leswika leo le ilego la ganwa ke baagi ba gago, leo le ilego la ba hlogo ya sekhutlong." 
Acts4:12 Pholoso ga e go motho yo mongwe, ka gobane ga go na leina le lengwe ka tlase ga legodimo leo le neilwego bathong leo re swanetsego go pholoswa ka lona." 
Acts4:13 Ge ba bona sebete sa Petere le Johane leba bona gore ke batho ba sa rutegago le bao ba sa tsebego selo, ba makala; ba tseba ka bona gore ba na le Jesu." 
Acts4:14 Ge ba bona monna yo a fodisitswego a eme kgauswi le bona, ba palelwa ke go mmotsa selo." 
Acts4:15 Eupsa ge ba laetse go tswa Lekgotleng, ba boledisana." 
Acts4:16 A re: Re tla dira eng ka banna ba? ka gobane ka nnete mohlolo wo o makatsago o dirilwe ke bona, wa utollwa go bohle bao ba bego ba dula Jerusalema; lere ka se kgone go e latola." 
Acts4:17 Eupsa e le gore e se ke ya phatlalala bathong, a re ba tshosetseng ka kelohloko, gore go tloga bjale go ya pele ba ka se bolele le motho ka leina le." 
Acts4:18 Ba bitsa ba ba laela gore ba se bolele goba ba ruta le gatee ka leina la Jesu. 
Acts4:19 Eupsa Petere le Johane ba fetola ba re go bona: “Ge e ba go lokile mahlong a Modimo go le theetsa go feta Modimo, lena le ahlola." 
Acts4:20 Gobane re ka se bolele dilo tseo re di bonego le tseo re di kwelego. 
Acts4:21 Ge ba ba tshosetsa go ya pele, ba ba lokolla ba sepele, ba sa hwetse kamoo ba ka ba otlago ka gona ka baka la setshaba, ka gobane bohle ba be ba tumisa Modimo ka baka la seo se dirilwego." 
Acts4:22 Gobane monna yo o be a na le mengwaga ya go feta ye masomenne yo a dirilwego mohlolo wo wa go fodisa. 
Acts4:23 Ge ba lokollwa, ba ya sehlopheng sa bona leba botsa tsohle tseo baperisita ba bagolo le bagolo ba ba boditsego tsona." 
Acts4:24 Ge ba ekwa, ba hlabosa lentsu la bona go Modimo ka kgopolo e tee, ba re: “Morena, ke wena Modimo yo a dirilego legodimo le lefase le lewatle le tsohle tse di lego go tsona.”" 
Acts4:25 Ke mang yo a boletsego ka molomo wa mohlanka wa gago Dafida a re: “Ke ka baka la’ng baheitene ba ile ba galefa lesetshaba se ile sa sisinya dilo tsa lefeela? 
Acts4:26 Dikgosi tsa lefase tsa tsoga, lebabusi ba kgobokana kgahlanong le Morena le Keresete wa gagwe." 
Acts4:27 Gobane ruri ba kgobokane kgahlanong le Ngwana wa gago yo mokgethwa Jesu, yo o mo tloditsego, Heroda gotee le Pontio Pilato, gotee le ditshaba le setshaba sa Isiraele." 
Acts4:28 O dire tsohle tseo seatla sa gago le keletso ya gago di ikemiseditsego go di dira e sa le pele. 
Acts4:29 Lebjale, Morena, lebelela ditshosetso tsa bona; o nee bahlanka ba gago gore ba bolele lentsu la gago ka sebete ka moka;" 
Acts4:30 Ka go otlolla seatla sa gago gore o fodise; le gore dipontsho le mehlolo di dirwe ka Leina la Ngwana wa gago yo mokgethwa Jesu. 
Acts4:31 Ge ba rapela, lefelo leo ba bego ba kgobokane go lona le ile la sikinyega; ka moka ba tlala Moya o Mokgethwa, leba bolela lentsu la Modimo ka sebete." 
Acts4:32 Lesaba la bao ba dumelago e be e le ba pelo e tee le moya o tee; eupsa ba na le selo se sengwe le se sengwe seo ba swanago ka sona. 
Acts4:33 Baapostola ba hlatsela ka maatla a magolo ka tsogo ya Morena Jesu, leka moka ga bona ba kgaugelo ye kgolo." 
Acts4:34 Gape go be go se na motho yo a ilego a hlakahlakana gare ga bona; gobane bohle bao ba nago le naga goba dintlo ba be ba di rekisa leba tlisa theko ya dithoto tse di rekisitswego; 
Acts4:35 Ba robala maotong a baapostola, leyo mongwe le yo mongwe a abelwa seo a se hlokago." 
Acts4:36 Le Josese, yo a ilego a bitswa ke moapostola Barnaba, (ke gore, ge e ba e fetoletswe e re: Morwa wa khomotso), e lego Molefi, yo a tswago nageng ya Tsipero." 
Acts4:37 Ge a na le naga, ba e rekisa, ba tlisa tshelete yeo ba e bea maotong a baapostola." 
Acts5:1 Eupsa monna yo mongwe yo a bitswago Ananiase a rekisa dithoto tse dingwe le mosadi wa gagwe Safira. 
Acts5:2 A thibela karolo ya theko, mola mosadi wa gagwe le yena a e lemogile, a tlisa karolo e itsego a e bea maotong a baapostola." 
Acts5:3 Eupsa Petere a re: Anania, ke ka baka la’ng Sathane a tladitse pelo ya gago gore o bolele Moya o Mokgethwa maaka leo thibele karolo ya theko ya naga?" 
Acts5:4 Ge e sa le gona, na e be e se ya gago? leka morago ga ge e rekisitswe, na e be e se ka maatla a gago? ke ka baka la’ng o hlamile taba ye pelong ya gago? ga se wa botsa batho maaka, eupsa wa botsa Modimo." 
Acts5:5 Ge Anania a ekwa mantsu a, a wela fase a lahla moya, lebohle ba ba kwelego poifo e kgolo ba wela." 
Acts5:6 Masogana ao a tsoga, a mo phuthela, a mo ntsha a mo boloka." 
Acts5:7 Mo e ka bago diiri tse tharo ka morago ga moo, mosadi wa gagwe yo a bego a sa tsebe seo se diregilego, a tsena." 
Acts5:8 Petere a mo fetola a re: Mpotse ge e ba o rekisitse naga yeo ka tshelete e ntsi gakaakaa? lea re: Ee, ka tse ntsi kudu." 
Acts5:9 Ke moka Petere a re go yena: O dumeletse bjang go leka Moya wa Morena? bona, maoto a bao ba bolokilego monna wa gago a mojakong lea tla go rwala ka ntle." 
Acts5:10 Ke moka gateetee a wela fase dinaong tsa gagwe lea lahla moya; masogana ao a tsena, a mo hwetsa a hwile, a mo rwala a mo boloka le monna wa gagwe." 
Acts5:11 Phuthego ka moka ya tshoga kudu le bohle bao ba kwelego ditaba tse. 
Acts5:12 Ka diatla tsa baapostola ba dirilwe dipontsho tse dintsi le mehlolo gare ga setshaba; ka moka ba be ba le ka pelong ya Solomone ka pono e tee. 
Acts5:13 Go ba bangwe, ga go yo a kgonago go ba tlatsa, eupsa setshaba sa ba ba ba bagolo." 
Acts5:14 Badumedi ba tlaleletswa go Morena, e lego masaba a banna le basadi." 
Acts5:15 Ka gona ba ntsha balwetsi ditarateng, ba ba robatsa malaong le diphaposing tsa go robala, e le gore bonyenyane moriti wa Petere yo a fetago o apere ba bangwe ba bona." 
Acts5:16 Gape lesaba le legolo go tswa metseng yeo e e dikologilego la tla Jerusalema, la tlisa balwetsi le bao ba tlaiswago ke meoya e mebe, lebohle ba fodiswa." 
Acts5:17 Ke moka moperisita yo mogolo a ema le bohle bao ba bego ba na le yena (e lego sehlotswana sa Basadutsei) ba tlala bogale. 
Acts5:18 Ba bea baapostola ka diatla leba ba tsenya kgolegong ya setshaba. 
Acts5:19 Eupsa morongwa wa Jehofa a bula mejako ya kgolego bosego a e tlisa pele a re. 
Acts5:20 Ema o bolele batho ka tempeleng mantsu ka moka a bophelo bjo. 
Acts5:21 Ge ba ekwa se, ba tsena ka tempeleng e sa le ka pela mesong leba ruta. Eupsa moperisita yo mogolo a tla a bitsa bao ba bego ba na le yena, le lekgotla le lekgotla ka moka la bana ba Isiraele, a ba romela kgolegong gore ba tsee." 
Acts5:22 Eupsa ge bahlankedi ba fihla ba sa ba hwetse kgolegong, ba boela morago ba re." 
Acts5:23 Le a re: Re hweditse kgolego e notletswe e le ka kgonthe ka polokego ka moka, lebaleti ba eme ka ntle pele ga mejako; eupsa ge re bula ga se ra hwetsa motho ka gare." 
Acts5:24 Ge moperisita yo mogolo le mmusi wa tempele le baperisita ba bagolo ba ekwa ditaba tse, ba belaela gore e tla gola bjang." 
Acts5:25 Ke moka motho yo mongwe a tla a ba botsa a re: Bonang, banna bao le ba beilego kgolegong ba eme tempeleng leba ruta batho." 
Acts5:26 Ke moka molaodi yoo a sepela le bahlankedi bao a ba tlisa ka ntle le bosoro, ka gobane ba be ba boifa batho gore ba se ke ba kgatlwa ka maswika." 
Acts5:27 Ka morago ga ge ba di tlisitse, ba di tlisa pele ga Lekgotla; moperisita yo mogolo a ba botsisa a re:" 
Acts5:28 a re: Na ga se ra le laela ka go tia gore le se ke la ruta ka leina le? lebona, o tladitse Jerusalema ka thuto ya gago, leo ikemiseditse go re tlisa madi a monna yo." 
Acts5:29 Ke moka Petere le baapostola ba bangwe ba araba ba re: Re swanetse go kwa Modimo go feta batho. 
Acts5:30 Modimo wa borakgolokhukhu ba rena o tsositse Jesu yo le mmolailego la mo fega mohlareng. 
Acts5:31 Modimo a mo tsosa ka seatla sa gagwe sa le letona gore e be Kgosana le Mopholosi, gore a nee Baisiraele tshokologo le tebalelo ya dibe." 
Acts5:32 Re dihlatse tsa gagwe tsa dilo tse; lego bjalo le ka Moya wo Mokgethwa wo Modimo a o filego bao ba mo kwago. 
Acts5:33 Ge ba ekwa se, ba hlabja ke dipelo leba rera go ba bolaya." 
Acts5:34 Ka morago ga moo go ile gwa ema yo mongwe ka Lekgotleng, e lego Mofarisei, yo a bitswago Gamaliele, e lego ramolao, yo a bego a tsebja gare ga setshaba ka moka, lea laela gore baapostola ba nee sebaka se senyenyane." 
Acts5:35 A re go bona: “Banna ba Isiraele, ela hloko seo le ikemiseditsego go se dira mabapi le banna ba." 
Acts5:36 Gobane pele ga matsatsi a Theudase o ile a ema a ikgantsha ka gore ke motho yo mongwe; bao palo ya banna ba ka bago makgolo a mane ba ilego ba ba tlatsa le bona; bohle bao ba bego ba mo kwa ba gasana ba fediswa. 
Acts5:37 Ka morago ga monna yo, Judase wa Galilea a tsoga mehleng ya lekgetho, a gogela batho ba bantsi ba mo latela; le yena o ile a fediswa; bohle ba phatlalala." 
Acts5:38 Lebjale ke re go lena: Ithibe banna ba lele ba tlogele ba eme; gobane ge e ba keletso ye goba modiro wo e tswa go batho, e tla fela lefeela." 
Acts5:39 Eupsa ge e ba e tswa go Modimo, o ka se kgone go e fedisa; gore le lena le hwetswe le lwa le Modimo." 
Acts5:40 Ba dumelelana le yena; leka morago ga go bitsa baapostola le go ba betha, a ba laela gore ba se bolele ka leina la Jesu, lea ba lokolla." 
Acts5:41 Leba tloga pele ga Lekgotla, leba thabela gore ba be ba tsewa ba swanelwa ke go hlabja ke dihlong ka baka la Leina la gagwe." 
Acts5:42 Letsatsi le lengwe le le lengwe ka tempeleng le ka ntlong e nngwe le e nngwe ba be ba sa kgaotse go ruta le go bolela ka Jesu Keresete. 
Acts6:1 Mehleng yeo, ge palo ya barutiwa e oketsega, gwa tsoga Bagerika ba ngunanguna ka Baheberu, ka gobane bahlologadi ba bona ba be ba hlokomologwa bodireding bja letsatsi le letsatsi." 
Acts6:2 Ke moka ba lesomepedi ba bitsa lesaba la barutiwa go bona, ba re: Ga se lebaka la gore re tlogele lentsu la Modimo lera hlankela ditafoleng." 
Acts6:3 Ka gona, bana beso, lebelelang gare ga lena banna ba supago ba go botega, bao ba tletsego Moya o Mokgethwa le bohlale, bao re ka ba kgethago go hlokomela taba ye." 
Acts6:4 Eupsa re tla dula re ineela thapelong le bodireding bja lentsu. 
Acts6:5 Lentsu le ile la kgahlisa lesaba ka moka, lela kgetha Stefano, monna yo a tletsego tumelo le Moya o Mokgethwa, le Filipi le Prokoro, Nikanore, Timone, Parmenase le Nikolase, mosokologi wa Antiokia." 
Acts6:6 Ba ile ba bea pele ga baapostola, leka morago ga go rapela, ba ba bea diatla." 
Acts6:7 Lentsu la Modimo la oketsega; palo ya barutiwa ya oketsega kudu kua Jerusalema; mme lesaba le legolo la baperisita le be le kwa tumelo. 
Acts6:8 Stefano, a tletse tumelo le maatla, a dira mehlolo ye megolo le mehlolo gare ga setshaba." 
Acts6:9 Ke moka ba bangwe ba sinagogeng yeo e bitswago sinagoge ya Batho ba Tokologo, le Bakirenia le Baleksandria le ba bangwe ba bona ba tswago Kilikia le Asia, ba ema ba ngangisana le Stefano." 
Acts6:10 Leba be ba sa kgone go ganetsa bohlale le moya wo A bego a bolela ka wona. 
Acts6:11 Ke moka ba laola banna bao ba ilego ba re: Re mo kwele a bolela mantsu a go roga Moshe le Modimo. 
Acts6:12 Ba tsosa setshaba, bagolo le bamangwalo, ba tla go yena, ba mo swara ba mo tlisa Lekgotleng." 
Acts6:13 Le hlome dihlatse tsa maaka tseo di ilego tsa re: Monna yo ga a kgaotse go bolela mantsu a go nyefola sekgethwa se le molao. 
Acts6:14 Gobane re kwele a re Jesu yo wa Natsaretha o tla senya lefelo le lea fetola mekgwa yeo Moshe a re fetiseditsego yona. 
Acts6:15 Bohle bao ba dulago Lekgotleng ba mo lebelela ka kelohloko leba bona sefahlego sa gagwe bjalo ka sefahlego sa morongwa. 
Acts7:1 Ke moka moperisita yo mogolo a re: Na dilo tse di bjalo? 
Acts7:2 Lea re: Banna, bana beso le botate, theeletsang; Modimo wa letago o ile a iponagatsa go tatago rena Aberahame ge a be a le Mesopotamia, pele a dula kua Karane." 
Acts7:3 A re go yena: Tswa nageng ya geno le lapeng la geno, o tle nageng yeo ke tlago go go bontsha yona." 
Acts7:4 Ke moka a tswa nageng ya Bakaladea, a dula Karane; lego tloga moo, ge tatagwe a hwile, a mo tlisa nageng ye yeo le dulago go yona bjale." 
Acts7:5 Ga se a ka a mo nea bohwa go yona, gaesita le go hloma; lega go le bjalo o ile a holofetsa gore o tla mo nea yona e le thoto le ditlogolo tsa gagwe ka morago ga gagwe, mola a se na ngwana." 
Acts7:6 Modimo a bolela bjalo gore ditlogolo tsa gagwe di tla dula e le basele nageng e sele; le gore ba tla ba tlisa bokgobeng leba ba lopa mengwaga ye makgolo a mane. 
Acts7:7 Setshaba seo ba tlago go ba bokgobeng bja sona, ke tla se ahlola, a realo Modimo; leka morago ga moo ba tla tswa leba Ntshebelela lefelong le." 
Acts7:8 A mo fa kgwerano ya lebollo, leka fao Aberahame e be e le tatago Isaka lea mo bolotsa ka letsatsi la seswai; Isaka a tswala Jakobo; Jakobo e be e le tatago bapatriareka ba lesomepedi." 
Acts7:9 Bapatriareka ba hufega, ba rekisetsa Josefa Egipita, eupsa Modimo o be a na le yena." 
Acts7:10 A mo hlakodisa masetlapelong a gagwe ka moka, a mo nea kgaugelo le bohlale mahlong a Farao kgosi ya Egipita; a mo bea mmusisi wa Egepeta le ntlo ya gagwe ka moka." 
Acts7:11 Go ile gwa tla tlhaelelo nageng ka moka ya Egipita le ya Kanana le tlalelo e kgolo, leborakgolokhukhu ba rena ba se hwetse dijo." 
Acts7:12 Eupsa ge Jakobo a ekwa gore go na le korong kua Egipita, a roma borakgolokhukhu ba rena pele." 
Acts7:13 Ka lekga la bobedi Josefa a tsebiswa bana babo; lelesika la Josefa la tsebiswa Farao. 
Acts7:14 Ke moka Josefa a roma gore a bitse Jakobo tatagwe le lapa la gagwe ka moka, e lego meoya e masometshela-hlano." 
Acts7:15 Ka morago Jakobo a theogela Egipita lea hwa, yena le borakgolokhukhu ba rena." 
Acts7:16 Ba ile ba iswa Sikeme leba bewa lebitleng leo Aberahame a le rekilego ka tshelete go barwa ba Emoro, tatago Sikeme." 
Acts7:17 Eupsa ge nako ya kholofetso yeo Modimo a e holofeditsego Aberahame e batamela, setshaba sa Egipita sa gola lesa ata." 
Acts7:18 Go fihlela go tsoga kgosi e nngwe yeo e bego e sa tsebe Josefa. 
Acts7:19 O ile a dirisana le lapa la rena ka bohwirihwiri, a dira bokgopo go borakgolokhukhu ba rena, moo ba ilego ba raka bana ba bona ba banyenyane, e le gore ba se ke ba phela." 
Acts7:20 Moshe o belegwe ka nako efe lee be e le yo mobotse ka mo go kgethegilego lea dula ka ntlong ya tatagwe dikgwedi tse tharo; 
Acts7:21 Ge a rakwa ka ntle, morwedi wa Farao a mo amusa a mo amusa morwa wa gagwe." 
Acts7:22 Moshe o be a rutegile ka bohlale ka moka bja Baegipita, e bile e le yo matla ka mantsu le ditiro." 
Acts7:23 Ge a na le mengwaga ye masomenne, a tla pelong ya gagwe go etela bana babo, bana ba Isiraele." 
Acts7:24 Ge a bona gore yo mongwe wa bona o ile a tlaiswa ke go hloka toka, a itshireletsa lea itefeletsa go bao ba gateletswego lea fenya Moegipita." 
Acts7:25 Gobane o be a nagana gore bana babo ba tla kwesisa gore Modimo o tla ba pholosa ka seatla sa gagwe, eupsa ba be ba sa kwesise." 
Acts7:26 Letsatsing le le latelago a iponatsa go bona ge ba be ba ngangisana, leba be ba tla dumelelana gape ka go re: Bahlomphegi, le bana babo rena; ke ka lebaka la eng le dirana phoso?" 
Acts7:27 Eupsa yo a foseditsego moagisani wa gagwe o ile a mo kgoromeletsa kgole, a re: Ke mang yo a go dirilego mmusi le moahlodi wa rena?" 
Acts7:28 Na o tla mpolaya go etsa ge o dirile Moegipita maabane? 
Acts7:29 Ke moka Moshe a tshaba ka baka la lentsu le, lee be e le mofaladi nageng ya Midiane, moo a ilego a belega barwa ba babedi." 
Acts7:30 Ge go fetile mengwaga ye masomenne, morongwa wa Jehofa a iponagatsa go yena leganateng la Thaba ya Sinai ka kgabo ya mollo sethokgweng sa meetlwa." 
Acts7:31 Moshe ge a bona seo, a makatswa ke pono yeo; ge a batamela go e bona, lentsu la Morena la tla go yena." 
Acts7:32 A re: Ke nna Modimo wa borakgolokhukhu ba gago, Modimo wa Aberahame le Modimo wa Isaka le Modimo wa Jakobo. Ke moka Moshe a thothomela lea se be le sebete sa go lebelela." 
Acts7:33 Ke moka Jehofa a re go yena: Apola dieta tsa gago maotong a gago, ka gobane lefelo leo o emego go lona ke naga e kgethwa." 
Acts7:34 Ka bona, ka bona masetla-pelo a setshaba sa ka seo se lego Egipita, ka kwa go fegelwa ga bona leka theoga go ba pholosa. Leetla bjale, ke tla go roma Egipita." 
Acts7:35 Moshe yo a ba gannego ka go re: Ke mang yo a go dirilego mmusi le moahlodi? yena Modimo yo a romilego gore e be mmusi le mopholosi ka seatla sa morongwa yo a ilego a iponagatsa go yena sethokgweng sa meetlwa. 
Acts7:36 A ba ntsha ka morago ga go dira mehlolo le dipontsho nageng ya Egipita le Lewatleng le Lehwibidu le leganateng ka nywaga e masomenne. 
Acts7:37 Ye ke Moshe yo a boditsego bana ba Isiraele: “Jehofa Modimo wa lena o tla le tsosetsa moporofeta gare ga bana babo lena go swana le nna; O tla mo kwa. 
Acts7:38 Ke yena yo a bego a le phuthegong leganateng le morongwa yo a boletsego le yena Thabeng ya Sinai le botatago rena, bao ba amogetsego mantsu a phelago gore a re nee." 
Acts7:39 Bao borakgolokhukhu ba rena ba sa ba kwego, eupsa ba mo kgoromeletsa kgole le bona, ba boela Egipita ka dipelong tsa bona." 
Acts7:40 A re go Arone: “Re direle medimo yeo e re eteletsego pele, ka gobane Moshe yo yo a re ntshago nageng ya Egipita, ga re tsebe seo se mo diragaletsego." 
Acts7:41 Mehleng yeo ba dira namane leba direla modingwana sehlabelo leba thabela mediro ya diatla tsa bona. 
Acts7:42 Ke moka Modimo a retologa a ba gafela go rapela madira a legodimo; Bjalo ka ge go ngwadilwe ka pukung ya baporofeta: Lena ntlo ya Isiraele, na le ile la nnea diphoofolo tse di hlabilwego le dihlabelo go nna nywageng ye masomenne leganateng?" 
Acts7:43 Ee, o ile wa tsea tabarenakele ya Molog le naledi ya modimo wa gago Refane, diswantsho tseo o di dirilego gore o di rapele; ke tla go isa Babilona." 
Acts7:44 Borakgolokhukhu ba rena ba be ba na le taberenakele ya bohlatse leganateng, bjalo ka ge a be a e beile ge a be a bolela le Moshe, gore a e dire go ya ka tsela yeo a e bonego." 
Acts7:45 Le botataweso bao ba tlilego ka morago ga moo, ba tlisitse le Jesu go ba ditshaba, bao Modimo a ba rakago pele ga borakgolokhukhu ba rena go fihla mehleng ya Dafida." 
Acts7:46 Bao ba ilego ba amogelwa ke Modimo leba kganyoga go hweletsa Modimo wa Jakobo taberenakele. 
Acts7:47 Eupsa Solomone a mo agela ntlo. 
Acts7:48 Eupsa Yo Godimodimo ga a dule ditempele tseo di dirilwego ka diatla; bjalo ka ge moporofeta a bolela. 
Acts7:49 Legodimo ke setulo sa ka sa bogosi lelefase ke setulo sa dinao tsa ka; o tla nkaga ntlo efe? Morena o re: goba lefelo la ka la go khutsa ke lefe? 
Acts7:50 Na seatla sa ka ga se sa dira dilo tse ka moka? 
Acts7:51 Lena ba manganga le bao ba sa bollago ba dipelo le ditsebe, ka mehla le ganetsa Moya o Mokgethwa; bjalo ka botataweno, le dira bjalo." 
Acts7:52 Ke mang go baporofeta bao borakgolokhukhu ba lena ba sa kago ba ba tlaisa? leba bolaya bao ba bego ba file tsebiso peleng ya go tla ga Moloki; bao bjale le bego le le baeki le babolai ba bona. 
Acts7:53 Bao ba amogetsego molao ka nako ya barongwa leba se o boloke. 
Acts7:54 Ge ba ekwa ditaba tse, ba tshoswa ke pelo, leba mo tsholla meno." 
Acts7:55 Eupsa yena yo a bego a tletse Moya o Mokgethwa, a lebelela thwii legodimong lea bona letago la Modimo le Jesu a eme ka letsogong le letona la Modimo." 
Acts7:56 Lea re: Bonang, ke bona magodimo a butswe leMorwa wa motho a eme ka letsogong le letona la Modimo." 
Acts7:57 Ke moka ba goeletsa ka lentsu le le hlabosago, ba thibela ditsebe tsa bona leba kitimela go yena ka pelo e tee." 
Acts7:58 Ba mo raka ka ntle ga motse ba mo kgatla ka maswika, dihlatse tsa bea diaparo tsa tsona maotong a lesogana leo leina la lona e lego Saulo." 
Acts7:59 Ba kgatla Stefano ka maswika ge a be a bitsa Modimo a re: Morena Jesu, amogela moya wa ka." 
Acts7:60 A khunama ka matolo, a goeletsa ka lentsu le le hlabosago: “Morena, o se ke wa ba bea sebe se.” Lege a boletse se, a robala." 
Acts8:1 Saulo a dumela lehu la gagwe. Ka nako yeo go ile gwa ba le tlaiso e kgolo go phuthego yeo e bego e le Jerusalema; ka moka ba gasane dileteng tsa Judea le Samarea, ntle le baapostola." 
Acts8:1 Saulo a dumela lehu la gagwe. Ka nako yeo go ile gwa ba le tlaiso e kgolo go phuthego yeo e bego e le Jerusalema; ka moka ba gasane dileteng tsa Judea le Samarea, ntle le baapostola." 
Acts8:2 Banna ba borapedi ba rwala Stefano polokong ya gagwe ba mo llela. 
Acts8:3 Ge e le Saulo o ile a fedisa phuthego ka go tsena ka ntlong e nngwe le e nngwe a thopa banna le basadi lea ba isa kgolegong. 
Acts8:4 Ka gona bao ba bego ba gasane ba ya gohle go yo bolela lentsu. 
Acts8:5 Ke moka Filipi a theogela motseng wa Samarea a ba botsa Keresete. 
Acts8:6 Setshaba sa ela hloko dilo tseo Filipi a di boletsego, ge se ekwa le go bona mehlolo yeo a e dirilego." 
Acts8:7 Gobane meoya e silafetsego e be e etswa go ba bantsi bao ba bego ba na le yona, ba goeletsa ka lentsu le le hlabosago, leba bantsi bao ba golofetsego le bao ba golofetsego ba fodiswa." 
Acts8:8 Motseng woo gwa ba le lethabo le legolo. 
Acts8:9 Eupsa go be go e-na le monna yo mongwe yo a bitswago Simone, yoo pele motseng woo a bego a loya le go loya batho ba Samarea ka go bolela gore ke monna yo mogolo." 
Acts8:10 Bohle ba ile ba mo ela hloko, go tloga go yo monyenyane go fihla go yo mogolo, ba re: Monna yo ke maatla a magolo a Modimo." 
Acts8:11 Ba mo lebelela, ka gobane o be a ba loile ka boloi ka nako e telele." 
Acts8:12 Eupsa ge ba dumela Filipi yo a bego a bolela ditaba tsa Mmuso wa Modimo le leina la Jesu Keresete, banna le basadi ba kolobetswa." 
Acts8:13 Ke moka Simone le yena a dumela, lege a kolobeditswe, a dula le Filipi lea makala ge a bona mehlolo le dipontsho tseo di diregilego." 
Acts8:14 Ge baapostola bao ba bego ba le Jerusalema ba ekwa gore Samarea e amogetse lentsu la Modimo, ba roma Petere le Johane go bona." 
Acts8:15 Ge ba theoga, ba ba rapelela gore ba amogele Moya o Mokgethwa." 
Acts8:16 (Ka gobane ga se a hlwa a wela le ge e le ofe wa bona, ke bona feela bao ba kolobeditswego Leineng la Morena Jesu)." 
Acts8:17 Ke moka ba ba bea diatla leba amogela Moya o Mokgethwa. 
Acts8:18 Simone ge a bona gore moya o mokgethwa o filwe ka go bewa diatla tsa baapostola, a ba neela tshelete." 
Acts8:19 A re: Mphe le maatla a, gore yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo ke mo beago diatla a hwetse Moya o Mokgethwa." 
Acts8:20 Eupsa Petere a re go yena: “Tshelete ya gago e a hwelela le wena, ka gobane o be o nagana gore mpho ya Modimo e ka rekwa ka tshelete." 
Acts8:21 Ga o na karolo goba pheletso tabeng ye, ka gobane pelo ya gago ga se ya loka mahlong a Modimo." 
Acts8:22 Ka gona, sokologa bobe bjo bja gago, leo rapele Modimo gore mo le kgopolo ya pelo ya gago e lebalelwe." 
Acts8:23 Gobane ke lemoga gore o ka gare ga gallo ya go baba le tlemong ya bokgopo. 
Acts8:24 Ke moka Simone a araba a re: “Nthapelele Morena, gore go se be le se tee sa dilo tse tseo o di boletsego seo se ntlhaselago." 
Acts8:25 Ka morago ga ge ba hlatsetse le go bolela lentsu la Jehofa, ba boela Jerusalema leba bolela Ebangedi metseng e mentsi ya Ba Samarea." 
Acts8:26 Morongwa wa Jehofa a bolela le Filipi a re: Tsoga o ye ka borwa tseleng yeo e theogago go tloga Jerusalema go ya Gasa, yeo e lego leganateng." 
Acts8:27 A tsoga a ya, a bona monna wa Ethiopia, molaki yo a nago le matla a magolo ka tlase ga Kandase, mohumagadi wa Lebopo, yo a bego a hlokometse matlotlo a gagwe ka moka lea tla Jerusalema go tlo rapela." 
Acts8:28 A boa a dula ka koloing ya gagwe a bala moporofeta Jesaya. 
Acts8:29 Ke moka Moya wa re go Filipi: “Batamela o kopanele koloi ye. 
Acts8:30 Filipi a kitimela go yena, a mo kwa a bala moporofeta Jesaya, a re: Na o kwesisa seo o se balago?" 
Acts8:31 Lea re: Nka kgona bjang ge motho a sa ntlhahle? A kgopela Filipi gore a rotoge a dule le yena. 
Acts8:32 Lefelo la Lengwalo leo a le badilego ke lona: O ile a iswa bjalo ka nku go hlabja; le go swana le kwana yeo e lego semumu pele ga mokuti wa yona, ga se a ka a bula molomo wa yona." 
Acts8:33 Ka go kokobetswa ga gagwe kahlolo ya gagwe e ile ya tloswa; leke mang yo a tlago tsebisa bong bja gagwe? gobane bophelo bja gagwe bo ile bja amogwa lefaseng. 
Acts8:34 Mohlankedi yoo a araba Filipi a re: Moporofeta o bolela taba ye ka mang? ya gagwe, goba ya motho yo mongwe?" 
Acts8:35 Ke moka Filipi a bula molomo wa gagwe, a thoma ka lona Lengwalo leo, a mmotsa Jesu." 
Acts8:36 Ge ba sa le tseleng, ba fihla meetseng a itsego; lemohlankedi wa kgoro a re: Bona, meetse ke a; ke eng seo se nthibelago go kolobetswa?" 
Acts8:37 LeFilipi a re: Ge o dumela ka pelo ya gago ka moka, o ka kgona. Lea araba a re: Ke dumela gore Jesu Keresete ke Morwa wa Modimo." 
Acts8:38 A laela koloi gore e eme, lebobedi bja bona ba theogela ka meetseng, Filipi gotee le mohlankedi wa lapeng; a mo kolobetsa." 
Acts8:39 Ge ba rotoga ka meetseng, Moya wa Morena wa tsea Filipi, moo molaki yoo a se sa mmonago." 
Acts8:40 Eupsa Filipi a hwetswa kua Asoto, lea phatsa metseng ka moka a bolela ditaba tse dibotse go fihlela a fihla Kesarea." 
Acts9:1 Saulo a tshosetsa barutiwa ba Morena le go bolaya, a ya go moperisita yo mogolo." 
Acts9:2 A mo kgopela mangwalo a go ya Damaseko a go ya disinagogeng, gore ge a ka hwetsa yo mongwe wa tsela ye, e ka ba banna goba basadi, a ba tlise Jerusalema ba tlemilwe." 
Acts9:3 Ge a sa sepela, a batamela Damaseko, gateetee seetsa se se tswago legodimong sa mo dikologa." 
Acts9:4 A wela fase lea kwa lentsu le re go yena: Saulo, Saulo, ke ka baka la’ng o ntlaisa?" 
Acts9:5 Lea re: O mang, Morena? leMorena a re: Ke nna Jesu yo le mo tlaisago; go thata gore o raga kgahlanong le dispurs." 
Acts9:6 A thothomela a re ka go makala: Morena, o nyaka ke dire eng? Morena a re go yena: Tsoga o tsene motseng, leo tla botswa seo o swanetsego go se dira." 
Acts9:7 Banna bao ba bego ba sepela le yena ba ema ba sa kgone go bolela leba kwa lentsu eupsa ba se bona motho. 
Acts9:8 Saulo a tsoga lefaseng; ge mahlo a gagwe a butswe, a se bone motho; eupsa ba mo swara ka seatla, ba mo isa Damaseko." 
Acts9:9 O ile a fetsa matsatsi a mararo a sa bone lea se je goba a nwa. 
Acts9:10 Damaseko go be go na le morutiwa yo mongwe yo a bitswago Anania; leMorena a re go yena ponong: Anania! lea re: Bonang, ke mo, Morena." 
Acts9:11 Ke moka Jehofa a re go yena: “Ema o ye mmileng wo o bitswago Straight, o kgopele ka ntlong ya Judase motho yo a bitswago Saulo, yo a tswago Tareso; gobane bona, o a rapela." 
Acts9:12 A bona ponong monna yo a bitswago Ananiase a tsena a mo bea seatla gore a kgone go bona. 
Acts9:13 Ke moka Anania a fetola a re: “Morena, ke kwele batho ba bantsi ka monna yo ka mo go gobatsago bakgethwa ba gago kua Jerusalema." 
Acts9:14 Lemo o na le maatla a go tswa go baperisita ba bagolo go tlama bohle bao ba bitsago leina la gago. 
Acts9:15 Eupsa Jehofa a re go yena: Sepela, ka gobane ke selo seo ke se kgethilwego gore ke rwale leina la ka pele ga ditshaba le dikgosi le bana ba Isiraele." 
Acts9:16 Gobane ke tla mmontsha kamoo a swanetsego go tlaisega ka gona ka baka la leina la ka. 
Acts9:17 Anania a ya a tsena ka ntlong; lea bea diatla tsa gagwe godimo ga gagwe lea re: Ngwanesu Saulo, Morena Jesu, yo a iponagaditsego go wena tseleng ge o etla, o nthomile, gore o amogele sefahlego sa gago leo tlale Moya o Mokgethwa." 
Acts9:18 Gateetee mahlo a gagwe a wa go etsa makwapi, a bona gateetee a ema a kolobetswa." 
Acts9:19 Ge a amogelwa dijo, a matlafatswa. Ke moka Saulo a dula le barutiwa bao ba bego ba le Damaseko ka matsatsi a itsego." 
Acts9:20 Gateetee a tsebatsa Keresete disinagogeng gore ke Morwa wa Modimo. 
Acts9:21 Eupsa bohle bao ba mo kwelego ba makala leba re; Na ga se Yena yo a bolailego bao ba bitsago Leina le kua Jerusalema lea tla mo ka morero wa go ba tlisa ka dithapo tsa diatla go baperisita ba bagolo? 
Acts9:22 Eupsa Saulo a matlafala lea gakantsha Bajuda bao ba bego ba dula Damaseko ka go hlatsela gore ke Keresete. 
Acts9:23 Ka morago ga ge go fetile matsatsi a mantsi, Bajuda ba dira lekgotla la go mmolaya." 
Acts9:24 Eupsa bahlapetsi ba bona ba be ba tseba Saulo. Ba be ba lebeletse dikgoro bosego le mosegare gore ba mmolaye. 
Acts9:25 Barutiwa ba mo tsea bosego ba mo theosa ka serotong kgauswi le morako. 
Acts9:26 Ge Saulo a fihla Jerusalema, a leka go tlatsa barutiwa. Eupsa ka moka ba be ba mo boifa leba sa dumele gore e be e le morutiwa." 
Acts9:27 Eupsa Barnaba a mo tsea a mo tlisa go baapostola, a ba botsa ka fao a bonego Morena tseleng le gore a bolela le yena le ka fao a ilego a bolela ka sebete kua Damaseko ka Leina la Jesu." 
Acts9:28 O be a na le bao ba tsenago le go tswa Jerusalema. 
Acts9:29 A bolela ka sebete ka leina la Morena Jesu, a ngangisana le Bagerika, eupsa bona ba ya go mmolaya." 
Acts9:30 Ge bana babo rena ba ekwa seo, ba mo theosetsa Kesarea leba mo romela Tareso." 
Acts9:31 Ke moka diphuthego tsa Judea ka moka, Galilea le Samarea tsa khutsa letsa agwa; leo sepele ka poifo ya Morena le ka khomotso ya Moya o Mokgethwa, e a oketsega." 
Acts9:31 Ke moka diphuthego tsa Judea ka moka, Galilea le Samarea tsa khutsa letsa agwa; leo sepele ka poifo ya Morena le ka khomotso ya Moya o Mokgethwa, e a oketsega." 
Acts9:32 Ya re ge Petere a phatsa dilete ka moka, le yena a theogela go bakgethwa bao ba dulago Lida." 
Acts9:33 Ke moka a hwetsa monna yo mongwe yo a bitswago Enease, yo a bego a na le nywaga e seswai a robetse malaong lea golofetse." 
Acts9:34 Petere a re go yena: Enea, Jesu Keresete o a go fodisa; tsoga o dire malao a gago. Lea ema gateetee." 
Acts9:35 Bohle bao ba bego ba dula Lida le Sharone ba mmona, ba retologela go Jehofa." 
Acts9:36 Kua Jope go be go na le morutiwa yo mongwe yo a bitswago Tabitha, yo ka tlhathollo e bitswago Doroka. Mosadi yo o be a tletse mediro e mebotse le dimpho tse dibotse tseo a di dirilego." 
Acts9:37 Mehleng yeo a babja a hwa; ge ba hlapile, ba mo robatsa ka phaposing ya ka godimo." 
Acts9:38 Ka ge Lida e be e le kgauswi le Jopa lebarutiwa ba kwa gore Petere o gona, ba roma banna ba babedi go yena bao ba ilego ba mo kgopela gore a se diege go tla go bona." 
Acts9:39 Ke moka Petere a ema a sepela le bona. Ge a fihla, ba mo tlisa ka phaposing ya ka godimo, lebahlologadi ka moka ba ema kgauswi le yena ba lla, ba bontsha diaparo le diaparo tseo Dorkase a di dirilego ge a be a na le bona." 
Acts9:40 Eupsa Petere a ba ntsha ka moka, a khunama a rapela; a retologela setopong, a re: Tabitha, tsoga. A bula mahlo a gagwe, ge a bona Petere, a dula." 
Acts9:41 Lea mo fa seatla sa gagwe lea mo emisetsa godimo, leka morago ga ge a biditse bakgethwa le bahlologadi, a mo tsweletsa a phela." 
Acts9:42 Go be go tsebja Jope ka moka; leba bantsi ba dumela go Morena. 
Acts9:43 Legwa direga gore a dula matsatsi a mantsi kua Jope le Simone o tee, modiri wa matlalo." 
Acts10:1 Go be go na le monna yo mongwe kua Kesarea yo a bitswago Koronelio, e lego molaodi wa madira wa sehlopha seo se bitswago sehlopha sa Mataliana." 
Acts10:2 Motho yo a boifago Modimo le ba lapa la gagwe ka moka, yo a ilego a nea batho dimpho tse dintsi tsa botho leka mehla a rapela Modimo." 
Acts10:3 Go bonagala a bona ponong mo e ka bago ka iri ya senyane ya letsatsi morongwa wa Modimo a etla go yena lea re go yena: Koronelio! 
Acts10:4 Ge a mo lebelela, a tshoga lea re: Ke eng se, Morena? A re go yena: Dithapelo tsa gago le dimpho tsa gago di rotogile go gopola pele ga Modimo." 
Acts10:5 Bjale romela banna Jope go yo bitsa yo mongwe Simone yo leina la gagwe e lego Petere. 
Acts10:6 O robala le Simone, modiri wa matlalo, yo ntlo ya gagwe e lego kgauswi le lewatle; o tla go botsa seo o swanetsego go se dira." 
Acts10:7 Morongwa yo a bego a bolela le Koronelio a sepetse, a bitsa bahlanka ba babedi ba lapeng la gagwe le lesole la borapedi la bao ba bego ba mo letetse ka mehla;" 
Acts10:8 Ka morago ga ge a ba boditse ditaba tse ka moka, a ba romela Jope." 
Acts10:9 Letsatsing le le latelago, ge ba be ba sepela le go batamela motse, Petere a rotogela marulelong mo e ka bago ka iri ya botshelela go yo rapela." 
Acts10:10 A swarwa ke tlala kudu lea nyaka go ja, eupsa ge ba sa itokiseletsa a wela ka gare ga letshogo." 
Acts10:11 A bona magodimo a bulega lea bona selo se sengwe se theogela go yena, bjalo ka lesela le legolo leo le logilwego dikhutlo tse nne lela theosetswa fase." 
Acts10:12 Go yona go be go na le diphoofolo ka moka tsa maoto a mane tsa lefase le diphoofolo tsa naga le diphoofolo tse di gagabago le dinonyana tsa leratadima. 
Acts10:13 Lentsu la tla go yena: “Tsoga, Petere! bolaya o je." 
Acts10:14 Eupsa Petere a re: Ga go bjalo, Morena; gobane ga se ka ka ka ja selo se se sa hlwekago goba se se sa hlwekago." 
Acts10:15 Lentsu la re go yena ka lekga la bobedi: Se Modimo a se hlwekisitsego, o se ke wa se tsea e le se sekgethwa." 
Acts10:16 Se se dirilwe gararo, leselo seo sa rotosetswa legodimong gape." 
Acts10:17 Ge Petere a be a belaela ka pelong ya gore pono ye yeo a e bonego e tla bolela eng, bona banna bao ba rometswego go tswa Koronelio ba botsisa ka ntlong ya Simone leba ema pele ga kgoro." 
Acts10:18 A letsa mogala a botsisa ge e ba Simone yo a bitswago Petere a robala moo. 
Acts10:19 Ge Petere a be a nagana ka pono yeo, Moya wa re go yena: “Bona, banna ba bararo ba go nyaka." 
Acts10:20 Ke moka, tsoga, o theogele fase o sepele le bona ntle le pelaelo, gobane ke ba romile." 
Acts10:21 Ke moka Petere a theogela go banna bao ba bego ba rometswe go yena go tswa go Koronelio. Lea re: Bonang, ke nna yo le mo nyakago. Lebaka leo le tlilego ke lefe?" 
Acts10:22 Ba re: Koronelio, molaodi wa madira, monna yo a lokilego le yo a boifago Modimo le yo a nago le pego ye botse gare ga setshaba ka moka sa Bajuda, o lemositswe ke morongwa yo mokgethwa wa Modimo gore a go amogele ka ntlong ya gagwe a re bitseng le go kwa mantsu go tswa go wena." 
Acts10:23 Ke moka a ba bitsa lea ba robala bosego. Letsatsing le le latelago Petere a tloga le bona, lebana babo ba bangwe ba Jope ba sepela le yena." 
Acts10:24 Letsatsing le le latelago ba tsena Kesarea. Koronelio a ba letela, a bitsa ba leloko le bagwera ba gagwe." 
Acts10:25 Ge Petere a tsena, Koronelio a gahlana le yena, a wela maotong a gagwe a mo khunamela." 
Acts10:26 Eupsa Petere a mo tsea a re: Tsoga! Nna ka bonna le nna ke monna. 
Acts10:27 Ge a sa bolela le yena, a tsena a hwetsa ba bantsi ba kgobokane." 
Acts10:28 A re go bona: Le a tseba gore ga go molaong gore monna yo e lego Mojuda a tle go yo mongwe wa setshaba se sengwe; eupsa Modimo o mpontshitse gore ga se ka swanela go bitsa motho yo a sa hlwekago goba yo a sa hlwekago. 
Acts10:29 Ke ka baka leo ke tlilego go lena ka ntle le go ganetsa, gateetee ge ke rometswe;" 
Acts10:30 LeKoronelio a re: Matsatsi a mane a go feta ke ikona dijo go fihla ka nako ye; ka iri ya senyane ka rapela ka ntlong ya ka, ka bona monna yo a aperego diaparo tse di phadimago go eme pele ga ka." 
Acts10:31 A re: Koronelio, thapelo ya gago e kwelwe, ledimpho tsa gago di gopotswe pele ga Modimo." 
Acts10:32 Ke moka o romele Jope go yo bitsa Simone yo sefane sa gagwe e lego Petere; a robala ka ntlong ya Simone, mohlapi wa matlalo, kgauswi le lewatle; o tla bolela le wena ge a etla." 
Acts10:33 Ke ka baka leo ke ilego ka romela lena gatee-tee; leo dirile gabotse ge o ka tla. Bjale ka moka re mo pele ga Modimo, go kwa tsohle tse Modimo a le laetsego tsona." 
Acts10:34 Ke moka Petere a bula molomo a re: Ruri ke bona gore Modimo ga a amogele motho yoo. 
Acts10:35 Eupsa setshabeng se sengwe le se sengwe yo a mmoifago lea dira toka o a amogelega go yena. 
Acts10:36 Lentsu leo Modimo a le romilego go bana ba Isiraele ka go bolela ka khutso ka Jesu Keresete: Ke yena Morena wa bohle. 
Acts10:37 Lentsu leo, ke le re, le a tseba, leo le tsebisitswego Judea ka moka lela thoma go tloga Galilea, ka morago ga kolobetso yeo Johane a bego a e bolela." 
Acts10:37 Lentsu leo, ke le re, le a tseba, leo le tsebisitswego Judea ka moka lela thoma go tloga Galilea, ka morago ga kolobetso yeo Johane a bego a e bolela." 
Acts10:38 Kamoo Modimo a tloditsego Jesu wa Natsaretha ka Moya o Mokgethwa le ka maatla, yo a bego a sepelasepela a dira botse le go fodisa bohle bao ba bego ba gateletswe ke Diabolo; gobane Modimo o be a na le yena." 
Acts10:39 Lere dihlatse tsa tsohle tseo A di dirilego nageng ya Bajuda gammogo le kua Jerusalema; a ba bolaya, a ba fega mohlareng;" 
Acts10:40 Modimo a mo tsosa ka letsatsi la boraro, a mmontsha pepeneneng;" 
Acts10:41 E sego go batho ka moka, eupsa go dihlatse tse di kgethilwego pele ga Modimo, ee, go rena, bao ba jelego le go nwa le yena ka morago ga ge a tsogile bahung." 
Acts10:42 A re laela gore re bolele batho le go hlatsela gore ke Yena yo a kgethilwego ke Modimo gore e be Moahlodi wa ba ba phelago le ba ba hwilego. 
Acts10:43 Efa baporofeta ba gagwe ka moka bohlatse bja gore mang le mang yo a dumelago go yena o tla amogela tebalelo ya dibe ka leina la gagwe. 
Acts10:44 Ge Petere a sa bolela mantsu a, Moya o Mokgethwa wa wela godimo ga bohle bao ba kwelego lentsu." 
Acts10:45 Badumedi bao ba bego ba etswa lebollong, bohle bao ba bego ba tlile le Petere ba ile ba makala, ka gobane mpho ya Moya o Mokgethwa le yona e ile ya tshollelwa go Baditshaba." 
Acts10:46 Gobane ba kwele kamoo ba bolelago ka maleme le go godisa Modimo. Ke moka Petere a araba: 
Acts10:47 Na go na le motho yo a ka thibelago meetse, gore a se kolobetswe, bao ba amogetsego Moya wo Mokgethwa go swana le rena?" 
Acts10:48 Lea laela gore ba kolobetswe Leineng la Morena. Ke moka ba mo kgopela gore a dule nako e telele. 
Acts11:1 Baapostola le bana babo rena bao ba bego ba le Judea ba kwa gore le bona ba ditshaba ba amogela lentsu la Modimo. 
Acts11:1 Baapostola le bana babo rena bao ba bego ba le Judea ba kwa gore le bona ba ditshaba ba amogela lentsu la Modimo. 
Acts11:2 Ge Petere a rotogela Jerusalema, ba lebollo ba ile ba ngangisana le yena." 
Acts11:3 A re: O ile wa tsena go bao ba sa bollago, wa ja le bona." 
Acts11:4 Eupsa Petere o ile a lokisa taba yeo go tloga mathomong, a ba hlalosetsa yona ka taelo, a re." 
Acts11:5 Ke be ke rapela motseng wa Jope, ka bona pono e le ka gare ga sebjana sa go theoga bjalo ka lesela le legolo, se theogile go tswa legodimong ka dikhutlo tse nne; leya ba ya tla go nna." 
Acts11:6 Ge ke be ke tsepamisitse mahlo, ka nagana ka bona diphoofolo tsa maoto a mane tsa lefase le diphoofolo tsa naga le diphoofolo tse di gagabago le dinonyana tsa leratadimeng." 
Acts11:7 Ka kwa lentsu le re go nna: Tsoga, Petere! hlaba o je." 
Acts11:8 Eupsa ka re: Ga go bjalo, Morena, ka gobane ga go selo se se sa kgethwa goba se se sa hlwekago seo se kilego sa tsena molomong wa ka." 
Acts11:9 Eupsa lentsu la nkgoba gape le etswa legodimong la re: Se Modimo a se hlwekisitsego, o se ke wa se bitsa se se sa kgethwa." 
Acts11:10 Se se direga gararo, lebohle ba rotosetswa legodimong." 
Acts11:11 Lebonang, gateetee go be go setse go na le banna ba bararo bao ba ilego ba tsena ka ntlong yeo ke bego ke le go yona, ba rometswe go nna ba etswa Kesarea." 
Acts11:12 Moya wa ntaela gore ke sepele le bona ntle le pelaelo. Bana babo rena ba ba tshelelago ba be ba sepela le nna, lera tsena ka ntlong ya monna yoo." 
Acts11:13 A re bone ka moo a bonego morongwa ka ntlong ya gagwe a eme a re go yena: Romela banna Jope leo bitse Simone, yo sefane sa gagwe e lego Petere;" 
Acts11:14 Ke mang yo a tlago go go botsa mantsu ao wena le ba ntlo ya gago ka moka le tlago go pholoswa ka ona? 
Acts11:15 Ge ke thoma go bolela, Moya o Mokgethwa wa wela godimo ga bona, bjalo ka ge e le go rena mathomong." 
Acts11:16 Ke moka ka nagana ka lentsu la Morena, ka fao A boletsego ka gona: Johane ka nnete o kolobeditse ka meetse; eupsa le tla kolobetswa ka Moya o Mokgethwa." 
Acts11:17 Gobane Modimo o ba file mpho ye e swanago le ya rena, bao re bego re dumela go Morena Jesu Keresete; ke be ke le eng gore ke kgone go ganetsa Modimo?" 
Acts11:18 Ge ba ekwa se, ba homola, ba tagafatsa Modimo, ba re: Ke moka Modimo o ile a dira gore le Baditshaba ba sokologele bophelong." 
Acts11:19 Bao ba gasantswego ka baka la tlaiso yeo e ilego ya tsogela Stefano ba ile ba fihla Fenikia le Tsipero le Antiokia leba se bolele lentsu go motho, ge e se go Bajuda feela." 
Acts11:20 Ba bangwe ba bona e be e le banna ba Tsipero le Kirene, bao ge ba fihla Antiokia, ba ilego ba bolela le Bagerika leba bolela ka Morena Jesu." 
Acts11:21 Letsogo la Morena le be le na le bona, leba bantsi ba dumela leba retologela go Morena." 
Acts11:22 Ka morago ga moo ditaba tsa ditaba tse di tlelwa ditsebeng tsa phuthego yeo e bego e le Jerusalema, leya roma Baranaba go fihla Antiokia." 
Acts11:23 Ge a fihla a bona kgaugelo ya Modimo, a thaba lea ba kgothatsa ka moka gore ba latele Jehofa ka morero wa dipelo." 
Acts11:24 Gobane e be e le monna yo botse, a tletse Moya o Mokgethwa le tumelo, lebatho ba bantsi ba tlaleletswa go Morena." 
Acts11:25 Ke moka Barnaba a tloga a ya Tareso go yo nyaka Saulo. 
Acts11:26 Ge a mo hwetsa, a mo tlisa Antiokia. Legwa direga gore ngwaga ka moka ba kopana ka phuthegong leba ruta batho ba bantsi. Lebarutiwa ba ile ba thoma go bitswa Ba Keresete kua Antiokia." 
Acts11:27 Mehleng yeo baporofeta ba tla Antiokia ba etswa Jerusalema. 
Acts11:28 Yo mongwe wa bona yo a bitswago Agabo a ema lea bontsha ka Moya gore go tla ba le bodiidi bjo bogolo lefaseng ka moka, bjo bo diregilego mehleng ya Klaudio Kesara." 
Acts11:29 Ke moka barutiwa bao, yo mongwe le yo mongwe go ya ka bokgoni bja gagwe, a phetha ka go romela thuso go bana babo rena bao ba dulago Judea." 
Acts11:29 Ke moka barutiwa bao, yo mongwe le yo mongwe go ya ka bokgoni bja gagwe, a phetha ka go romela thuso go bana babo rena bao ba dulago Judea." 
Acts11:30 Seo le bona ba se dira, ba se romela go bagolo ka seatla sa Baranaba le Saulo." 
Acts12:1 Mo e ka bago ka nako yeo Kgosi Heroda a otlolla diatla tsa gagwe gore a tshwenye ba bangwe ba phuthego. 
Acts12:2 A bolaya Jakobo ngwanabo Johane ka tshosa. 
Acts12:3 Ka ge a bone gore go kgahlisa Bajuda, a tswela pele a tsea Petere le yena. (Ka nako yeo e be e le matsatsi a dinkgwa tse di sa omelwago.)" 
Acts12:4 Ge a mo swere, a mo tsenya kgolegong, a mo gafela dikotara tse nne tsa bahlabani gore ba mo hlokomele; ka maikemisetso a go mo ntsha bathong ka morago ga Paseka." 
Acts12:5 Ka morago Petere o ile a dula kgolegong, eupsa phuthego e ile ya mo rapelela Modimo ka ntle le go kgaotsa." 
Acts12:6 Ge Heroda a be a nyaka go mo tlisa, Petere bosegong bjona bjona a robala magareng ga masole a mabedi a tlemilwe ka diketane tse pedi; bahlapetsi ba mojako ba be ba disa kgolego." 
Acts12:7 Lebona, morongwa wa Morena a tla godimo ga gagwe, leseetsa sa phadima ka kgolegong, lea itia Petere ka thoko lea mo tsosa, a re: Tsoga ka pela! Diketane tsa gagwe tsa wa diatleng tsa gagwe." 
Acts12:8 Morongwa a re go yena: “Itlema o tleme dieta tsa gago. Leka fao a dirile. A re go yena: Lahlela seaparo sa gago go go dikologa leo ntatele. 
Acts12:9 A tswa a mo latela; lea se tsebe gore seo se dirilwego ke morongwa e be e le thereso; eupsa o be a nagana gore o bone pono. 
Acts12:10 Ge ba feta karolo ya pele le ya bobedi, ba fihla kgorong ya tshipi yeo e isago motseng; ba tswa ba feta tseleng e tee; gateetee morongwa a tloga go yena." 
Acts12:11 Ge Petere a ipotsa, a re: Bjale ke tseba ka nnete gore Morena o romile morongwa wa gagwe lea mpholosa diatleng tsa Heroda le ditebelelong ka moka tsa setshaba sa Bajuda." 
Acts12:12 Ka morago ga ge a setse a hlahlobisisitse taba yeo, a tla ntlong ya Maria mmago Johane, yo sefane sa gagwe e bego e le Mareke; moo ba bantsi ba bego ba kgobokane go rapela." 
Acts12:13 Ge Petere a kokota mojakong wa kgoro, ngwanenyana yo a bitswago Roda a tla go theetsa." 
Acts12:14 Ge a lemoga lentsu la Petere, ga se a ka a bula kgoro ka lethabo, eupsa a kitimela ka gare a bolela ka fao Petere a bego a eme ka gona pele ga kgoro." 
Acts12:15 Ba re go yena: O a hlanya. Eupsa o be a dula a kgonthisetsa gore go bile bjalo. Ke moka ba re: Ye ke morongwa wa gagwe. 
Acts12:16 Eupsa Petere a tswela pele a kokota, lege ba bula mojako ba mmona, ba makala." 
Acts12:17 Eupsa yena a ba supa ka seatla gore ba homole, a ba botsa kamoo Jehofa a mo ntshitsego ka gona kgolegong. A re: Sepela o botse Jakobo le bana babo rena dilo tse. Lea tloga a ya lefelong le lengwe." 
Acts12:18 Ge e setse e le mosegare, gwa ba le khuduego e nyenyane gare ga masole, e lego seo se ilego sa diragalela Petere." 
Acts12:19 Ge Heroda a mo nyaka a sa mo hwetse, a hlahloba bahlapetsi lea laela gore ba bolawe. A theoga a tloga Judea a ya Kesarea, a dula moo." 
Acts12:19 Ge Heroda a mo nyaka a sa mo hwetse, a hlahloba bahlapetsi lea laela gore ba bolawe. A theoga a tloga Judea a ya Kesarea, a dula moo." 
Acts12:20 Heroda o ile a kgahlwa kudu ke ba Tiro le Sidone, eupsa ba tla go yena ka kgopolo e tee, leka morago ga ge ba dirile Blasto, mohlankedi wa kgoro ya kgosi mogwera wa bona, ba kganyoga khutso; ka gobane naga ya bona e be e fepsa ke naga ya kgosi." 
Acts12:21 Ka letsatsi le le beilwego Heroda, a apere diaparo tsa bogosi, a dula sedulong sa gagwe sa bogosi lea bolela le bona." 
Acts12:22 Setshaba sa goeletsa sa re: Le ke lentsu la modimo e sego la motho. 
Acts12:23 Gateetee morongwa wa Jehofa a mo itia, ka gobane ga se a ka a nea Modimo letago;" 
Acts12:24 Eupsa lentsu la Modimo la gola, la ata." 
Acts12:25 Barnaba le Saulo ba boa Jerusalema, ba feditse bodiredi bja bona, ba tsea Johane yoo leina la gagwe e bego e le Mareka." 
Acts13:1 Phuthegong yeo e bego e le Antiokia go be go na le baporofeta le barutisi ba bangwe; go swana le Baranaba le Simeone yo a bitswago Nigere, le Lukio wa Kirene le Manaene yo a godisitswego ke Heroda mmusisi, le Saulo." 
Acts13:2 Ge ba be ba hlankela Morena e bile ba ikona dijo, Moya wo Mokgethwa wa re: Nkgetheleng Baranaba le Saulo mosomong wo ke ba biditsego go wona." 
Acts13:3 Ka morago ga ge ba ikona dijo, ba rapela, ba ba bea diatla, ba ba raka." 
Acts13:4 Ka morago ga moo, ba rometswe ka Moya o Mokgethwa, ba tloga ba lebile Seleukia. Ba tloga moo ba sesa ba ya Tsipero." 
Acts13:5 Ge ba le Salami, ba bolela lentsu la Modimo disinagogeng tsa Bajuda. Ba bile ba na le Johane e le modiredi wa bona." 
Acts13:6 Ge ba phatsa sehlakahlakeng go fihla Pafo, ba hwetsa moloi yo mongwe, moporofeta wa maaka, Mojuda yo a bitswago Barjeso." 
Acts13:7 O be a le mmogo le mohlankedi wa naga, Sergio Paulo, monna yo bohlale; yo a ilego a bitsa Barnaba le Saulo lea nyaka go kwa lentsu la Modimo." 
Acts13:8 Eupsa Elima moloi (gobane leina la gagwe ke bjalo ka tlhathollo) o ile a ba ganetsa lea leka go arosa yo a tseago legato la tumelo. 
Acts13:9 Ke moka Saulo, yo gape a bitswago Paulo, a tlala Moya o Mokgethwa, a mo tsepelela mahlo." 
Acts13:10 Lea re: Wena yo a tletsego bohwirihwiri ka moka le bosoro ka moka, ngwana wa Diabolo, lenaba la toko ka moka, na o ka se kgaotse go kgopamisa ditsela tse di lokilego tsa Morena?" 
Acts13:11 Bjale, bona, seatla sa Jehofa se go lena, leo tla foufala wa se bone letsatsi ka nakwana. Legateetee mouwane le leswiswi tsa wela godimo ga Yena; a sepelasepela a nyaka ba bangwe gore ba mo swere ka seatla." 
Acts13:12 Ge mohlankedi wa legato a bona seo se diregilego, a dumela, a makatswa ke thuto ya Morena." 
Acts13:13 Ge Paulo le sehlopha sa gagwe ba tloga Pafo, ba fihla Perege kua Pamfilia. Johane a tloga go bona, a boela Jerusalema." 
Acts13:14 Eupsa ge ba tloga Perega, ba fihla Antiokia kua Pisidia, ba tsena sinagogeng ka letsatsi la Sabatha, ba dula fase." 
Acts13:15 Ka morago ga go bala molao le baporofeta, babusi ba sinagoge ba roma ba romela go bona gore ba re: Banna le bana beso, ge e ba le na le lentsu la kgothatso bakeng sa setshaba, le bolele go ya pele." 
Acts13:16 Ke moka Paulo a ema a supa ka seatla sa gagwe a re: “Banna ba Isiraele le lena bao ba boifago Modimo, theetsang." 
Acts13:17 Modimo wa setshaba se sa Isiraele o kgethile borakgolokhukhu ba rena lea godisa setshaba ge se be se dula e le basele nageng ya Egipita, lea ba ntsha ka letsogo le le phagamego." 
Acts13:18 Lemo e ka bago ka nako ya mengwaga ye masomenne O ile a dumelela ditsela tsa bona lesokeng. 
Acts13:19 Ka morago ga ge a fedisitse ditshaba tse supago nageng ya Kanana, a arola naga ya tsona ka matengwa." 
Acts13:20 Ka morago ga moo a ba nea baahlodi nywaga e ka bago e makgolo a mane-masomehlano go fihlela moporofeta Samuele. 
Acts13:21 Ka morago ga moo ba kgopela kgosi leModimo a ba nea Saulo, morwa wa Kishi, monna wa moloko wa Benjamini, ka nywaga e masomenne." 
Acts13:22 Ka morago ga ge a mo tlositse, a ba tsosetsa Dafida gore e be kgosi ya bona; yo le yena a ilego a mo hlatsela lea re: Ke hweditse Dafida, morwa wa Jese, monna wa pelo ya ka, yo a tlago phethagatsa thato ya ka ka moka." 
Acts13:23 Go tswa pelong ya monna yo, go ya ka kholofetso ya gagwe, Modimo o belege Mopholosi wa Isiraele, Jesu." 
Acts13:24 Ge Johane pele a fihla a be a bolela ka kolobetso ya tshokologo go setshaba ka moka sa Isiraele. 
Acts13:25 Johane ge a feditse leeto la gagwe, a re: O nagana gore ke mang? Ga ke yena. Eupsa bona, go tla yo mongwe ka morago ga ka, yo ke sa swanelegego go lokolla dieta tsa gagwe maotong a gagwe." 
Acts13:26 Banna le bana beso, bana ba moloko wa Aberahame le yo mongwe le yo mongwe gare ga lena yo a boifago Modimo, lentsu la pholoso ye le rometswe go lena." 
Acts13:27 Badudi ba Jerusalema le babusi ba bona, ka ge ba be ba sa mo tsebe, goba mantsu a baporofeta ao a balwago ka letsatsi le lengwe le le lengwe la Sabatha, ba ile ba phethagatsa seo ka go mo ahlola." 
Acts13:28 Lele ge ba sa hwetse lebaka la lehu go Yena, ba sa kgopela Pilato gore a bolawe." 
Acts13:29 Ka morago ga go phethagatsa tsohle tseo di ngwadilwego ka yena, ba mo folosa mohlareng ba mo robatsa lebitleng." 
Acts13:30 Eupsa Modimo a mo tsosa bahung. 
Acts13:31 A bonwa ka matsatsi a mantsi ke bao ba rotogilego le yena go tloga Galilea go ya Jerusalema, e lego dihlatse tsa gagwe go setshaba." 
Acts13:32 Re le botsa ditaba tse di thabisago tseo di holofeditsego botatago bona. 
Acts13:33 Modimo o phethagaditse rena bana ba bona ka go tsosa Jesu; bjalo ka ge go ngwadilwe gape mo psalmeng ya bobedi: O Morwa wa ka, lehono ke go belegile." 
Acts13:34 Lemabapi le gore O mo tsositse bahung, gore a se boele go bola, o boletse ka tsela ye: Ke tla go fa dikgaugelo tse di sa fetogego tsa Dafida." 
Acts13:35 Ke ka baka leo a bolelago gape le go psalme e nngwe: O se ke wa dumelela Mokgethwa wa gago gore a bone tshenyego. 
Acts13:36 Gobane Dafida ka morago ga ge a hlanketse moloko wa gagwe ka thato ya Modimo, o ile a robala a robala le borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe lea bona tshenyego." 
Acts13:37 Eupsa yo Modimo a mo tsositsego ga se a ka a bona go senyega. 
Acts13:38 Ka gona, anke le tsebise, banna le bana babo rena, gore ka monna yo le bolelwa ka tebalelo ya dibe." 
Acts13:39 Leka yena bohle bao ba dumelago ba lokafaditswe dilong tsohle tseo le bego le sa kgone go lokafatswa go tsona ka molao wa Moshe. 
Acts13:40 Ka gona, hlokomelang gore seo se boletswego ke baporofeta se se ke sa le wela;" 
Acts13:41 Bonang, lena ba nyatsago, le makala le fedile, gobane ke dira modiro mehleng ya lena, modiro wo le ka se tsogego le o dumela, gaesita le ge motho a ka le tsebatsa wona." 
Acts13:42 Ge Bajuda ba etswa sinagogeng, Baditshaba ba kgopela gore mantsu a a bolelwe ka Sabatha ye e latelago." 
Acts13:43 Ge phuthego e thubegile, ba bantsi ba Bajuda le basokologi ba bodumedi ba latela Paulo le Barnaba, bao ba ilego ba bolela le bona leba ba kgodisa gore ba dule ka kgaugelo ya Modimo." 
Acts13:44 Ka Sabatha ka letsatsi le le latelago mo e nyakilego go ba motse ka moka wa kgobokana go theetsa lentsu la Modimo. 
Acts13:45 Eupsa ge Bajuda ba bona lesaba, ba tlala mona leba bolela kgahlanong le dilo tseo Paulo a di boletsego, ba ganetsana le go senya leina." 
Acts13:46 Ke moka Paulo le Baranaba ba ba le sebete leba re: Go be go nyakega gore lentsu la Modimo le bolelwe le lena pele; 
Acts13:47 Gobane ka tsela ye Morena o re laetse lea re: Ke le beile bjalo ka seetsa sa Bantle, gore le be pholoso go fihla mafelelong a lefase." 
Acts13:48 Ge Baditshaba ba ekwa se, ba thaba leba tagafatsa lentsu la Morena; lebohle bao ba bego ba reretswe bophelong bjo bo sa felego ba dumela." 
Acts13:49 Lentsu la Jehofa la tsebiswa nageng ka moka. 
Acts13:50 Eupsa Bajuda ba hlohleletsa basadi ba borapedi le ba hlomphegago le banna ba motse leba tsosa tlaiso kgahlanong le Paulo le Baranaba leba ba raka nageng ya bona. 
Acts13:51 Eupsa ba sikinya lerole maotong a bona, ba fihla Ikonia." 
Acts13:52 Barutiwa ba tlala lethabo le ka Moya o Mokgethwa. 
Acts14:1 Go ile gwa direga kua Ikonia gore bobedi bja bona ba tsena sinagogeng ya Bajuda mmogo, ba bolela ka tsela yeo lesaba le legolo la Bajuda gotee le Bagerika la ba badumedi." 
Acts14:2 Eupsa Bajuda bao ba sa dumelego ba tutuetsa Baditshaba leba dira menagano ya bona e mpe malebana le bana babo bona. 
Acts14:3 Ke moka ba dula nako e telele ba bolela ka sebete go Morena, yo a ilego a hlatsela lentsu la kgaugelo ya gagwe lea dira gore dipontsho le mehlolo di dirwe ka diatla tsa bona." 
Acts14:4 Eupsa lesaba la motse la arogana, karolo e nngwe ya ba ya Bajuda, karolo ya baapostola." 
Acts14:5 Ge go be go hlaselwa ke Baditshaba gotee le Bajuda gotee le babusi ba bona, gore ba ba gobose le go ba kgatla ka maswika." 
Acts14:6 Ba e hlokomela, ba tshabela Lisitara le Derebe, metse ya Likaonia, le tikologong yeo e e dikologilego." 
Acts14:7 Ba bolela Ebangedi moo. 
Acts14:8 Go be go na le monna yo mongwe kua Lisitara yo a fokolago maotong a gagwe, e lego segole sa popelong ya mmagwe, yo a sa kago a sepela." 
Acts14:9 A kwa Paulo a bolela, a mo lebelela, a lemoga gore o na le tumelo ya go fodiswa." 
Acts14:10 A re ka lentsu le le hlabosago: Ema thwii ka maoto. Lea tlola lea sepela. 
Acts14:11 Ge lesaba le bona seo Paulo a se dirilego, la hlabosa mantsu a lona, la re ka polelo ya Likaonia: Medimo e theogile go rena ka go swana le batho." 
Acts14:12 Ba bitsa Baranaba Jupiter; le Paulus, Mercury, ka gobane e be e le seboledi se segolo." 
Acts14:13 Ke moka moperisita wa Jupiter, yo a bego a le ka pele ga motse wa bona, a tlisa dikgomo le difaha dikgorong lea nyaka go dira dihlabelo le setshaba." 
Acts14:14 Baapostola, Barnaba le Paulo, ge ba ekwa taba ye, ba gagola diaparo tsa bona, ba kitimela gare ga setshaba ba goeletsa." 
Acts14:15 A re: Bahlomphegi, ke ka baka la’ng le dira dilo tse? Le rena re banna ba difisegelo tse di swanago le lena, re le botsa gore le tlogele dilo tse tsa lefeela go Modimo yo a phelago yo a dirilego legodimo le lefase le lewatle le tsohle tse di lego go tsona." 
Acts14:16 Bao pele ba bego ba dumelela ditshaba ka moka gore di sepele ditseleng tsa tsona. 
Acts14:17 Eupsa ga se a ka a itlogela ntle le bohlatse, ka gore o dirile botse lea re nesa pula go tswa legodimong le dinako tsa dienywa, lea tlatsa dipelo tsa rena ka dijo le lethabo." 
Acts14:18 Ka mantsu a ba ile ba thibela setshaba ka thata, gore ba se ba direle dihlabelo." 
Acts14:19 Bajuda ba bangwe ba tswago Antiokia le Ikonia ba tla moo, ba kgodisa setshaba, ba kgatla Paulo ka maswika, ba mo goga ka ntle ga motse, ba nagana gore o hwile." 
Acts14:20 Eupsa ge barutiwa ba eme ba mo dikologile, a tsoga a tsena motseng; leletsatsing le le latelago O ile a tloga le Bárnabas a ya Derbe." 
Acts14:21 Ka morago ga ge ba boditse Ebangedi motseng woo leba ithutile mo gontsi, ba boela Lisitara le Ikonia le Antiokia." 
Acts14:22 Go tiisa meoya ya barutiwa le go ba kgothaletsa gore ba dule tumelong, le gore re tsene Mmusong wa Modimo ka masetlapelo a mantsi." 
Acts14:23 Ka morago ga ge ba beile bagolo phuthegong e nngwe le e nngwe leba rapela ka go ikona dijo, ba ineela go Morena yo ba bego ba dumela go yena." 
Acts14:24 Ka morago ga ge ba phatsa Pisidia, ba fihla Pamfilia." 
Acts14:25 Ka morago ga ge ba boletse lentsu kua Perega, ba theogela Attalia." 
Acts14:26 Go tloga moo ba sesa ba ya Antiokia, moo ba ilego ba retwa mogau wa Modimo ka baka la modiro wo ba o phethilego." 
Acts14:27 Ge ba etla leba kgoboketsa phuthego, ba botsa tsohle tseo Modimo a di dirilego ka bona, le ka fao a buletsego Baditshaba mojako wa tumelo." 
Acts14:28 Ba dula moo le barutiwa nako ye telele. 
Acts15:1 Banna ba bangwe bao ba theogilego Judea ba ruta bana babo rena ba re: Ge e ba le sa bolotse go ya ka mokgwa wa Moshe, le ka se pholoswe." 
Acts15:1 Banna ba bangwe bao ba theogilego Judea ba ruta bana babo rena ba re: Ge e ba le sa bolotse go ya ka mokgwa wa Moshe, le ka se pholoswe." 
Acts15:2 Ge Paulo le Baranaba ba be ba sa kwane le bona ba sa kwane le bona, ba ile ba phetha ka gore Paulo le Baranaba le ba bangwe ba bona ba rotogele Jerusalema go baapostola le bagolo mabapi le potsiso ye." 
Acts15:3 Ge ba beilwe ke phuthego, ba phatsa Fenikia le Samarea ba tsebisa ka go sokologa ga Baditshaba; ba thabisa bana babo rena ka moka." 
Acts15:4 Ge ba fihla Jerusalema, ba amogelwa ke phuthego le ke baapostola le bagolo, leba botsa tsohle tseo Modimo a di dirilego ka bona." 
Acts15:5 Eupsa ba bangwe ba sehlotswana sa Bafarisei bao ba ilego ba ba badumedi ba ema ba re: Go be go nyakega gore ba bolotse le go ba laela gore ba boloke molao wa Moshe. 
Acts15:6 Baapostola le bagolo ba kopana go yo ahlaahla taba ye. 
Acts15:7 Lege go be go na le ngangisano ye ntsi, Petere a ema lea re go bona: Banna le bana beso, le a tseba gore kgale Modimo o kgethile gare ga rena gore Baditshaba ba kwe lentsu la ebangedi ka molomo wa ka, leba dumele." 
Acts15:8 LeModimo, yo a tsebago dipelo, o ba hlatsetse lea ba fa Moya wo Mokgethwa, go no swana le ge a re dirile;" 
Acts15:9 O se ke wa dira phapano magareng ga rena le bona, o hlwekise dipelo tsa bona ka tumelo." 
Acts15:10 Bjale, ke ka baka la’ng o kgopela Modimo gore a bee joko molaleng wa barutiwa, yeo rena le borakgolokhukhu ba rena re sa kgonego go e rwala?" 
Acts15:11 Eupsa re dumela gore re tla pholoswa ka kgaugelo ya Morena Jesu Keresete, go swana le bona." 
Acts15:12 Ke moka lesaba ka moka la homola, la theetsa Baranaba le Paulo lela bolela mehlolo le mehlolo yeo Modimo a e dirilego ka bona gare ga ditshaba." 
Acts15:13 Ka morago ga ge ba homotse, Jakobo a araba a re: Banna le bana beso, ntheetseng!" 
Acts15:14 Simeone o ile a bolela ka moo Modimo a ilego a etela Baditshaba pele go ba tsea setshaba sa leina la gagwe. 
Acts15:15 Lemantsu a baporofeta a dumelelana le se; bjalo ka ge go ngwadilwe. 
Acts15:16 Ka morago ga moo ke tla boa ka tsosolosa tente ya Dafida yeo e welego; ke tla tsosolosa marope a yona ka e tsosa. 
Acts15:17 E le gore masaledi a setshaba a tsome Morena le Baditshaba ka moka bao leina la ka le bitswago ka bona,” go bolela Jehofa yo a dirago dilo tse ka moka." 
Acts15:18 Ditiro tsa gagwe ka moka di tsebja ke Modimo go tloga mathomong a lefase. 
Acts15:19 Ka gona kahlolo ya ka ke gore ga re tshwenye bao ba sokologilego go Modimo go tswa gare ga baheitene. 
Acts15:20 Eupsa re ba ngwalele gore ba se ke ba silafatswa ka medimo ya diswantsho le bootswa le go kgangwa le madi. 
Acts15:21 Gobane Moshe wa bogologolo o na le motseng o mongwe le o mongwe bao ba mmotsago, mola ba balwa ka letsatsi le lengwe le le lengwe la Sabatha disinagogeng." 
Acts15:22 Ke moka baapostola le bagolo gotee le phuthego ka moka ba thabela go romela banna bao ba kgethilwego go tswa sehlopheng sa bona Antiokia gotee le Paulo le Barnaba; Judase o ile a rea Barsaba le Silase, banna ba bagolo gare ga bana babo rena." 
Acts15:23 Ba ngwala mangwalo ka bona ka tsela ye; Baapostola le bagolo le bana babo rena ba dumedisa bana babo rena ba ditshaba Antiokia le Siria le Kilikia. 
Acts15:24 Go ya kamoo re kwelego ka gona, ba bangwe bao ba ilego ba tswa go rena ba ile ba le tshwenya ka mantsu leba le nyatsa meoya ya lena, ba re: Le swanetse go bolotswa lele boloke molao; bao re sa ba nee taelo e bjalo;" 
Acts15:25 Go be go bonala e le mo gobotse gore rena bao re bego re kopane, re romele banna ba ba kgethilwego go lena gotee le Baranaba le Paulo bao re ba ratago." 
Acts15:26 Banna bao ba ilego ba bea maphelo a bona kotsing ka baka la Leina la Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete. 
Acts15:27 Ka gona re rometse Judase le Silase, bao le bona ba tlago go le botsa ka molomo." 
Acts15:28 Gobane Moya o Mokgethwa le rena e be e le mo gobotse gore re se ke ra le rwesa morwalo o mogolo go feta dilo tse tse bohlokwa; 
Acts15:29 gore le se je dijo tseo di dirilwego dihlabelo tsa medimo ya diswantsho, le madi le tse di kgangwago le bootswa; lege le ka ipolokela, le tla dira gabotse. Na go sepela gabotse." 
Acts15:30 Ge ba rometswe, ba fihla Antiokia; ge ba kgobokeditse lesaba, ba isa lengwalo." 
Acts15:31 Ge ba bala, ba thabiswa ke khomotso yeo." 
Acts15:32 Judase le Silase, bao le bona e bego e le baporofeta, ba kgothatsa bana babo rena ka mantsu a mantsi leba ba tiisa." 
Acts15:33 Ka morago ga gore ba dule lefelong le lengwe moo, bana babo bona ba romelwa ka khutso go baapostola." 
Acts15:34 Eupsa Silase a kgahlisa go dula moo. 
Acts15:35 Paulo le Baranaba le bona ba ile ba dula Antiokia legotee le ba bangwe ba bantsi ba ithuta le go bolela lentsu la Morena. 
Acts15:36 Matsatsi a sego kae ka morago ga moo, Paulo a re go Barnaba: “A re boele re etele bana babo rena motseng o mongwe le o mongwe wo re bego re bolela lentsu la Morena go wona, re bone kamoo ba phelago ka gona." 
Acts15:37 Barnaba a tsea sephetho sa go tsea Johane, yoo leina la gagwe la mafelelo e bego e le Mareka." 
Acts15:38 Eupsa Paulo ga se a ka a bona e le mo gobotse go mo tsea le yena, yo a ilego a tloga go bona kua Pamfilia lea se ye go soma le bona." 
Acts15:39 Kgang ya bona ya ba e soro kudu moo ba ilego ba aroganya yo mongwe le yo mongwe leBarnaba a tsea Mareka a sesa a ya Tsipero. 
Acts15:40 Ke moka Paulo a kgetha Silase, a tloga, a kgothaletsa bana babo rena gore ba mo gaugelwe ke Modimo." 
Acts15:41 A phatsa Siria le Kilikia, a tiisa diphuthego." 
Acts16:1 Ke moka a fihla Derebe le Lisitara, lego be go na le morutiwa yo mongwe yo a bitswago Timotheo, morwa wa mosadi yo mongwe, yo e bego e le mosadi wa Mojuda e bile e le modumedi; eupsa tatagwe e be e le Mogerika." 
Acts16:2 Se se begilwego gabotse ke bana babo rena bao ba bego ba le Lisitara le Ikonia. 
Acts16:3 Paulo o be a tla swanelwa ke go tswa le yena; a mo tsea a mo bolotsa ka baka la Bajuda bao ba bego ba le tikologong yeo, ka gobane ba be ba tseba tsohle gore tatagwe e be e le Mogerika." 
Acts16:4 Ge ba dutse ba phatsa metse, ba gafela melao yeo e bego e beilwe ke baapostola le bagolo bao ba bego ba le Jerusalema." 
Acts16:5 Ka gona diphuthego tsa tiisa tumelong letsa oketsega ka palo letsatsi le letsatsi. 
Acts16:6 Ge ba phatsa Frigia le tikologong ya Galatia, ba thibelwa ke Moya o Mokgethwa go bolela lentsu kua Asia." 
Acts16:7 Ka morago ga ge ba fihlile Misia, ba leka go ya Bithinia, eupsa Moya wa se ba dumelele." 
Acts16:8 Bao ba fetago Misia ba theogela Teroase. 
Acts16:9 Pulo a bonala pono bosego; Go be go eme monna yo mongwe yo a tswago Matsedonia a mo rapela a re: Etla Matsedonia o re thuse. 
Acts16:10 Ka morago ga ge a bone pono yeo, re ile ra leka go ya Matsedonia gateetee, ra kgobokanya ka kgonthisetso ya gore Morena o re biditse gore re ba bolele Ebangedi." 
Acts16:11 Ka gona, ge re tloga Teroase, ra fihla Samotrase ka tsela e otlologilego leletsatsing le le latelago ra fihla Neapoli." 
Acts16:12 Go tloga moo go ya Filipi, yeo e lego motse-mosate wa naga yeo ya Matsedonia, le koloni; ra dula motseng woo matsatsi a itsego." 
Acts16:13 Ka Sabatha re ile ra tswa motseng wo o lego kgauswi le noka, moo go bego go na le thapelo; lera dula fase ra boledisana le basadi bao ba bego ba dula moo." 
Acts16:14 Re kwele mosadi yo mongwe yo a bitswago Lidia, morekisi wa diaparo tse diphepolo go tswa motseng wa Tiatira, yo a bego a rapela Modimo; yo Morena a ilego a bula pelo ya gagwe, gore a hlokomele tse di boletswego ka Paulo." 
Acts16:15 Ge a kolobeditswe le ba lapa la gagwe, o ile a re kgopela lea re: Ge e ba le ahlotse gore ke a botega go Jehofa, tla ntlong ya ka le dule moo. Leo ile a re tswalela." 
Acts16:16 Ya re ge re be re eya go rapela, ngwanenyana yo mongwe yo a bego a na le moya wa bonoge, a tla go re gahlanetsa, yo a bego a hweditse tshelete e ntsi go beng ba gagwe ka bonoge." 
Acts16:17 A latela Paulo le rena, a goeletsa a re: Banna ba ke bahlanka ba Modimo yo Godimodimo, bao ba re bontshago tsela ya pholoso." 
Acts16:18 Lese a se dira matsatsi a mantsi. Eupsa Paulo yo a bego a nyamile, a retologa a re go moya: Ke go laela ka Leina la Jesu Keresete gore o tswe go yena. Lea tswa ka yona nako yeo." 
Acts16:19 Ge beng ba yona ba bona gore kholofelo ya poelo ya bona e fedile, ba swara Paulo le Silase ba ba gogela lepatlelong la mmaraka go babusi." 
Acts16:20 Ba ba tlisa go bomaseterata ba re: Banna ba, bao e lego Bajuda, ba thatafatsa motse wa rena kudu." 
Acts16:21 Rutang meetlo yeo re sa dumelelwago go e amogela goba go e boloka, ka gobane re Baroma." 
Acts16:22 Lesaba la ba tsogela gotee lebabusi ba gagola diaparo tsa bona leba laela gore ba ba bethe. 
Acts16:23 Ka morago ga ge ba ba otlile ka bontsi, ba ba lahlela kgolegong leba laela mohlapetsi wa kgolego gore a ba boloke." 
Acts16:24 Bao ba ilego ba amogela taelo e bjalo, ba ba lahlela kgolegong ya ka gare leba tlema maoto a bona dikoteng." 
Acts16:25 Bosegogare Paulo le Silase ba rapela leba opelela Modimo ditheto lebagolegwa ba e kwa. 
Acts16:26 Gateetee gwa ba le tshisinyego e kgolo ya lefase, moo metheo ya kgolego e ilego ya sikinyega, legateetee mejako ka moka ya bulwa leditlemo tsa yo mongwe le yo mongwe tsa lokollwa." 
Acts16:27 Ge mohlokomedi wa kgolego a tsoga borokong lea bona mejako ya kgolego e butswe, a ntsha tshosa ya gagwe lenkabe a ipolaile ge nkabe a ile a nagana gore bagolegwa ba tshabile." 
Acts16:28 Eupsa Paulo a goeletsa ka lentsu le le hlabosago, a re: “O se ke wa ikgobatsa, gobane ka moka ga rena re mo." 
Acts16:29 Ke moka a bitsa lebone, a tlolela ka gare, a tla a thothomela, a wela fase pele ga Paulo le Silase." 
Acts16:30 A ba ntsha a re: “Barena, ke swanetse go dira eng gore ke pholoswe?" 
Acts16:31 Leba re: Dumela go Morena Jesu Keresete, leo tla pholoswa, le ba lapa la gago." 
Acts16:32 Ba bolela lentsu la Jehofa go yena le bohle bao ba bego ba le ntlong ya gagwe. 
Acts16:33 Ka yona nako yeo ya bosego a ba tsea a ba hlatswa dintho; lea kolobetswa gateetee, yena le bohle ba gagwe." 
Acts16:34 Ka morago ga ge a ba tlisitse ka ntlong ya gagwe, a ba beela dijo lea thaba ka ge a be a dumela go Modimo le ntlo ya gagwe ka moka." 
Acts16:35 Ge e setse e le mosegare, bomaseterata ba roma bahlanka gore ba re: Lesa banna bao ba sepele." 
Acts16:36 Mohlokomedi wa kgolego a botsa Paulo lentsu le a re: Bamaseterata ba romile gore ba go lokolle; ke moka tloga gona bjale leo sepele ka khutso. 
Acts16:37 Eupsa Paulo a re go bona: “Ba re bethile rena Baroma pepeneneng ntle le kahlolo, ba re lahlela kgolegong; lebjale ba re kgoromeletsa ka ntle ka sephiring? aowa ka nnete; eupsa a ba tle ba re tlise ka bobona." 
Acts16:38 Bahlanka ba botsa bomaseterata mantsu a, ba tshoga ge ba ekwa gore ke Baroma." 
Acts16:39 Ba tla ba ba lopa, ba ba ntsha, ba ba kgopela gore ba tloge motseng." 
Acts16:40 Ba tswa kgolegong ba tsena ka ntlong ya Lidia; ge ba bona bana babo rena, ba ba homotsa, ba tloga." 
Acts17:1 Ge ba feta Amfipoli le Apollonia, ba fihla Thesalonika, moo go bego go na le sinagoge ya Bajuda." 
Acts17:2 Paulo a tsena go bona ka matsatsi a mararo a ba boledisana ka Mangwalo. 
Acts17:3 Bula o tiisetse gore Keresete o swanetse go ba a ile a tlaisega lea tsoga bahung; le gore Jesu yo ke le rerago ke Keresete. 
Acts17:4 Ba bangwe ba bona ba ba badumedi leba dumelelana le Paulo le Silase; le go Bagerika ba ba boifago Modimo lesaba le legolo, le go basadi ba bagolo e sego ba sego kae." 
Acts17:5 Eupsa Bajuda bao ba bego ba sa dumele ba ile ba hufegela, leba tsea banna ba bangwe ba dihlong ba mohuta wa tlasana, ba kgoboketsa lesaba leba dira gore motse ka moka o hlakahlakane, ba hlasela ntlo ya Jasone leba leka go ntsha batho." 
Acts17:6 Ge ba sa ba hwetse, ba gogela Jasone le bana babo ba bangwe go babusi ba motse leba goeletsa ba re: Bao ba fetositsego lefase le bona ba tlile mo;" 
Acts17:7 Yeo Jasone a e amogetsego, leka moka ga bona ba thulana le ditaelo tsa Kesara ka go bolela gore go na le kgosi e nngwe, e lego Jesu." 
Acts17:8 Ba tshosa batho le babusi ba motse ge ba ekwa ditaba tse. 
Acts17:9 Ge ba tsere tshireletso go Jasone le go ba bangwe, ba ba lokolla." 
Acts17:10 Gateetee bana babo rena ba roma Paulo le Silase bosego ba ya Berea; ba tla moo sinagogeng ya Bajuda. 
Acts17:11 Ba be ba na le seatla se se bulegilego go feta ba kua Thesalonika, ka ge ba be ba amogela lentsu ka botho ka moka leletsatsi le letsatsi ba hlahloba Mangwalo go bona ge e ba dilo tse di le bjalo." 
Acts17:12 Ka gona ba bantsi ba bona ba dumela; gape le tsa basadi ba ba hlomphegago bao e bego e le Bagerika, le tsa banna, e sego ba sego kae." 
Acts17:13 Eupsa ge Bajuda ba Thesalonika ba tseba gore lentsu la Modimo le boletswe ke Paulo kua Berea, le bona ba tla moo leba tsosa setshaba." 
Acts17:14 Gateetee bana babo rena ba roma Paulo gore a ye lewatleng. Eupsa Silase le Timotheo ba be ba sa dutse ba le moo. 
Acts17:15 Bao ba bego ba etelela pele Paulo ba mo isa Athene; ge ba amogetse taelo go Silase le Timotheo gore ba tle go yena ka pela, ba tloga." 
Acts17:16 Ge Paulo a be a ba letetse kua Athene, moya wa gagwe wa tutuetswa ka gare ga gagwe ge a bona motse wo o gafetswego borapeding bja medimo ya diswantsho ka mo go feletsego." 
Acts17:17 Ka gona o be a ngangisana sinagogeng le Bajuda le badumedi, le letsatsi le letsatsi mmarakeng le bao ba gahlanago le yena." 
Acts17:18 Ke moka boradifilosofi ba bangwe ba Baepikure le ba Bastoiki ba kopana le yena. Ba bangwe ba re: “Mohlabani yo o tla reng? ba bangwe, go bonala e le sehlongwa sa medimo ye e sa tlwaelegago, ka baka la gore o ba rerile ka Jesu le tsogo." 
Acts17:19 Ba mo tsea ba mo tlisa kua Areopago ba re: Na re ka tseba gore thuto ye e mpsha yeo o bolelago ka yona ke eng? 
Acts17:20 Gobane o tlisa dilo tse dingwe tse di sa tlwaelegago pele ga ditsebe tsa rena; ka nako yeo re be re tla tseba seo dilo tse di se bolelago. 
Acts17:21 (Gobane Baathene ka moka le basele bao ba bego ba le moo ba be ba sa fetse nako ya bona ba le selo ge e se go bolela goba go kwa selo se sefsa). 
Acts17:22 Ke moka Paulo a ema gare ga mmoto wa Mars, a re: Banna ba Athene, ke bona gore le tumela-khwele kudu dilong ka moka." 
Acts17:23 Gobane ge ke feta ke bona bokgopo bja gago, ka hwetsa aletare yeo e ngwadilwego gore: “Ya Modimo yo a sa Tsebjego.” Ke yena yo le mo rapelago ka go hloka tsebo, yena ke le rerela yena." 
Acts17:24 Modimo yo a dirilego lefase le tsohle tse di lego go lona, ka ge e le Morena wa legodimo le lefase, ga a dule ditempele tseo di dirilwego ka diatla;" 
Acts17:25 Le gona ga a rapelwe ka diatla tsa batho bjalo ka ge eka o nyaka selo, ka gobane o nea bohle bophelo le mohemo le tsohle;" 
Acts17:26 LeO dirile ka madi a tee ditshaba ka moka tsa batho gore di dule lefaseng ka moka, lea beakanya e sa le pele dinako tse itsego le mellwane ya lefelo la bona la bodulo;" 
Acts17:27 Gore ba be ba tla nyaka Morena, ge nkabe ba ka kgona go mo lemoga leba mo hwetsa, le ge a se kgole le yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa rena." 
Acts17:28 Ka baka la gore go Yena re phela, re a sutha ebile re gona; bjalo ka ge ba bangwe ba direti tsa gago le bona ba boletse: Gobane le rena re bana ba gagwe." 
Acts17:29 Ka ge ka nako yeo re le bana ba Modimo, ga se ra swanela go nagana gore Bomodimo bo swana le gauta goba silifera goba leswika leo le betlilwego ka bokgabo le leano la motho." 
Acts17:30 Ka morago ga dinako tsa go hloka tsebo mo Modimo a tshosa mahlo; eupsa bjale o laela batho ka moka gohle gore ba sokologe. 
Acts17:31 Ka gobane o beile letsatsi leo ka lona a tlago go ahlola lefase ka toko ka monna yo a mo beilego; yeo a ilego a nea batho ka moka kgonthisetso ka yona ka go mo tsosa bahung. 
Acts17:32 Ge ba ekwa ka tsogo ya bahu, ba bangwe ba kwera, leba bangwe ba re: Re tla le kwa gape ka taba ye." 
Acts17:33 Ke moka Paulo a tloga gare ga bona. 
Acts17:34 Eupsa banna ba bangwe ba mo latela leba dumela, bao ba bego ba na le Dionisio, Moareopage, le mosadi yo a bitswago Damari, le ba bangwe bao ba bego ba na le bona." 
Acts18:1 Ka morago ga dilo tse Paulo a tloga Athene a fihla Korinthe; 
Acts18:2 A hwetsa Mojuda yo mongwe yo a bitswago Akhwila, yo a belegetswego Ponto, yo a sa tswago go tswa Italy, a na le mosadi wa gagwe Prisila. (Ka gobane Klaudio o be a laetse Bajuda ka moka gore ba tloge Roma) lea tla go bona." 
Acts18:3 Ka ge e be e le wa mosomo o tee, o ile a dula le bona lea soma, ka gobane ka mosomo wa bona e be e le badiri ba ditente." 
Acts18:4 A bea mabaka ka Sabatha e nngwe le e nngwe sinagogeng, a kgodisa Bajuda le Bagerika." 
Acts18:5 Ge Silase le Timotheo ba etswa Matsedonia, Paulo a gateletsega moyeng lea hlatsela Bajuda gore Jesu ke Keresete." 
Acts18:6 Ge ba ganetsa le go rora, a sisinya diaparo tsa gagwe a re go bona: Madi a lena a dihlogong tsa lena! Ke hlwekile, go tloga bjale go ya pele ke tla ya go Bantle." 
Acts18:7 A tloga moo, a tsena ka ntlong ya monna yo mongwe yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Justo, yo a bego a rapela Modimo, yoo ntlo ya gagwe e kopanego ka thata le sinagoge." 
Acts18:8 Keresepo, molaodi wa sinagoge, a dumela go Morena le ntlo ya gagwe ka moka. Lebontsi bja Bakorinthe ba ekwa se ba ile ba ba badumedi leba kolobetswa." 
Acts18:9 Morena a bolela le Paulo ponong bosego a re: O se ke wa boifa, eupsa bolela o se ke wa homola." 
Acts18:10 Gobane ke na le lena, lega go na motho yo a tlago go le hlasela gore a le gobatse, ka gobane ke na le batho ba bantsi motseng wo." 
Acts18:11 A dula moo ngwaga le dikgwedi tse tshela lea ruta lentsu la Modimo gare ga bona. 
Acts18:12 Ge Gallio e be e le mohlankedi wa Akaya, Bajuda ba tsogela Paulo ka kwano e tee leba mo isa sedulong sa kahlolo." 
Acts18:13 A re: Monna yo o kgodisa batho go rapela Modimo kgahlanong le molao. 
Acts18:14 Ge Paulo a nyaka go bula molomo wa gagwe, Gallio a re go Bajuda: Ge e le taba ya phoso goba dihlong tse kgopo, lena Bajuda, gona ke swanetse go le kgotlelela." 
Acts18:15 Eupsa ge e ba e le taba ya mantsu le maina le molao wa gago, e hlokomele; gobane nka se be moahlodi wa ditaba tse bjalo." 
Acts18:16 A ba raka sedulong sa kahlolo. 
Acts18:17 Ke moka Bagerika ka moka ba tsea Sostenese, molaodi wa sinagoge, ba mo betha pele ga sedulo sa kahlolo. Galio ga se a ka a hlokomela le se tee sa dilo tseo." 
Acts18:18 Ke moka Paulo a dula moo lebakanyana ka morago ga moo, a laelana le bana babo, a tloga moo a ya Siria, a na le yena Prisila le Akhwila. A beola hlogo kua Kenkerea, ka gobane o be a na le keno." 
Acts18:19 A tla Efeso a ba tlogela moo; eupsa yena ka nosi a tsena sinagogeng a boledisana le Bajuda. 
Acts18:20 Ge ba be ba nyaka gore a dule le bona nako e telele, a se dumele;" 
Acts18:21 Eupsa ba laelana leba re: Go sa setswe gore ke swanetse go keteka monyanya wo o tlago Jerusalema, eupsa ke tla boela go lena ge e ba Modimo a rata. A tloga Efeso ka sekepe." 
Acts18:22 Ka morago ga ge a fihlile Kesarea, a rotoga a dumedisa phuthego, a theogela Antiokia." 
Acts18:23 Ka morago ga gore a fetse nako ye nngwe moo, a tloga a phatsa naga ka moka ya Galatia le Frigia ka tatelano, lea matlafatsa barutiwa ka moka." 
Acts18:24 Mojuda yo mongwe yo a bitswago Apollo, yo a belegetswego Alexandria, monna yo a nago le bokgoni bja go bolela le yo a nago le matla a Mangwalo, a tla Efeso." 
Acts18:25 Monna yo o rutilwe tseleng ya Morena; lea fisega moyeng, o be a bolela ka mafolofolo le go ruta dilo tsa Morena, ka gobane o be a tseba fela kolobetso ya Johane."
