Ephesians6:9 Gomme, bahlomphegi, le dire dilo tse di swanago go bona, ntle le go ba tshosetsa, ka gobane le a tseba gore Mong wa lena le yena o legodimong; gape ga go na tlhompho ya batho bao ba nago le yena." 
Ephesians6:10 Mafelelong bana beso, tiang Moreneng le matla a gagwe." 
Ephesians6:11 Apara ditlhamo tse di tletsego tsa Modimo, gore le kgone go ema kgahlanong le maano a Diabolo." 
Ephesians6:12 Gobane ga re lwe le nama le madi, eupsa re lwantshana le babusi, le mebuso, le babusi ba leswiswi la lefase le, le bobe bja moya bjo bo lego godimo." 
Ephesians6:13 Ka gona, tsea ditlhamo tse di tletsego tsa Modimo, gore le kgone go ganetsa letsatsing la bobe leka morago ga ge le phetha tsohle, le kgone go ema." 
Ephesians6:14 Ka gona, ema, o rwele matheka a gago ka thereso, o apere sefapano sa toko;" 
Ephesians6:15 Maoto a lena a apesitswe dieta tsa go lokisetsa Ebangedi ya khutso; 
Ephesians6:16 Go feta tsohle, tsea kotse ya tumelo yeo o tla kgonago go tima mesebe ka moka ya mollo ya ba kgopo ka yona." 
Ephesians6:17 Le tsea kefa ya pholoso le tshosa ya Moya, le ke lentsu la Modimo." 
Ephesians6:18 Rapela ka mehla ka thapelo ka moka le ka kgopelo ka Moya, le e hlokomele ka kgotlelelo ka moka le ka kgopelo ka moka bakeng sa bakgethwa ka moka;" 
Ephesians6:19 Le nna, ke fiwe kahlolo, gore ke bule molomo wa ka ka sebete, ke tsebise sephiri sa Ebangedi." 
Ephesians6:20 Ke motseta yo a tlemilwego ka ditlemo, gore ke bolele ka sebete go yona ka mo ke swanetsego go bolela ka gona." 
Ephesians6:21 Eupsa e le gore le tsebe ditaba tsa ka le kamoo ke di dirago ka gona, Tigiko, ngwanabo rena yo a rategago le mohlanka yo a botegago Moreneng o tla le tsebisa tsohle." 
Ephesians6:22 Yeo ke le rometsego yona ka morero o swanago, gore le tsebe ditaba tsa rena le gore a homotse dipelo tsa lena." 
Ephesians6:23 Bana babo rena ka khutso le lerato ka tumelo e tswago go Modimo Tate le Morena Jesu Keresete. 
Ephesians6:24 Mogau o be go bohle bao ba ratago Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete ka potego. Amene. (E ngwaletswe Baefeso go tswa Roma, ke Tihiko.)" 
Philippians1:1 Paulo le Timotheo, bahlanka ba Jesu Keresete, le ba bakgethwa bohle ba Keresete Jesu bao ba lego Filipi, gotee le bapisopo le batiakone." 
Philippians1:2 Mogau le khutso go lena go tswa go Modimo Tatago rena le go tswa go Morena Jesu Keresete. 
Philippians1:3 Ke leboga Modimo wa ka ge ke le gopola ka moka. 
Philippians1:4 Ka mehla thapelong ye nngwe le ye nngwe ya ka go lena bohle bao le kgopelago ka lethabo. 
Philippians1:5 Gobane le selalelo sa lena ka Ebangedi go tloga letsatsing la pele go fihla bjale; 
Philippians1:6 Le ge le botile se gabotse, gore Yo a thomilego modiro o mobotse go wena o tla o dira go fihla letsatsing la Jesu Keresete." 
Philippians1:7 Go etsa ge e le mo go swanetsego gore ke nagane ka lena ka moka, ka gobane ke na le lena pelong ya ka; ka ge bobedi ditlemong tsa ka gotee le go sireletsa le go tiisetsa Ebangedi, ka moka ga lena le abela kgaugelo ya ka." 
Philippians1:8 Gobane Modimo ke bohlatse bja ka, gore ke le hlologetse ka moka ga lena ka gare ga mala a Jesu Keresete." 
Philippians1:9 Ke rapela se gore lerato la lena le atlege le go feta tsebong le kahlolong ka moka; 
Philippians1:10 E le gore le amogele dilo tse dibotse kudu; e le gore le tle le be ba botegago le ba sa kgopisego go fihla letsatsing la Keresete; 
Philippians1:11 e tletse ka dienywa tsa toko tseo di tswago ka Jesu Keresete, gore Modimo a tumiswe le go tumiswa." 
Philippians1:12 Eupsa bana beso, ke nyaka gore le kwesise gore dilo tseo di ntiragaletsego e be e le tsa tswelopele ya Ebangedi;" 
Philippians1:13 Ka gona ditlemo tsa ka go Keresete di utollwa ka mosate ka moka le mafelong a mangwe ka moka; 
Philippians1:14 Bana babo rena ba bantsi Moreneng bao ba tshepsago ke ditlemo tsa ka, ba na le sebete kudu sa go bolela lentsu ka ntle le poifo." 
Philippians1:15 Ruri, ba bangwe ba bolela ka Keresete gaesita le ka baka la mona le dingangisano; le ba bangwe le bona ba thato e botse;" 
Philippians1:16 Yo a bolelago ka Keresete ka dingangisano, e sego ka potego, a nagana gore o tla oketsa ditlemo tsa ka ditlemo." 
Philippians1:17 Eupsa yo mongwe o tswa leratong, ka gobane ke tseba gore ke na le tshekamelo ya go lwela Ebangedi." 
Philippians1:18 Bjale go thwe’ng? le ge go le bjalo, ka tsela ye nngwe le ye nngwe, e ka ba ka boikaketsi goba ka thereso, Keresete o rerwa; lego yona ke a thaba, ee, leke tla thaba." 
Philippians1:19 Gobane ke a tseba gore se se tla isa pholosong ya ka ka thapelo ya lena le kabo ya Moya wa Jesu Keresete. 
Philippians1:20 Go ya ka tebelelo ya ka ya go tswa pelong le kholofelo ya ka, gore nka se hlabje ke dihlong ka selo, eupsa Keresete ka sebete ka moka, bjalo ka mehleng, bjale le yena o tla godiswa mmeleng wa ka, e ka ba ka bophelo goba ka lehu." 
Philippians1:21 Go nna go phela ke Keresete, lego hwa ke poelo." 
Philippians1:22 Eupsa ge e ba ke phela nameng, ke dienywa tsa boitapiso bja ka; eupsa seo ke tlago go se kgetha ga ke tsebe." 
Philippians1:23 Gobane ke mathateng magareng ga ba babedi leke kganyoga go tloga ke yo ba le Keresete; yeo e lego kaone kudu: 
Philippians1:24 Eupsa gore o dule o le nameng, o nyaka tse dingwe." 
Philippians1:25 Ka kgodisego ye ke a tseba gore ke tla dula le lena ka moka leka tswela pele bakeng sa tswelopele ya lena le lethabo la tumelo; 
Philippians1:26 E le gore lethabo la lena e be le legolo go nna ka Jesu Keresete ka gobane ke boetse go lena. 
Philippians1:27 Boitshwaro bja lena a di be bjalo ka ge di swanetse Ebangedi ya Keresete, e le gore go sa setswe gore ke tla go le bona goba ke se gona ka tsela e nngwe, ke kgone go kwa ditaba tsa lena, e le gore le eme ka moya o tee, le kopane lele katanele tumelo ya ebangedi;" 
Philippians1:28 Le se ke la tshosa manaba a lena, e lego seo go bona e lego pontsho e kwagalago ya tshenyego, eupsa go lena la pholoso le la Modimo." 
Philippians1:29 Gobane le filwe ka baka la Keresete, e sego feela go dumela go yena, eupsa gape le go tlaisega ka baka la gagwe;" 
Philippians1:30 Ka ntwa ye e swanago le yeo o e bonego go nna, lebjale o kwa gore e go nna." 
Philippians2:1 Ge e ba go na le khomotso le ge e le efe go Keresete, ge e ba go na le khomotso le ge e le efe ya lerato, ge e ba go na le kopanelo le ge e le efe ya Moya, ge e ba go na le ka gare le kgaugelo." 
Philippians2:2 Phethagatsa lethabo la ka, ka ge le na le kgopolo e tee, le na le lerato le tee, le monagano o tee, le monagano o tee." 
Philippians2:3 Go se ke gwa dirwa selo ka baka la ngangisano goba ka lefeela; eupsa yo mongwe le yo mongwe ka boikokobetso a tsee yo mongwe yo a fetago yena. 
Philippians2:4 Yo mongwe le yo mongwe o se ke wa lebelela dilo tsa gagwe, eupsa yo mongwe le yo mongwe le tsa ba bangwe." 
Philippians2:5 Anke boemo bjo bja kgopolo bjo bo bego bo le go Keresete Jesu a be go lena. 
Philippians2:6 Yo a bego a le ka sebopego sa Modimo, ga se a ka a tsea e le bohlakodi go lekana le Modimo." 
Philippians2:7 Eupsa yena ga se a dira phapano, a tsea sebopego sa mohlanka a lekana le batho." 
Philippians2:8 Lege a hweditswe ka sebopego sa motho, O ile a ikokobetsa lea kwa go fihla lehung, e lego lehu la sefapano." 
Philippians2:9 Ka gona Modimo le yena a mo phagamisa kudu, a mo fa leina le le fetago leina le lengwe le le lengwe." 
Philippians2:10 Gore ka Leina la Jesu lengwele le lengwe le le lengwe le be le khunama, la dilo legodimong le tse di lego lefaseng le tse di lego ka fase ga lefase;" 
Philippians2:11 Leleme le lengwe le le lengwe le ipolele gore Jesu Keresete ke Morena, e le gore Modimo Tate a tumiswe." 
Philippians2:12 Ka gona, baratiwa ba ka, bjalo ka ge le be le theeditse ka mehla, e sego bjalo ka ge ke be ke le nosi, eupsa bjale kudu ge ke se gona, itlhamele pholoso ya lena ka poifo le go thothomela." 
Philippians2:13 Gobane ke Modimo yo a somago ka go lena gore le rate le go dira ka mo go mo ratago. 
Philippians2:14 Dira tsohle ntle le go ngunanguna le go ngangisana. 
Philippians2:15 E le gore le be bao ba se nago bosodi le bao ba se nago kotsi, bana ba Modimo, le se ke la kgalemelwa, gare ga setshaba se se kgopamego le se se kgopamego, seo gare ga sona le phadimago bjalo ka mabone lefaseng;" 
Philippians2:16 Boloka lentsu la bophelo pele ga lena; gore ke thabe letsatsing la Keresete, gore ga se ka kitima lefeela lega se ka soma ka lefeela." 
Philippians2:17 Ee, ge e ba ke dirilwe sehlabelo ka sehlabelo le tirelo ya tumelo ya lena, ke thaba le go thaba le lena ka moka." 
Philippians2:18 Ka lona lebaka leo le lena le swanetse go thaba le go thaba le Nna. 
Philippians2:19 Eupsa ke botile Morena Jesu gore o tla romela Timotheo go wena kgauswinyane, gore ke go homotse gabotse ge ke tseba boemo bja gago." 
Philippians2:20 Gobane ga ke na kwano yeo e tlago go hlokomela boemo bja gago. 
Philippians2:21 Gobane bohle ba tsoma tsa bona, e sego tsa Jesu Keresete." 
Philippians2:22 Eupsa le tseba bohlatse bja gagwe, bja gore Yena, bjalo ka morwa le tate, o hlanketse le Nna ka Ebangedi." 
Philippians2:23 Ka gona ke holofela gore ke tla mo roma ka pela ge ke bona gore go tla ba bjang le nna. 
Philippians2:24 Eupsa ke botile Morena gore nna ka nosi ke tla tla kgauswinyane. 
Philippians2:25 Le ge go le bjalo ke ile ka bona go swanetse go le romela Epafrodito, ngwaneso, le modirisani wa ka, le masole-gotee le wena, eupsa e le motseta wa lena le yo a bego a hlankela dinyakwa tsa ka." 
Philippians2:26 Gobane o be a le hlologetse ka moka e bile a tletse manyami, ka gobane le kwele gore o a babja." 
Philippians2:27 Gobane o be a babja go fihla lehung, eupsa Modimo o ile a mo gaugela; e sego go yena feela, eupsa gape le go nna, gore ke se ke ka ba le manyami godimo ga manyami." 
Philippians2:28 Ka gona ka mo roma ka kelohloko le go feta, e le gore ge o mmona gape, o thabe lenna ke se nyame." 
Philippians2:29 Mo amogele Moreneng ka lethabo ka moka; leo sware ba bjalo ka botumo: 
Philippians2:30 Ka gobane o be a le kgaufsi le go hwa ka baka la modiro wa Keresete, e sego mabapi le bophelo bja gagwe, gore a hlokomele go hloka ga lena tirelo go nna." 
Philippians3:1 Mafelelong, bana beso, thabeleng Morena. Go le ngwalela dilo tse di swanago ruri ga se boima go nna, eupsa go wena go bolokegile." 
Philippians3:2 Hlokomelang dimpsa, hlokomela badiri ba babe, le hlokomele bokopana." 
Philippians3:3 Gobane re lebollo, rena bao re rapelago Modimo ka moya, re thabela Keresete Jesu, re sa tshepe nama." 
Philippians3:4 Le ge nka bota nama. Ge e ba motho yo mongwe a nagana gore o na le selo seo a ka se botago nameng, ke sa dutse ke feta:" 
Philippians3:5 Ka letsatsi la seswai a bolotse, wa moloko wa Isiraele, wa moloko wa Benjamini, Moheberu wa Baheberu; mabapi le molao, ke Mofarisei;" 
Philippians3:6 Ge e le phisego, tlaiso ya phuthego; a kgoma toko yeo e lego molaong, a se na bosodi." 
Philippians3:7 Eupsa seo e bego e le poelo go nna, ke ile ka se tsea e le tahlegelo ka baka la Keresete." 
Philippians3:8 Ee, ka ntle le pelaelo, leke lebelela tsohle ge e se kotsi ka baka la go tseba Keresete Jesu, Morena wa ka yo a phalago bohle; ka baka la gagwe ke lahlegetswe ke tsohle leke e batse e le tahlegelo, gore ke hwetse Keresete." 
Philippians3:9 Ke hwetswe go yena, e sego ka toko ya ka yeo e tswago molaong, eupsa yeo e tswago ka tumelo go Keresete, toko yeo e tswago go Modimo ka tumelo." 
Philippians3:10 Gore ke mo tsebe, le maatla a tsogo ya gagwe le kopano ya ditlaisego tsa gagwe, tseo di dirilwego gore di dumelelane le lehu la gagwe;" 
Philippians3:11 Ge nka kgona go fihlelela tsogo ya bahu. 
Philippians3:12 E sego bjalo ka ge eka ke setse ke fihlile goba ke setse ke phethagetse; eupsa ke kitimela go e latela, ge nka kgona go e swara yeo le nna ke ilego ka swarwa ke Keresete Jesu ka baka la yona." 
Philippians3:13 Bana beso, ga ke itseele bjalo ka yo a tserwego; eupsa se se tee ke se dira, ke lebala dilo tse di lego ka morago, ke otlollela diatla go tse di lego ka pele." 
Philippians3:14 Ke kitimela moputsong wa pitso ya Modimo ka Keresete Jesu. 
Philippians3:15 Ka gona, bohle ba ba phethagetsego, anke re naganeng ka tsela yeo, lege le nagana ka selo se sengwe le se sengwe, Modimo o tla le utollela le sona." 
Philippians3:16 Le ge go le bjalo, re setse re fihlile go yona, a re sepeleng go ya ka molao wo o swanago, a re ele hloko selo se se swanago." 
Philippians3:17 Bana beso, ebang balatedi ba ka, le ele hloko bao ba sepelago bjalo ka ge le re bea mohlala." 
Philippians3:18 Gobane ba bantsi ba a sepela, bao ke le boditsego ka bona gantsi, lebjale le ge ba lla ba le botsa gore ke manaba a sefapano sa Keresete." 
Philippians3:19 Bao bofelo bja bona e lego tshenyego, bao Modimo wa bona e lego mpa ya bona, bao letago la bona le lego dihlong tsa bona, bao ba naganago ka dilo tsa lefaseng." 
Philippians3:20 Gobane go sepela ga rena go legodimong; go tloga fao re lebeletse Mopholosi, Morena Jesu Keresete." 
Philippians3:21 Ke yena yo a tlago go fetosa mmele wa rena o mobe, gore o bopege bjalo ka mmele wa gagwe wo o tagafaditswego, go ya ka mokgwa wo a kgonago go ikokobeletsa dilo tsohle ka wona." 
Philippians4:1 Ka gona, bana beso bao ba rategago le bao ba ntlhologelago, lethabo la ka le mphapahlogo wa ka, ema ka go tia kudu Moreneng, baratiwa ba ka ba rategago." 
Philippians4:2 Ke kgopela Euodiase le Sintige gore ba be le kgopolo e tee Moreneng. 
Philippians4:3 Ke go kgopela le wena joko ya nnete, o thuse basadi bao ba somilego le nna Ebangedi, le Clement le basomi mmogo le nna ba bangwe bao maina a bona a lego ka pukung ya bophelo." 
Philippians4:4 Thabela Moreneng ka mehla, leke re gape: Thaba." 
Philippians4:5 Boitshwaro bja gago a bo tsebje ke batho bohle. Morena o kgauswi. 
Philippians4:6 Le se ke la hlokomela selo; eupsa dilong tsohle di tsebiseng Modimo dikgopelo tsa lena ka thapelo le ka kgopelo le tebogo. 
Philippians4:7 Khutso ya Modimo yeo e fetago kwesiso ka moka, e tla disa dipelo tsa lena le menagano ya lena ka Keresete Jesu." 
Philippians4:8 Mafelelong bana beso, selo le ge e le sefe sa thereso, se se botegago, se se lokilego, se se hlwekilego, se se rategago, se se retwago; ge go na le bokwala, lege go na le theto, nagana ka dilo tse." 
Philippians4:9 Dira tse le ithutilego tsona, le di amogetse, le di kwele, le di bonego go nna, leModimo wa khutso o tla ba le lena." 
Philippians4:10 Eupsa ke ile ka thaba kudu Moreneng ka ge bjale le atlega gape mafelelong; yeo go yona le lena le bego le hlokometse, eupsa la hloka sebaka." 
Philippians4:11 E sego gore ke bolela ka go hloka, ka gobane ke ithutile go kgotsofala boemong bjo bongwe le bjo bongwe." 
Philippians4:12 Ke tseba go kokobetswa, e bile ke tseba go ba le boati;" 
Philippians4:13 Ke kgona go dira dilo ka moka ka Keresete yo a mphago maatla. 
Philippians4:14 Le ge go le bjalo o dirile gabotse, gore o boledisane le masetla-pelo a ka." 
Philippians4:15 Bjale le lena Bafilipi, le a tseba gore mathomong a Ebangedi, ge ke be ke tloga Matsedonia, ga go kereke yeo e ilego ya boledisana le nna ka go neela le go amogela, ge e se lena le nnosi." 
Philippians4:16 Gobane le kua Thesalonika le ile la romela leboelela go mpheta. 
Philippians4:17 E sego ka gobane ke kganyoga mpho, eupsa ke kganyoga dienywa tse dintsi ka baka la lena." 
Philippians4:18 Eupsa ke na le tsohle e bile ke atile: Ke kgotsofetse ka ge ke amogetse Epafrodito dilo tse di rometswego go wena, e lego monkgo o bose wa monkgo o bose, sehlabelo se se kgahlisago, se se kgahlisago Modimo." 
Philippians4:19 Eupsa Modimo wa ka o tla le nea dinyakwa ka moka tsa lena go ya ka mahumo a gagwe a letago ka Keresete Jesu. 
Philippians4:20 Bjale letago ke la Modimo le Tatago rena go isa mehleng ya neng le neng. Amene. 
Philippians4:21 Dumedisang mokgethwa yo mongwe le yo mongwe ka go Keresete Jesu. Bana beso bao ba nago le nna ba a le dumedisa. 
Philippians4:22 Bakgethwa ka moka ba a le dumedisa, kudukudu bao e lego ba ntlong ya Kesara." 
Philippians4:23 Mogau wa Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete a e be le lena ka moka. Amene. (E ngwaletswe Bafilipi go tswa Roma, ke Epafrodito.)" 
Colossians1:1 Paulo, moapostola wa Jesu Keresete ka thato ya Modimo, le Timotheo ngwanabo rena." 
Colossians1:2 Go bakgethwa le bana babo rena ba botegago go Keresete bao ba lego Kolose re re: Mogau le khutso go tswa go Modimo Tatago rena le Morena Jesu Keresete. 
Colossians1:3 Re leboga Modimo, Tatago Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete, mola re le rapelela ka mehla." 
Colossians1:4 Ka ge re kwele ka tumelo ya gago go Keresete Jesu le ka lerato leo le ratago bakgethwa ka moka. 
Colossians1:5 Gobane kholofelo yeo le beetswego lena legodimong, yeo le e kwelego pele lentsung la thereso ya Ebangedi;" 
Colossians1:6 yo a tlilego go lena, bjalo ka lefaseng ka moka; le enywa dienywa go etsa ge le dira le lena, go tloga letsatsing leo le kwelego ka lona lela tseba mogau wa Modimo ka thereso." 
Colossians1:7 Go etsa ge le ithutile go Epafrase, mohlanka-gotee le rena yo a rategago, yo e lego mohlanka yo a botegago wa Keresete bakeng sa lena;" 
Colossians1:8 le yena o re tsebisitsego lerato la gago ka Moya. 
Colossians1:9 Ka gona ga re kgaotse go tloga letsatsing leo re e kwelego, go le rapelela le go kganyoga gore le tlale tsebo ya thato ya gagwe ka bohlale ka moka le temogo ya moya;" 
Colossians1:10 E le gore le sepele ka mo go swanelwago ke Morena go tsohle tse di amogelegago, le enywa dienywa medirong ka moka e mebotse lele oketsege tsebong ya Modimo;" 
Colossians1:11 O matlafaditswe ka maatla ka moka, go ya ka maatla a gagwe a letago, go bohle ba go se fele pelo le ba go se fele pelo ka lethabo;" 
Colossians1:12 Re leboga Tate yo a re kgontshitsego go tsea karolo bohwa bja bakgethwa seetseng. 
Colossians1:13 Yena a re hlakodisitsego matleng a leswiswi, a re tlisa Mmusong wa Morwa wa gagwe yo a rategago." 
Colossians1:14 Go yena re na le topollo ka madi a gagwe, ee, tebalelo ya dibe;" 
Colossians1:15 Ke yena seswantsho sa Modimo yo a sa bonagalego, leitsibulo la dibopiwa ka moka;" 
Colossians1:16 Gobane dilo ka moka tse di lego legodimong le lefaseng di bopilwe ka yena, e ka ba ditulo tsa bogosi goba mebuso goba mebuso goba mebuso; dilo ka moka di hlotswe ke Yena le go Yena." 
Colossians1:17 Leo gona pele ga dilo ka moka, leka yena dilo ka moka di gona." 
Colossians1:18 LeKe Hlogo ya mmele, phuthego; ke yena Mathomo, Leitsibulo go tswa bahung; e le gore a be le bophagamo go tsohle." 
Colossians1:19 Gobane go kgahlilwe ke Tate gore go tlala ka moka go dule go Yena; 
Colossians1:20 leka morago ga ge A dirile khutso ka madi a sefapano sa gagwe, ka go boelanya dilo ka moka le Yena; ka Yena, ke re, e ka ba dilo tsa lefaseng goba dilo tsa legodimong." 
Colossians1:21 Le lena, bao le kilego la arogana le manaba dipelong tsa lena ka mediro ye mebe, eupsa bjale o boelane." 
Colossians1:22 Mmeleng wa nama ya gagwe ka lehu, gore a le tsweletse ba le ba bakgethwa le ba se nago bosodi le ba se nago bosodi mahlong a gagwe;" 
Colossians1:23 Ge e ba le dula le tiile tumelong, le sa aroga kholofelong ya Ebangedi yeo le e kwelego le yeo e boletswego dibopiwa ka moka tse di lego ka tlase ga legodimo; yeo nna Paulose ke ilego ka dirwa modiredi wa yona;" 
Colossians1:24 yeo bjale e le thabilego ka baka la ditlaisego tsa ka le yeo e lego ka morago ga ditlaisego tsa Keresete, yeo e phethagaditswego nameng ya ka ka baka la mmele wa gagwe, ke yona kereke." 
Colossians1:25 Ke dirilwe mohlanka wa yona, go ya ka nako ya Modimo yeo ke e filwego ka baka la lena, gore ke phethagatse lentsu la Modimo." 
Colossians1:26 Gaesita le sephiri seo se bego se utilwe go tloga mehleng le meloko, eupsa bjale se utolletswe bakgethwa ba gagwe." 
Colossians1:27 Bao Modimo a bego a nyaka go ba tsebisa mahumo a letago la sephiri se gare ga ditshaba. E lego Keresete mo go lena, kholofelo ya letago." 
Colossians1:28 Re mo tsebatsa ka go lemosa motho yo mongwe le yo mongwe le go ruta yo mongwe le yo mongwe ka bohlale ka moka; gore re dire gore motho yo mongwe le yo mongwe a phethagale go Keresete Jesu. 
Colossians1:29 Le nna ke soma ka thata le go katana go ya ka tiro ya gagwe, yeo e somago ka maatla go nna." 
Colossians2:1 Gobane ke nyaka gore le tsebe gore ke ntwa e kgolo gakaakang yeo ke nago le yona go lena le go bona kua Laoditsea le bohle bao ba sa kago ba bona sefahlego sa ka nameng. 
Colossians2:2 E le gore dipelo tsa bona di homotswe, di tlemilwe gotee ka lerato le mahumo ka moka a kgonthisiso ya monagano, gore ba lemoge sephiri sa Modimo le sa Tate le sa Keresete;" 
Colossians2:3 Go yena go utilwe matlotlo ka moka a bohlale le tsebo. 
Colossians2:4 Se ke se bolela, gore go se be le motho yo a le forago ka mantsu a go goketsa." 
Colossians2:5 Gobane le ge ke se gona nameng, ke na le lena moyeng, ke thaba ke bona thulaganyo ya lena le go tia ga tumelo ya lena go Keresete." 
Colossians2:6 Go etsa ge le amogetse Keresete Jesu, Morena, le sepela ka yena." 
Colossians2:7 Le tsemile medu le go aga ka go Yena, le tiisa tumelong, bjalo ka ge le rutilwe, le go tlala go yona ka ditebogo." 
Colossians2:8 Hlokomelang gore go se be le motho yo a le senyago ka megabaru le ka boradia bja lefeela, go ya ka setso sa batho, go ya ka melao ya motheo ya lefase e sego go ya ka Keresete." 
Colossians2:9 Gobane go yena go dula go tlala ka moka ga Bomodimo mmeleng. 
Colossians2:10 Leo phethagetse go Yena, yo e lego Hlogo ya maatla ka moka le maatla." 
Colossians2:11 Le bolotseng ka lebollo leo le dirilwego ka ntle le diatla ka yena ka go apola mmele dibeng tsa nama ka lebollo la Keresete. 
Colossians2:12 Le bolokilwe le yena kolobetsong, yeo go yona le tsositswego le yena ka tumelo ya go soma ga Modimo yo a mo tsositsego bahung." 
Colossians2:13 Lena bao le hwilego ka baka la dibe tsa lena le go se bolle ga nama ya lena, o phedisitse le yena ka go le lebalela dikarogo tsa lena ka moka;" 
Colossians2:14 Ka go phumola mongwalo wa seatla wa melao yeo e bego e le kgahlanong le rena, le go o tlosa tseleng ka go o kokotela sefapanong sa gagwe;" 
Colossians2:15 Ka morago ga ge a thopile mebuso le mebuso, a di bontsha phatlalatsa lea di fenya go tsona." 
Colossians2:16 Go se be le motho yo a le ahlolago ka dijo goba dino goba mabapi le letsatsi la monyanya goba ngwedi o mofsa goba Sabatha. 
Colossians2:17 E lego moriti wa dilo tse di tlago; eupsa mmele ke wa Keresete. 
Colossians2:18 Go se be le motho yo a le forago ka moputso wa lena ka boikokobetso bja boithatelo le go rapela barongwa, a swahlela dilo tseo a sa kago a di bona, a ikgogomosa ka lefeela ka monagano wa gagwe wa nama." 
Colossians2:19 Le go se kgomarele Hlogo yeo go yona mmele ka moka o hlankelwago le go tlemiwa gotee ka malokololo le ditlemo ka phepo, o oketsege ka go oketsega ga Modimo." 
Colossians2:20 Ka gona ge e ba le hwile le Keresete ka baka la melao ya motheo ya lefase, ke ka baka la’ng le ikokobeletsa melao ya melao, bjalo ka ge eka le phela lefaseng." 
Colossians2:21 (O se ke wa kgoma; o se ke wa latswa; o se ke wa swara; 
Colossians2:22 Ke dife ka moka tseo di tlago go hwelela ka mokgwa;) go ya ka ditaelo le dithuto tsa batho? 
Colossians2:23 Dilo tse dingwe di na le pontsho ya bohlale borapeding bja thato le boikokobetso le go hlokomologa mmele; e sego ka tlhompho le ge e le efe ya go kgotsofatsa nama. 
Colossians3:1 Ka gona ge e ba le tsositswe le Keresete, nyakang dilo tse di lego godimo moo Keresete a dutsego ka letsogong le letona la Modimo." 
Colossians3:2 Bea lerato la gago dilong tsa godimo, e sego dilong tsa lefaseng." 
Colossians3:3 Gobane le hwile, lebophelo bja lena bo utilwe le Keresete go Modimo." 
Colossians3:4 Ge Keresete yo e lego bophelo bja rena a tswelela, gona le lena le tla tswelela le yena ka letago." 
Colossians3:5 Ke moka o bolaye ditho tsa gago tse di lego mo lefaseng; bootswa, ditshila, lerato le le feteletsego, kganyogo e mpe le megabaru, e lego borapedi bja medimo ya diswantsho;" 
Colossians3:6 Ke ka baka la’ng kgalefo ya Modimo e wela bana ba go se kwe. 
Colossians3:7 Le wena le be le sepela go lona ge le be le dula go lona. 
Colossians3:8 Eupsa bjale le lena le lahla dilo tse ka moka; pefelo, pefelo, lehufa, thogako, poledisano e silafetsego go tswa molomong wa gago." 
Colossians3:9 Le se ke la aketsana, ka ge le amogile mokgalabje le mediro ya gagwe;" 
Colossians3:10 O apare motho yo mofsa, yo a mpshafaditswego tsebong ka seswantsho sa Yo a mmopilego." 
Colossians3:11 Moo go se nago Mogerika goba Mojuda, lebollo goba la go se bolle, Mobarbaria, Moskithe, lekgoba goba motho yo a lokologilego, eupsa Keresete ke bohle le go bohle." 
Colossians3:12 Ka gona, apeseng bakgethwa ba Modimo, bakgethwa le baratiwa, le kwelobohloko, botho, boikokobetso, boleta le go se fele pelo;" 
Colossians3:13 Kgotlelelana le go lebalelana ge motho a e-na le ngangisano le motho yo mongwe; bjalo ka ge Keresete a le lebaletse, le lena le swanetse go dira bjalo." 
Colossians3:14 Godimo ga tse ka moka, apeseng lerato, leo e lego tlemo ya phethego." 
Colossians3:15 Anke khutso ya Modimo e buse dipelong tsa lena, yeo le lena le bileditswego go yona ka mmele o tee; leo leboge." 
Colossians3:16 Anke lentsu la Keresete le dule ka mo go humilego ka go lena ka bohlale ka moka; rutaneng le kgothatsana ka dipsalme le difela le dikosa tsa moya, le opele ka mogau dipelong tsa lena bakeng sa letago la Morena." 
Colossians3:17 Se sengwe le se sengwe seo le se dirago ka mantsu goba ka ditiro, dira tsohle ka leina la Morena Jesu lele leboge Modimo le Tate ka yena." 
Colossians3:18 Basadi, ikokobeletse banna ba lena ka mo go swanetsego Moreneng." 
Colossians3:19 Banna, le rate basadi ba lena, le se ke la ba galefela." 
Colossians3:20 Bana, kwang batswadi ba lena dilong tsohle, gobane se se kgahlisa Morena." 
Colossians3:21 Botate, le se ke la kwera bana ba lena e le gore ba se ke ba nolega moko." 
Colossians3:22 Bahlanka, kwang beng ba lena go ya ka nama dilong tsohle; e sego ka tirelo ya mahlo, bjalo ka banna; eupsa ka pelo ye e lokilego, re boifa Modimo." 
Colossians3:23 Se sengwe le se sengwe seo le se dirago, se dire go tswa pelong, bjalo ka ge e le bakeng sa Jehofa, e sego bakeng sa batho;" 
Colossians3:24 Gobane le tseba gore le tla amogela moputso wa bohwa bjo bo tswago go Morena, ka gobane le hlankela Morena Keresete." 
Colossians3:25 Eupsa yo a dirago bobe o tla amogela bobe bjo a bo dirilego, lemotho yoo ga go na tlhompho." 
Colossians4:1 Beng, nea bahlanka ba lena se se lokilego le se se lekanago; le tseba gore le lena le na le Mong legodimong." 
Colossians4:2 Tswela pele ka thapelo leo phakgame go yona ka ditebogo; 
Colossians4:3 Ka go re rapelela gore Modimo a re bulele mojako wa kahlolo gore re tsebatse sephiri sa Keresete seo le nna ke tlemilwego ka sona. 
Colossians4:4 E le gore ke tsebise phatlalatsa ka mo ke swanetsego go bolela ka gona. 
Colossians4:5 Sepela ka bohlale go bao ba lego ka ntle, leo reke nako." 
Colossians4:6 Anke polelo ya lena e be ye botho ka mehla, le gaswa ka letswai, e le gore le tsebe kamoo le swanetsego go araba yo mongwe le yo mongwe ka gona." 
Colossians4:7 Tihiko yo e lego ngwanabo rena yo a rategago, mohlanka yo a botegago le mohlanka-gotee le nna Jehofa, o tla le botsa boemo bja ka ka moka." 
Colossians4:8 Yo ke mo rometsego go lena ka morero o swanago, gore a tsebe dithoto tsa lena lea homotse dipelo tsa lena;" 
Colossians4:9 O na le Onesimo, ngwanabo rena yo a botegago le yo a rategago, yo e lego yo mongwe wa lena. Ba tla go tsebisa tsohle tseo di diregago mo." 
Colossians4:10 Aristareko, mogolegwagotee le nna, o a go dumedisa le Markose, morwa wa kgaetsedi ya Baranaba. (Yo a amogetsego ditaelo tsa gago, ge a ka tla go wena, mo amogele)" 
Colossians4:10 Aristareko, mogolegwagotee le nna, o a go dumedisa le Markose, morwa wa kgaetsedi ya Baranaba. (Yo a amogetsego ditaelo tsa gago, ge a ka tla go wena, mo amogele)" 
Colossians4:11 Le Jesu, yo a bitswago Justo, yo a sa bollago. Ba ba nnosi ke badirisani ba ka Mmusong wa Modimo, bao e bilego khomotso go nna." 
Colossians4:12 Epafora, yo e lego yo mongwe wa lena, mohlanka wa Keresete, o a le dumedisa, ka ge a dula a le somela ka mafolofolo ka dithapelo, e le gore le eme le phethagetse e bile le phethagetse thatong ka moka ya Modimo." 
Colossians4:13 Gobane ke hlatsela ka yena gore o fisegela lena le bao ba lego Laoditsea le bona ba Hierapoli. 
Colossians4:14 Luka, ngaka ye e rategago, le Dema, ba a le dumedisa." 
Colossians4:15 Dumedisang bana babo rena ba kua Laoditsea, le Nimfa le phuthego yeo e lego ka ntlong ya gagwe." 
Colossians4:16 Ge lengwalo le le balwa gare ga lena, anke le balwe le phuthegong ya Balaoditsea; le gore le wena o badile lengwalo leo le tswago Laoditsea." 
Colossians4:17 O re go Aripo: Hlokomela bodiredi bjo o bo amogetsego Moreneng gore o bo phethagatse. 
Colossians4:18 Tumediso ya Paulo ka seatla sa ka. Gopolang dithapo tsa ka tsa diatla. Mohau a be le wena. Amene. (E ngwadilwe go tloga Roma go ya go Bakolose ke Tihiko le Onesimo.) 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulo le Silivano le Timotheo ba ngwalela phuthego ya Bathesalonika bao ba lego go Modimo Tate le Morena Jesu Keresete: Mogau wa lena le khutso go tswa go Modimo Tatago rena le Morena Jesu Keresete. 
1Thessalonians1:2 Ka mehla re leboga Modimo ka baka la lena ka moka lere bolela ka lena dithapelong tsa rena; 
1Thessalonians1:3 Nagana ka mo go sa kgaotsego ka mosomo wa lena wa tumelo le mosomo wa lena wa lerato le kgotlelelo ya kholofelo ya lena go Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete, pele ga Modimo le Tatago rena;" 
1Thessalonians1:4 Ka gobane le a tseba, bana beso ba rategago, lena le kgethilwego ke Modimo." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Gobane Ebangedi ya rena ga se ya tla go lena ka mantsu fela, eupsa gape le ka maatla le ka Moya wo Mokgethwa le ka kgonthisetso ye ntsi; ka ge le tseba gore re bile batho ba mohuta mang gare ga lena ka baka la lena." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Le ile la ba baekisi ba rena le ba Morena, ka morago ga ge le amogetse lentsu masetlapelong a mantsi, ka lethabo la Moya o Mokgethwa." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Ka gona le bile mehlala go bohle bao ba dumelago kua Matsedonia le Akaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Gobane lentsu la Jehofa le ile la foka go tswa go lena, e sego Matsedonia le Akaya feela, eupsa le gohle moo tumelo ya lena go Modimo e bego e katolositswe gona; ka gona ga go nyakege gore re bolele." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Gobane bona ka bobona ba re tsebisitse ka tsela yeo re bilego le yona le lena le kamoo le ilego la tlogela medingwana ya diswantsho go ya go Modimo go hlankela Modimo yo a phelago le wa thereso; 
1Thessalonians1:10 Le go letela Morwa wa gagwe a etswa legodimong, yo a mo tsositsego bahung, e lego Jesu yo a re lopolotsego bogale bjo bo tlago." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Bana beso, lena ka nosi le a tseba gore maiteko a lena ga se a lefeela." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Eupsa gaesita le ka morago ga moo re ile ra tlaisega kua Filipi lera kgopela ka dihlong, bjalo ka ge le tseba, re ile ra ba le sebete go Modimo wa rena go le botsa Ebangedi ya Modimo ka ngangisano e kgolo." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Gobane keletso ya rena e be e se ya boradia goba ditshila goba boradia; 
1Thessalonians2:4 Eupsa bjalo ka ge re dumeletswe ke Modimo go botwa ka Ebangedi, re bolela bjalo; e sego bjalo ka ge re kgahlisa batho, eupsa Modimo a leka dipelo tsa rena." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Gobane le rena ga se ra ka ra dirisa mantsu a go reta, bjalo ka ge le tseba, goba sesiro sa megabaru; Modimo ke hlatse:" 
1Thessalonians2:6 Le gona ga se ra ka ra tsoma tlhompho go batho, le ge e le go lena goba go ba bangwe, mola re be re ka ba baapostola ba Keresete re be re ka ba boima." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Eupsa re be re le boleta go lena, bjalo ka ge mokisi a hlokomela bana ba gagwe." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Ka ge re be re le hlologetse ka lerato, ga se ra ikemisetsa go abelana le lena Ebangedi ya Modimo fela, eupsa le meoya ya rena ka nosi, ka gobane le be le ratega go rena." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Gobane bana beso, le nagana ka boitapiso bja rena le boitapiso bja rena, ka ge re be re soma bosego le bosego, ka ge re be re sa kolota le ge e le ofe wa lena, re ile ra le botsa Ebangedi ya Modimo." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Lena le dihlatse, le Modimo, kamoo re itshwarago ka gona re le ba bakgethwa le ba go loka le ba go hloka bosodi gare ga lena bao ba dumelago." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Go etsa ge le tseba kamoo re ilego ra kgothatsa le go homotsa le go eletsa yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa lena go etsa ge tate a dira bana ba gagwe. 
1Thessalonians2:12 Gore le sepele le swanelega go Modimo, yo a le biditsego mmusong wa gagwe le letagong la gagwe." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Ka gona re leboga Modimo re sa kgaotse, ka gobane ge le amogetse lentsu la Modimo leo le le kwelego go rena, ga se la le amogela bjalo ka lentsu la batho, eupsa bjalo ka ge le le bjalo ka thereso, lentsu la Modimo leo le somago ka maatla. Le go lena bao ba dumelago." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Gobane bana beso, le fetogile baekisi ba diphuthego tsa Modimo tseo di lego Judea ka Keresete Jesu;" 
1Thessalonians2:14 Gobane bana beso, le fetogile baekisi ba diphuthego tsa Modimo tseo di lego Judea ka Keresete Jesu;" 
1Thessalonians2:15 bao ba bolailego Morena Jesu gotee le baporofeta ba bona, ba re tlaisa; lega ba kgahlise Modimo e bile ba ganetsa batho ka moka." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Seo se re thibelago go bolela le Baditshaba gore ba pholoswe, gore ba lefeletse dibe tsa bona ka mehla, ka gobane kgalefo e ba tlile go fihla bokgoleng bjo bo feteletsego." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Eupsa rena bana babo rena bao re ilego ra tloswa go lena ka nako e kopana re le gona, e sego ka pelong, re ile ra tsoma le go feta go bona sefahlego sa lena ka kganyogo e kgolo." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Ke ka baka leo re bego re tla tla go wena, nna Paulo, leboelela; eupsa Sathane o ile a re thibela." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Gobane kholofelo ya rena goba lethabo goba mphapahlogo wa lethabo ke eng? Na le lena ga le gona pele ga Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete ge a etla? 
1Thessalonians2:20 Gobane le letago la rena le lethabo la rena. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Ka gona, ge re se sa kgona go kgotlelela, re ile ra bona e le mo gobotse go tlogelwa re nnosi kua Athene;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 Timotheo, ngwanabo rena le mohlanka wa Modimo, le modirisani wa rena wa Ebangedi ya Keresete, o ile a roma gore a le tiise le go le homotsa tumelong ya lena." 
1Thessalonians3:3 Gore go se be le motho yo a tutuetswago ke diteko tse, ka gobane lena ka nosi le a tseba gore re reretswe tsona." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Gobane ruri ge re be re na le lena, re le boditse pele gore re swanetse go tlaisega; go no swana le ge go diregile, lele a tseba." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ka gona, ge ke be ke se sa kgona go kgotlelela, ka roma gore ke yo ithuta tumelo ya gago, gore moleki a se ke a le leka ka tsela ye nngwe lemosomo wa rena e be wa lefeela." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Eupsa bjale ge Timotheo a tlile go rena go tswa go wena, a re tlisetsa ditaba tse dibotse tsa tumelo ya gago le lerato la gago, le gore o dula o re gopola gabotse e bile o kganyoga kudu go re bona, go etsa ge le rena le lena le tla re bona." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Ka gona, bana beso, re homotswa ka lena masetlapelong le tlalelong ka moka ka tumelo ya lena." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Gobane bjale re phela ge le ema le tiile Moreneng. 
1Thessalonians3:9 Gobane Modimo wa rena a ka le leboga gakaakang gape, ka baka la lethabo ka moka leo re thabelago ka baka la lena pele ga Modimo wa rena;" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Na o rapela kudu bosego le mosegare gore re bone sefahlego sa gago lere tlatse seo se hlaelelago tumelong ya gago? 
1Thessalonians3:11 Eupsa Modimo ka boyena le Tatago rena, le Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete, re hlahla tsela ya rena go lena." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Morena a le oketseng le go ratana le batho ka moka, go etsa ge rena re le rata." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Go fihla mafelelong a a tiise dipelo tsa lena, a se na bosodi ka bokgethwa pele ga Modimo, ee, Tatago rena, ge Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete a boa le bakgethwa ba gagwe ka moka." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Go feta moo, bana beso, re a le kgopela e bile re le kgothatsa ka Morena Jesu gore bjalo ka ge le amogetse go rena kamoo le swanetsego go sepela le go kgahlisa Modimo, ka gona le tla ata ka mo go oketsegilego." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Gobane le tseba ditaelo tse re le filego tsona ka Morena Jesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Gobane ye ke thato ya Modimo, ee, go kgethagatswa ga lena, gore le se ke la bootswa." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Gore yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa lena a tsebe go rua selo sa gagwe ka go kgethagatswa le go hlompsha; 
1Thessalonians4:5 E sego ka kganyogo ya kganyogo, go swana le baheitene bao ba sa tsebego Modimo." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Gore go se be le motho yo a yago pele lea fora ngwanabo tabeng le ge e le efe, ka gobane Morena ke molefetsi wa dilo tse ka moka, bjalo ka ge le rena re le lemositse le go le hlatsela e sa le pele." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Gobane Modimo ga se a re bitsa ditshila, eupsa o re biditse go kgethagatswa." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Ka gona, mang le mang yo a nyatsago, ga a nyatse motho, eupsa ga a nyatse Modimo, yo le yena a re filego Moya wa gagwe o Mokgethwa." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Ge e le lerato la borwarre, ga go nyakege gore ke le ngwalele, ka gobane lena ka nosi le rutilwe ke Modimo go ratana." 
1Thessalonians4:10 O dira se go bana babo rena ka moka bao ba lego Matsedonia ka moka; eupsa bana beso, re a le kgopela gore le oketsege ka mo go oketsegilego;" 
1Thessalonians4:11 Le gore o ithute gore o homole le go dira mediro ya gago le go soma ka diatla tsa gago ka nosi, bjalo ka ge re go laetse;" 
1Thessalonians4:12 e le gore o sepele ka potego le bao ba lego ka ntle, leo se ke wa hloka selo." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Eupsa bana beso, ga ke nyake gore le sa tsebe ka bao ba robetsego, e le gore le se ke la lla go swana le ba bangwe bao ba se nago kholofelo." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Ka gobane ge re dumela gore Jesu o hwile lea tsoga, Modimo o tla tlisa le bao ba robetsego ka go Jesu le yena." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Gobane se re le botsa ka lentsu la Jehofa, gore rena bao ba dulago bophelong go fihlela ge Jehofa a boa, re ka se thibele bao ba robetsego." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Gobane Jehofa ka boyena o tla theoga legodimong ka mokgosi, ka lentsu la morongwa yo mogolo le ka phalafala ya Modimo; lebao ba hwilego go Keresete ba tla tsoga pele." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Ke moka rena bao re setsego re phela re tla iswa le bona marung gore re yo gahlanetsa Jehofa leratadimeng; leka fao re tla dula re na le Morena. 
1Thessalonians4:18 Ka gona, homotsana ka mantsu a." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Eupsa bana beso, ga go nyakege gore ke le ngwalele ka dinako le dinako." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Gobane lena ka nosi le tseba gabotse gore letsatsi la Jehofa le tla bjalo ka lehodu bosego. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Gobane ge ba tla re: Khutso le polokego; ke moka tshenyego ya tshoganetso e ba hlasela bjalo ka pelego ya mosadi wa moimana; mme ba ka se phonyokge. 
1Thessalonians5:4 Eupsa lena bana beso, ga le leswiswing, gore letsatsi leo le se ke la le swara bjalo ka lehodu." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Ka moka ga lena le bana ba seetsa le bana ba mosegare; ga re ba bosego goba ba leswiswi. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Ka gona a re se robale go swana le ba bangwe; eupsa a re phakgameng lere hlaphogelwe monaganong. 
1Thessalonians5:7 Bao ba robalago ba robala bosego; lebao ba tagilwego ba tagwa bosego. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Eupsa rena ba mosegare a re hlaphogelweng ka go apara sefapano sa tumelo le lerato; lebakeng sa kefa, kholofelo ya pholoso." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Gobane Modimo ga se a re laela gore re galefe, eupsa re hwetse pholoso ka Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Yo a re hwetsego, gore go sa setswe gore re tsoga goba re robetse, re kgone go phela le Yena." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Ka gona, homotsana le go agana, bjalo ka ge le lena le dira." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Bana beso, re a le kgopela gore le tsebe bao ba somago ka thata gare ga lena leba le okamela Moreneng, le go le kgothatsa;" 
1Thessalonians5:13 Le go ba tseela godimo kudu ka lerato ka baka la modiro wa bona. Le be le khutso gare ga lena. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Bjale bana beso, re a le kgothatsa, lemosa ba sa lokago, le homotse bao ba fokolago, le thekge bao ba fokolago, le kgotlelele batho ka moka." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Hlokomelang gore go se be le motho yo a busetsago bobe ka bobe; eupsa ka mehla latelang tse dibotse, gare ga lena gotee le go batho bohle." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Ka mehla thaba. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Rapela o sa kgaotse. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Lebogang tsohle, ka gobane ye ke thato ya Modimo ka Keresete Jesu go lena." 
1Thessalonians5:19 O se ke wa tima Moya. 
1Thessalonians5:20 O se ke wa nyatsa diporofeto. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Leka tsohle; swara se sebotse. 
1Thessalonians5:22 Phema diponagalo ka moka tsa bobe. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Modimo wa khutso o tla go dira yo mokgethwa ka mo go feletsego; leke rapela Modimo gore moya wa gago le moya le mmele wa gago di bolokwe di se na bosodi ka mo go feletsego ge Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete a boa. 
1Thessalonians5:24 Yo a le bitsago o a botega, le yena o tla e dira." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Bana beso, re rapelele." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Dumedisang bana babo rena ka moka ka katlo e kgethwa. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ke le laela ka Jehofa gore lengwalo le le balwe bana babo rena ka moka ba bakgethwa. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Mogau wa Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete a be le lena. Amene. (Lengwalo la mathomo leo le yago go Bathesalonika le ngwadilwe go tswa Athene). 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo le Silivano le Timotheo ba ngwalela phuthego ya Bathesalonika ka go Modimo Tatago rena le Morena Jesu Keresete. 
2Thessalonians1:2 Mogau le khutso go lena go tswa go Modimo Tatago rena le Morena Jesu Keresete. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Re tlamegile go leboga Modimo ka mehla ka baka la lena, bana beso, ka mo go swanetsego, ka gobane tumelo ya lena e gola kudu lelerato la yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa lena le atile;" 
2Thessalonians1:4 Ka gona rena ka nosi re ikgantsha ka lena diphuthegong tsa Modimo ka baka la go se fele pelo le tumelo ya lena ditlaisong tsa lena ka moka le ditlaisegong tseo le di kgotlelelago. 
2Thessalonians1:5 E lego pontsho e kwagalago ya kahlolo ya go loka ya Modimo, e le gore le tle le tsewe le le ba swanelwago ke Mmuso wa Modimo wo le o tlaisegago ka baka la wona." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Gobane go loka go Modimo go lefetsa masetla-pelo go bao ba le tshwenyago; 
2Thessalonians1:7 O khutse le rena ka baka la lena bao le gateletswego, ge Morena Jesu a tla utollwa le barongwa ba gagwe ba matla a e-tswa legodimong." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Mollo o tukago mollo wo o itefeletsago bao ba sa tsebego Modimo le bao ba sa kwego Ebangedi ya Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Yena o tla otlwa ka tshenyego ye e sa felego go tswa sefahlegong sa Morena le go tswa letagong la maatla a gagwe; 
2Thessalonians1:10 Ge a etla go tagafatswa ke bakgethwa ba gagwe le go kgahlwa ke bohle bao ba dumelago (ka gobane bohlatse bja rena bo dumetswe gare ga lena) letsatsing leo. 
2Thessalonians1:11 Ke ka baka leo ka mehla re le rapelelago, gore Modimo wa rena a le tsee le le le swanelwago ke pitso ye lea phethagatse dilo ka moka tse di kgahlisago tsa botho bja gagwe le modiro wa tumelo ka matla." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Gore Leina la Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete le tagafatswe go wena le lena go yena go ya ka mogau wa Modimo wa rena le Morena Jesu Keresete. 
2Thessalonians2:1 Bjale bana beso, re a le kgopela ge Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete a boa le ka go bokana ga rena le yena." 
2Thessalonians2:2 Gore le se sisinyege kapejana ka baka la kgopolo goba la tshoga, e sego ka moya goba ka mantsu goba ka mangwalo ao a tswago go rena, ka ge letsatsi la Keresete le batametse." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Go se be le motho yo a le forago ka tsela le ge e le efe, gobane letsatsi leo le ka se fihle go fihlela go eba le bohlanogi lemotho wa sebe a utollwa, morwa wa tshenyego;" 
2Thessalonians2:4 yo a mo ganetsanago le yo a mo phagamisago go feta bohle bao ba bitswago Modimo goba bao ba rapelwago; mo e lego gore a dule bjalo ka Modimo tempeleng ya Modimo lea ipontsha e le Modimo. 
2Thessalonians2:5 Na ga le gopole gore ke le boditse ditaba tse ge ke be ke sa na le lena? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Bjale le tseba seo se e thibelago, gore a utollwe mehleng ya gagwe." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Gobane sephiri sa bokgopo se setse se soma; ke feela yo a diegago bjale yo a tlago go diega go fihlela a tloswa tseleng. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Ke moka yo kgopo o tla utollwa, yo Jehofa a tlago go mo fedisa ka moya wa molomo wa gagwe lea mo fedisa ka go phadima ga go tla ga gagwe." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Gaesita le yo a tlago ka morago ga go dira ga Sathane ka matla ka moka le dipontsho le mehlolo ya maaka. 
2Thessalonians2:10 Le moleko o mongwe le o mongwe wa bokgopo go bao ba hwelelago; ka gobane ga se ba amogela lerato la thereso e le gore ba pholoswe. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Leka fao Modimo o tla ba romela bofora bjo bo tiilego, gore ba dumele maaka." 
2Thessalonians2:12 E le gore bohle bao ba sa dumelego thereso, eupsa ba kgahlwa ke go se loke ba ahlolwe." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Eupsa re tlamegile go leboga Modimo ka mehla ka baka la lena, bana babo rena baratiwa ba Morena, ka gobane Modimo o le kgethile go tloga mathomong gore le pholoswe ka go kgethagatswa ga Moya le tumelo theresong." 
2Thessalonians2:14 O le biditse go yona ka Ebangedi ya rena, gore le hwetse letago la Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Ka gona, bana beso, emang le tiile lele kgomarele ditlwaelo tse le rutilwego ka tsona, e ka ba ka mantsu goba ka lengwalo la rena." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Eupsa Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete ka boyena le Modimo Tatago rena, yo a re ratilego lea re nea khomotso ya ka mo go sa felego le kholofelo e botse ka mogau." 
2Thessalonians2:17 Khomotsa dipelo tsa lena lele itlhatsele ka mantsu a mangwe le a mangwe a mabotse le medirong e nngwe le e nngwe. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Mafelelong, bana beso, re rapeleleng gore lentsu la Morena le tle le elela ka bolokologi le go tagafatswa, go etsa ge le tagafatswa go lena." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Le gore re ka lokollwa bathong ba go hloka tlhaologanyo le ba kgopo, ka gobane ga se bohle bao ba nago le tumelo." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Eupsa Jehofa o a botega, yo a tlago go le matlafatsa le go le thibela bobe." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Re bota Morena yo a go kgomago gore o dira tse re le laelago tsona e bile o tla di dira. 
2Thessalonians3:5 Morena o lebisa dipelo tsa lena leratong la Modimo le go yo a sa felego pelo yo a letetsego Keresete. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Bjale bana beso, re le laela ka leina la Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete gore le ikgogele ngwanabo rena yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a sepelago ka tsela e sa rulaganyetswago e sego go ya ka setso seo a se amogetsego go rena." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Gobane lena ka nosi le tseba kamoo le swanetsego go re latela ka gona, ka gobane ga se ra itshwara ka tsela e sa rulaganyetswago gare ga lena;" 
2Thessalonians3:8 Ga se ra ja bogobe bja motho ka lefeela; eupsa re dira bosego le mosegare ka boitapiso le boiteko, gore re se kolota le ge e le ofe wa lena." 
2Thessalonians3:9 E sego ka gobane re hloka matla, eupsa e le gore re itire mohlala gore le re latele." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Gobane le ge re be re na le lena, re le laetse se: Ge motho a sa nyake go soma, le yena a se ke a ja." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Gobane re kwa gore go na le ba bangwe bao ba sepelago ka tlhakatlhakano gare ga lena leba sa some le gatee, eupsa ba swaregile." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Ba ba bjalo, re laela le go eletsa ka Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete gore ba some ka setu leba je bogobe bja bona." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Eupsa lena bana beso, le se ke la lapa go dira botse." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Ge e ba motho a sa kwe lentsu la rena lengwalong le, ela hloko monna yoo leo se ke wa ba le segwera le yena, e le gore a eme ka dihlong." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Eupsa le se ke la mo tsea e le lenaba, eupsa le mo eletsa bjalo ka ngwaneso." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Morena wa khutso ka mehla o le nea khutso ka ditsela tsohle. Morena o tla ba le lena ka moka. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Tumediso ya Paulo ka seatla sa ka, seo e lego seka mangwalong ka moka: ke ka fao ke ngwalago ka gona." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Mogau wa Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete a e be le lena ka moka. Amene. (Lengwalo la bobedi leo le yago go Bathesalonika le ngwadilwe go tswa Athene). 
1Timothy1:1 Paulo, moapostola wa Jesu Keresete ka taelo ya Modimo Mopholosi wa rena le Morena Jesu Keresete, yo e lego kholofelo ya rena;" 
1Timothy1:2 Timotheo morwa wa ka tumelong: Mogau, kgaugelo le khutso tse di tswago go Modimo Tatago rena le Jesu Keresete Morena wa rena." 
1Timothy1:3 Go etsa ge ke be ke le kgopela gore le dule Efeso, ge ke be ke eya Matsedonia, e le gore le laele ba bangwe gore ba se rute thuto e nngwe." 
1Timothy1:4 Le gona o se ke wa ela hloko dinonwane le masika ao a sa felego ao a hlankelago dipotsiso, go e na le go agwa ga Modimo mo tumelong." 
1Timothy1:5 Bofelo bja taelo ke lerato le le tswago pelong e hlwekilego le letswalo le lebotse le le tswago tumelong e sa itirago. 
1Timothy1:6 Tseo ba bangwe ba arogilego go tsona, ba arogile go dipolelo tsa lefeela;" 
1Timothy1:7 Le kganyoga go ba barutisi ba molao; ga ba kwesise seo ba se bolelago goba seo ba se tiisetsago. 
1Timothy1:8 Eupsa re a tseba gore molao ke o mobotse ge motho a o dirisa ka molao; 
1Timothy1:9 Go tseba se gore molao ga se wa direlwa baloki, eupsa o diretswe bao ba hlokago molao le bao ba sa kwego, ba kgopo le badiradibe, ba ba sa kgethwa le ba bakgethwa, babolai ba botate le babolai ba bomme, babolai ba batho." 
1Timothy1:10 Bao ba diotswa, bao ba itshilafatsago ka batho, bahlakodi ba batho, ba maaka, bao ba ikanago maaka, le ge e ba go na le selo se sengwe seo se thulanago le thuto e kwagalago;" 
1Timothy1:11 Go ya ka Ebangedi ya letago ya Modimo yo a segofaditswego, yeo ke e gafetswego." 
1Timothy1:12 Leke leboga Keresete Jesu, Morena wa rena, yo a nkgontshitsego, gore o ntebe ke botega ka go mpea bodireding;" 
1Timothy1:13 Pele e be e le mosenyi, motlaisi le modiri wa bobe, eupsa ke ile ka gaugela, ka gobane ke ile ka dira seo ke sa tsebe ka go se dumele." 
1Timothy1:14 Mogau wa Morena wa rena wa tlala kudu ka tumelo le lerato leo le lego go Keresete Jesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Ke lentsu le le ka botwago le tshwanelo ya go amogelwa, gore Keresete Jesu o tlile lefaseng go pholosa badiradibe; yo ke lego hlogo ya gagwe." 
1Timothy1:16 Eupsa ka fao ke ile ka hwetsa kgaugelo, gore Jesu Keresete pele ga tsohle a kgone go bontsha go se fele pelo ka moka ka go nna, bjalo ka mohlala go bao ka morago ga fao ba bego ba tla dumela go yena go ya bophelong bjo bo sa felego." 
1Timothy1:17 Bjale go Kgosi, yo a sa felego, yo a sa hwego, yo a sa bonagalego, Modimo a nnosi yo bohlale, e be tlhompho le letago go isa mehleng ya neng le neng. Amene." 
1Timothy1:18 Morwa Timotheo, ke go gafela thomo ye go ya ka diporofeto tse di tlilego pele ga gago, gore o tle o lwe ntwa ye botse ka yona;" 
1Timothy1:19 Ka tumelo le letswalo le lebotse; yeo ba bangwe ka baka la tumelo ba e tlositsego, ya tlisa go robega ga sekepe." 
1Timothy1:20 Ba bona ke Himeneus le Alexander; yeo ke e gafetsego Sathane, gore ba ithute go se ke ba nyefola." 
1Timothy2:1 Ka gona ke kgothaletsa gore mathomong ditopelo, dithapelo, dikgopelo le ditebogo di swanetse go dirwa bakeng sa batho ka moka;" 
1Timothy2:2 Bakeng sa dikgosi le bohle bao ba nago le matla a taolo; e le gore re phele bophelo bjo bo homotsego le bja khutso ka borapedi ka moka le potego. 
1Timothy2:3 Gobane ke mo gobotse le mo go amogelegago mahlong a Modimo, Mopholosi wa rena;" 
1Timothy2:4 yo a nyakago gore batho ka moka ba pholoswe leba tle ba tsebe thereso. 
1Timothy2:5 Gobane go na le Modimo o tee le Mmoelanyi o tee magareng ga Modimo le batho, e lego motho Keresete Jesu;" 
1Timothy2:6 yo a ilego a ineela e le topollo ya gore bohle ba hlatselwe ka nako e swanetsego. 
1Timothy2:7 Ke kgethilwe go ba moreri le moapostola (ke bolela thereso ka Keresete, ga ke bolele maaka;) morutisi wa ditshaba ka tumelo le thereso." 
1Timothy2:8 Ka gona ke nyaka gore batho gohle ba rapele leba emise diatla tse kgethwa, ba sa galefe goba ba belaele." 
1Timothy2:9 Ka mo go swanago, basadi ba ikgabise ka diaparo tsa maemo a godimo, ka dihlong le ka go hlaphogelwa; e sego ka meriri ya go loga, goba gauta, goba dipheta, goba diaparo tse di bitsago tshelete e ntsi;" 
1Timothy2:10 Eupsa (bao ba fetogago basadi bao ba ipolelago gore ba borapedi) ka mediro e mebotse. 
1Timothy2:11 Mosadi a ithute ka setu ka boikokobetso ka moka. 
1Timothy2:12 Eupsa ga ke dumelele mosadi go ruta goba go laola monna, eupsa ke homole." 
1Timothy2:13 Ka gobane Adama o bopilwe pele, ke moka Efa." 
1Timothy2:14 Adama ga se a forwa, eupsa mosadi yo a forilwego o be a le molatong." 
1Timothy2:15 Lega go le bjalo, o tla pholoswa pelegong, ge e ba ba dula ba le tumelong le leratong le bokgethwa ka go hlaphogelwa." 
1Timothy3:1 Polelo ye ke ya nnete: Ge motho a kganyoga ofisi ya mopisopo, o kganyoga mosomo wo mobotse." 
1Timothy3:2 Mopisopo ka gona o swanetse go ba yo a se nago bosodi, monna wa mosadi o tee, yo a phakgamego, yo a hlaphogetswego monaganong, yo a nago le boitshwaro bjo bobotse, yo a amogelago baeng, yo a kgonago go ruta;" 
1Timothy3:3 ga se ba ineela beine, ga se bafisi ba nama, ga ba na megabaru ya go hwetsa poelo ya ditshila; eupsa go se fele pelo, e sego mongangisi, e sego wa megabaru;" 
1Timothy3:4 Yo a busago ntlo ya gagwe gabotse lea kwa bana ba gagwe ka go tia; 
1Timothy3:5 (Gobane ge motho a sa tsebe go busa ntlo ya gagwe, o tla hlokomela phuthego ya Modimo bjang?)" 
1Timothy3:6 E sego motho yo a thomago, gore a se ke a ikgogomosa ka kahlolo ya Diabolo." 
1Timothy3:7 Go feta moo, o swanetse go ba le pego e botse ya bao ba lego ka ntle; gore a se ke a wela kgobosong le moreong wa Diabolo." 
1Timothy3:8 Ka mo go swanago, batiakone ba swanetse go ba ba ba hlomphegago, ba se be ba maleme a mabedi, ba sa ineele beine e ntsi, ba se ke ba ba le megabaru ya go hwetsa poelo ya ditshila;" 
1Timothy3:9 Boloka sephiri sa tumelo ka letswalo le le hlwekilego. 
1Timothy3:10 Le bona a ba lekwe pele; ke moka a ba somise ofisi ya motiakone, mola ba hwetswa ba se na bosodi." 
1Timothy3:11 Ka mo go swanago, basadi ba bona ba swanetse go ba bao ba hlomphegago, e sego ba go senya leina, bao ba hlaphogetswego monaganong, ba botegago dilong tsohle." 
1Timothy3:12 Batiakone e be banna ba mosadi o tee leba buse bana ba bona le dintlo tsa bona gabotse. 
1Timothy3:13 Gobane bao ba somisitsego mosomo wa motiakone ba ithekele tekanyo e botse le sebete se segolo tumelong ya Keresete Jesu. 
1Timothy3:14 Ke le ngwalela dilo tse ka kholofelo ya go tla go lena kgauswinyane. 
1Timothy3:15 Eupsa ge e ba ke diegile nako e telele, e le gore le tsebe kamoo le swanetsego go itshwara ka gona ka ntlong ya Modimo, e lego phuthego ya Modimo yo a phelago, kokwane le motheo wa thereso." 
1Timothy3:16 Sephiri sa borapedi ke se segolo ka ntle le ngangisano: Modimo o utolotswe nameng, a lokafaditswe ka Moya, a bonwa ke barongwa, a bolelwa go Baditshaba, a dumela lefaseng, a rotoswa ka letago." 
1Timothy4:1 LeMoya o bolela ka go lebanya gore mehleng ya bofelo ba bangwe ba tla wa tumelong leba ela hloko meoya ya go goketsa le dithuto tsa batemona; 
1Timothy4:2 Go bolela maaka ke boikaketsi; gore letswalo la bona le fisitswe ka tshipi e fisago; 
1Timothy4:3 e iletsa go nyala lee laela go ila dijo tseo Modimo a di hlotsego gore di amogelwe ka ditebogo go tswa go bao ba dumelago le go tseba thereso. 
1Timothy4:4 Gobane sebopiwa se sengwe le se sengwe sa Modimo ke se sebotse lega se selo seo se ka ganwago ge se amogelwa ka ditebogo. 
1Timothy4:5 Gobane e kgethagatswa ka lentsu la Modimo le ka thapelo. 
1Timothy4:6 Ge o ka gopotsa bana babo rena ka dilo tse, o tla ba mohlanka wa Jesu Keresete yo mobotse, o fepsa ka mantsu a tumelo le thuto ye botse yeo o fihlilego go yona." 
1Timothy4:7 Eupsa gana dinonwane tse di sa kgethwago le tsa bakgekolo, o itlwaetse borapedi bja Modimo." 
1Timothy4:8 Gobane go itshidulla ga go holege ganyenyane, eupsa borapedi bo hola tsohle, ka kholofetso ya bophelo bjo bo lego gona bjale le bja bophelo bjo bo tlago." 
1Timothy4:9 Le ke lentsu leo le ka botwago lele swanelwa ke go amogelwa. 
1Timothy4:10 Gobane ke ka baka leo re somago ka thata gotee le go goboswa, ka gobane re botile Modimo yo a phelago, yo e lego Mopholosi wa batho ka moka, kudukudu wa bao ba dumelago." 
1Timothy4:11 Laela o rute dilo tse. 
1Timothy4:12 Go se be le motho yo a nyatsago bofsa bja gago; eupsa e be mohlala wa badumedi ka mantsu, poledisanong, leratong, moya, tumelong, go hlweka." 
1Timothy4:13 Go fihlela ge ke etla, ela hloko go bala, kgothatso, go ruta." 
1Timothy4:14 O se ke wa hlokomologa mpho yeo e lego go wena, yeo o e filwego ka boporofeta, le ge o beilwe palamonwana." 
1Timothy4:15 Naganisisa ka dilo tse; Iphe ka botlalo go bona; e le gore mohola wa gago o bonagale go bohle. 
1Timothy4:16 Itlhokomele le thuto; dula go yona, gobane ka go dira bjalo o tla ipholosa gotee le bao ba go theetsago." 
1Timothy5:1 O se ke wa kgalema mogolo, eupsa o mo lopa bjalo ka tate; le masogana e le bana babo rena;" 
1Timothy5:2 Basadi ba bagolo bjalo ka bomme; ba banyenyane bjalo ka dikgaetsedi, ka bohlweki ka moka." 
1Timothy5:3 Hlompha bahlologadi bao e lego bahlologadi e le ka kgonthe. 
1Timothy5:4 Eupsa ge e ba mohlologadi a na le bana goba bana ba ngwanabo, a ba thome ka go ithuta go bontsha borapedi ka gae le go lefa batswadi ba gagwe; gobane ke se sebotse e bile se amogelega go Modimo." 
1Timothy5:5 Mohlologadi yo e lego lesope e le ka kgonthe, o bota Modimo leo dula bosego le mosegare a lopelo le dithapelong." 
1Timothy5:6 Eupsa yo a phelago ka lethabo o hwile ge a sa phela. 
1Timothy5:7 Dilo tse di nea taolo, gore ba se be le bosodi." 
1Timothy5:8 Eupsa ge e ba motho a sa itlhokomele, kudu-kudu ba lapa la gagwe, o latola tumelo leo mobe go feta yo a sa dumelego." 
1Timothy5:9 Mohlologadi a se ke a phela ka tlase ga nywaga e masometshela yo e bego e le mosadi wa monna o tee. 
1Timothy5:10 O tsebja kudu ka mediro e mebotse; ge e ba a be a godisa bana, ge a be a tlogela basele, ge a be a hlatswa dinao tsa bakgethwa, ge a be a hlakodisa badiidi, ge a be a ekisa mediro ka moka e mebotse ka mafolofolo." 
1Timothy5:11 Eupsa bahlologadi ba banyenyane ba gana; 
1Timothy5:12 ka go ahlolwa, ka gobane ba ile ba gana tumelo ya bona ya pele." 
1Timothy5:13 Gape ba ithuta go se dire selo le go lelera ka ntlo le ntlo; lee sego feela bao ba sa dirego selo, eupsa gape le batsweletsi ba ditlakala le batho bao ba swaregilego bao ba bolelago dilo tseo ba sa swanelago go bolela." 
1Timothy5:14 Ka gona ke nyaka gore basadi ba bafsa ba nyale, ba belege bana, ba etele pele ntlo, ba se ke ba nea lenaba lebaka la go senya leina." 
1Timothy5:15 Gobane ba bangwe ba setse ba arogile ka morago ga Sathane. 
1Timothy5:16 Ge e ba monna goba mosadi yo a dumelago a na le bahlologadi, a ba thuse lephuthego e se ke ya latofatsa; gore e pholose bao e lego bahlologadi e le ka kgonthe." 
1Timothy5:17 Anke bagolo bao ba busago gabotse ba tsewe e le bao ba swanelwago ke go hlompsha gabedi, kudukudu bao ba itapisago ka lentsu le thutong." 
1Timothy5:18 Ka gobane Lengwalo le re: O se ke wa kgoma molomo wa kgomo yeo e folago mabele. Le: Mosomi o swanelwa ke moputso wa gagwe. 
1Timothy5:19 O se ke wa latofatsa mogolo, eupsa pele ga dihlatse tse pedi goba tse tharo." 
1Timothy5:20 Ba kgalema sebe pele ga bohle, gore ba bangwe le bona ba boife." 
1Timothy5:21 Ke le ena pele ga Modimo le Morena Jesu Keresete le barongwa bao ba kgethilwego gore le boloke dilo tse le sa ikgethele yo mongwe lele se ke la dira selo ka go beba sefahlego. 
1Timothy5:22 O se ke wa bea motho diatla gateetee, leo se ke wa tsea karolo dibeng tsa batho ba bangwe; ipoloke o hlwekile." 
1Timothy5:23 O se sa nwa meetse, eupsa dirisa beine e nyenyane ka baka la mpa ya gago le malwetsi a gago a kgafetsakgafetsa." 
1Timothy5:24 Dibe tsa batho ba bangwe di bulegile e sa le pele ledi tswa pele ga kahlolo; le banna ba bangwe ba ba latela. 
1Timothy5:25 Ka mo go swanago mediro e mebotse ya ba bangwe e utollwa e sa le pele; lebao ba fapanego ba ka se ute. 
1Timothy6:1 Bahlanka ba bantsi bao ba lego ka tlase ga joko a ba lebelele beng ba bona e le bao ba swanelwago ke tlhompho ka moka, gore Leina la Modimo le thuto ya gagwe di se ke tsa goboswa." 
1Timothy6:2 Ba ba nago le beng ba ba botegago, le se ke la ba dumelela go ba nyatsa, ka gobane ke bana babo rena; eupsa go e na le moo, ba hlankele, ka gobane ke ba botegago le baratiwa, ba tseago tse botse. Dilo tse di ruta le go kgothatsa." 
1Timothy6:3 Ge e ba motho yo mongwe a ruta lea sa dumele mantsu a go lokisa, e lego mantsu a Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete, le ka thuto ya borapedi;" 
1Timothy6:4 O a ikgogomosa, ga a tsebe selo, eupsa o rata dipotsiso le dingangisano tsa mantsu, tseo go tsona go tswago mona, dingangisano, go senya leina, dipelaelo tse mpe;" 
1Timothy6:5 Dingangisano tse di sothegilego tsa batho bao ba nago le menagano e gobogilego le bao ba hlokago thereso, ba nagana gore poelo ke borapedi; gogela morago go tse bjalo." 
1Timothy6:6 Eupsa borapedi bja Modimo gotee le kgotsofalo ke poelo e kgolo. 
1Timothy6:7 Gobane ga se ra tlisa selo lefaseng le, lego kgonthiseditswe gore ga re kgone go rwala selo." 
1Timothy6:8 Le ka dijo le diaparo, a re kgotsong ka tsona." 
1Timothy6:9 Eupsa bao ba nyakago go huma ba wela molekong le moreong le dikganyogong tse dintsi tsa bosilo le tse kotsi tseo di nweletsago batho tshenyegong le kgobogong. 
1Timothy6:10 Gobane megabaru ke modu wa bobe ka moka; mola ba bangwe ba be ba e kganyoga, ba ile ba aroga tumelong leba itlhaba ka manyami a mantsi." 
1Timothy6:11 Eupsa wena monna wa Modimo, tshabela dilo tse; le phegelela toko, borapedi, tumelo, lerato, kgotlelelo, boleta." 
1Timothy6:12 Lwang ntwa e botse ya tumelo, swarele bophelo bjo bo sa felego, bjoo le lena le bileditswego go bjona, lela ipobola gabotse pele ga dihlatse tse dintsi." 
1Timothy6:13 Ke nea taelo ya gago pele ga mahlo a Modimo, yo a phedisago dilo ka moka le pele ga Keresete Jesu, yo a ilego a ipobola gabotse pele ga Pontio Pilato." 
1Timothy6:14 Gore le boloke taelo ye ka ntle le bosodi le ka ntle le bosodi go fihlela ge Morena wa rena Jesu Keresete a tswelela. 
1Timothy6:15 Seo a tlago go se bontsha mehleng ya gagwe, yo e lego yo a segofaditswego le yo a nnosi yo a nago le Maatla, Kgosi ya dikgosi le Morena wa marena;" 
1Timothy6:16 Ke yena a nnosi yo a nago le go se hwe, yo a dulago seetseng seo go se nago motho yo a ka batamelago go sona; yeo go se nago motho yo a e bonego e bile a sa kgone go e bona; e be letago le maatla a go ya go ile. Amene." 
1Timothy6:17 Lapisa bahumi lefaseng le gore ba se ikgogomose, ba se tshepe mahumo a sa kgonthisegego, eupsa ba tshepe Modimo yo a phelago, yo a re fago tsohle ka bohumi gore re ipshine ka tsona;" 
1Timothy6:18 gore ba dire botse, ba humile medirong e mebotse, ba rata go abelana, ba rata go abelana;" 
1Timothy6:19 le ba beele motheo o mobotse wa nako ye e tlago, e le gore ba sware bophelo bjo bo sa felego." 
1Timothy6:20 Wena Timotheo, disa seo o se gafetswego, o pheme dipolelo tse kgopo le tsa lefeela le dikganetso tsa thutamahlale tseo di bitswago ka maaka." 
1Timothy6:21 Seo ba bangwe bao ba ipobotsego ba fosa tumelong. Mogau o be le wena. Amene. (Ya pele go Timotheo e ngwadilwe go tswa Laoditsea, yeo e lego motse o bohlokwa kudu wa Frigia Pacatiana.)" 
2Timothy1:1 Paulo, moapostola wa Jesu Keresete ka thato ya Modimo, go ya ka kholofetso ya bophelo bjo bo lego go Keresete Jesu." 
2Timothy1:2 Go Timotheo, morwa wa ka yo a rategago: Mogau, kgaugelo le khutso go tswa go Modimo Tate le Keresete Jesu Morena wa rena." 
2Timothy1:3 Ke leboga Modimo gore ke hlankela borakgolokhukhu ba ka ka letswalo le le hlwekilego, gore ke go nagana ke sa kgaotse dithapelo tsa ka mosegare le bosego;" 
2Timothy1:4 Ke hlologetse go go bona, ke gopola megokgo ya gago, gore ke tlale lethabo;" 
2Timothy1:5 Ge ke gopola tumelo yeo e sa itirago yo a lego go wena, yeo e ilego ya thoma go phela go koko wa gago Loïs le mmago Eunice; lele nna ke kgodisegile ka seo go wena." 
2Timothy1:6 Ka gona ke le gopotsa gore le ntsha mpho ya Modimo yeo e lego go lena ka go bea diatla tsa ka. 
2Timothy1:7 Gobane Modimo ga se a re fa moya wa poifo; eupsa ya matla le lerato le boitshwaro. 
2Timothy1:8 O se ke wa hlabja ke dihlong ka baka la bohlatse bja Morena wa rena goba ka nna mogolegwa wa gagwe, eupsa o tsee karolo ditlaisegong tsa Ebangedi go ya ka matla a Modimo;" 
2Timothy1:9 o re pholositse lea re bitsa ka pitso e kgethwa, e sego ka mediro ya rena, eupsa go ya ka morero wa gagwe le kgaugelo ya gagwe yeo re e neilwego ka Keresete Jesu pele lefase le thoma." 
2Timothy1:10 Eupsa bjale e utollwa ka ponagalo ya Mopholosi wa rena, Jesu Keresete, yo a fedisitsego lehu, a tlisa bophelo le go se hwe seetseng ka Ebangedi." 
2Timothy1:11 Ke ile ka kgethwa go ba mmoledi le moapostola le morutisi wa ditshaba. 
2Timothy1:12 Ke ka baka leo le nna ke tlaisegago ka dilo tse; le ge go le bjalo ga ke hlabje ke dihlong; gobane ke tseba yo ke dumetsego go yena, leke kgodisegile gore o kgona go boloka seo ke mo gafetsego sona go fihla letsatsing leo." 
2Timothy1:13 Swarela ka go tia sebopego sa mantsu a kwagalago ao le a kwelego go nna, ka tumelo le lerato leo le lego go Keresete Jesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Selo se sebotse seo le se gafetswego se bolokwa ke Moya o Mokgethwa wo o phelago ka go rena. 
2Timothy1:15 Se le a se tseba, gore bohle bao ba lego Asia ba nthibela; bao ba bona e lego Phygellus le Hermogenes." 
2Timothy1:16 Morena o gaugela ntlo ya Onesiforo; ka gobane gantsi o be a ntapolosa lea se ke a hlabja ke dihlong ka ketane ya ka. 
2Timothy1:17 Eupsa ge a be a le Roma, o ile a nnyaka ka mafolofolo lea nkhwetsa." 
2Timothy1:18 Morena o mo dumelela gore a hwetse kgaugelo go Morena letsatsing leo; leka dilong tse ntsi tse A mphereletsego ka gona kua Efeso, le tseba gabotse kudu." 
2Timothy2:1 Ka gona, wena morwa wa ka, o tie mogau wo o lego go Keresete Jesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Leseo le se kwelego ka Nna gare ga dihlatse tse dintsi, le fetisetsa se go banna ba botegago, bao le bona ba tlago go kgona go ruta ba bangwe." 
2Timothy2:3 Kgotlelela thata, bjalo ka lesole le lebotse la Jesu Keresete." 
2Timothy2:4 Ga go motho yo a lwantshanago yo a itlelago le ditaba tsa bophelo bjo; gore a kgahlise yo a mo kgethilego gore e be lesole. 
2Timothy2:5 Ge e ba motho a katanela bokgoni, ga a rweswe mphapahlogo, ka ntle le ge a ka lwantshana ka molao." 
2Timothy2:6 Molemi yo a somago o swanetse go hwetsa karolo ya pele dienyweng. 
2Timothy2:7 Ela hloko seo ke se bolelago; mme Morena o le fa temogo ya tsohle. 
2Timothy2:8 Gopolang gore Jesu Keresete wa lesika la Dafida o tsositswe bahung go ya ka Ebangedi ya ka. 
2Timothy2:9 Mo go yona ke tlaisega, bjalo ka modiri wa bobe, go fihla ditlemong; eupsa lentsu la Modimo ga le tlemilwe." 
2Timothy2:10 Ka baka leo ke kgotlelela tsohle ka baka la bakgethwa, e le gore le bona ba hwetse pholoso yeo e lego go Keresete Jesu ka letago le le sa felego." 
2Timothy2:11 Le ke lentsu leo le ka botwago: Gobane ge re hwile le yena, re tla phela le yena." 
2Timothy2:12 Ge re tlaisega, le rena re tla busa le Yena; ge re Mo latola, le yena o tla re latola." 
2Timothy2:13 Ge re sa dumele, yena o dula a botega; a ka se kgone go itatola." 
2Timothy2:14 O ba gopotse taba ye leo ba eletsa pele ga Morena gore ga ba ngangisane ka mantsu a go hloka mohola, eupsa ba fedise batheetsi." 
2Timothy2:15 Ithute go itlhagisa o lekwa pele ga Modimo, o le mosomi yo a sa nyakego go hlabja ke dihlong, yo a aroganyago lentsu la thereso ka mo go swanetsego." 
2Timothy2:16 Eupsa phema dipolelo tse di sa kgethwago le tsa lefeela, ka gobane di tla oketsega go ba bokgopo bjo bo oketsegilego." 
2Timothy2:17 Lentsu la bona le tla ja bjalo ka kankere; ba bona ke Himeneuse le Fileto; 
2Timothy2:18 gore ba fositse mabapi le thereso ka go bolela gore tsogo e setse e fetile; le go menola tumelo ya ba bangwe. 
2Timothy2:19 Eupsa motheo wa Modimo o tiile ka tiiso ye: Morena o tseba bao e lego ba gagwe. Gomme: Yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a reago leina la Keresete a a tloge bokgopong. 
2Timothy2:20 Eupsa ka ntlong e kgolo ga go na dibjana tsa gauta le tsa silifera feela, eupsa gape le tsa kota le tsa lefase; le ba bangwe go hlompha leba bangwe ba go hlompha." 
2Timothy2:21 Ge e ba motho le ge e le ofe a ka itlhwekisa go se, o tla ba yo a hlompshago, a kgethagatswa le go swanelega go diriswa ke Morena, lea itokiseletsa modiro o mongwe le o mongwe o mobotse." 
2Timothy2:22 Le tshabela dikganyogo tsa bofsa, eupsa phegelela toka, tumelo, lerato, khutso le bao ba bitsago Morena ka dipelo tse di hlwekilego." 
2Timothy2:23 Eupsa masilo le batho ba sa rutegago ba phema dipotsiso, ka gobane ba tseba gore ba lwa le morafe." 
2Timothy2:24 Mohlanka wa Morena a se ke a ngangisana; eupsa o be boleta go batho bohle, o kgone go ithuta, o se fele pelo," 
2Timothy2:25 Ba ikganetsanago ruta ka boleta; ge Modimo mohlomongwe a ka ba fa tshokologo ya go lemoga thereso; 
2Timothy2:26 Le gore ba tle ba fole moreong wa Diabolo, yo a ilego a thopsa ke yena ka thato ya gagwe." 
2Timothy3:1 Tseba gape gore mehleng ya bofelo go tla ba le dinako tse thata. 
2Timothy3:2 Gobane setshaba e tla ba barati ba bona ka nosi, ba megabaru, ba ikgantsha, ba ikgogomosago, ba go senya leina, ba sa kwego batswadi, ba sa leboge, ba sa kgethwa." 
2Timothy3:3 Ka ntle le lerato la tlhago, khutso, balatofatsi ba maaka, bao ba sa kgonego go itshwara, ba sehlogo, ba nyatsegago ba ba lokilego;" 
2Timothy3:4 Baeki, ba manganga, ba ikgogomosago, ba ratago maipshino go feta barati ba Modimo;" 
2Timothy3:5 Ba na le sebopego sa borapedi, eupsa ba latola maatla a bjona; furalela ba bjalo." 
2Timothy3:6 Gobane ke ba mohuta wo bao ba khukhunelago ka dintlo leba isa basadi ba masilo mathopsa, ba imetswe ke dibe, ba iswa ke mehuta ka moka ya dikganyogo." 
2Timothy3:7 Ka mehla o ithuta e bile a ka se tsoge a fihlile tsebong ya thereso. 
2Timothy3:8 Go etsa ge Jane le Jambrese ba be ba ganetsa Moshe, le bona ba ganetsa thereso." 
2Timothy3:9 Eupsa ba ka se tswele pele, ka gobane bosilo bja bona bo tla utollwa batho ka moka, go etsa ge bo bona bo ile bja utollwa." 
2Timothy3:10 Eupsa le be le tseba ka botlalo thuto ya ka, tsela ya bophelo, morero, tumelo, kgotlelelo, lerato, kgotlelelo," 
2Timothy3:11 Ditlaiso, diteko tseo di ilego tsa ntlhasela kua Antiokia, Ikonia, Lisitara; ke ditlaiso tse kaakang tseo ke di kgotleletsego, eupsa Morena o mpholositse go tsona ka moka." 
2Timothy3:12 Ee, bohle bao ba nyakago go phela ka tsela ya Modimo go Keresete Jesu ba tla tlaiswa." 
2Timothy3:13 Eupsa batho ba babe le baratisi ba tla mpefala le go feta, ba tla forwa le go forwa." 
2Timothy3:14 Eupsa na o dula o le dilong tseo o ithutilego tsona le tseo o kgonthiseditswego ka tsona, ka gobane o tseba gore o ithutilwe go bona;" 
2Timothy3:15 Le gore go tloga bjaneng o tseba Mangwalo a Makgethwa ao a ka go dirago gore o hlalefetse pholoso ka tumelo go Keresete Jesu. 
2Timothy3:16 Mangwalo ka moka a filwe ke Modimo lea hola go ruta, go ganetsa, go kgalema le go ruta toko." 
2Timothy3:17 E le gore motho wa Modimo e be yo a phethagetsego, a hlamilwe ka mo go feletsego bakeng sa mediro ka moka e mebotse." 
2Timothy4:1 Bjale ke le ena pele ga Modimo le Morena Jesu Keresete, yo a tlago go ahlola ba ba phelago le bahu ka ponagalo ya gagwe le mmuso wa gagwe;" 
2Timothy4:2 Goeletsa lentsu; e be ka pela ka sehla, ka ntle ga sehla; kgalema, kgalema, kgothatsa ka go se fele pelo ka moka le go ruta." 
2Timothy4:3 Gobane go tla tla nako yeo ka yona ba ka se kgotlelelego thuto e kwagalago; eupsa go ya ka dikganyogo tsa bona ba tla ikgoboketsa barutisi ka ditsebe tse di phopholetswego; 
2Timothy4:4 Ba tla furalela thereso leba retologela dinonwaneng. 
2Timothy4:5 Eupsa phakgame dilong tsohle, kgotlelela ditlaisego, dira modiro wa moebangedi, o nee bohlatse bjo bo tletsego bja bodiredi bja gago." 
2Timothy4:6 Gobane bjale ke itokiseditse go dirwa sehlabelo, lenako ya go tloga ga ka e kgauswi." 
2Timothy4:7 Ke lwetse ntwa e botse, ke feditse tsela ya ka, ke bolokile tumelo." 
2Timothy4:8 Go tloga bjale go ya pele go beeletswe mphapahlogo wa toko wo Morena, Moahlodi wa go loka, a tlago go mpha wona letsatsing leo, e sego go nna ke nnosi, eupsa gape le go bohle bao ba ratago ponagalo ya gagwe." 
2Timothy4:9 Dira sohle seo o ka se kgonago go tla go nna ka pela. 
2Timothy4:10 Gobane Dema o tlogetse nna, ka gobane o be a rata lefase le, lea tloga a ya Thesalonika; Crescens go ya Galatia, Tito go ya Dalmatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Ke Luka feela yo a nago le nna. Tsea Markus o tle le yena, gobane o nthusa bodireding." 
2Timothy4:11 Ke Luka feela yo a nago le nna. Tsea Markus o tle le yena, gobane o nthusa bodireding." 
2Timothy4:12 Ka roma Tihiko Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Seaparo seo ke se tlogetsego kua Karapese kua Troase, ge o etla, o tlise le dipuku, eupsa kudukudu matlalo." 
2Timothy4:14 Aleksandere modiri wa koporo o ntiretse bobe kudu, Morena o tla mo lefa ka mediro ya gagwe." 
2Timothy4:15 Le lena le swanetse go hlokomela mang; ka gobane O ile a ganetsa mantsu a rena kudu. 
2Timothy4:16 Ge ke araba la mathomo, ga go na motho yo a ilego a ema kgauswi le nna, eupsa bohle ba ntlogetse;" 
2Timothy4:17 Eupsa Jehofa o ile a ema kgauswi le nna lea ntlafatsa; e le gore ka nna boboledi bo tsebje ka botlalo leBaditshaba ka moka ba kwe; ka pholoswa molomong wa tau. 
2Timothy4:18 Jehofa o tla ntlhakodisa modirong o mongwe le o mongwe o mobe, a ntshireletsa mmusong wa gagwe wa legodimong; letago ke la gagwe go isa mehleng ya neng le neng. Amene." 
2Timothy4:19 Dumedisang Priska le Aquila le ba lapa la Onesiforo. 
2Timothy4:20 Erasto a dula Korinthe, eupsa ka tlogela Trofimo a babja kua Mileto." 
2Timothy4:21 Dira sohle seo o ka se kgonago go tswetsa pele marega. Eubulo o go dumedisa le Pudene le Linuse le Klaudia le bana babo rena ka moka. 
2Timothy4:22 Morena Jesu Keresete a be le moya wa gago. Mohau a be le wena. Amene. (Lengwalo la bobedi leo le yago go Timotheo, yo a kgethilwego bjalo ka mopisopo wa mathomo wa kereke ya Baefeso, le ngwadilwe go tswa Roma ge Paulo a be a tliswa pele ga Nero ka lekga la bobedi)." 
Titus1:1 Paulo mohlanka wa Modimo le moapostola wa Jesu Keresete, ka tumelo ya bakgethwa ba Modimo le go amogela thereso yeo e lego ka morago ga borapedi." 
Titus1:2 Ka kholofelo ya bophelo bjo bo sa felego, bjo Modimo, yo a sa kgonego go bolela maaka, a bo holofeditsego pele lefase le thoma;" 
Titus1:3 Eupsa ka nako ye e swanetsego lentsu la gagwe le ile la utollwa ka boboledi bjo ke bo gafetswego go ya ka taelo ya Modimo, Mopholosi wa rena;" 
Titus1:4 Ke go Tito morwa wa ka go ya ka tumelo ye e swanago: Mogau, kgaugelo le khutso tse di tswago go Modimo Tate le Morena Jesu Keresete, Mopholosi wa rena." 
Titus1:5 Ke ka baka leo ke le tlogetsego kua Kereta, gore le lokise dilo tse di hlaelelago lele kgethe bagolo motseng o mongwe le o mongwe go etsa ge ke le beile." 
Titus1:6 Ge motho a se na bosodi, monna wa mosadi o tee, a na le bana ba botegago bao ba sa latofatswego ka borabele goba go hloka toka." 
Titus1:7 Gobane mopisopo o swanetse go hloka bosodi bjalo ka molaki wa Modimo; e sego ya go ithatela, ya se akgofele go galefa, ga e ineele beine, e sego moreki wa nama, e sego go ineela go hwetsa tshelete e silafetsego;" 
Titus1:8 Eupsa yo a ratago go amogela baeng, yo a ratago batho ba lokilego, yo a hlaphogetswego, yo a lokilego, yo mokgethwa, yo a itshwarago;" 
Titus1:9 Swarela lentsu le le botegago ka mo a rutilwego ka gona, e le gore a kgone go kgothatsa le go kgodisa bao ba ganetsago ka thuto e kwagalago." 
Titus1:10 Gobane go na le batho ba bantsi bao ba bolelago meferefere le bao ba bolelago lefeela le bafora, kudukudu ba lebollo." 
Titus1:11 Molomo wa bona o swanetse go thibelwa, ba phekgolago dintlo ka moka ka go ruta dilo tseo e sego tsa bona, ka baka la poelo ya ditshila." 
Titus1:12 Yo mongwe wa bona, e lego moporofeta wa bona, o ile a re: Bakreta ka mehla ke maaka, dibata tse mpe, dimpa tse di nanyago." 
Titus1:13 Bohlatse bjo ke bja thereso. Ka baka leo, ba kgaleme ka bogale, gore ba phele tumelong;" 
Titus1:14 O se ke wa ela hloko dinonwane tsa Sejuda le ditaelo tsa batho bao ba arogilego theresong. 
Titus1:15 Go bao ba hlwekilego, tsohle di hlwekile, eupsa go bao ba silafetsego le bao ba sa dumelego, ga go selo se se hlwekilego; eupsa gaesita le menagano ya bona le matswalo a bona di silafaditswe." 
Titus1:16 Ba ipolela gore ba tseba Modimo; eupsa medirong ba Mo latola, ka gobane ba makgapha le go se kwe leba gana mediro ye mengwe le ye mengwe ye mebotse." 
Titus2:1 Eupsa bolela dilo tseo e lego thuto e kwagalago. 
Titus2:2 Gore batsofadi ba hlaphogelwe monaganong, ba hlokomele, ba itshwara, ba phetse gabotse tumelong, leratong le go se fele pelo." 
Titus2:3 Ka gona le basadi ba tsofetsego, gore ba itshware bjalo ka ge e le ba bakgethwa, e sego balatofatsi ba maaka, ba sa ineelego beine e ntsi, barutisi ba dilo tse dibotse;" 
Titus2:4 gore ba rute makgarebe go hlaphogelwa, go rata banna ba bona, go rata bana ba bona." 
Titus2:5 Go ba ba bohlale, ba hlwekilego, mohlokomedi wa ntlo, ba ba lokilego, ba kwa banna ba bona, gore lentsu la Modimo le se ke la goboswa." 
Titus2:6 Masogana le ona a kgothaletswa go hlaphogelwa monaganong. 
Titus2:7 Ipontshe go tsohle o le mohlala wa mediro e mebotse, dithutong tsa gore go se senyege, go tia, go botega," 
Titus2:8 Polelo e kwagalago, yeo e ka se kego ya ahlolwa; gore yo a ganetsago a eme a hlabja ke dihlong ka gobane a ka se bolele bobe ka lena." 
Titus2:9 Kgothaletsa bahlanka gore ba kwe beng ba bona leba ba kgahlise gabotse dilong tsohle; o se ke wa araba gape; 
Titus2:10 E sego go sikinyega, eupsa go bontsha tumelo ka moka e botse; e le gore ba kgabise thuto ya Modimo Mopholosi wa rena go tsohle." 
Titus2:11 Gobane kgaugelo ya Modimo yeo e tlisago pholoso e bonagetse bathong ka moka. 
Titus2:12 Le re rute gore, ka go lahla bokgopo le dikganyogo tsa lefase, re swanetse go phela ka go hlaphogelwa, ka go loka le ka go boifa Modimo lefaseng le la bjale;" 
Titus2:13 ge le sa letetse kholofelo yeo e segofaditswego le ponagalo ya letago ya Modimo yo mogolo le Mopholosi wa rena, Jesu Keresete;" 
Titus2:14 yena a ikgafilego ka baka la rena gore a re lopolle dilong ka moka tsa go se loke le go itlhwekisa setshaba sa dithoto, se se fisegelago medirong e mebotse." 
Titus2:15 Bolela ditaba tse leo kgothatse le go kgalema ka matla ka moka. A go se be le yo a go nyatsago. 
Titus3:1 Ba gopole gore ba ikokobeletse babusi le matla, ba kwa bomaseterata, ba itokisetse modiro o mongwe le o mongwe o mobotse." 
Titus3:2 Go se bolele motho, go se be yo a ngangisanago, eupsa go ba boleta, go bontsha boleta ka moka go batho bohle." 
Titus3:3 Gobane le rena ka nosi ka dinako tse dingwe re be re le masilo, re sa kwe, re forwa, re hlankela dikganyogo tsa mehuta ka moka le maipshino, re phela ka lehufa le mona, re hloyana e bile re hloyana." 
Titus3:4 Eupsa ka morago ga moo botho le lerato la Modimo, Mopholosi wa rena, di ile tsa tswelela go motho." 
Titus3:5 E sego ka mediro ya toko yeo re e dirilego, eupsa go ya ka kgaugelo ya gagwe o re pholositse ka go hlapa ka go tswalwa lefsa le go mpshafatswa ga Moya o Mokgethwa;" 
Titus3:6 yeo a re tsholletsego ka bontsi ka Jesu Keresete, Mopholosi wa rena;" 
Titus3:7 Ka ge re lokafaditswe ka kgaugelo ya gagwe, re swanetse go ba bajabohwa go ya ka kholofelo ya bophelo bjo bo sa felego." 
Titus3:8 Le ke lentsu le le botegago, leke nyaka gore le le tiisetse ka mehla, e le gore bao ba dumelago go Modimo ba tle ba hlokomele go boloka mediro e mebotse. Dilo tse ke tse botse e bile di na le mohola go batho." 
Titus3:9 Eupsa phema dipotsiso tsa bosilo le masika le dingangisano le ngangisano mabapi le molao; gobane ga di na mohola e bile ga di na mohola. 
Titus3:10 Monna yo e lego mohlanogi yo a gannwego ka morago ga keletso ya pele le ya bobedi; 
Titus3:11 O a tseba gore yo a swanago le yena o a nyenyefatswa e bile o dira dibe, ka go ahlolwa ka boyena." 
Titus3:12 Ge ke roma Artema goba Tihiko go lena, le fisegele go tla go nna Nikopoli, ka gobane ke ikemiseditse go fetsa marega moo." 
Titus3:13 Tlisa Senase, ramolao le Apolose leetong la bona ka mafolofolo, gore ba se hloke selo." 
Titus3:14 Le gona anke ba rena ba ithute go boloka mediro e mebotse bakeng sa merero e nyakegago, e le gore e se ke ya enywa dienywa."
