2Peter2:12 Eupsa tse, bjalo ka diphoofolo tsa tlhago, tse sehlogo, tseo di dirilwego gore di thopse le go fediswa, di bolela ka bogale ka dilo tseo di sa di kwesisego; leba tla hwelela ka mo go feletsego ka go senyega ga bona;" 
2Peter2:13 Ba tla amogela moputso wa bokgopo, bjalo ka bao ba thabelago meferefere mosegare. Ke masoba le mabala, ba dira monyanya ka boradia bja bona ge ba eja le lena;" 
2Peter2:14 O na le mahlo a tletsego bohlotlolo, le yo a sa kgonego go kgaotsa sebe; meoya e sa tsepamago ya boradia: pelo yeo ba e dirisitsego ka mekgwa ya megabaru; bana ba rogilwego:" 
2Peter2:15 yo a tlogetsego tsela ya go loka lea aroga, e lego tsela ya Bileama, morwa wa Botsore, yo a bego a rata moputso wa bokgopo;" 
2Peter2:16 Eupsa o ile a kgalemelwa ka baka la bobe bja gagwe, pokolo ya semumu yeo e bolelago ka lentsu la motho, ya thibela bohlanya bja moporofeta." 
2Peter2:17 Ke melete yeo e se nago meetse, maru ao a rwalwago ke ledimo; bao mouwane wa leswiswi o bolokilwego ka mo go sa felego." 
2Peter2:18 Gobane ge ba bolela mantsu a magolo a go ruruga a lefeela, ba goketsa ka dikganyogo tsa nama, ka boomo kudu, bao ba bego ba hlwekile, bao ba lokolotswego go bao ba phelago ka phoso." 
2Peter2:19 Le ge ba ba holofetsa tokologo, bona ka nosi ke bahlanka ba tshenyego; gobane motho yo a fenywago ke yena, o tliswa bokgobeng." 
2Peter2:20 Gobane ge ba phonyokgile ditshila tsa lefase ka go tseba Morena le Mopholosi, Jesu Keresete, ba raragane gape go lona leba fenywa, gona bofelo bja mafelelo bo ba mpe go feta bja mathomo." 
2Peter2:21 Gobane go be go le kaone gore ba se tsebe tsela ya toko, go e na le gore ka morago ga go e tseba, ba furalela taelo ye kgethwa yeo ba e filwego." 
2Peter2:22 Eupsa ba diragalela go ya ka seema sa thereso: Mpsa ya fetoga mahlatsa a yona gape; kgobe yeo e bego e hlatswitswe e be e lekeletse ka gare ga leraga. 
2Peter3:1 Baratiwa, lengwalo le la bobedi, bjale ke le ngwalela; tse ka bobedi ke tsosa dikgopolo tsa lena tse di hlwekilego go gopola." 
2Peter3:2 E le gore le gopole mantsu ao a boletswego pele ke baporofeta ba bakgethwa le taelo ya rena baapostola ba Morena le Mopholosi. 
2Peter3:3 Go tseba se pele, gore mehleng ya bofelo go tla tla bakweri bao ba sepelago ka dikganyogo tsa bona." 
2Peter3:4 A re: Tshepiso ya go tla ga gagwe e kae? gobane ga e sa le botate ba robala, dilo ka moka di tswela pele go etsa mathomong a tlholo." 
2Peter3:5 Ka gona ga ba tsebe gore ka lentsu la Modimo magodimo e be e le ya kgale lelefase le eme ka ntle ga meetse le ka meetseng. 
2Peter3:6 Ka yona lefase leo le bego le tletse meetse ka nako yeo le ile la hwelela. 
2Peter3:7 Eupsa magodimo le lefase tse di lego gona bjale di bolokilwe ka lentsu le tee bakeng sa mollo malebana le letsatsi la kahlolo le la phediso ya batho ba kgopo. 
2Peter3:8 Eupsa, baratiwa, o se ke wa hlokomologa selo se tee, gore letsatsi le tee le Morena le swana le mengwaga ye sekete lemengwaga ye sekete e swana le letsatsi le tee." 
2Peter3:9 Morena ga a diege kholofetso ya gagwe, go etsa ge ba bangwe ba lebelela go diega; eupsa o re kgotlelela, ga a rate gore ba bangwe ba hwe, eupsa bohle ba tle ba sokologe." 
2Peter3:10 Eupsa letsatsi la Jehofa le tla tla bjalo ka lehodu bosego; yeo go yona magodimo a tlago go feta ka lesata le legolo ledielemente di tla tologa ka phiso ya mollo, le lefase le mediro yeo e lego go lona di tla fiswa." 
2Peter3:11 Ka ge dilo tse ka moka di feta, le swanetse go ba batho ba mohuta mang tseleng ka moka e kgethwa le borapedi bja Modimo." 
2Peter3:12 Go tsoma le go akgofela go tla ga letsatsi la Modimo, leo go lona magodimo ao a tukago mollo a tlago go hwelela ledielemente di tlo tologa ka phiso ya mollo?" 
2Peter3:13 Eupsa go ya ka kholofetso ya gagwe re letetse magodimo a mafsa le lefase le lefsa leo go lona go dulago toko. 
2Peter3:14 Ka gona, baratiwa, ge le letetse dilo tse bjalo, le katanele gore le hwetswe ka khutso, le se na bosodi, le se na bosodi ke yena." 
2Peter3:15 Le nagane gore go se fele pelo ga Morena wa rena ke pholoso; bjalo ka ge Paulo ngwanabo rena yo a rategago le yena a le ngwaletse go ya ka bohlale bjo a bo filwego; 
2Peter3:16 Go swana le mangwalong a gagwe ka moka ao a bolelago ka dilo tse; yeo go yona dilo tse dingwe go lego thata go di kwesisa, tseo batho bao ba sa rutegago le bao ba sa tsepamago, go swana le Mangwalo a mangwe, ba di pitlaganyago gore ba itshenyege." 
2Peter3:17 Ka gona, lena baratiwa, ka ge le tseba dilo tse e sa le pele, le hlokomele gore le lena le arositswe ke phoso ya ba kgopo, le wele go tia ga lena." 
2Peter3:18 Eupsa gola ka kgaugelo le tsebong ya Morena le Mopholosi wa rena, Jesu Keresete. Letago ke la Yena, bjale le go ya go ile. Amene." 
1John1:1 Seo se bego se le gona go tloga mathomong, seo re se kwelego, seo re se bonego ka mahlo a rena, seo re se bonego lediatla tsa rena di swerwe, sa Lentsu la bophelo;" 
1John1:1 Seo se bego se le gona go tloga mathomong, seo re se kwelego, seo re se bonego ka mahlo a rena, seo re se bonego lediatla tsa rena di swerwe, sa Lentsu la bophelo;" 
1John1:2 (Gobane bophelo bo utolotswe, lere bo bone, lere a le hlatsela le go le bontsha bophelo bjo bo sa felego bjo bo bego bo le go Tate lea re utollwa;)" 
1John1:2 (Gobane bophelo bo utolotswe, lere bo bone, lere a le hlatsela le go le bontsha bophelo bjo bo sa felego bjo bo bego bo le go Tate lea re utollwa;)" 
1John1:3 Seo re se bonego le go se kwa re le botsa sona, gore le lena le be le kopanelo le rena; leka nnete, kopanelo ya rena e le Tate le Morwa wa gagwe, Jesu Keresete." 
1John1:3 Seo re se bonego le go se kwa re le botsa sona, gore le lena le be le kopanelo le rena; leka nnete, kopanelo ya rena e le Tate le Morwa wa gagwe, Jesu Keresete." 
1John1:4 Re le ngwalela dilo tse, gore lethabo la lena le felele." 
1John1:4 Re le ngwalela dilo tse, gore lethabo la lena le felele." 
1John1:5 Ye ke molaetsa wo re o kwelego go yena lere le tsebatsa gore Modimo ke seetsa lega go na leswiswi go yena. 
1John1:5 Ye ke molaetsa wo re o kwelego go yena lere le tsebatsa gore Modimo ke seetsa lega go na leswiswi go yena. 
1John1:6 Ge re re re na le kopanelo le yena lere sepela leswiswing, re bolela maaka lega re dire thereso." 
1John1:6 Ge re re re na le kopanelo le yena lere sepela leswiswing, re bolela maaka lega re dire thereso." 
1John1:7 Eupsa ge re sepela seetseng, bjalo ka ge a le seetseng, re na le kopanelo le yo mongwe le yo mongwe, lemadi a Jesu Keresete, Morwa wa gagwe, a re hlwekisa dibeng ka moka." 
1John1:7 Eupsa ge re sepela seetseng, bjalo ka ge a le seetseng, re na le kopanelo le yo mongwe le yo mongwe, lemadi a Jesu Keresete, Morwa wa gagwe, a re hlwekisa dibeng ka moka." 
1John1:8 Ge re re ga re na sebe, re a iphora, lethereso ga e gona go rena." 
1John1:8 Ge re re ga re na sebe, re a iphora, lethereso ga e gona go rena." 
1John1:9 Ge re ipolela dibe tsa rena, o a botega le go loka go re lebalela dibe tsa rena le go re hlwekisa go se loke ka moka." 
1John1:9 Ge re ipolela dibe tsa rena, o a botega le go loka go re lebalela dibe tsa rena le go re hlwekisa go se loke ka moka." 
1John1:10 Ge re re ga se ra dira sebe, re mo dira moaketsi, lelentsu la gagwe ga le ka go rena." 
1John1:10 Ge re re ga se ra dira sebe, re mo dira moaketsi, lelentsu la gagwe ga le ka go rena." 
1John2:1 Bana ba ka, dilo tse ke le ngwalela tsona gore le se ke la dira sebe. Lege motho a dira sebe, re na le Mmuelli le Tate, Jesu Keresete, Moloki." 
1John2:1 Bana ba ka, dilo tse ke le ngwalela tsona gore le se ke la dira sebe. Lege motho a dira sebe, re na le Mmuelli le Tate, Jesu Keresete, Moloki." 
1John2:2 Leke poelano ya dibe tsa rena, lee sego fela tsa rena, eupsa gape le dibe tsa lefase ka moka." 
1John2:2 Leke poelano ya dibe tsa rena, lee sego fela tsa rena, eupsa gape le dibe tsa lefase ka moka." 
1John2:3 Leka se re tseba gore re a Mo tseba, ge re boloka ditaelo tsa gagwe." 
1John2:3 Leka se re tseba gore re a Mo tseba, ge re boloka ditaelo tsa gagwe." 
1John2:4 Yo a rego: Ke a mo tseba, a sa boloke ditaelo tsa gagwe, ke moaketsi, lethereso ga e go yena." 
1John2:4 Yo a rego: Ke a mo tseba, a sa boloke ditaelo tsa gagwe, ke moaketsi, lethereso ga e go yena." 
1John2:5 Eupsa mang le mang yo a bolokago lentsu la gagwe, lerato la Modimo le phethagetse go yena; ka se re tseba gore re mo go yena." 
1John2:5 Eupsa mang le mang yo a bolokago lentsu la gagwe, lerato la Modimo le phethagetse go yena; ka se re tseba gore re mo go yena." 
1John2:6 Yo a rego o dula go yena o swanetse go sepela bjalo ka ge a be a sepela. 
1John2:6 Yo a rego o dula go yena o swanetse go sepela bjalo ka ge a be a sepela. 
1John2:7 Bana beso, ga ke le ngwalele taelo ye mpsha, eupsa ke taelo ya kgale yeo le bego le na le yona go tloga mathomong. Taelo ya kgale ke lentsu leo le le kwelego go tloga mathomong." 
1John2:7 Bana beso, ga ke le ngwalele taelo ye mpsha, eupsa ke taelo ya kgale yeo le bego le na le yona go tloga mathomong. Taelo ya kgale ke lentsu leo le le kwelego go tloga mathomong." 
1John2:8 Ke le ngwalela gape taelo ye mpsha yeo e lego ya nnete go Yena le go lena, ka gobane leswiswi le fedile leseetsa sa nnete bjale se a phadima." 
1John2:8 Ke le ngwalela gape taelo ye mpsha yeo e lego ya nnete go Yena le go lena, ka gobane leswiswi le fedile leseetsa sa nnete bjale se a phadima." 
1John2:9 Yo a rego o seetseng, a hloile ngwanabo, o lefifing go fihla ga bjale." 
1John2:9 Yo a rego o seetseng, a hloile ngwanabo, o lefifing go fihla ga bjale." 
1John2:10 Yo a ratago ngwanabo o dula seetseng, lega go na lebaka la go kgopsa go yena." 
1John2:10 Yo a ratago ngwanabo o dula seetseng, lega go na lebaka la go kgopsa go yena." 
1John2:11 Eupsa yo a hloilego ngwanabo o leswiswing lea sepela leswiswing lega a tsebe moo a yago gona, ka gobane leswiswi leo le foufaditse mahlo a gagwe." 
1John2:11 Eupsa yo a hloilego ngwanabo o leswiswing lea sepela leswiswing lega a tsebe moo a yago gona, ka gobane leswiswi leo le foufaditse mahlo a gagwe." 
1John2:12 Ke le ngwalela bana ba ka, ka gobane le lebaletswe dibe tsa lena ka baka la leina la gagwe." 
1John2:12 Ke le ngwalela bana ba ka, ka gobane le lebaletswe dibe tsa lena ka baka la leina la gagwe." 
1John2:13 Ke le ngwalela lena botate, ka gobane le tseba Yo a lego gona go tloga mathomong. Ke le ngwalela masogana, ka gobane le fentse Mobe. Ke le ngwalela bana ba ka, gobane le be le tseba Tate."

1John5:11 Bohlatse bjo ke bja gore Modimo o re file bophelo bjo bo sa felego, lebophelo bjo bo ka Morwa wa gagwe." 
1John5:12 Yo a nago le Morwa o na le bophelo; lemang le mang yo a se nago Morwa wa Modimo ga a na bophelo. 
1John5:12 Yo a nago le Morwa o na le bophelo; lemang le mang yo a se nago Morwa wa Modimo ga a na bophelo. 
1John5:13 Se ke se ngwaletse lena bao le dumelago leineng la Morwa wa Modimo; gore le tsebe gore le na le bophelo bjo bo sa felego, le gore le dumele Leineng la Morwa wa Modimo." 
1John5:13 Se ke se ngwaletse lena bao le dumelago leineng la Morwa wa Modimo; gore le tsebe gore le na le bophelo bjo bo sa felego, le gore le dumele Leineng la Morwa wa Modimo." 
1John5:14 Leye ke tshepo ye re nago le yona go yena, gore o a re kwa ge re kgopela se sengwe go ya ka thato ya gagwe." 
1John5:14 Leye ke tshepo ye re nago le yona go yena, gore o a re kwa ge re kgopela se sengwe go ya ka thato ya gagwe." 
1John5:15 Lege re tseba gore O a re kwa, se sengwe le se sengwe seo re se kgopelago, re tseba gore re na le dikgopelo tseo re bego re di kganyoga go yena." 
1John5:15 Lege re tseba gore O a re kwa, se sengwe le se sengwe seo re se kgopelago, re tseba gore re na le dikgopelo tseo re bego re di kganyoga go yena." 
1John5:16 Ge motho a ka bona ngwanabo a dira sebe seo se sa lebisego lehung, a rapele lea mo nee bophelo ka baka la bao ba sa dirego sebe go fihla lehung. Go na le sebe seo se isago lehung, ga ke re o tla se rapelela." 
1John5:16 Ge motho a ka bona ngwanabo a dira sebe seo se sa lebisego lehung, a rapele lea mo nee bophelo ka baka la bao ba sa dirego sebe go fihla lehung. Go na le sebe seo se isago lehung, ga ke re o tla se rapelela." 
1John5:17 Go se loke ka moka ke sebe, lega go na sebe seo se isago lehung." 
1John5:17 Go se loke ka moka ke sebe, lega go na sebe seo se isago lehung." 
1John5:18 Re a tseba gore yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a belegwego ke Modimo ga a dire sebe; eupsa yo a belegwego ke Modimo o a itlhokomela, leyo mobe ga a mo kgwathe." 
1John5:18 Re a tseba gore yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a belegwego ke Modimo ga a dire sebe; eupsa yo a belegwego ke Modimo o a itlhokomela, leyo mobe ga a mo kgwathe." 
1John5:19 Lere a tseba gore re ba Modimo, lelefase ka moka le rapaletse bokgopong." 
1John5:19 Lere a tseba gore re ba Modimo, lelefase ka moka le rapaletse bokgopong." 
1John5:20 Lere a tseba gore Morwa wa Modimo o tlile lea re fa kwesiso, gore re tsebe Motho wa Thereso, lere le go Yo wa Thereso, e lego Morwa wa gagwe Jesu Keresete. Ye ke Modimo wa nnete, le bophelo bjo bo sa felego." 
1John5:20 Lere a tseba gore Morwa wa Modimo o tlile lea re fa kwesiso, gore re tsebe Motho wa Thereso, lere le go Yo wa Thereso, e lego Morwa wa gagwe Jesu Keresete. Ye ke Modimo wa nnete, le bophelo bjo bo sa felego."
